078.text: You wrestle the sentient to the ground, nearly burning your hands on their scalding hot husk. The sentient begs for mercy, asking you to rescue them from captivity. Gain 3 help[/b] and continue.

780.text: You notice movement in the bushes, so you set a basic trap and wait for it to spring. Set 1 challenge die to time, morale, or health to represent the trap (read options below). Then roll 3 other challenge dice; if any of them match the set die, gain the resulting benefit once (if none match, gain 1 overpower[/b] instead). These dice can come from the dice pool or the center; return them afterward.

choices.option: TIME (try to study an animal’s behavior)
choices.outcome: You observe the critter for a little while before setting it free. Gain 1 boost on your character and 1 boost on each wood card.

choices.option: MORALE (try to gain an animal companion)
choices.outcome: The animal is scared but complacent. You will have to work to gain its trust. Gain animal 1221[/b].

choices.option: HEALTH (try to kill and eat an animal)
choices.outcome: The trap instantly kills the animal. Gain item 1217[/b].

781.action: SUBDUE[/b] the offensive sentient on the right
781.text: As you pin them down, the other sentient plucks a large metal plate from their grasp. They thank you with hefty reward and heaps of praise. Gain $10 and 1 morale.

choices.outcome: The sentient is easily overcome. Gain $5.

choices.option: Attack the purple sentient on the ledge
choices.outcome: They are focused on the green sentient, and you catch them off guard. They promise to leave the other sentient alone, and you send them dashing away in fear. Relieved, the green sentient communicates to you in a series of scents that somehow make sense to you. They were being chased, and you saved them. They offer to join you as a friend. Gain sentient 1353[/b].

783.action: DUEL[/b] the sentient in a card and dice game
783.text: The gold sentient’s eyes light up at the prospect of playing their favorite game. Place card 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card 1521[/b] as the opponent’s card.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

784.text: The stone crashes to the ground, much to the dismay of sentients in the area. Despite the disrespectful act, you’re happy to see an ornate wand shining from the dust. Gain item 981[/b] and curse 1388[/b].

785.action: TARGET[/b] the sentients on the bridge
785.text: The crowded bridge makes for an easy target… though so do you. You’re pelted with stones from above. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 move[/b]. You dart under the bridge and find a quiet path running along the base of the city wall. Go northeast to 389[/b].

786.action: CHARGE[/b] past the guards and don’t stop until you can no longer hear them
786.text: The guards apparently rely on intimidation and not on speed. Go to interior 591[/b].

787.action: SHOVE[/b] the sentient as they zoom by
787.text: You send the sentient sprawling over the cobblestone street, and they skid to a stop against a building. They glare at you, but they seem to have dislocated something, as they make no move to defend themselves. Choose one:

choices.option: Rip a device off their belt
choices.outcome: Gain item 860[/b] and curse 1391[/b].

choices.option: Apologize and reset their dislocated joint
choices.outcome: They thank you profusely and offer to share a copy of the map they’re planning to steal. They rush away to the north, and a few minutes later they return with a map. Gain item 1264[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 21 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region I).

788.text: The sentient is not impressed with your use of brute force, but you still gain item 1264[/b].

789.text: A merchant like this isn’t trained in the art of combat, and you quickly overwhelm them. “Please,” they beg, “take these coins and leave me be.” Gain $8.

079.action: SHOVE[/b] a boulder from its axis
079.text: The boulder crashes into another boulder, causing a domino effect of destruction. When the dust clears, you have a clear path to the base of the pillar. Go deeper into the planet to cave 046[/b].

790.text: A nice rope on the tree caught your eye, and now it’s yours. Gain item 901[/b].

791.text: The vines wrap around every inch of the ship, including the blinking radio and the cryogenic chambers. You slice through the radio, and the signal goes dead. You have cut off the signal that led you to this planet. Gain item 1181[/b] and exit to 732[/b].

795.text: You smash through the glass to your right, grabbing the sentient and slamming them to the ground. Caught completely off guard, they surrender and beg for mercy, offering you their weapon in return. Gain item 1153[/b] and exit to 281[/b].

799.action: DIG[/b] out from under the building
799.text: You dig through bones, sand, and water to reach safety. Gain 1 health and exit to 346[/b].

080.text: You wrestle the sentient to the ground, knocking the blowtorch from their grasp. The molten gold is too hot to touch, so you claim the tool instead. Gain item 870[/b].

801.action: RAID[/b] the sky island of the shard
801.text: You swagger across the island as if you own the place and grab the shard. Gain item 1707[/b].

081.action: DIG[/b] through the glowing dead end in the rear of the cavern
081.text: Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon 015[/b]; keep this location for reference.

082.text: Wielding a cold stalagmite, you shatter the ice, brittle shards spraying across the cavern. The crystal breaks free, but the stream is no longer passable. Gain item 1160[/b]; you may no longer move north from this location.

083.action: DIG[/b] through the glowing dead end in the rear of the cavern
083.text: Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon 016[/b]; keep this location for reference.

084.action: TARGET[/b] a small yellow crystal growing on the ceiling of the cavern
084.text: Your aim rings true, and you catch the crystal as it falls. Gain item 1164[/b] and 1 random skill. You may continue with the move-BALANCE[/b][/b] action.

085.text: Find card 797[/b] (it’s a large card), which shows a bracket of 8 fighters. You will take the place of the fighter in the bottom right (use X instead of 1; ignore the coin multipliers). The numbers in hexes represent each fighter’s strength (the number of skill dice the fighter will roll in each head-to-head bout). Run the tournament by rolling skill dice for each fighter and comparing the results. The winner of each bout is the fighter with more overpower[/b] results (the fighter with the lower strength breaks ties thanks to crowd support). If you lose a bout, you’re out of the tournament. When the tournament ends, win or lose, read entry 085[/b] in the Book of Secrets.

086.action: DISLODGE[/b] the crystal from the magma stream
086.text: You knock the crystal free of the deadly magma, and it floats over to you. Gain item 1162[/b].

087.text: With a mighty roar, you slash your way through the mine, cutting free bewildered workers and upending guards. You grab a pickaxe and follow a group of miners deeper into the planet. Gain item 896[/b] and go deeper into the planet to cave 049[/b].

870.text: Choose one: Refresh 1 challenge die from your grid, gain 1 look[/b], or add 1 boost to an egg. Also, if you have a wood resource (1180[/b]), you may lose it to gain a bramble torch (1084[/b]).

872.action: CLEAVE[/b] a stone (if on a location with nearby rocks)

873.text: Choose one: Refresh 1 challenge die from your grid, gain 1 look[/b], or add 1 boost to an egg. Also, if you have a wood resource (1180[/b]), you may lose it to gain a bramble torch (1084[/b]).

088.action: DIG[/b] through the glowing sediment to the right
088.text: Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon 017[/b]; keep this location for reference.

089.action: DIG[/b] through the glowing dead end in the rear of the cavern
089.text: The soil breaks away easily, revealing a deeper area to explore. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon 018[/b]; keep this location for reference.

090.action: DIG[/b] through the piles of treasure
090.text: As you scoop aside jewelry and coins, you find a hidden doorway. You may open it; if you do, advance deeper into the planet to dungeon 593[/b]; keep this location for reference.

091.text: The chest bursts open; gain item 1036[/b] and 1 boost. Unfortunately, the noise attracts the attention of the nearby serpent, which slithers toward you at breakneck speed. You must immediately perform one of these actions:

choices.outcome: Go to cave 031[/b].

When you defeat the monster, you find a large seed (gain item 1020[/b]) gleaming from the broken chest nearby. As you pick it up, you notice a passage leading deeper into the planet. You may go to dungeon 594[/b] (keep this location for reference) or go back to cave 031[/b].

910.action: FISH[/b] for food (use only on a location with water)
910.text: Roll 3 skill dice up to 3 times (always rolling all dice); roll 1 extra die per boost you pay from this trap, plus 1 extra die if you pay a maximum of 1 boost from a food or flora. Based on number of overpower[/b] in the final results, gain the following:

choices.outcome: You don’t catch anything other than a brief glimpse of fish. Gain 1 boost.
Catch a small but savory fish; gain 1 health.
Catch a medium-sized fish; gain 1 health and 1 boost.
Catch a large fish; gain item 1226[/b].
Catch a monstrosity; gain item 1232[/b].

911.action: FISH[/b] for food (use only on a location with water)
911.text: Roll 3 skill dice up to 3 times (always rolling all dice); roll 1 extra die per boost you pay from this net, plus 1 extra die if you pay a maximum of 1 boost from a food or flora. Based on number of overpower[/b] in the final results, gain the following:

choices.outcome: You don’t catch anything other than a brief glimpse of fish. Gain 1 boost.
Catch a small but savory fish; gain 1 health.
Catch a medium-sized fish; gain 1 health and 1 boost.
Catch a large fish; gain item 1226[/b].
Catch a monstrosity; gain item 1232[/b].

912.action: FISH[/b] for food (use only on a location with water)
912.text: Roll 3 skill dice up to 3 times (always rolling all dice); roll 1 extra die per boost you pay from this trap, plus 1 extra die if you pay a maximum of 1 boost from a food or flora. Based on number of overpower[/b] in the final results, gain the following:

choices.outcome: You don’t catch anything other than a brief glimpse of fish. Gain 1 boost.
Catch a small but savory fish; gain 1 health.
Catch a medium-sized fish; gain 1 health and 1 boost.
Catch a large fish; gain item 1226[/b].
Catch a monstrosity; gain item 1232[/b].

913.action: FISH[/b] for food (use only on a location with water)
913.text: Roll 3 skill dice up to 3 times (always rolling all dice); roll 1 extra die per boost you pay from this lure, plus 1 extra die if you pay a maximum of 1 boost from a food or flora. Based on number of overpower[/b] in the final results, gain the following:

choices.outcome: You don’t catch anything other than a brief glimpse of fish. Gain 1 boost.
Catch a small but savory fish; gain 1 health.
Catch a medium-sized fish; gain 1 health and 1 boost.
Catch a large fish; gain item 1226[/b].
Catch a monstrosity; gain item 1232[/b].

092.text: Crystal shards float free of the pedestal. Gain item 1165[/b].

921.action: FISH[/b] for food (use only on a location with water)
921.text: Roll 3 skill dice up to 3 times (always rolling all dice); roll 1 extra die per boost you pay from this pole, plus 1 extra die if you pay a maximum of 1 boost from a food or flora. Based on number of overpower[/b] in the final results, gain the following:

choices.outcome: You don’t catch anything other than a brief glimpse of fish. Gain 1 boost.
Catch a small but savory fish; gain 1 health.
Catch a medium-sized fish; gain 1 health and 1 boost.
Catch a large fish; gain item 1226[/b].
Catch a monstrosity; gain item 1232[/b].

923.text: You set a basic trap and wait for it to spring. Set 1 challenge die to time, morale, or health to represent the trap (read options below). Then roll 3 other challenge dice; if any of them match the set die, gain the resulting benefit once (if none match, gain 1 overpower[/b] instead). These dice can come from the dice pool or the center; return them afterward.

choices.option: TIME (try to study an animal’s behavior)
choices.outcome: You observe the critter for a little while before setting it free. Gain 1 boost on your character and 1 boost on each animal card.

choices.option: MORALE (try to gain an animal companion)
choices.outcome: The animal is scared but complacent. You will have to work to gain its trust. Gain animal 810[/b], 813[/b], or 829[/b], then lose the trap card unless you pay 1 help[/b].

choices.option: HEALTH (try to kill and eat an animal)
choices.outcome: The trap instantly kills the animal. Gain item 1217[/b].

926.text: Set 1 challenge die to time, morale, or health to represent the trap (read options below). Then roll 3 other challenge dice; if any of them match the set die, gain the resulting benefit once (if none match, gain 1 overpower[/b] instead). These dice can come from the dice pool or the center; return them afterward.

choices.option: TIME (try to study an animal’s behavior)
choices.outcome: You observe the critter for a little while before setting it free. Gain 1 boost on your character and 1 boost on each animal card.

choices.option: MORALE (try to gain an animal companion)
choices.outcome: The animal is scared but complacent. You will have to work to gain its trust. Gain animal 819[/b], 825[/b], or 827[/b], then lose the trap card unless you pay 1 help[/b].

choices.option: HEALTH (try to kill and eat an animal)
choices.outcome: The trap instantly kills the animal. Gain item 1217[/b].

093.action: CLEAVE[/b] your way through the maze
093.text: You proceed through the maze, cleaving open any barriers that get in your way. Go deeper into the planet to cave 043[/b].

932.action: FISH[/b] for food (use only on a location with water)
932.text: Roll 3 skill dice up to 3 times (always rolling all dice); roll 1 extra die per boost you pay from this trap, plus 1 extra die if you pay a maximum of 1 boost from a food or flora. Based on number of overpower[/b] in the final results, gain the following:

choices.outcome: You don’t catch anything other than a brief glimpse of fish. Gain 1 boost.
Catch a small but savory fish; gain 1 health.
Catch a medium-sized fish; gain 1 health and 1 boost.
Catch a large fish; gain item 1226[/b].
Catch a monstrosity; gain item 1232[/b].

094.action: DIG[/b] through a crumbling rock wall on the outskirts of the city
094.text: Move deeper into the planet to dungeon 595[/b]; keep this location for reference.

947.text: You set a basic trap and wait for it to spring. Set 1 challenge die to time, morale, or health to represent the trap (read options below). Then roll 3 other challenge dice; if any of them match the set die, gain the resulting benefit once (if none match, gain 1 overpower[/b] instead). These dice can come from the dice pool or the center; return them afterward.

choices.option: TIME (try to study an animal’s behavior)
choices.outcome: You observe the critter for a little while before setting it free. Gain 1 boost on your character and 1 boost on each animal card.

choices.option: MORALE (try to gain an animal companion)
choices.outcome: The animal is scared but complacent. You will have to work to gain its trust. Gain animal 821[/b], 824[/b], or 854[/b], then lose the trap card unless you pay 1 help[/b].

choices.option: HEALTH (try to kill and eat an animal)
choices.outcome: The trap instantly kills the animal. Gain item 1217[/b].

095.action: BURN[/b] the eggs before they hatch
095.text: You guiltily admit that the smell of fried eggs makes your stomach growl. Then you realize it’s not just your stomach that’s growling—a massive animal has emerged from the cave. You must immediately perform one of these actions:

choices.outcome: Go to cave 035[/b].

The fleshy, long-limbed animal collapses to the cavern floor, and you grab a yellow crystal from its carcass (item 1164[/b]). The light from the crystal reveals a passage leading from the back of the cave. Proceed deeper into the planet to dungeon 596[/b]; keep this location for reference.

096.text: An epic battle ensues, and a part of you feels bad for the creature of legend as you strike the final blow. You’re excited about the treasure you find deep in the cave, though; gain item 1045[/b]. If you pay 1 boost, also gain item 1160[/b] from the carcass.

962.text: Choose one: Refresh 1 challenge die from your grid, gain 1 look[/b], or add 1 boost to an egg. Also, if you have a wood resource (1180[/b]), you may lose it to gain a bramble torch (1084[/b]).

097.text: With reckless abandon, you unleash fury onto the devices, leaving behind a trail of circuits, panels, and wires. The toxic energy subsides, replaced with a far more powerful substance. Gain item 865[/b] and 1 morale. Ignore further hypoxia damage on this location from now on.

098.action: CUT[/b] a vine free and swing forward
098.text: You skip the labyrinth and create your own route through the cavern, swinging from vine to vine. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave 044[/b].

099.action: FLEX[/b] to the group by standing under the boulder and pretending to hold it above your head
099.text: The sentients laugh at your antics, but soon everyone is trying to do the same thing. Gain 1 morale and continue.

100.text: The sentient eagerly agrees before you even complete your request. Gain sentient 1351[/b].

101.text: The large insect is incredibly fast, and it makes a game of dodging you. It sidles next to you when it understands that you’re willing to indulge its whims in a playful, non-aggressive way. Gain animal 853[/b].

102.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1169[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1207[/b]. Otherwise, the chest snaps shut on your finger; lose 1 health and gain 1 boost.

103.text: The animals back away in fear as you rummage through their tent. Go to interior 549[/b].

1034.text: You open the package, eager to see what’s inside. Roll a skill die to determine the contents of the package:After you have dismantled the package, lose item 1034[/b].

choices.outcome: A large insect leaps out of the package, its talons slashing into your shoulder before attempting to scamper away. Lose 1 health. Then roll 3 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. If you pay 1 move[/b], you dash after the beast and capture it (gain animal 1221[/b]). Otherwise, the insect escapes and you gain 1 boost.
Gain a jet pack (1253[/b]).

Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions).
Gain a turvy fir (1056[/b]).
Gain curse 1387[/b] and $5.
Gain a glass arrow (1413[/b]).

104.action: CONSUME[/b] a piece of fresh fruit
104.text: As you reach for the fruit, the animal vanishes into thin air. You have a few seconds to study the details of your current location before there’s a flurry of movement in the grove, then the trap door slams shut. Go to 511[/b] and continue.

1046.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1046.text: The future flashes in your mind’s eye. Roll 2 challenge dice. You may continue; if you do, count those 2 dice against the total dice to be rolled for the new action. Otherwise, place the dice in the center (ignore the results) and gain 1 boost on this flora.

1047.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1047.text: You burst into uncontrollable, contagious laughter. You may continue; if you do, gain 1 engage[/b]. Otherwise, gain 1 morale.

1048.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1048.text: You feel energized beyond what you would call natural. Gain lesson 1424[/b]. You may continue; if you do, gain 1 look[/b].

1049.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1049.text: A few seconds after eating the petal, you look down at your hands to see that they’re translucent—you can see right through them! You may continue; if you do, ignore 1 challenge die result. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

105.text: The beast pecks at you as you secure one of its legs so it can’t fly away. Gain animal 803[/b].

1050.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1050.text: You feel something awaken deep inside of you, like one of your organs was operating suboptimally and now it’s reawakened. You may continue with a help[/b] action, ignoring any health results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1051.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1051.text: As the petal melts in your mouth, the absurd tangle of bones casts a shadow that tells of possible futures. Roll 3 skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the selected skill.

1052.action: CONSUME[/b] the contents of a bulb
1052.text: The brown bulb bursts open to reveal at least a liter of cool, clear water. You may continue with an overpower[/b] action, ignoring any health results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1053.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1053.text: Your mind springs to life, opening to possibilities previously beyond your comprehension. Gain lesson 1419[/b]. You may continue; if you do, gain 1 engage[/b].

1054.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1054.text: Your body becomes buoyant enough to walk briefly on water. You may continue with a move[/b] action across water, reducing the cost to 1. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1055.text: You avoid the razor-sharp petals, pinching free a berry and tossing it in your mouth. You may continue with a different take[/b] action, reducing the cost by half (round up the new cost). Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1056.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny patch of soft needles from the bush
1056.text: You discover that the turvy fir is crawling with insects—that’s why so many birds are attracted to it. Choose one:

choices.option: Swallow the needles, insects and all
choices.outcome: Once you get past the earthy taste, you find that the insects are full of protein. You’re proud of yourself for trying something different. Gain 1 health; you may continue with a take[/b] action, ignoring all morale results on challenge dice.
Gain 1 boost.

1058.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1058.text: Even the slightest nibble sends the tree into a blind rage. Refresh all challenge dice from adjacent cards and lose 1 health.

1059.text: The berry is plump and delicious, and you immediately feel a surge of adrenaline. You may continue with an overpower[/b] action, ignoring any time results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

106.action: SIPHON[/b] the essence of the stone
106.text: You don’t really know what you’re doing, but your instincts lead you to reach into the gateway and tug the diaphanous membrane into your mind. When you do, all goes black. You wake up on the moss with a throbbing headache, but also a newfound potential. Lose 1 health, gain lesson 1428[/b], and gain 1 boost.

1060.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1060.text: As you chew on the torch grass, a warm sensation spreads from your mouth throughout your body. You may continue, ignoring cold damage during your next action. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1061.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1061.text: The kelp tastes strongly of blood. You fight through the flavor, hoping that you don’t develop vampiric tendencies. You may remove a boost from a sentient in your grid; if you do, gain 1 health and 1 overpower[/b]. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1062.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1062.text: Your entire body begins to glow, illuminating the surrounding area with perfect clarity. You may continue with a look[/b] action, changing the result of 1 challenge die to another die face. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1063.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1063.text: The flower has a salty, acidic taste, and it leaves welts on your tongue. Gain 1 boost; unless you continue, lose 1 health.

1064.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1064.text: As you chew on the petal, you feel an instant boost to your memory. You may continue; if you do, gain 1 boost on your character and 1 random skill. Otherwise, gain 1 boost here.

1065.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1065.text: If you’re on a location with a cold arrival penalty, suffer 1 cold damage. Otherwise, you may either continue and ignore heat damage during your next action, or gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1066.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1066.text: Your sense of sight is temporarily heightened. You may continue with a move[/b] action; if you do, first look at all adjacent listed locations. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1067.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1067.text: The vibrant flower creates the sensation of tiny fireworks in your mouth. You’re overwhelmed with a passion for life and a desire to connect. You may continue with an engage[/b] action, ignoring all time results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1068.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1068.text: You feel a surge of strength from the spicy flower. You may continue with an overpower[/b] action; if you do, you may reroll any challenge dice once. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1069.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1069.text: As you chew on the molten petals, your skin temporarily grows a solid-yet-flexible crust. You may continue, ignoring all health results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

107.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1026[/b] and 2 boost.

1070.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1070.text: The golden leaf melts on your tongue, and for at least a few moments you feel 10 years younger. You may continue; if you do, first refresh all dice from your character card. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1071.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1071.text: You instantly regret the choice—this is not an edible flower. Lose 1 health and gain 1 boost; you may continue.

1072.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1072.text: You conceive the spark of an idea. You may continue; if you do, choose 1 skill, roll 4 skill dice, and gain all results matching the chosen skill. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1073.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1073.text: A strong sense of courage surges through you, and you’re ready to throw caution to the wind. You may continue, ignoring all morale results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1074.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1074.text: You avoid the sizzling ends of the flora and eat one of the dark purple flowers. You may continue with a look[/b] action, on the initial roll ignoring all time results and rerolling all morale results. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1075.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1075.text: The flower gives the inside of your mouth a small static shock from its stored energy. Gain 1 boost. You may continue; if you do, you may first move any number of boost from here to your other cards.

1076.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1076.text: You’re overwhelmed with a strong sense of empathy for the world around you. You may continue with a help[/b] action; if you do, decrease the cost by up to 2 available help[/b] skills (without anyone spending them). Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1077.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1077.text: The bark tastes like the burnt end barbecue pork your grandfather claimed to make, even though you knew he was buying it from a local restaurant. It explodes with flavor. You may continue; if you do, roll 3 skill dice, and if there are any engage[/b] results, keep them and roll 3 skill dice again (repeat until you don’t roll any engage[/b]). Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1078.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1078.text: As soon as the flower touches your lips, you know it was a bad idea. Your lips and mouth become numb and your vision grows blurry. You collapse on the ground. Lose 1 time and gain 1 boost.

1079.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1079.text: As you chew the crisp leaf, you feel your fingers and feet grip your surroundings in a remarkable way. You may continue with a move[/b] action; if you do, before you roll, choose a type of result to ignore. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

108.text: You nimbly-yet-quietly spring into the grove and snatch the shield. Gain item 939[/b]. The surrounding mushrooms erupt, spewing lava in your path. In an attempt to avoid the scalding liquid, roll 4 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 move[/b].

1080.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1080.text: Your eyes lose focus for a moment, and after you blink a few times, you realize that you can see exponentially farther than before. Before the effects wear off, you may look at an adjacent location (you may reference the depart storybook). Continue.

1081.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1081.text: The leaf melts on your tongue, and suddenly you feel your body rise a few centimeters off the ground—you’re levitating! You may continue with a move[/b] action, ignoring all morale results. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1082.action: CONSUME[/b] a tiny taste of the flora
1082.text: The mushroom is dripping a gooey, hot, sap-like substance, so you dip your finger and lick it. The flavor is a little spicy, and even your finger tingles from contact with the substance. You may continue with a different take[/b] action; if you do, you may reroll any challenge dice once. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

109.text: The sentient waits patiently while you empty their pockets, extracting a pack of herbs. When it’s clear that you’ve missed some coins, the sentient hands them to you too, complimenting your skills as a petty thief. Gain flora 1075[/b] and $3.

110.text: The animal attempts to bite you. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 move[/b]. Gain animal 845[/b].

111.text: Large shards of the shattered orb are scattered on the ground. Gain item 1194[/b].

112.text: As happy as the animal is to have company, it doesn’t like being trapped. Gain animal 851[/b].

113.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

1136.action: CONSUME[/b] a nibble of the mushroom (pay 1 boost from this card)
1136.text: Eating strange mushrooms is always a roll of the dice, so roll 2 skill dice. If either result is overpower[/b], lose 1 health. For any other result, gain 1 health. Also, if the result is a pair (other than overpower[/b]), you may refresh all challenge dice and continue.

115.action: ACCESS[/b] the building via a forgotten side door
115.text: The rusty lock takes some convincing, but the door eventually swings open. Go to interior 553[/b].

116.action: BATHE[/b] in the swiftly flowing water
116.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

117.action: EXTRACT[/b] either the crystal or the rowboat
117.text: Gain 3 random skills, then choose one:

choices.option: Extract the crystal from its invisible tether (pay a total of 1 look, 1 engage, 2 help, and 1 overpower)
choices.outcome: Gain item 1011[/b]. Each player who contributed at least 1 skill gains 1 time, 1 morale, and 1 health.
Gain vehicle 1014[/b].

choices.option: Suffer but try again (pay 1 time, 1 morale, and 1 health)
choices.outcome: Without the sacrifice of skills, the dark magic of the crystal resists the extraction but finally succumbs to your efforts. You are drained but successful. Gain item 1011[/b].

118.action: GRAB[/b] the animal as it flies by
118.text: You time your attempt perfectly, and the scaled creature goes limp as your arms wrap around it. Gain animal 804[/b].

119.text: Your eyes lose focus for a moment, and after you blink a few times, you realize that you can see exponentially farther than before. Before the effects wear off, you may look at an adjacent location (north is 124[/b] and south is 114[/b]). Continue.

012.action: STEAL[/b] the shiny pile of coins
012.text: You can’t resist the glimmer of gold. Gain $10 and exit to 649[/b].

120.action: SCAVENGE[/b] for a loose board on the dock
120.text: You pry off an old but serviceable plank. Gain item 1180[/b].

121.text: You quietly push off into open water, careful to ensure the owner of the boat doesn’t see you. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and $4.

122.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item 1178[/b].

1224.action: CONSUME[/b] some fruit (pay 1 boost from this card)
1224.text: The fruit is refreshing and delicious. Gain 1 health.

123.action: HACK[/b] the obelisks to show your location to your companions
123.text: The device is made to transmit information beyond this planet, including visuals. So you hack it to project a map of this part of the world into the sky. Open the Book of Vantages to page 4 so all players can see it; you are at the bottom of the NE-4 quadrant. Gain ability 1472[/b], 1 morale, and 1 boost.

124.action: HACK[/b] the security system so it views you as a metal sentient
124.text: Gain ability 1472[/b] and go to interior 554[/b].

125.action: GATHER[/b] intel about the correct tunnel
125.text: You piece together some information from the entrance to the tunnels and the surrounding sentients, who have gathered to watch you attempt the puzzle. For your next location action here, decrease the cost by X.

126.text: The heat singes your fingers as you handle the chest (suffer 1 heat damage). Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1164[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 895[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

1265.action: BATHE[/b] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1265.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1266.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the resources necessary to make food

1267.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the resources necessary to make armor

1268.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the resources necessary to make medicine

1269.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the resources necessary to make weapons

127.action: SCAVENGE[/b] for lost items in the dirt near the lorestones
127.text: You mostly find tiny trinkets and tokens at the base of the lorestones from other visitors; out of respect, you leave them on the ground. You can’t resist picking up a flag that has fallen into the mud, along with some coins. Gain item 1188[/b] and $2.

1270.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the knowledge necessary to make maps

1271.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the knowledge necessary to design games

1272.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the resources necessary to make beverages

1273.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the resources necessary to make wind items

1274.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the mediation skills necessary to run the embassy

1275.action: WISH[/b] for fortune (pay 1 boost from this structure; perform this action at most once per game)

1276.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a few distracted sentients in the audience
1276.text: The sentients are rapt in the drama of the performance. Gain $X.

1277.text: One particular sentient is a nuisance to other customers, so you twist their words in such a way that they end up sleeping on the haystacks and you gain their mode of transportation, a skywhale. Gain animal 840[/b].

1278.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the resources necessary to make garments

1279.action: FORAGE[/b] for treats to better care for animals

128.text: Despite their strength and combat skills, you remove the sword from their grasp and let its power flow into you until it recognizes you as its rightful owner. Gain item 1005[/b] and perform no other location actions here.

1280.action: GATHER[/b] information to better serve your school
1280.text: For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

1281.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item 1178[/b].

1282.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the resources necessary to make vehicles

1283.action: BATHE[/b] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1283.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1284.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the resources necessary to make accessories

1285.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the resources necessary to maintain the ideal temperature

1286.action: GATHER[/b] intel about the surrounding area
1286.text: For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

1287.action: EXTRACT[/b] a small crystal from the attached crystal cave
1287.text: Roll a skill die and gain the corresponding crystal: move[/b] (1160[/b]), look[/b] (1161[/b]), engage[/b] (1162[/b]), help[/b] (1163[/b]), take[/b] (1164[/b]), overpower[/b] (1165[/b]).

1288.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the resources necessary to grow these dangerous plants

1289.action: BATHE[/b] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1289.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

129.text: You can see a green light emitting from inside the spire, so you find a loose rock and wiggle inside. Gain ability 1511[/b] and go to interior 555[/b].

1290.action: BATHE[/b] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1290.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1291.action: ACQUIRE[/b] the resources necessary to grow these rare plants

1292.action: ACQUIRE[/b] a map of the world’s cities
1292.text: A sentient, oblivious to your plans, sketches a map of the world’s cities and towns. Gain item 1251[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location (find your region in the look[/b] storybook, then view page 9 in the Book of Vantages).

013.action: STEAL[/b] the most beautiful item from the hostel
013.text: The nicely crafted flint catches your eye; gain item 1128[/b]. Then exit to 719[/b].

130.text: Choose which sentient’s dice to steal:

choices.outcome: Gain item 924[/b].
There’s nothing special about these dice. Gain 1 boost.

1305.action: SWINDLE[/b] the sentient (perform this action at most once per game)

choices.option: Fool the wind sentient into believing that you’re raising funds to throw a massive party
choices.outcome: Gain $4.

choices.option: Perfectly execute a long con involving a stolen identity, a bait-and-switch, and a big twist at the end (lose 1 time)
choices.outcome: Gain $7.

choices.option: Convince the wind sentient that you saw a tornado just around the corner and they should let you hold their coin purse while they check it out
choices.outcome: Lose the sentient and gain $10.

1306.action: SWINDLE[/b] the sentient (perform this action at most once per game)

choices.option: Fool the wind sentient into believing that you’re raising funds to throw a massive party
choices.outcome: Gain $4.

choices.option: Perfectly execute a long con involving a stolen identity, a bait-and-switch, and a big twist at the end (lose 1 time)
choices.outcome: Gain $7.

choices.option: Convince the wind sentient that you saw a tornado just around the corner and they should let you hold their coin purse while they check it out
choices.outcome: Lose the sentient and gain $10.

1307.action: SWINDLE[/b] the sentient (perform this action at most once per game)

choices.option: Fool the wind sentient into believing that you’re raising funds to throw a massive party
choices.outcome: Gain $4.

choices.option: Perfectly execute a long con involving a stolen identity, a bait-and-switch, and a big twist at the end (lose 1 time)
choices.outcome: Gain $7.

choices.option: Convince the wind sentient that you saw a tornado just around the corner and they should let you hold their coin purse while they check it out
choices.outcome: Lose the sentient and gain $10.

1308.action: SWINDLE[/b] the sentient (perform this action at most once per game)

choices.option: Fool the wind sentient into believing that you’re raising funds to throw a massive party
choices.outcome: Gain $4.

choices.option: Perfectly execute a long con involving a stolen identity, a bait-and-switch, and a big twist at the end (lose 1 time)
choices.outcome: Gain $7.

choices.option: Convince the wind sentient that you saw a tornado just around the corner and they should let you hold their coin purse while they check it out
choices.outcome: Lose the sentient and gain $10.

1309.action: SWINDLE[/b] the sentient (perform this action at most once per game)

choices.option: Fool the wind sentient into believing that you’re raising funds to throw a massive party
choices.outcome: Gain $4.

choices.option: Perfectly execute a long con involving a stolen identity, a bait-and-switch, and a big twist at the end (lose 1 time)
choices.outcome: Gain $7.

choices.option: Convince the wind sentient that you saw a tornado just around the corner and they should let you hold their coin purse while they check it out
choices.outcome: Lose the sentient and gain $10.

131.action: GRAB[/b] your choice of the tent or a torch from the fire and scamper away
131.text: Gain either the tent (1032[/b]) or a torch (1041[/b]).

1310.action: SWINDLE[/b] the sentient (perform this action at most once per game)

choices.option: Fool the sentient into believing that you’re raising funds to create an ice machine to expand the reach of heat-sensitive circuitry
choices.outcome: Gain $9.

choices.option: Perfectly execute a long con involving a stolen identity, a bait-and-switch, and a big twist at the end (lose 1 time)
choices.outcome: Gain $14.

choices.option: Convince the sentient that you saw a gold sentient pillaging a nearby connection port and they should let you hold their coin purse while they check it out
choices.outcome: Lose the sentient and gain $19.

1311.action: SWINDLE[/b] the sentient (perform this action at most once per game)

137.text: You don’t settle for a good bone—you find a great one! Gain item 1186[/b].

138.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

139.action: SCAVENGE[/b] for lost items in the moss near the stone
139.text: Your fingernails are caked in dirt by the time you locate some coins. Gain $5.

140.action: BATHE[/b] in the calm, clear water
140.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

141.text: You take a beautiful piece of ivory from the skeleton. Gain item 1186[/b].

142.action: SCAVENGE[/b] the ship for anything of use
142.text: Within the ship you find a basic item. Randomize items 1299[/b]–1304[/b] not in any player’s grid or reserve and gain 1 at random; if none are available, instead gain 1 health from a nutritional pod.

143.action: SALVAGE[/b] spare parts from the wreckage
143.text: Gain either some metal scraps (1184[/b]) or a circuit board (1190[/b]).

144.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] the sentient while pretending to greet them
144.text: The sentient apparently mistakes your quick hand motion for part of your greeting gesture and doesn’t notice that you’ve pilfered some of their coins. Gain $X; you may continue.

145.text: You sit in the rocky cradle, basking in the glow of the sentient. Gain 2 health.

1453.action: SWAP[/b] back to your original body
1453.text: The sentient is grateful for the opportunity to walk in your footsteps. Replace card 1453[/b] with your previous character card and gain 1 morale.

146.text: The sentient agrees to join on the condition that you travel southwest. If you agree, gain sentient 1329[/b] and go southwest to 140[/b].

147.text: Aside from the birds flying overhead, there isn’t much to see here. But around you there’s a wealth of interesting places: a city to the north, wreckage to the south, and a glowing sentient to the west. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

148.text: You toss a stone into the water. When it plunks into the sea with a satisfying splash, a massive dark shape under the surface shifts toward it. The beast then grows still, drifting to the west for tastier prey. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

149.text: “If someday you decide to leave this lush planet, use towers like those to the southwest to send a signal to those searching for you.” For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Also gain destiny 1598[/b] (place it in the center) and continue.

1490.action: HIJACK[/b] a boat, a hailed ride, a runecaster, or a city building on your location
1490.text: Choose based on what you can see on your location:

choices.outcome: Gain the rowboat (1014[/b]) or the sailboat (1156[/b]). If it’s a different type of boat, instead gain 1 take[/b] and continue.

choices.option: A hailed ride (if your previous action was HAIL)
choices.outcome: Gain a sailboat (1156[/b]).
Gain a runecaster of the corresponding color: blue (1028[/b]), purple (1030[/b]), orange (1026[/b]), green (1029[/b]), yellow (1031[/b]), or red (1027[/b]).

choices.option: A building (if you are on a city location)
choices.outcome: City 041[/b]: Gain structure 1284[/b].City 518[/b]: Gain structure 1276[/b].City 519[/b]: Gain structure 1278[/b].City 520[/b]: Gain structure 1266[/b].City 521[/b]: Gain structure 1287[/b].City 522[/b]: Gain structure 1280[/b].City 523[/b]: Gain structure 1277[/b].City 524[/b]: Gain structure 1291[/b].City 525[/b]: Gain structure 1285[/b].City 526[/b]: Gain structure 1268[/b].City 527[/b]: Gain structure 1272[/b].City 528[/b]: Gain structure 1290[/b].City 529[/b]: Gain structure 1274[/b].City 530[/b]: Gain structure 1271[/b].City 531[/b]: Gain structure 1293[/b].

015.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from being waterlogged. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain flora 1062[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions). Otherwise, the chest shocks you—suffer 1 heat damage and gain 1 boost; continue.

150.text: The winged beast evades you until a lucky grab snatches them out of the air. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Suffer 1 heat damage unless you pay 1 overpower[/b]. Gain animal 814[/b].

151.action: BATHE[/b] in the calm, clear water
151.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

152.text: As you chew the crisp leaf, you feel your fingers and feet grip your surroundings in a remarkable way. You may continue with a move[/b] action; if you do, before you roll, choose a type of result to ignore. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

153.text: You’re in full parkour mode as you nimbly-yet-quietly spring onto the island and snatch the amulet. Gain item 1176[/b]. The six large birds nearby shriek and attack in formation. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 overpower[/b].

154.action: BATHE[/b] in the calm, clear water
154.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

155.action: BATHE[/b] in the calm, clear water
155.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

156.text: The Traveler talks about the fire sentients that occupy this area: they are master artisans—patient to a fault and focused on offering the gift of fire and forge to the world through items like torches, orbs, and runecasters. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

157.action: SIPHON[/b] the essence of the gateway
157.text: You don’t really know what you’re doing, but your instincts lead you to reach into the gateway and tug the diaphanous membrane into your mind. When you do, all goes black. You wake up on the rock with a throbbing headache, but also a newfound potential. Lose 1 health, gain lesson 1428[/b], and gain 1 boost.

End the game in a mission victory, your destiny unknown.

160.action: COERCE[/b] the guards to grant you access

161.action: STEAL[/b] the sentient’s possessions while they work
161.text: All you can find is a metal shield and some coins. Gain item 930[/b] and $2.

162.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient leaving the city
162.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are occupied with a large egg, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

163.text: You feign friendliness as you draw close to the beast, then you grab it with a commanding grip at the last second. It instantly falls into tepid submission, though fear does not inspire instant loyalty. Gain animal 813[/b].

164.action: EXTRACT[/b] a shiny item from the eye
164.text: You spring across the gap and reach into the eye to extract an amulet. As you do, a sentient bursts from the lava below and vows to avenge their mother. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 overpower[/b]. Gain item 1176[/b].

165.action: SALVAGE[/b] spare parts from the wreckage
165.text: Gain either some metal scraps (1184[/b]) or a circuit board (1190[/b]).

166.text: As you walk by the tree toward the house, one of the sizzling boils bursts open, burning your shoulder. Suffer 1 heat damage. The commotion alerts the owner of the house to your presence, and they chase you away. Go either east to 167[/b] or west to 165[/b].

167.text: As tired as the sentient seems, it’s difficult to tear anything away from the strong grip of their many appendages. Gain item 962[/b] and $3.

168.action: SIPHON[/b] some of the elemental’s power
168.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell 1383[/b] and continue with the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

1687.action: BATHE[/b] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1687.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1688.action: BATHE[/b] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1688.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1689.action: BATHE[/b] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1689.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

169.action: PILFER[/b] some of the sacred lava
169.text: Despite the Traveler’s warnings not to steal from this sacred fount, you take some lava. It cools in the water enough to handle. Gain item 1182[/b] and curse 1394[/b].

1690.action: BATHE[/b] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1690.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1691.action: BATHE[/b] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1691.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1692.action: BATHE[/b] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1692.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

170.text: With great effort, you pull the rock away from whatever sorcery that tethers it to the arch. As soon as you do, it stops spinning and loses its aura. It’s just a rock. Gain item 1179[/b].

1701.action: BATHE[/b] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1701.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1705.action: HIJACK[/b] the vessel so you can continue your adventure on this planet
1705.text: You catch the small crew off guard, as they were expecting you to be happy to see them. Lose destiny 1705[/b], gain vehicle 1033[/b] and destiny 1600[/b] (place it in the center), and proceed with the next player’s turn.

171.action: ACCESS[/b] the orb’s interior without touching the lava
171.text: As you poke your head into the orb, you’re surprised to find a stone sentient inside. Fortunately, they’re curious about you, and there’s enough room for two inside. They show you that the orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 4 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NE-4. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill.

172.text: With the leaf sentients seemingly disinterested in steering away from the volcano, you take over the ship, declaring yourself captain. Gain vehicle 1156[/b] and $4.

173.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1026[/b] and 2 boost.

174.action: ENDURE[/b] the onslaught of waves in front of the judges (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
174.text: Find card 1708[/b] and place it on the table. To earn the respect of fire sentients, you must keep the flame of the Mother Volcano lit despite the tide. It is a trial of wits as much as it is patience, especially as the end of the trial nears and 5 waves emerge from the water.You clamber onto the lowest stone outcropping (height 1) just before the first wave hits. The sacred flame is safe… but the stone starts to crumble, and you must soon jump to another outcropping. Study the other 4 waves so you can use each outcropping (i.e., determine which unique height of 2, 3, 4, and 5 is associated with each wave, starting with the 2nd wave and ending with the 5th wave) exactly once and keep the flame burning.See entry 174[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

175.text: You pin down the sentient as you fill a flask with the sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b] and curse 1387[/b].

176.action: STEAL[/b] from the blissfully unaware sentients
176.text: There isn’t much to take other than a trinket and a few coins. Gain item 1102[/b] and $2.

177.action: EXTRACT[/b] a flagpost from the ground
177.text: The people in the surrounding area are furious that you would steal one of these flags. Gain item 1188[/b] and curse 1387[/b].

178.action: CONSUME[/b] a petal of the flower
178.text: The sentient is pleased to see you consume the flower, and they do the same. They open up about how the flowers in this area are suffering, and their people have been trying to revive them through the power of dance. Gain 1 boost, 1 move[/b], and quest 1629[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

179.text: You feel an intense compulsion to connect with the nearby sentient. Without even realizing it, you find yourselves in a deep conversation about life, nature, and love. When the effects wear off, you part ways, and you realize the sentient has given you a beautiful flute. Gain item 949[/b].

180.action: ENLIST[/b] the sentient to join your journey
180.text: It takes some convincing, but the elderly sentient eventually admits that they’re curious to learn about wind patterns in other parts of the world. Gain sentient 1308[/b].

181.action: SWINDLE[/b] the guards into opening the chest and steal the contents
181.text: The guards aren’t dumb, and you’re not particularly clever, but somehow you convince the guards to open the chest. Before they know it, you grab the contents and take off running. Gain item 1021[/b] and go east to 182[/b] or west to 180[/b].

182.text: From your position on the ground, the sentient doesn’t expect such a maneuver. Gain item 938[/b].

183.action: ENLIST[/b] the sentient to join you
183.text: The sentient agrees, but only if you first travel east with them. Gain sentient 1305[/b] and go east to 184[/b].

184.text: The queen winks and welcomes you to participate in the trial. Continue with the help-ENLIVEN[/b][/b] action.

185.action: LOOT[/b] the ruins of any items they contain
185.text: Gain 1 take[/b] and go to interior 542[/b].

186.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient leaving the city
186.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of large seeds, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

187.action: PILFER[/b] the artifact without anyone noticing
187.text: In full sneaky rogue mode, you pick the exact moment and angle to take the artifact. As you try to use it in secret, though, it doesn’t work. If you pay 4 boost, you discover a way to play the horn (gain item 1003[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost and 1 look[/b].

188.action: SCAVENGE[/b] the turbine for spare parts
188.text: It’s hard to find anything that isn’t covered in rust, but you’re happy to find that one of the blades has been sharpened by the wind and sand over time. The owner of the turbine cries while you scavenge their machine. Gain item 1189[/b] and lose 1 morale.

189.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, and the mud is nutrient rich. Unfortunately, you’re not the only creature who likes the sediment. When you stand up to dry, you find several leeches suckling on your feet. Gain 2 morale but lose 1 health. Continue.

190.text: Amidst the rubble near a cave, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item 1179[/b].

choices.option: Throw the stone into the cave
choices.outcome: The stone strikes a nearby target—perhaps the cave isn’t nearly as deep as you thought. Gain 1 boost. If you dare, you may continue with the look-EXPLORE[/b][/b] action with its cost decreased by 1.

191.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1026[/b] and 2 boost.

192.action: SCAVENGE[/b] a sealed jug from the grass
192.text: You pick up a container of sticky, yellow liquid. Gain item 866[/b].

193.text: With the guidance of the Traveler, you discover that you can capture the most abundant natural resource of the prairie: wind. Gain item 1212[/b].

194.text: You put a stop to the violent clash between dueling sentients, insisting that they settle their differences in a more productive way. They grumble but agree to put aside their magic and weapons, leaving them in your care as they talk through their issue. Gain items 860[/b] and 981[/b].

195.action: HACK[/b] into the interface of the gateway
195.text: A cash box swings open, revealing a pile of coins from fellow travelers who paid to use the gate. Gain $20; you may continue with the move-ENTER[/b][/b] action.

196.action: SALVAGE[/b] spare parts from the wreckage
196.text: Gain either some metal scraps (1184[/b]) or a circuit board (1190[/b]).

197.action: ENLIST[/b] the sentient after they finish their task
197.text: The sentient places the final flag in the ground, satisfied with their work. “Now what?” they ask. Gain sentient 1307[/b].

198.text: As you move into the pliable glass of the orb, you find a sentient inside. Fortunately, they’re curious about you, and there’s enough room for two. They show you that the orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 3 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NW-1. Gain 1 boost.

199.text: The sentient is so focused on the chest that they don’t notice the theft until you’re a safe distance away. Instead of giving chase, they give you a nod of respect. Gain item 943[/b].

020.action: SWAP[/b] the magnetic rocks with crystals of equal size
020.text: With the magnets in hand, the barrier slides aside. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave 080[/b].

200.text: After searching around the ledge, you find a stone that should be good for crafting. Gain item 1179[/b].

201.action: COERCE[/b] the sentient into revealing secrets of the surrounding area
201.text: You can tell a part of them likes sharing how much they know. They recommend looking for a back-alley entrance if you want to visit Ingot Town to the north, or you can travel east to meet a good friend of theirs, a runecaster inspector. Gain 2 boost and 1 move[/b]; you may continue.

202.text: The sentient thinks you’re joking at first. You persist, and they realize you’re serious. “I would curse you,” they say, “but I admire your courage. One does not simply walk into this area and steal from metalfolk.” Gain item 1255[/b] and $2; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 12 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region F).

203.action: EXTRACT[/b] the contents of the building, keeping the metal sentient at bay
203.text: The metal sentient strains against your advance, but you outmaneuver them. Inside the dilapidated building you find a captive, whom you free. Gain sentient 1349[/b] and curse 1391[/b].

204.action: ROB[/b] the house when the owners are asleep
204.text: You creep into the home (go to interior 556[/b] and lose 1 morale).

205.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

206.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient leaving the city
206.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of random knickknacks, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

207.action: BYPASS[/b] the king’s security system (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
207.text: Find cards 538[/b] and 539[/b] (they’re large cards), place them on the table, and begin. The King of Thieves offers you honorary status as a metal sentient if you can bypass a complex laser security system within a short amount of time. They share the repeating pattern of the lasers (1st, 2nd, 3rd, 1st, 2nd…). The laser array shifts every 2 seconds, and moving from one square to the next—orthogonally or diagonally—takes 1 second of your time. You cannot be on a square when any part of it is touched by a laser, and you only have 9 seconds (in the context of this puzzle, not real time) to move from the front of the grid to the back. Use cubes to track your movement, with the first cube placed in row A (the first second). See entry 207[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

208.text: The inside of the orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 3 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NW-3. Gain 1 boost.

209.text: The critter is nimble, but its weakness is its instinct to attack, and you use one of those attempted slashes to swipe and pin it down. Gain animal 828[/b].

021.action: LOOT[/b] the device from the ledge
021.text: You carefully unplug the device so it remains functional. Gain item 988[/b]; you may continue.

210.text: You notice that passing sentients all steer clear of the object. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

211.text: You aggressively extract a glowing amulet from the metal plates of the sentient’s armor. Gain item 1174[/b] and $2.

212.text: The beast is slow but big, and it takes a while to pin it down. Gain animal 829[/b].

213.text: You pierce through the guard’s portable forcefield and leave them pinned under a boulder while you enter the building. Suffer 1 heat damage and gain item 982[/b]; go to interior 513[/b].

214.text: Amidst the rubble near a cave, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item 1179[/b].

choices.option: Throw the stone into the cave
choices.outcome: The stone strikes a nearby target—perhaps the cave isn’t nearly as deep as you thought. If you dare, you may gain 1 look[/b] and continue with the look-EXPLORE[/b][/b] action.

215.action: CONSUME[/b] a zesty beverage at the bar
215.text: Gain 1 morale and 1 health. The bartender holds out their hand, waiting for payment. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Immediately go south to 210[/b] or west to 396[/b].
Gain 1 boost and continue.
The bartender leads you to interior 557[/b] and leaves you alone.

216.text: Gleaming from the tundra underneath the skeleton is a yellow crystal; gain item 1164[/b]. Continue.

217.text: You locate the source of the electricity and disconnect it. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all help[/b] results. Unless you are calculating in your efforts (pay 1 help[/b]), an angry sentient curses you (gain curse 1391[/b]). You may go north to 222[/b].

218.text: You grab the shard floating in the middle of the great, rocky donut and instantly black out. When you wake up a few minutes later with a splitting headache, your mind has expanded. Lose 1 health and gain lesson 1431[/b].

219.action: COERCE[/b] the sentient to join you
219.text: The sentient respects your strongarm approach, but they really don’t want to abandon their post. The Traveler agrees to stand guard in their place, so you gain sentient 1335[/b].

022.text: You realize that the laser array has only a few sources that you can modify to drop the barrier. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

220.action: FORAGE[/b] for a clear, carvable piece of ice
220.text: You find a transparent wedge of pure ice. Gain item 1183[/b].

221.text: The beast is simply too strong to wrangle, so you instead dart around, tying its long, cabled necks in a knot. Gain animal 808[/b].

222.text: The confused pup puts up a minor struggle in the snow. Gain animal 810[/b].

223.action: SCAVENGE[/b] for any lost items in the snow near the stones
223.text: Just as your fingers begin to freeze, you locate some coins. Gain $5.

224.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient walking in the opposite direction along the narrow path
224.text: The sentient is too preoccupied with keeping warm to notice your pilfering as you shuffle around them on the ledge. Gain item 880[/b] and $X; you may continue.

225.action: GRAB[/b] your choice of the smaller tent or a torch and scamper away
225.text: Gain either the small tent (1032[/b]) or a torch (1085[/b]).

226.text: In the surrounding meadow there are a few small mushrooms and berries. They seem safe, and your stomach seems to agree. Gain 2 health.

227.text: It’s both unsettling and a bit magical to sit down on a blanket that supports your weight while remaining in midair. You untie the tethers and begin to fly. Gain vehicle 985[/b].

228.action: ENLIST[/b] the sentient to travel with you
228.text: The sentient asks whether you’re able to “travel by tower.” You’re unsure of what they’re asking, and they explain that energy sentients can jump from one tower to the next across great distances. They don’t think this possible for a landwalker like you, but they’re fine traveling the old-fashioned way. Gain sentient 1325[/b].

229.text: You notice other sentients gathering in the area, waiting for nightfall. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

023.text: The gate is solid, but you detect a few weak points around the edges. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

230.action: CONSUME[/b] some of the nutrient-rich moss growing on the rocks
230.text: You munch on some moss while resting against the cliff to the near south. Gain 2 health and continue.

231.action: PILFER[/b] the artifact without anyone noticing
231.text: In full sneaky rogue mode, you pick the exact moment and angle to take the artifact. As you try to use it in secret, though, it doesn’t work. If you pay 3 boost, you discover a way to use the gauntlet (gain item 1001[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

232.action: STEAL[/b] a lantern from the nearby tree
232.text: Figuring there are so many lanterns here that one won’t be missed, you quietly unfasten a lantern’s chain from the tree. Gain item 1187[/b].

233.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the look-TRANSLATE[/b][/b] action.

234.action: CONSUME[/b] a petal of the nearby flower
234.text: You manage to avoid triggering the flower, which is just as much a trap as it is vegetation. The effects of the petal allow you to walk temporarily on top of the water. You may go north to 239[/b] or continue.

235.action: GATHER[/b] intel from the Traveler about the energy sentients
235.text: “I may not always agree with what they say, but I love hearing them say it anyway—their ability to pick up new languages is astounding.” They point to an energy sentient in an orb to the north. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

236.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item 1178[/b].

237.text: When you think the sentient isn’t looking, you grab a torch. Gain item 1086[/b].

238.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient leaving the city
238.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of books, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

239.action: ACCESS[/b] the building via a side window
239.text: The window creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior 565[/b].

024.text: You toss a few glowing stones into the darkness to gauge the width and depth. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

240.text: You surprise the current occupant of the orb. Fortunately, they’re curious about you, and there’s enough room for two inside. They show you that the orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 3 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NW-1. Gain 1 boost.

241.action: EXTRACT[/b] the crystal from the stone
241.text: The stone resists, but you succeed. Gain item 1161[/b].

242.action: SIPHON[/b] some of the elemental’s power
242.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell 1384[/b] and continue with the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

243.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1028[/b] and 2 boost.

244.text: You surprise the current occupant of the orb, who informs you politely that the orb is occupied and that you’ll need to wait your turn. They mention that you can leave messages to other travelers on the orb exterior. Gain 1 boost and choose one:

choices.outcome: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Lose 1 time to wait for the sentient to finish their task
choices.outcome: When the sentient departs the orb, you enter to find that the orb displays a map of your region. Look at page 3 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NW-1. Gain 1 boost.

245.text: You notice that the plants are aggressive toward any passing animal. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

246.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1030[/b] and 2 boost.

247.text: Exhaustion from arguing has left the sentients gullible enough to fall for your ploy, and all three pool their purses to pay for what is really nothing more than a ragged patch of your augsuit. Gain $6.

248.text: Goosebumps prickle your skin after you peel off your augsuit. The water feels amazing—really, even better than a good bath should feel, perhaps due to the proximity of the tree? Gain 2 morale and 1 health; you may continue.

249.text: You scale one of the standing stones while the moth-like beast watches. When it hovers too close, you jump on top of it, pinning it to the ground. Gain animal 823[/b].

025.text: The gate is solid, but you detect a few cracks in the supporting stones. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

250.action: LOOT[/b] the unattended box from the thorny ledge
250.text: Roll 3 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 look[/b] to prevent any thorns from gouging your arm. Gain item 952[/b].

251.action: GRAB[/b] one of the spinning stones
251.text: The second you put your weight on the stone, it drops into the gaping pit below, bringing you with it. One of the spikes tears into your arm, and you black out from the pain. Lose 1 health and go to cave 049[/b].

252.action: ENLIST[/b] the sentient to join you
252.text: The sentient is incredibly hesitant to leave their collection of bones. You sense their anxiety and offer to carry temporarily the bones for them. Gain sentient 1331[/b].

253.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 886[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1160[/b]. Otherwise, the treasure chest bursts into flames, scalding your hands (suffer 1 heat damage).

254.text: There is a large animal to the east, but it doesn’t seem to be the beast that left these hoofmarks. To the west, you think you can see a treasure chest. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

255.text: You convince the duo that you’re a famous hunter and that they would be silly not to join you. One doesn’t take the bait, but the other is smitten. Gain sentient 1333[/b].

256.text: You don’t settle for a good bone—you find a great one! Gain item 1186[/b].

257.text: With the sentient’s appendages pinned to their sides, they can’t stop you from robbing them. You find some coins in one pocket and some seeds in another, ignoring the animals. Gain item 1021[/b] and $2.

258.action: STEAL[/b] a map from the peddler as the Traveler distracts them
258.text: You grab the map and scamper away. Gain item 1254[/b] and curse 1392[/b].

259.text: The lumbering beast proves difficult to wrangle, and it puts up a disinterested struggle. Gain animal 824[/b].

026.action: SWAP[/b] the widgets with pieces of cooling lava of identical size
026.text: With the widgets removed, the barrier disappears before your eyes. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave 086[/b].

260.text: For every arm you pin down, there are always several others swatting at you from all directions. Fortunately, it isn’t swatting to hurt, just to discourage. Gain animal 825[/b].

261.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the overpower-HUNT[/b][/b] action.

262.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient leaving the city
262.text: You bump against a sentient carrying a giant salad in both hands, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

263.text: You accidentally step on one of the nearby stones, and it cracks open, water gushing over your foot. The other roots and the flower instantly withdraw underground. You salvage a mouthful of water. You may continue with an overpower[/b] action, ignoring any health results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

264.action: LOOT[/b] the ruins of any items they contain
264.text: Gain ability 1511[/b] and go to interior 543[/b].

265.text: When they’re not looking, you attach the restraints to a boulder of equivalent weight and hide with the tired captive. Gain sentient 1314[/b].

266.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient with jingling pockets who stumbles out of the casino
266.text: The sentient is too busy recounting their streak of good luck to notice their immediate misfortune. Gain $X; you may continue.

267.action: EXTRACT[/b] a flower from the oasis
267.text: You wait until the sentient flies away, then you run into the garden and grab a plant. Gain either an orange flower with many green leaves (flora 1072[/b]) or a green flower with pink buds (flora 1078[/b]).

268.action: DISTRACT[/b] the sinew sentient to help the leaf sentient escape
268.text: The leaf sentient darts away, offering their gratitude through an outburst of communicative odors. Gain 2 morale.

269.action: CONSUME[/b] a taste of the wind to help predict where it blows next
269.text: You quickly realize that this sandstorm is composed of something more interesting than sand. Gain item 867[/b].

027.text: You realize that the laser array has only a few sources that you can modify to drop the barrier. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

270.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside.
