Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 924[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, the chest clamps on your leg like a trap; gain 1 boost and (if possible) lose 1 skill.

271.action: SCAVENGE[/b] the sculpture for anything useful
271.text: Within the bones, you unexpectedly find a well-crafted sword. Gain item 892[/b].

272.text: You’re able to tug the sticky material toward you, but it snaps back into place. You can’t quite explain it, but you suddenly feel… lucky. Gain spell 1372[/b].

273.action: SALVAGE[/b] spare parts from the wreckage
273.text: Gain either some metal scraps (1184[/b]) or a circuit board (1190[/b]).

274.text: As the petal melts in your mouth, the absurd tangle of bones casts a shadow that tells of possible futures. Roll 3 skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the selected skill.

275.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

276.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] the sentient whose back is to you
276.text: The sinew sentient is too engrossed in the game to notice your thievery. Gain item 890[/b] and $X; you may continue.

277.text: Someone chained this poor creature to the wall and left it to feed on unsuspecting visitors, and it deserves better. Gain animal 836[/b].

278.text: This area appears to be a chokepoint for anyone who tries to cross the lowest point of the wall. You’re almost undoubtedly walking into a trap. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

279.text: The sentient joins you inside the orb. The orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 4 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NE-3. The sentient appreciates your attention to detail, and they offer to travel with you. Gain sentient 1344[/b].

028.text: You realize that as dangerous as the sentinel appears, they present a rare type of barrier that you can actually talk to. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

280.text: Once you get the sentient to start talking, they spill all sorts of secrets, including the excellent news that part of your ship crashed just north of here. There is a secret staircase inside the cliff that can take you there. Gain 1 boost; you may either go north to 285[/b] or gain 1 move[/b].

281.action: SCAVENGE[/b] a torch from the fire
281.text: Gain item 1087[/b]. You may continue with the move-ENTER[/b][/b] action.

282.text: You don’t settle for a good bone—you find a great one! Gain item 1186[/b].

283.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1031[/b] and 2 boost.

284.text: You nimbly-yet-quietly spring up the rock and snatch the crystal. Gain item 1162[/b]. The three treasure chests at the base of the rock burst open, guardians emerging from each and attacking in formation. Roll 5 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 overpower[/b].

285.action: SALVAGE[/b] spare parts from the wreckage
285.text: Gain either some metal scraps (1184[/b]) or a circuit board (1190[/b]).

286.action: STEAL[/b] one of the sentient’s possessions while they bicker with themselves
286.text: Gain one of the following: A torch (1087[/b]), a crystal (1160[/b]), or a coin purse ($6).

287.text: Amidst the rubble along the ledge, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item 1179[/b].

choices.option: Throw the stone toward the mountain
choices.outcome: The stone strikes its target, and you didn’t even throw that hard—perhaps the Memory Palace isn’t all that far away. If you dare, you may gain 1 look[/b] and continue with the look-NAVIGATE[/b][/b] action.

288.text: The tiny beast seems to predict each of your attempts to catch it, and it snips at you with razor-sharp teeth. Gain animal 834[/b].

289.action: HIJACK[/b] the balloon to travel across the gap
289.text: Feigning injury, you draw the balloon close enough to jump on board, surprising the crew. You mercifully let them debark on solid land before sailing away. Gain vehicle 1023[/b] and $3.

029.text: You realize that the laser array has only a few sources that you can modify to drop the barrier. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

290.text: You don’t settle for a good bone—you find a great one! Gain item 1186[/b].

291.text: To your amazement, at the moment when your hands should have slipped into the folds of their gown, instead they pass through the air as if the Traveler isn’t there at all. Gain 1 boost and continue.

292.text: The liquid is clear, crisp, and incredibly refreshing. Gain 1 health and continue.

293.text: The liquid is clear, crisp, and incredibly refreshing. Gain 1 health and continue.

294.action: GRAB[/b] your choice of the tent or a torch and scamper away
294.text: Gain either the tent (1032[/b]) or a torch (1085[/b]), then go east or west.

295.text: The sentient invites you into an orb—it looks solid, but it liquifies at your touch. You find yourself inside what is essentially a portion of the globe where you can see your current area. As an aimless wanderer on this planet, this sense of positioning and place makes you happy. Look at page 4 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NE-2. Gain 1 boost and continue.

296.action: SCAVENGE[/b] for any lost items near the stones
296.text: You locate some coins in the sand. Gain $5.

297.text: There are lorestones both to the east and the west. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

298.action: SCAVENGE[/b] for any lost items in the cold sand near the stones
298.text: Just as your fingers begin to freeze, you locate some coins. Gain $5.

299.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item 1178[/b].

030.text: You realize that as dangerous as the sentinel appears, they present a rare type of barrier that you can actually talk to. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

300.text: You throw yourself onto the animal’s neck and hang on until it tires. Gain animal 841[/b].

301.action: STEAL[/b] the scraps of the ceremony
301.text: You slowly make your way down the mountain, biding your time until the sentients have departed. At the center of the circle you find the remains of some armor. Gain item 974[/b]. You may pay 1 boost to go north to 306[/b].

302.action: STEAL[/b] some eggs from the birdhouses
302.text: You furtively reach into one of the nests, your hands closing around a large egg. Either keep the egg (gain item 1213[/b]) or eat it raw right away while it’s fresh (gain 2 health). Then, if you pay 1 move[/b], you may go north to 307[/b].

303.action: EXTRACT[/b] a small stone to keep for yourself
303.text: You extract a small, nondescript rock. Gain item 1179[/b].

304.action: DISTRACT[/b] a guard at the fort
304.text: A cannoneer was preparing to fire at the approaching pirate ship, but your distraction gives the ship time to dock safely on the other sky island. Its crew cheers for your act of sneaky hospitality. They invite you aboard for a celebration. Gain $5 and 1 morale. You may go to any adjacent location; north is 309[/b] and east is 404[/b].

305.action: ACCESS[/b] the building via a loose panel
305.text: Sand is piled around the back of the lighthouse, disguising several loose panels. You remove one and make your way upstairs. Go to interior 597[/b].

306.text: You nimbly-yet-quietly spring onto the island and snatch the shard. Gain item 1216[/b]. The five floating islands nearby hurtle toward you, and all you can do is smash them before they smash you. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 overpower[/b].

307.text: You take a beautiful piece of ivory from the skeleton. Gain item 1186[/b].

308.action: ACCESS[/b] the orb to see if it can help with the animal
308.text: The interior of the orb provides a broader view of the world but doesn’t provide insight into the injured animal. Look at page 6 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is SW-3. Gain 1 boost. You may continue, but if you perform a location action, its cost is increased by 1.

309.action: HIJACK[/b] the ship by inspiring a mutiny
309.text: At the Traveler’s behest, you board and try to take over the ship. This is no small task; at first you keep your head down and listen for any disgruntled pirates. Gain 1 boost and 1 engage[/b]. You may either stop or continue with an engage--COAX[/b][/b] action to empower a few disgruntled pirates to speak up (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: Soon after the selected pirates speak their mind, they are thrown in the brig. As you predicted, this retaliation fans the flames among the other pirates, and it helps you identify the snitch. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]. You may either stop or continue with an overpower--CHARGE[/b][/b] action to lead the mutiny (then read the next result only):

The mutiny begins before dawn, when the captain’s closest allies all find themselves tied to their beds on the ocean surface. The treasury is next. You force the lock and make a show of dividing the stashed loot evenly among every pirate on the ship. Finally, you personally toss the captain overboard and take over the helm, much to the delight of the crew. You are the captain now. Gain vehicle 1017[/b].

031.text: You realize that as dangerous as the sentinel appears, they present a rare type of barrier that you can actually talk to. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

310.text: The most interesting thing you find is the bush itself, which is covered with vibrant flowers. Gain flora 1067[/b].

311.action: CATCH[/b] one of the nearby birds
311.text: The bird sees you coming, and sparks fly from its crest. Roll 4 skill dice. If the results include at least 1 overpower[/b], suffer 1 heat damage. Gain animal 816[/b].

312.text: You quietly push off into open water without anyone noticing. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and $4.

313.text: You nonchalantly wade toward the animal and grab it firmly by the neck, not seeking to hurt it. Sparks literally fly from the bird’s head as you do. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Suffer 1 heat damage unless you pay 1 overpower[/b]. Gain animal 816[/b].

314.text: You quietly push off into open water without anyone noticing. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and $4.

315.text: The book is bound to the pedestal through some kind of sorcery, but you’re finally able to wiggle it free. Gain item 1192[/b].

316.text: The animal responds to your aggressive move by releasing a cloud of tiny spores that make you cough uncontrollably. Suffer 1 hypoxia damage and gain animal 843[/b].

317.text: You trip the animal, sending it sprawling to the ground. Seconds later, a huge lizard crashes through the bushes, clamps down on the insectile animal, and drags it away. You are too shocked to respond. Lose 1 morale and gain 1 boost.

318.action: PILFER[/b] the artifact without anyone noticing
318.text: In full sneaky rogue mode, you pick the exact moment and angle to take the artifact. As you try to use it in secret, though, it doesn’t work. If you pay 3 boost, you discover a way to activate the artifact (gain item 1008[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

319.text: Preoccupied by its task, the animal struggles only to continue etching. Gain animal 817[/b].

032.text: The gate is solid, but you detect some rust around the hinges. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

320.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item 1178[/b].

321.action: STALL[/b] until the sentient disappears inside the building
321.text: A flood of young sentients appears and then shuffles back into the building, and then the plaza is empty. You find a quiet room inside the building; go to interior 567[/b].

322.action: EXTRACT[/b] the flower from its pot
322.text: The sentient is devastated that you would destroy their creation with such callous disregard. Gain flora 1071[/b] and curse 1386[/b].

323.action: STEAL[/b] a flower from a nearby student
323.text: It looks more like a blue chopstick than a flower, but there’s something about it that excites your mind. Gain flora 1053[/b].

324.text: The injured animal doesn’t try to evade you, but its ethereal composition makes it slightly awkward to wrangle. It collapses to the ground and its light grows dim. Gain 1 random skill, then choose one:

choices.option: Pay 1 engage to call for aid
choices.outcome: A leaf sentient dashes over from the east. With a rapid series of gestures, the sentient helps stabilize the animal. “You did the right thing,” the sentient says. “Come, join us at the academy.” Go to interior 600[/b].
You save the animal’s life; gain animal 822[/b].
The animal perishes in your arms and fades away, leaving only an orange crystal in its wake. Gain item 1162[/b].

325.action: EXTRACT[/b] the animal from the web
325.text: The youngling trembles as you remove the web. Gain animal 817[/b].

326.text: Grasping the animal is the easy part; the difficulty arises from avoiding the sharp barbs of its web. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 move[/b]. Gain animal 819[/b].

327.text: Clearly the chest was a trap, and now you can proceed to pick or force the lock without any issues. Gain 1 boost and either 2 engage[/b] or 2 overpower[/b]; continue.

328.text: The sentient’s size is a disadvantage when dealing with scoundrels like you, and you pluck a hefty bag of coins from their side before they can react. They yell as you scamper away. Gain curse 1393[/b] and $12.

329.text: You dart between the sentient’s long limbs and grab their only weapon. Gain item 1088[/b] and continue.

033.text: You deduce the optimal landing area for a mighty leap. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

330.text: The Traveler gives you some pointers as you hack into the inner workings of the device. “Runecasters help sentients around the world to increase the efficiency of basic tasks. Here, just pair it to you.” Gain item 1028[/b] and 1 boost.

331.text: The golden leaf melts on your tongue, and for at least a few moments you feel 10 years younger. You may continue; if you do, first refresh all dice from your character card. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

332.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient leaving the village
332.text: You bump into a sentient carrying a large barrel of ale, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

333.action: STEAL[/b] from the unsuspecting shop owner while they’re distracted by a customer who appears from the northern valley
333.text: You grab a welding torch and casually tuck it out of sight. Gain item 873[/b] and $2.

334.text: You can’t find even a single coin on them, just some old cards. Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions) and lose 1 morale.

335.action: ACCESS[/b] the building from the blind side
335.text: The floorboards of the building creak as you slip inside. Go to interior 569[/b].

336.action: SWINDLE[/b] the caravan into helping you cross the canyon
336.text: You convince the caravan into thinking you’re a potential customer, and they help you across the canyon. Once you’re on the other side, you scamper away. Go north to 341[/b].

337.action: SIPHON[/b] coins from the base of the vehicle
337.text: The old transport is carrying more coins than it can handle. You exploit the weakness and walk away undetected with a handful of coins. Gain $10 and continue.

338.action: ACCESS[/b] the resort via an unattended window
338.text: The window creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior 570[/b].

339.action: PILFER[/b] the artifact without anyone noticing
339.text: In full sneaky rogue mode, you pick the exact moment and angle to take the artifact. As you try to use it in secret, though, it doesn’t work. If you pay 4 boost, you activate the artifact (gain item 999[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

034.text: You realize that as dangerous as the sentinel appears, they present a rare type of barrier that you can actually talk to. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

340.text: You quietly hoist the sails and push off into open water without anyone noticing. Gain vehicle 1156[/b] and $4.

341.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the engage-TRADE[/b][/b] action.

342.action: HIJACK[/b] a sailboat that steers too close to shore
342.text: The boat’s owner begs you to let them keep the boat; they’ll even take you into the city and give you money for the market. If you accept, go to city 529[/b] and gain $5. If you refuse, gain vehicle 1156[/b].

343.action: BATHE[/b] in the gently flowing water
343.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime, though the runoff from the nearby city isn’t entirely clean. Gain 1 morale and continue.

344.text: After luring the boat over to the dock, you push the captain into the water and take the helm. Gain vehicle 1156[/b], curse 1393[/b], and $4.

345.text: You take a rifle away from the hunters and send them running. The animal is on the brink of death. Gain item 1153[/b] and either 1 help[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; continue.

346.action: ACCESS[/b] the building via a side window
346.text: The window creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior 076[/b].

347.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

348.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1030[/b] and 2 boost.

349.text: The effect of the flower is weak, but you can feel something working through your system. You find yourself waving to the nearby sentients as if they’re old friends. Gain 2 morale and continue.

035.action: SWAP[/b] the gelatinous bulbs with stones of identical size
035.text: With the bulbs in hand, the barrier vanishes before your eyes. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave 095[/b].

350.text: Amidst the rubble near a cave, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item 1179[/b].

choices.option: Throw the stone into the cave
choices.outcome: The stone strikes a nearby target—perhaps the cave isn’t nearly as deep as you thought. If you dare, you may gain 1 look[/b] and continue with the look-EXPLORE[/b][/b] action.

351.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item 1178[/b].

352.text: The sentient is happy to try out other fishing holes in the area, so they quickly pack up their gear and join you. Gain sentient 1361[/b].

353.text: The technology used in the tower is even more advanced than your augsuit. Some of the more mysterious elements bleed into your implants. Gain spell 1377[/b].

354.text: You feel something awaken deep inside of you, like one of your organs was operating suboptimally and now it’s reawakened. You may continue with a help[/b] action, ignoring any health results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

355.action: SALVAGE[/b] spare parts from the wreckage
355.text: Gain either some metal scraps (1184[/b]) or a circuit board (1190[/b]).

356.action: DISTRACT[/b] whatever is causing the water to spin
356.text: Downstream from the waterfall, you reach into the water and make a big splash. As you do, the spinning spikes disappear under the water, and you see a massive worm-like creature crash through the waterfall and disappear south. You have neutralized the dangerous sea centipede. Gain 1 morale and 1 move[/b]; continue.

357.text: You ensnare the animal, expecting praise from the building occupants; all you hear are grumbles from inside. Gain animal 814[/b].

358.action: STEAL[/b] the treasure chest from the sentient
358.text: While they’re distracted by the Traveler, you quietly remove the treasure chest from the outcropping. Gain item 1036[/b].

359.text: You grab the sentient’s fishing rod and pull them into the water. Gain item 921[/b].

036.text: You toss a few pebbles into the darkness to gauge the chasm’s width and depth. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

360.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

361.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1031[/b] and 2 boost.

362.text: You instantly regret the choice—this is not an edible flower. Lose 1 health and gain 1 boost; you may continue.

363.text: With a storm brewing to the northeast, swimming underwater may be the safest route forward. Land isn’t too far away to the west, though. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

364.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1029[/b] and 2 boost.

365.action: SCAVENGE[/b] for resources in the calm water under the surface
365.text: Some unrefined gold catches your eye. Gain item 1185[/b].

366.text: There doesn’t appear to be anyone monitoring these traps, so you take one for yourself. Gain item 932[/b].

367.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 924[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1164[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

368.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

369.action: SIPHON[/b] some of the elemental’s power
369.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell 1374[/b] and continue with the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

037.text: The gate is solid, but you detect decay around it. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

370.action: BATHE[/b] in the calm, clear water
370.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

371.text: A few seconds after eating the petal, you look down at your hands to see that they’re translucent—you can see right through them! You may continue; if you do, ignore 1 challenge die result. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

372.action: BATHE[/b] in the calm, clear water
372.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Unfortunately, you aren’t alone in the water, as you learn when something sharp and many-toothed clamps down on your arm. You shake it free, but you’re badly injured. Lose 2 health and gain 1 boost. You may go to an adjacent location (north is 302[/b]).

373.text: The long-necked beast is confused at first by the tiny creature—you—struggling against it, and you catch the creature off balance. It tips over, crashing into the sand, and you plant yourself at the base of its neck. Gain animal 841[/b].

374.action: PILFER[/b] the barrel in the sand
374.text: The crab-like beasts squeal as you pull the barrel out of the sand, lunging at you. You ward them away, and they skitter into the sea. Gain item 1158[/b].

375.text: You lure the ship toward the rocks and then forcibly take control. Gain vehicle 1156[/b], curse 1388[/b], and $5.

376.action: ACCESS[/b] the building via a vent in the roof
376.text: The vent creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior 571[/b].

377.text: The flower’s exterior is cool to the touch, but the inside contains a magma-like substance that splashes onto you. Suffer 1 heat damage and gain flora 1069[/b].

378.text: These are savvy traders, but you manage to convince one of them a defunct piece of your augsuit is priceless. Gain an orange crystal (1162[/b]), a shovel (900[/b]), an explosive (879[/b]), armor (946[/b]), a runecaster map (1255[/b]), or a red flower (1069[/b]).

379.text: Using some loose rocks and keeping your distance, you separate some lava into a place where it can cool enough for you to pick up. Gain item 1182[/b].

038.action: SWAP[/b] the stones with a branch of equal weight
038.text: With the stones in hand, the barrier dissolves before your eyes. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave 098[/b].

380.action: EXTRACT[/b] a knife from beneath the turtle’s shell
380.text: You curse the sentient who would dare torture a helpless animal like that. The animal nuzzles you appreciatively and wanders off. Gain item 1209[/b] and 1 morale.

381.text: You swim around behind the vehicle and enter the cabin, taking control. However, the turtle refuses to budge. You can either lose a flora or food card or 1 morale to force the turtle to move; if you do either, gain vehicle 1013[/b] with 1 boost on it. Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

382.text: You scour the area in the hopes of finding the source of the damaged rock, and you find a katana in the bushes. Gain item 889[/b].

383.action: ROB[/b] the sentient of their hammock
383.text: The wood sentient watches helplessly as you assert your size and strength to remove the hammock from the trees. Gain item 954[/b] and curse 1386[/b].

384.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1214[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, the chest clamps onto your fingers and won’t let go (end your turn).

385.action: LOOT[/b] the ruins of any items they contain
385.text: Gain 1 take[/b] and go to interior 544[/b].

386.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

387.action: EXTRACT[/b] a flower from the bush
387.text: You pluck one of the broad, pink flowers. Gain flora 1080[/b].

388.action: COERCE[/b] the guards into letting you pass
388.text: It doesn’t feel good to bully the guards, but you get what you want. Lose 1 morale and go to 780[/b].

389.text: You feel a surge of strength from the spicy flower. You may continue with an overpower[/b] action; if you do, you may reroll any challenge dice once. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

039.text: The markings on the wall provide a rough guide through the void. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

390.text: While popping berries into your mouth (gain 1 morale), you notice a gap in the bushes. A small hole in the wall leads west. You may wiggle through it to go to 787[/b].

391.text: You recognize a pattern in the stones that may be helpful. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

392.text: Roll 2 skill dice up to 2 times. If you roll at least 1 help[/b], gain 2 health. Otherwise lose 1 health.

393.action: SIPHON[/b] some of the elemental’s power
393.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell 1375[/b] and continue with the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

394.action: SALVAGE[/b] spare parts from the wreckage
394.text: Gain either some metal scraps (1184[/b]) or a circuit board (1190[/b]).

395.action: SCAVENGE[/b] a piece of the closest object
395.text: The struggle is real as you try to get close enough to the magnets. When you get there, you manage to hang on long enough to chip off a big enough fragment to craft into something useful. Gain item 1184[/b].

396.action: ACCESS[/b] the building via the front door
396.text: The door creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior 572[/b].

397.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

398.text: You find a beautiful piece of ice floating near the shore. Gain item 1183[/b].

399.text: The liquid is clear, crisp, and incredibly refreshing. Gain 1 health and continue.

040.action: EXTRACT[/b] the crystal from the center of the planet
040.text: With great effort you pry the crystal loose as energy surges through your body. You blink, and when your eyes open, you’re back on the surface with the crystal in your hands. Gain item 1000[/b] and go to 157[/b]; if you have a previous location card for reference, return it to the box.

400.text: A sophisticated firewall offers heavy resistance, but you break through to a flood of data. The tower is monitoring the position of all energy sentients to the west, and you suspect something nefarious at play. The data also shows a massive surge of energy from the northeast, but there’s a level of reverence to it. Before you unplug, you siphon a few credits into your augsuit. Gain ability 1472[/b], $3, and 1 boost.

401.action: SCAVENGE[/b] for lost coins in the area
401.text: You find a few coins stuck in the mud. Gain $3.

402.text: The forest to the left is full of healthy, pliable trees. Gain item 1180[/b].

403.text: You notice that the top of the fence is protected by an electric surge. You carefully disarm the fence and gain 1 boost. You may continue with the move-SCALE[/b][/b] action.

404.action: LOOT[/b] the ruins of any items they contain
404.text: With great agility, you reach the old building and scour it for items. Gain ability 1511[/b] and go to interior 545[/b].

405.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1030[/b] and 2 boost.

406.text: The diminutive beast scampers away, using the island as a barrier between you and it. When you close in, it lashes out with a quick series of bites. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 move[/b]. Gain animal 834[/b].

407.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item 1178[/b].

408.action: EXTRACT[/b] the only item you can reach through a window
408.text: You shimmy along the cliff, reach inside, and extract a rusty axe. Gain item 1088[/b].

409.text: The power of the spires surges into you. Gain spell 1371[/b].

041.text: The rogue’s gallery is covered in sketches of suspicious-looking sentients. Choose one:

choices.option: Grab a wanted poster of a water sentient
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, 1 overpower[/b], and quest 1674[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).
You learn of several lost sentients who were last seen searching underground for the Cave of Souls. Gain 2 boost and 1 look[/b].

410.action: ROB[/b] the house when the owners are asleep
410.text: You creep into the home (go to interior 573[/b] and lose 1 morale).

411.action: FORAGE[/b] in the bushes for fresh berries
411.text: In addition to some juicy berries, you find an old box of cards. Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions) and 1 health.

412.text: You embrace a passing sentient as if they’re an old friend, pocketing a few coins from their purse as you do. Gain $X; you may continue.

413.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

414.text: In the rubble you find a harpoon bow. Gain item 960[/b] and continue with any action other than look-SEARCH[/b][/b].

415.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1028[/b] and 2 boost.

416.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1193[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

417.text: It’s difficult to wrest away any of the sentient’s possessions, but you manage to take a wooden key. Before you walk away, the devastated sentient offers you their loyalty if you’ll return the key. You may gain either item 916[/b] or sentient 1318[/b].

418.text: You don’t settle for a good bone—you find a great one! Gain item 1186[/b].

419.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item 1178[/b].

042.text: A map of the world appears on the screen, and you send it to a nearby printer. Gain item 1037[/b] and 1 boost, then go to city 041[/b].

420.text: Using its tusks, you tip over the animal and pet it until it calms down. Gain animal 810[/b].

421.action: GRAB[/b] the animal and carry it to safety
421.text: Whimpering the whole way, the distraught animal finds comfort in your arms. It won’t last long without proper care. Gain animal 810[/b].

422.text: You locate the power source and unplug it. Gain 1 boost; you may go west to 615[/b].

423.action: SCAVENGE[/b] through the foundation for discarded tools or equipment
423.text: You find an old pair of pliers. Gain item 881[/b].

424.text: Your implant is flooded with data. You can’t read it, but it’s presented as an endlessly scrolling page of news and other information. You randomly select a link for your implant to download. Visit orb.stonemaiergames.com and enter 171[/b], 208[/b], or 308[/b].

425.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1029[/b] and 2 boost.

426.text: The beast is as slippery as it is long; you struggle to pin it down without it dealing damage to you. Gain animal 855[/b].

427.action: STEAL[/b] an item from within the bulbous flora
427.text: While the sentient is distracted by the Traveler, you steal their binoculars. Gain item 972[/b].

428.text: You feel a distinct but temporary improvement of your vision. Look at any adjacent location (north is 429[/b] and east is 634[/b]) and gain 1 boost. You may continue.

429.action: SCAVENGE[/b] the shallow waters for any lost items
429.text: You stub your toe on something heavy wedged into the sand, and when you reach down, you find a heavy skillet. Gain item 906[/b].

043.text: The slippery beasts are tough to hold onto. Gain animal 832[/b].

430.action: GATHER[/b] intel about the sea spouts
430.text: You recognize a pattern in the movement of the twisters: For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

431.action: SIPHON[/b] some of the elemental’s power
431.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell 1382[/b] and continue with the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

432.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1043[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

433.text: Despite the footprints in the sand indicating that the owner of the boat is nearby, you quietly push off into open water without being detected. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and $4.

434.action: BATHE[/b] in the calm, clear water
434.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime from your journey. Gain 1 morale.

435.action: SWINDLE[/b] sentients into paying a toll to cross the stones
435.text: Roll 6 skill dice to represent various sentients who fall for your con. For every different icon in the results, gain $1.

436.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1028[/b] and 2 boost.

437.text: Starting with the smallest animal, you carry it from the tiny island over to shore. This is enough to get the mother to follow with her other crablets before skittering away. Gain 2 morale.

438.text: You lure the sailor to shore and take the helm. The sailor doesn’t seem to mind all that much; they were just looking for company. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and $4.

439.action: ROB[/b] the sentient of the book
439.text: You successfully steal the artifact, but as you walk away, you find yourself right back where you started. Gain 1 boost.

044.text: You almost immediately regret the decision, as the sand centipede is twenty times your size. But as your father always said, if you can wrangle a horse, you can wrangle anything. Gain animal 832[/b].

440.text: The animal buzzes as you disrupt its task, struggling against your grasp. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Suffer 1 heat damage unless you pay 1 overpower[/b]. Gain animal 814[/b].

441.text: You quietly push off into open water without anyone noticing. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and $4.

442.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item 1178[/b].

443.text: You mount the beast in an attempt to wrangle it into a more peaceful state. At first it tries to buck you like a bronco, but you hold on until the animal calms down. It seems to want to go to the north or east. Gain animal 817[/b].

444.action: EXTRACT[/b] the animal from its perch
444.text: With its golden web sticking to the tree, you slowly extract the animal to get a better look. You discover a puncture wound in its abdomen. Gain 1 boost. You may continue with the help-HEAL[/b][/b] action. If you do, reduce its cost to 3.

445.action: GATHER[/b] intel about the surrounding area
445.text: A mercantile building to the northeast intrigues you, as do the ancient ruins to the west. Directly to the north awaits a monstrous elemental poised to challenge anyone who approaches. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

446.action: SIPHON[/b] some of the elemental’s power
446.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell 1372[/b] and continue with the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

447.text: You embrace a passing sentient as if they’re an old friend, pocketing a few coins from their purse as you do. Gain $X; you may continue.

448.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 977[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 908[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

449.text: Perhaps they notice the theft, but if so, they choose to ignore the distraction. Gain $6.

045.action: ROB[/b] the sentient as they zoom past
045.text: You didn’t know what to expect from the impromptu theft, but an oddly shaped flora wasn’t among your top guesses. Gain flora 1051[/b] and $1.

450.action: BATHE[/b] in the calm, clear water
450.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

451.action: STEAL[/b] one of the sentient’s weapons
451.text: The sentient is so focused on moving covertly that they don’t feel your hand extracting a trident from their back. Gain item 1090[/b].

452.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

453.action: ACCESS[/b] your choice of the building or the orb

choices.option: Access the building (pay 1 take or 1 boost)
choices.outcome: The lock swings open and you slip inside. Go to interior 574[/b].
Look at page 5 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is SE-2. Gain 1 boost.

454.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1028[/b] and 2 boost.

455.action: ACCESS[/b] the building via a side window
455.text: The gatekeeper is so focused on the front door that they don’t notice the intrusion. Go to interior 575[/b].

456.action: ACCESS[/b] the building from the water
456.text: The dock is clear and you slip inside. Go to interior 576[/b].

457.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 942[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

458.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item 1178[/b].

459.action: SALVAGE[/b] spare parts from the wreckage
459.text: Gain either some metal scraps (1184[/b]) or a circuit board (1190[/b]).

046.text: This deep in the planet, the stones have a slightly different composition than those found on the surface. Gain item 1179[/b].

460.text: You quietly push off into open water without anyone noticing. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and $4.

461.text: With its injured wing, the beast can’t fly fast or high, and you easily catch it. Gain animal 823[/b].

462.action: STEAL[/b] an explosive from the sentient
462.text: The sentient is so focused on their task that they don’t notice you. Gain item 877[/b].

463.action: SIPHON[/b] some of the elemental’s power
463.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell 1379[/b] and continue with the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

464.action: ACCESS[/b] the building via a side window
464.text: The window creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior 577[/b].

465.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

466.action: DISTRACT[/b] anyone who might be waiting on the far side of the wall
466.text: You roll a tumbleweed through the gap and aren’t at all surprised to see two bandits pounce on it. Embarrassed, they dart away into the night. Go north to 467[/b].

467.text: The alarm on the chest would have made it significantly more difficult to breach, so you clip the wire and can proceed to pick or force the lock without any issues. Continue with the engage-PICK[/b][/b] or overpower-FORCE[/b][/b] action, reducing the cost by 3.

468.action: STEAL[/b] the lantern hanging from a nearby tree
468.text: There are plenty of other lanterns hanging from trees to the east, so you figure this one won’t be missed. Gain item 1187[/b].

469.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1030[/b] and 2 boost.

047.action: ROB[/b] the hunters while they’re helplessly fighting the sand centipede

470.text: The long-legged animal is pinned by the water, chains, and you, though it resists with a fury. Gain animal 821[/b].

471.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain vehicle 957[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 857[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

472.action: BATHE[/b] in the calm, clear water
472.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

473.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient leaving the city
473.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of vials and potions, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

474.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1028[/b] and 2 boost.

475.text: The nimble beast almost escapes into the brush, but you’re too quick. As the animal cries for help, choose one:

choices.option: Tuck the animal under your arm and jump off the cliff to the east into the water (pay 1 move)
choices.outcome: Gain animal 831[/b] and go to 431[/b].

choices.option: Stay here for a moment and attempt to calm the frightened animal
choices.outcome: The delay gives the animal’s nearby parent time to rescue its youngling. The much larger beast barrels into you and scurries off with the youngling. Lose 1 health and gain 1 boost.

476.text: As you enter the building, you find a sentient facing west, fully absorbed by watching the elemental in that direction. Go to interior 510[/b].

477.text: The Traveler points out a pattern in the waves. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

478.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1031[/b] and 2 boost.

479.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] the sentient from below the waves
479.text: The churning of the water makes your sleight-of-hand imperceptible. Gain $X.

048.action: GRAB[/b] the tail and hang on for the ride
048.text: The sand centipede first slows down in a cavern to the north. Do you dismount?

choices.outcome: Go to cave 043[/b].
The sand centipede turns toward a hole in the ceiling and darts upward at great velocity. It bursts into daylight, and you’re tossed upward, landing on the edge of a cliff. Go to 400[/b].

480.action: EXTRACT[/b] any of the animal’s scales that are marred by the rune
480.text: The animal winces as you remove one scale after another, but it bears the pain. You may need some time to gain its trust, but you’ve found a new companion. Gain animal 848[/b].

481.text: You find some pieces of lava that are pliable but not scalding hot. Gain item 1182[/b].

482.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it remotely to you. You steer it over to the sentients, who latch on and ride it to safety. They cheer your ingenuity and express their gratitude with a gift. Gain item 1252[/b] and 2 morale; the sentients highlight your current location (view page 10 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region G). You may also lose 1 time to gain the runecaster (1029[/b]).

483.text: The animal has nowhere to go, but that’s part of the problem—even in control of it, you have to carry the struggling beast across the water. Gain animal 829[/b].

484.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item 1178[/b].

485.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1089[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

486.text: You’re most excited by the boat you see, though you would need to jump over a gap in the ground to reach it. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

487.text: With a well-timed snap of the wrist, the rope lands at your feet. Gain item 901[/b].

488.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 983[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

489.text: The animals could easily fly away, but curiosity gets the better of them and they hover too close. Gain animal 826[/b] and 1 boost.

049.action: EXTRACT[/b] a ring caught on a nearby spike
049.text: Gingerly avoiding the other spikes, you remove the ring. Gain item 991[/b].

490.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

491.action: SALVAGE[/b] spare parts from the wreckage
491.text: Gain either some metal scraps (1184[/b]) or a circuit board (1190[/b]).

492.text: Your selfish gesture draws the ire of the owner of the sled, a circuit sentient who makes their living transporting people down the mountain. Either keep the sled for yourself (gain vehicle 931[/b] and curse 1396[/b]) or simply pay $3 to the sentient to transport you downhill. Either way, go north to 351[/b].

493.text: The diaphanous beast proves difficult to grasp. At first it thinks you’re playing a game, but it struggles when it realizes your intent. Gain animal 822[/b].

494.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1083[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

495.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] some locals so you can afford to hail a ride
495.text: The locals are too preoccupied with staying atop the slippery cliffside to notice your pilfering. Gain $X; you may continue.

496.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

497.action: ACCESS[/b] the warehouse via an open door
497.text: The door creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior 578[/b].

498.action: SIPHON[/b] some of the elemental’s power
498.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell 1378[/b] and continue with the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

499.action: ROB[/b] the house when the owners are asleep
499.text: You creep into the home (go to interior 579[/b] and lose 1 morale).

050.text: You recognize a pattern in the airflow through the cave. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

500.text: The lava melts through your augsuit before you reach the tower; suffer 1 heat damage. Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item 1178[/b].

501.text: Reaching the device requires you to move across a lava field; suffer 1 heat damage. The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1031[/b] and 2 boost.

502.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1036[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1164[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

503.text: The orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 4 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NE-1. Gain 1 boost.

504.action: DISTRACT[/b] the pirates to give the sailboat time to escape
504.text: With great pageantry, you lure the pirates close enough that the smaller boat has time to sail away. You are their new target, however, so you must immediately go east to 505[/b] or west to 503[/b]; gain 1 morale.

505.text: You play with the sentient for a few minutes, getting close enough to lift a playing card and some coins from their pocket. Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions) and $3.

506.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item 1178[/b].

507.text: “If you’re looking to forge an alliance with these underwater people, there is no greater challenge than to complete the Trial of Strength to the northeast. How long can you hold your breath?” Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b].

508.text: Not only does the animal struggle against your efforts to wrangle it, but you have to outwit the overzealous poachers as it does. Gain animal 847[/b].

509.action: SALVAGE[/b] spare parts from the wreckage
509.text: Gain either some metal scraps (1184[/b]) or a circuit board (1190[/b]).

510.action: STEAL[/b] the most beautiful item from the cottage
510.text: The hardcover tome catches your eye; gain item 1045[/b]. You may push your luck to try to steal another item before the sentient notices. If you do, roll 3 skill dice up to 3 times. If the final result includes a pair or three-of-a-kind, gain item 858[/b] (in addition, the extra bonus for three-of-a-kind is to gain the 3 skills and $3). If not, you’re caught in the act and lose item 1045[/b]. Either way, exit to 476[/b].

511.text: As you reach for a piece of fruit, you realize that there is one fewer piece in the basket than there was a few seconds ago. Gain item 1224[/b] and continue with the look-SOLVE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 1.

512.text: You recognize a pattern in the beams of light pulsing from the lorestones. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

513.text: The sentient seems to prefer their current position, but they reluctantly join you. Gain sentient 1327[/b].

514.action: LOOT[/b] the island of the golden object
514.text: It takes all your strength to wrest the amulet away from its invisible tether. As you do, the lorestones grow dim. Gain item 1035[/b] and curse 1393[/b].

515.action: SIPHON[/b] the essence of the gateway
515.text: You don’t really know what you’re doing, but your instincts lead you to reach into the gateway and tug the diaphanous membrane into your mind. When you do, all goes black. You wake up on the sand with a throbbing headache, but also a newfound potential. Lose 1 health, gain lesson 1428[/b], and gain 1 boost.

516.text: The tree has shed some pleasantly shaped twigs, and you scoop them up. Gain item 1180[/b].

517.text: Heavily favoring their left side, the smelter dusts some sand off the wing with pride in their creation. “Hello, old friend. I’m honored to present your fully functional spaceship, right on schedule. I—” The sentient tumbles from their perch, landing in the desert below. You rush to their side as the fire in their heart burns its last flame. Lose 1 morale and gain vehicle 1033[/b].

518.text: The door opens to reveal a room filled with cushions and the haze of smoke. Several sentients are reclining nearby, oblivious to you. An elaborate pipe rests in the middle of the room. Choose one:

choices.option: Consume a small amount of the pipe’s contents
choices.outcome: Gain item 1103[/b].

choices.option: Steal some coins from an oblivious gold sentient
choices.outcome: Gain $5.

519.action: ACCESS[/b] the hull of the local shipwright office
519.text: A landlocked shipwright doesn’t have much to offer other than an old map or their services. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item 1264[/b].

choices.option: Enlist the shipwright to join you for a journey
choices.outcome: Gain sentient 1364[/b].

520.text: The lantern store owner is befuddled that a corporeal sentient like you would want a lantern. Choose one:

choices.outcome: They explain that energy sentients live inside lanterns. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost as you feel the warm glow of a lantern.
Gain item 953[/b].
Gain item 953[/b] and curse 1395[/b].

choices.option: Assist the lantern maker with their craft to gain some spare change
choices.outcome: Gain $4 and 1 boost.

521.text: Circuit sentients lounging in a circle take turns inhaling from a large hookah. Choose one:

choices.option: Recline in the lounge without trying the hookah
choices.outcome: Roll 5 skill dice. Gain 1 morale for each help[/b] result, then gain 1 health.

choices.option: Consume a tiny breath of hookah
choices.outcome: Gain item 867[/b].

522.text: Half a dozen cameras and scanning devices grant you permission to enter the security store. The owner, however, is quite friendly. Choose one:

choices.option: Steal a map showing various buildings around the world that may or may not have security systems
choices.outcome: Gain item 1256[/b].

choices.option: Hack into their security system to test for weaknesses as a favor
choices.outcome: Gain ability 1472[/b], $4, and 1 morale.

523.text: The lines etched into the Hall of Souls follow the paths of crystals—or “soulstones,” as the stone sentients say—over the course of many generations. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Your curiosity earns the admiration of the Soulkeeper. Gain sentient 1348[/b].

choices.option: Place a soulstone in the Hall (lose 1 crystal)
choices.outcome: The Soulkeeper appreciates your generosity, and they overlook how you may have originally obtained the crystal. Gain spell 1368[/b].

524.text: A sentient helps themselves to a self-serve salad bar. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 2 health. The nearby sentients nod appreciatively, commenting on how it’s good to see others adopting their vegetarian ways.

choices.option: Steal an entire plant when no one is looking, which is all too easy, given that each of these sentients has only one eye
choices.outcome: Gain flora 1050[/b].

525.text: The smell of warm bread wafts off the bakery conveyor belt. Choose one:

choices.option: Pocket a loaf when the proprietor isn’t looking
choices.outcome: Gain 2 health.

choices.option: Consume a few scraps to assist the baker with quality control
choices.outcome: Gain $3 and 1 health.

526.text: As you admire the paintings in the art gallery, two artists argue over who is more generous. They each offer you something. Gain either a map of treasure chests (1260[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location [view page 17 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region K]) or a handful of coins (gain $15).

527.text: Steam rises from the geothermal pool. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 morale.

choices.option: Extract a crystal from the pool bed
choices.outcome: Gain item 1163[/b].

528.text: The towering military cemetery is covered in blue crystals honoring those who gave their lives in the line of duty. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 2 morale.

choices.option: Steal a crystal from the cemetery
choices.outcome: Gain item 1160[/b] and curse 1385[/b].

529.text: A vendor at a busy street market showcases their array of wares. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Pay $4 for a pair of flippers
choices.outcome: Gain item 927[/b].
Gain item 953[/b] and curse 1393[/b].

053.action: CATCH[/b] a massive animal gliding along the ocean surface
053.text: You track the beast as it slithers just above and just below the water. At the right moment, you jump onto its neck and grab the kelp-like substance sprouting there. Gain animal 855[/b], then roll a skill die and go to where the creature takes you: move[/b] (052[/b]); look[/b] (061[/b]); engage[/b] (477[/b]); help[/b] (452[/b]); take[/b] (367[/b]); overpower[/b] (381[/b]).

530.text: The building advertises itself as a safehouse, but you can tell something nefarious is happening in the back room. You’re horrified to see a rowdy group of people placing bets on two animals on opposite corners of a large cage. Choose one:

choices.option: Catch the smaller animal and run away
choices.outcome: Gain animal 831[/b].

choices.option: Catch the larger animal and run away
choices.outcome: Gain animal 837[/b] and lose 1 health.

choices.option: Steal from the purse of a blissfully unaware sentient
choices.outcome: Gain item 1161[/b] and $3.

choices.option: Consume a series of memories of a famous explorer
choices.outcome: Gain ability 1464[/b].
