602.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1090[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

603.text: It’s only by sheer luck that you grab the same wiring that the animal is flying away with. With a tug you bring the bird-like creature to the ground. Gain animal 820[/b].

604.text: Convince the sentient that you can care for the yellow crystal better than they can. They clearly comprehend you, but their state of shock prevents them from clearly thinking through the consequences of giving up their prized possession. Lose 1 morale and gain item 1164[/b].

605.action: STEAL[/b] a weapon from the den
605.text: The sentients are too busy warming themselves by the fire to notice you taking your pick of their weapons. Gain either a mighty machete (item 919[/b]) or a bow and arrow set (item 956[/b]).

606.text: You avoid getting tangled in their many wires as you pin the sentient’s arms and wrench free a cold blade. You let them keep the other. Gain item 915[/b].

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost and continue as the beasts amble by.
Catch a small animal, angering the parent (lose 1 health and gain animal 812[/b]).
Catch the big animal while their calves scatter (gain animal 812[/b]).

608.text: The machine floods your implant with data. You can’t read it, but it’s presented almost like an endlessly scrolling page of news and other information. You randomly select a link for your implant to download. Visit orb.stonemaiergames.com and enter 111[/b], 171[/b], or 208[/b].

609.text: You scrape at the sled until it breaks free of the ice. Gain vehicle 931[/b] and $3.

610.text: As slow as the dinosaur-like creature is, it’s so stable on its feet that you have difficulty wrangling it. Gain animal 810[/b].

611.text: Following your instincts, you attune with the obelisk and find that you can control its size and movement. It shifts from its levitating position and shrinks to fit into your bag. Gain item 1025[/b].

612.action: SCAVENGE[/b] the junk for something useful
612.text: There’s still a bit of life in part of the nearby circuit board. Gain item 1190[/b].

613.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1030[/b] and 2 boost.

614.action: STEAL[/b] the eye of the ancient
614.text: As difficult as it is to reach and secure the eye, you’re surprised to find that the sentient doesn’t resist; rather, they seem relieved. Gain item 1012[/b] and 1 morale.

615.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1030[/b] and 2 boost.

616.action: SIPHON[/b] some of the elemental’s power
616.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell 1371[/b] and continue with the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

617.action: GATHER[/b] intel about the circuit boards
617.text: From what you can tell, these circuit boards contain information about the cities of the world. The port appears to be semi-compatible with your augsuit. The current user of this information is located to the north. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

618.action: EXTRACT[/b] a cord from one of the masks
618.text: The one mask goes silent, and the other mask actually seems grateful that they’re the only voice in the room. A panel opens in the rock and out slides a small package—a gift, you presume. Gain item 869[/b] and continue.

619.action: DISARM[/b] the sentient of their tool
619.text: The theft infuriates the sentient, and they threaten to curse you if you don’t return the tool immediately. You may either return the tool (gain 2 boost and continue) or keep it (gain item 873[/b] and curse 1396[/b]).

620.text: You carefully unplug the wires from the box and remove it (gain item 948[/b]). As you do, the sentient is released from their chains and falls to the ground in a heap. If you have food or an animal, also gain sentient 1326[/b].

621.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the look-MEMORIZE[/b][/b] action.

622.action: DISARM[/b] the sentient of their helmet
622.text: Without the crown, their face is much less intimidating—they look a bit sheepish, really. “Can you please return my warhelm?” they ask. Choose one:

choices.outcome: They thank you by sharing the fundamentals of mind magic. Gain lesson 1429[/b].
Gain item 1024[/b].

623.text: As you chew on the petal, you feel an instant boost to your memory. You may continue; if you do, gain 1 boost and 1 random skill. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

624.action: STEAL[/b] one of the thick wires
624.text: With a sharp tug, the wire comes crashing down. It will serve as an excellent grappling hook. Gain item 905[/b].

625.text: Avoiding direct skin contact with the powerful crystal, you remove it from the cradle and threaten any sentient from challenging you. You’ve crossed a line, though, and you’re swarmed by angry circuit sentients. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 overpower[/b]. Gain item 1009[/b].

626.action: EXTRACT[/b] a panel from the side of the building and slip inside
626.text: It’s almost too easy to break into the structure. Go to interior 581[/b].

627.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient leaving the city
627.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of crystals, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

628.text: Whistling nonchalantly, you slip the pliers into your augsuit pocket. Gain item 883[/b].

629.action: EXTRACT[/b] one of the animal’s thick tentacles from where it’s wedged into the cliff
629.text: You hear a sound like a computer rebooting, and the animal slowly returns to life. Gain animal 808[/b].

630.text: The vehicle seems to be on autopilot, which you easily override. Gain vehicle 1010[/b] and $2.

631.action: FORAGE[/b] for an elegant piece of seaweed
631.text: Amidst gently waving plants, you find item 1181[/b].

632.text: It has a salty, acidic taste that leaves welts on your tongue. Gain 1 boost; unless you continue, lose 1 health.

633.text: The creature is quite slippery, like a wet balloon. Finally you wrangle it. Gain animal 806[/b].

634.text: You find some aquatic mushrooms growing from the nutrient-rich ocean shelves: Gain item 1136[/b].

635.text: Your entire body begins to glow, illuminating the surrounding area with perfect clarity. You may continue with a look[/b] action, changing the result of 1 challenge die to another die face. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

636.action: EXTRACT[/b] the sentient from the twister
636.text: You exploit the sea spout’s own momentum to extract the sentient. The two of you are sent hurtling to the west. Gain sentient 1347[/b] and go to 430[/b].

637.text: You feel energized beyond what you would call natural. Gain lesson 1424[/b]. You may continue; if you do, gain 1 look[/b].

638.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

639.text: You don’t settle for a good bone—you find a great one! Gain item 1186[/b].

640.action: ACCESS[/b] the building via a side window
640.text: The guards are focused on sentients trying to avoid the outpost, not enter it. Go to interior 582[/b].

641.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient leaving the city
641.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of blue crystals, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

642.text: The beast seems more than willing to follow your directions and welcomes you into its cavernous, oxygenated mouth. You may hitch a ride northwest to 476[/b], northeast to 478[/b], southeast to 647[/b], or southwest to 635[/b]. When you arrive, ignore the hypoxia damage (if any).

643.action: GRAB[/b] onto an animal as it darts north
643.text: The animal doesn’t seem to mind the extra weight. Go to 644[/b].

644.action: SALVAGE[/b] spare parts from the wreckage
644.text: Gain either some metal scraps (1184[/b]) or a circuit board (1190[/b]).

645.action: ROB[/b] the sentient of their weapon
645.text: The sentient is just as impressed as they are bewildered that you pulled a fast one on them, and they let you keep the weapon without a fight. Gain item 1038[/b].

646.action: MOUNT[/b] the creature like a great underwater steed
646.text: Infuriated by your lack of respect, the sentient has you forcibly removed from the water. Gain curse 1385[/b]. All fades to black, and when you wake up, you’re on location 139[/b].

647.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the overpower-FIGHT[/b][/b] action.

648.action: CONSUME[/b] a tendril of the kelp
648.text: The kelp tastes strongly of blood. You fight through the flavor, hoping that you don’t develop vampiric tendencies. You may remove a boost from a sentient in your grid; if you do, gain 1 health and 1 overpower[/b]. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

649.text: There are several gaps big enough to reach inside the shipwreck. Gain ability 1511[/b] and go to interior 012[/b].

650.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] the sentient while pretending to console them
650.text: The motion of the currents makes your deft pilfering indetectable. Gain $X.

651.text: You grab onto the animal and spiral toward the ocean floor until it stops fighting back. Gain animal 850[/b].

652.text: You descend upon the guard wielding the pikestaff; with a clever twist, the weapon is yours. Gain item 1210[/b] and continue.

653.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped due to exposure to the salt water. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1161[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 885[/b]. Otherwise, a trap springs out of the chest, knocking the air from your lungs (suffer 1 hypoxia damage).

654.text: This area is void of other sea life— clearly, there is danger among these beautiful creatures. Whether you move or cut your way through, precision is necessary. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

655.text: On the ocean floor you find some intact sheets of glass. Gain item 1194[/b].

656.text: Amidst the rubble near a cave, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item 1179[/b].

choices.option: Drop the stone into the cave
choices.outcome: The stone sinks, but not far—perhaps the cave isn’t nearly as deep as you thought. If you dare, you may gain 1 look[/b] and continue with the look-EXPLORE[/b][/b] action.

657.action: SIPHON[/b] some of the elemental’s power
657.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell 1380[/b] and continue with the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

658.action: EXTRACT[/b] some air from the cord
658.text: You may immediately move north or west; if you do, don’t suffer hypoxia damage upon arrival. Otherwise, continue.

659.text: Despite the Traveler’s warning, you can’t resist the allure of treasure. Gain item 1083[/b] and $10. As soon as the gravekeeper sees your transgression, they curse you (gain curse 1385[/b]) and attack. Continue with an overpower--DEFEND[/b][/b] action.

660.action: GRAB[/b] the animal and hang on
660.text: The eel-like creature twists and turns, trying to throw you off. It drags you toward the anemone field to the west. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost and continue.
Lose 1 health and gain animal 848[/b]; go to 654[/b].

661.text: A vehicle-creature hybrid meanders over to you, and you take the opportunity to grab the reins and steer it as you wish. Gain vehicle 1013[/b] with 1 boost on it, and gain $3.

662.action: ACCESS[/b] the building via a side window
662.text: The window creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior 584[/b].

663.action: SCAVENGE[/b] for lost items in the tall grass near the stone
663.text: You locate an old playing card. Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions).

664.action: SIPHON[/b] the essence of the stone
664.text: You don’t really know what you’re doing, but your instincts lead you to reach into the gateway and tug the diaphanous membrane into your mind. When you do, all goes black. You wake up on the grass with a throbbing headache, but also a newfound potential. Lose 1 health, gain lesson 1428[/b], and gain 1 boost.

665.text: The short sentient, their head barely peeking above the long grass, is wearing a translation device. You forcefully rob them of it. Gain item 891[/b] and curse 1386[/b].

666.action: HACK[/b] the device floating in front of the tree
666.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but thanks to your ingenuity and the tree’s advice, you are able to pair it to you. Gain item 1027[/b].

667.action: STEAL[/b] from the couple while their attention is on each other
667.text: You don’t feel great about it, but you’re excited by what you find. Lose 1 morale and gain item 949[/b] and $6.

668.text: Just like the tiny cockroaches that have survived every interplanetary war, this insect is difficult to catch. Unlike the cockroaches you know, this one bites back. Gain animal 853[/b].

669.text: You take the most plump mushroom in the field. Gain item 1136[/b].

670.action: CONSUME[/b] a petal from the lotus near the rune
670.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

671.text: Gain a sticky stick (1180[/b]) or a leafy leaf (1181[/b]).

672.text: The sentient begs you not to take their fishing pole, as it is their livelihood. Choose one:

choices.option: Take the fishing pole despite the sentient’s request
choices.outcome: Lose 1 morale and gain item 921[/b].

choices.option: Respect their wishes and agree not to steal the fishing pole
choices.outcome: The sentient rewards you with a bag of fish and some old playing cards. Gain 1 health and 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions).

673.text: The sentient isn’t carrying much, just a few coins and a well-worn deck of cards. Gain $3 and 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions).

674.action: STEAL[/b] some fresh fruit from the animal’s basket without the animal noticing
674.text: Gain item 1224[/b]. The animal doesn’t notice your sticky fingers; you may continue with the help-SHARE[/b][/b] action.

675.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 973[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions). Otherwise, gain $4.

676.text: The sentient freely offers either their only possession (gain a recipe book, item 1223[/b]) or their expertise as an herbalist (gain sentient 1350[/b]). If you pay 1 take[/b], you may instead gain an antidote (865[/b]).

677.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient leaving the city
677.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of berries, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

678.text: It seems that the convincing factors are your feet, the likes of which are fascinating to the sentient. Gain sentient 1363[/b].

679.text: Hoping that the spooky fungus won’t follow you, you access the orb. Inside you see a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 6 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is SW-4. Gain 1 boost.

680.text: The nimble animal nearly evades you, but you snare its legs and it crashes to the ground. Gain animal 854[/b].

681.text: You identify a pattern in the silky strands. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

682.action: ROB[/b] the house when the owners are asleep
682.text: You creep into the home (go to interior 586[/b] and lose 1 morale). You may not choose the engage-PERSUADE[/b][/b] action there on any future turn.

683.text: The sentient is either gullible or generous, but the result is the same to you. Gain item 1213[/b].

684.action: CATCH[/b] a threat to the hummingbats
684.text: Sometimes the best way to avoid a trap is to surprise it. You spring onto the large beetle hiding on the tree to the left, grabbing its pincers and wrestling it to the platform. Gain animal 1221[/b].

685.text: The berry is plump and delicious, and you immediately feel a surge of adrenaline. You may continue with an overpower[/b] action, ignoring any time results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

686.text: The variety of trees offer a variety of choices, and among them you find a particularly impressive branch (gain item 1180[/b]).

687.action: GATHER[/b] intel about the surrounding area
687.text: A hulking creature looms to the direct north, and massive trees touch the clouds to the northwest and northeast. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

688.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item 1178[/b].

689.action: GRAB[/b] the cats by the scruff of their necks
689.text: Your kittens have never liked when you do this, and their claws are quite sharp. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all help[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 help[/b]. Gain animal 827[/b].

690.text: Snooping around, you learn that this site was once a hub for worldwide travel, but the portals fell into disrepair. A key element required for fixing the gateways is a spell for controlling the space between things, and there are rumors of such sorcery also powering a mysterious box of pure light to the northeast. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

691.action: EXTRACT[/b] the source of the light from among the roots
691.text: With the dexterity of someone half your age, you bend and twist into the roots. Inside, you find a glowing shard. Gain item 1225[/b].

692.text: One does not simply catch a blossom hulk, but it doesn’t seem to mind you trying to mount it. Gain animal 841[/b].

693.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the move-SCALE[/b][/b] action.

694.action: LOOT[/b] the ruins of any items they contain
694.text: Gain 1 take[/b] and go to interior 546[/b].

695.text: The barn is empty except for a few saddles. Gain item 958[/b].

696.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

697.action: SALVAGE[/b] spare parts from the wreckage
697.text: Gain either some metal scraps (1184[/b]) or a circuit board (1190[/b]).

698.text: Amidst the rubble near a cave, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item 1179[/b].

choices.option: Throw the stone into the cave
choices.outcome: The stone strikes a nearby target—perhaps the cave isn’t nearly as deep as you thought. If you dare, you may gain 1 look[/b] and continue with the look-EXPLORE[/b][/b] action.

699.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a few travelers along the path
699.text: The travelers are surprised by the break in the path, and they don’t notice you taking a few coins from their pockets. Gain $X; you may continue.

700.text: You take a beautiful piece of ivory from the skeleton. Gain item 1186[/b].

701.text: As you access the box, you feel all of your possessions peel away from you.If you have any sentients, animals, flora, or items, they remain on this location (set them aside on location 701[/b]; refresh any challenge dice on them and keep any boost on them. You will regain them automatically if you return here in the future). When you step out of the box, you’re at a different location (369[/b]), unarmed and vulnerable to the haunting elemental looming over you; ignore the “upon arrival” instructions and read entry 369[/b] in the Book of Secrets.

702.text: The creature lurking behind the lotus lashes out protectively, briefly impeding your path to the flower before scuttling away. The taste of the lotus reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

703.text: You embrace the hulk like an old friend, a gesture to which they’re too shocked to respond. Gain item 1261[/b] and $4.

704.text: The orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 6 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is SW-2. Gain 1 boost.

705.text: The animal, hoping for a friend, is taken aback by the aggressive approach. Gain animal 838[/b].

706.action: CATCH[/b] one of the pursuing animals
706.text: Your act of mercy gives the injured animal time to get away while its pursuers turn their attention to you. You stand firm over your captive, and they eventually fly away. Gain animal 840[/b].

707.text: You realize you’re not alone in the serene valley, and you set your sights on a target to the north. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

708.text: The sentient isn’t armed with anything other than some climbing gear. Gain item 884[/b].

709.text: With a firm tug, the rope comes tumbling from above. Gain item 903[/b].

710.text: You make your way through a small crowd that has gathered to admire the view, pocketing a few coins from their purse as you do. Gain $X; you may continue.

711.text: The lizard-like beast is slow but strong. Gain animal 837[/b].

712.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item 1031[/b] and 2 boost.

713.action: SALVAGE[/b] spare parts from the wreckage
713.text: Gain either some metal scraps (1184[/b]) or a circuit board (1190[/b]).

714.text: The sentient reveals that a long-forgotten truce between stone and wind sentients resulted in a few select sentients like them learning the secrets to cloudcrafting. You convince them that you’re an emissary from the wind sentients, and they reluctantly share their knowledge with you. Gain spell 1379[/b].

715.action: ENLIST[/b] the sentient to join you
715.text: The sentient scans the area for any other soul-seekers. Finding no other takers, they join you for your journey. Gain sentient 1348[/b].

716.text: Amidst the rubble near a cave, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item 1179[/b].

choices.option: Drop the stone into the cave
choices.outcome: The stone strikes a nearby target—perhaps the cave isn’t nearly as deep as you thought. If you dare, you may gain 1 look[/b] and continue with the look-EXPLORE[/b][/b] action.

717.action: BATHE[/b] in the calm, clear water
717.text: The warm water feels amazing as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

718.text: The sentient is eager to join you, and they urge you to head west for reasons you don’t quite understand. Gain sentient 1345[/b].

719.text: You push aside some rubble to find a long-forgotten entrance to the hostel. Go to interior 013[/b].

720.text: You take a beautiful piece of ivory from the skeleton. Gain item 1186[/b].

721.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the look-CALCULATE[/b][/b] action.

722.text: You watch as a sentient walks up to the ledge and steps off. They drop into the clouds but are instantly bounced up to the other side. Tears stream down their face as they walk away. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

723.action: SCAVENGE[/b] for lost items in the moss near the stone
723.text: You locate an old playing card. Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions).

724.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Unfortunately, the commotion awakens the nearby stoneskin lizard. It pounces on you, scattering the chest’s contents across the crag. Lose 1 health and gain 1 boost. If you pay 1 take[/b], also gain animal 837[/b].

725.action: GATHER[/b] intel about the gully ahead
725.text: You recognize a well-worn path leading from the sign toward the west. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

726.text: You catch the attention of the angry sentient, giving the others time to scurry to the north. They drop a token of their appreciation on the ground for you to pick up. Gain item 876[/b].

727.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient leaving the city
727.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of court documents, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

728.action: STEAL[/b] the sentient’s bag after they jump
728.text: Inside you find a rope, some coins, and a slate with a description of a lost pet. Gain item 902[/b], $3, and quest 1650[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

729.action: SIPHON[/b] some of the elemental’s power
729.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell 1368[/b] and continue with the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

730.action: STEAL[/b] one of the torches in the ground
730.text: Several oil torches are scattered around the base of the mining operation. Gain item 1085[/b].

731.action: SALVAGE[/b] spare parts from the wreckage
731.text: Curiously, some of the wreckage isn’t from your ship. It appears to have drifted on the tide from the north. Gain either some metal scraps (1184[/b]) or a circuit board (1190[/b]).

732.action: LOOT[/b] the ruins of the ship
732.text: Gain ability 1511[/b] and go to interior 791[/b].

733.text: You manage to sneak through the jungle to the pearl, but when you touch it, your mind goes blank, save for three glowing symbols. Choose life (gain spell 1236[/b]), spirit (gain spell 1237[/b]), or mind (gain spell 1238[/b]).

734.action: EXTRACT[/b] something from inside the rift
734.text: You reach into the rift and grab blindly at anything you can remove. Your fingers grasp something wet and slimy, and you find yourself holding a giant piece of seaweed from the past. Gain flora 1061[/b].

735.text: The creature is so focused on their task that they don’t notice you reaching into the transparent orb and removing their few possessions. Gain item 941[/b] and $2.

736.action: EXTRACT[/b] a shard of glass from the sand
736.text: As you take the shard, you realize just how many tiny pieces of glass are in the sand. They are unavoidable if you travel north. Gain item 1194[/b] and curse 1390[/b].

737.action: ROB[/b] the house when the owners are asleep
737.text: You creep into the home (go to interior 588[/b] and lose 1 morale).

738.text: You quietly push off into open water without anyone noticing. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and $4.

739.action: EXTRACT[/b] the first precious item you find on the island
739.text: You nimbly-yet-quietly swing from a tree to the east onto the island and land on top of a rusted, vine-covered mech. Suddenly, 3 pirate guards attack from above. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 overpower[/b]. Gain vehicle 984[/b].

740.text: The sentient is frantic with concern regarding a tree that was in this grove the last time they checked. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

741.text: You recognize a pattern in the masonry—this isn’t an entirely natural arch. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

742.text: The sentient indulges you as if you are a child, rolling their eye and giving you their purse. They predict you will soon lose the money at the casinos to the north. Gain curse 1390[/b], $5, and 1 boost.

743.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] the sentient as you greet them
743.text: The sentient’s thrashing gives you ample cover for a quick act of pilfering. Gain item 1251[/b].

744.action: ACCESS[/b] the building while the sentients are distracted by a large creature to the east
744.text: The building is open-air, so you walk right in. Go to interior 587[/b].

745.text: You quietly set sail into open water without anyone noticing. Gain vehicle 1156[/b] and $3.

746.action: BATHE[/b] in the calm, clear water
746.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

747.text: The creature is quite nimble—it doesn’t have the legs to outrun you, but it avoids your grasp for a while and bares sharp teeth if you catch it from the wrong angle. Gain animal 834[/b] and 1 boost.

748.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient leaving the city
748.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of clocks, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

749.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each move[/b]/look[/b]/help[/b] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

750.text: Rarely is “disarm” taken so literally as with this beast. With a mighty swing, you slice cleanly through one of its eight arms, the tentacle writhing on the surf. The kraken takes to the sea while the residents prepare a feast using the meat as the main course. They present you with a gift. Gain item 899[/b], 1 health, and 1 take[/b].

751.text: The naive youngster doesn’t know any better, agreeing to give you their sole possession for one of yours. Lose 1 card to gain animal 834[/b].

752.action: SIPHON[/b] some of the elemental’s power
752.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell 1381[/b] and continue with the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

753.action: STEAL[/b] a blue vial from the rider in the back
753.text: The sentient is on high alert, but you seem to find yourself in the exact best position every time they glance around. Gain item 862[/b] and continue.

754.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the move-SPEED[/b][/b] action.

755.action: SCAVENGE[/b] the wreckage for spare parts
755.text: You find some climbing gear. Gain item 904[/b].

756.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1189[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

757.text: Amidst the rubble near a cave, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item 1179[/b].

choices.option: Throw the stone into the cave
choices.outcome: The stone strikes a nearby target—perhaps the cave isn’t nearly as deep as you thought. If you dare, you may gain 1 look[/b] and continue with the look-EXPLORE[/b][/b] action.

758.text: You climb just above the animal’s snout and hang on for dear life, all the while steering it into the jungle until it calms down. Gain animal 832[/b].

759.action: DISARM[/b] the sentient of its staff
759.text: One second you have the staff in your hands as you spring away, and the next you’re back where you started. You try it again with the same result. Finally you grab the staff and wave it around instead of running. You can’t explain the result, but both sentients disappear. Gain item 934[/b].

076.action: CONSUME[/b] a taste of the white flakes
076.text: You feel a tingling sensation spread across your tongue. Gain item 867[/b] and continue.

760.action: ACCESS[/b] the building via a side window
760.text: You pull yourself through a second-level window. Go to interior 561[/b].

761.text: With a deft flick of the wrist, you dislodge the rope from the wall. Gain item 903[/b].

762.action: ENLIST[/b] the sentient to join you
762.text: The sentient is happy to join you, but only if you exit the city to the west or south. If you agree, gain sentient 1328[/b]. Otherwise, if you prefer to travel elsewhere, gain 1 boost.

763.action: GRAB[/b] a tree branch and hold it as if were a precious item as you walk toward the entrance
763.text: The guards nod appreciatively at your offering and open the doors for you. Go to interior 589[/b].

764.text: In their drunken revelry, they don’t notice your hands in their purses. Gain $X; you may continue.

765.action: LOOT[/b] some of the cargo in the landing zone
765.text: You whistle nonchalantly while dragging away a large crate. Gain item 1034[/b].

766.action: COERCE[/b] the captain to let you board the balloon, threatening to otherwise shoot it down
766.text: This isn’t a good start to your relationship, but you make up a sad story to gain their sympathy. Choose for them to drop you off either in the northwest (461[/b]), north (345[/b]), or northeast (346[/b]).

767.text: You embrace the sentient as if they’re an old friend, pocketing a few coins from their purse as you do. Gain $X; you may continue.

768.action: STEAL[/b] a map from the vendor
768.text: While the sentient is distracted, you snatch a map from the stand and stick it under your shirt. Gain item 1154[/b].

769.action: ACCESS[/b] the building via a side window
769.text: The window creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior 590[/b].

077.text: The nearest sentient has left their weapon on the ground, so you grab it (gain item 1151[/b]). Before the other sentient can pick up their crossbow, if you pay 1 boost, you can grab it too (gain item 1152[/b]). The helpless sentients fall silent and refuse to engage; exit to 346[/b] and continue.

770.text: You furtively reach into the boat and take a rolled-up parchment before whistling to yourself and walking away. Gain item 1258[/b] and continue; if you pay 1 take[/b], you can loot the boat itself (gain vehicle 1156[/b]).

771.text: Through a series of clever social and legal maneuvers, you wrest control of the ship away from the captain. Gain vehicle 1016[/b] and $8.

772.action: HIJACK[/b] the vessel and dock it away from the sentient
772.text: Seeing that you’re not leaving the city, the sentient disappears underwater. The captain of the ship is just relieved that they avoided the coast guard. Gain vehicle 1015[/b] and $5.

773.text: You recognize a pattern in the stones and potential in the tiny gateway. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

774.action: STEAL[/b] the axe when the sentient isn’t looking
774.text: The sentient is preoccupied by their blacksmithing or too trusting or both. Gain item 872[/b].

775.action: STEAL[/b] a parchment from the sentient as you pass on the path
775.text: When the sentient is out of sight, you open the parchment to find instructions to assassinate the King of Souls. Gain 1 boost, 1 overpower[/b], and quest 1635[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

776.text: You weave a web of lies about who you are and the poor quality of the garments. You don’t feel good about it (lose 1 morale), but your sharp tongue results in a deep discount on a warm coat; you may pay $2 to gain item 922[/b].

777.action: COERCE[/b] the guard let you enter the building
777.text: The guard admires your tactics and takes you on a shortcut inside. Gain 1 time and go to interior 583[/b].

778.text: The fruit looks good on the outside, and you take a risky bite. Roll X dice. If the results include at least 1 help[/b], gain item 1224[/b] and 1 health. Otherwise lose 1 health and gain 1 boost.

779.action: FORAGE[/b] for some strong vines along the wall
779.text: You find some healthy, sturdy vines. Gain item 1181[/b].

078.action: CONSUME[/b] a fleck of the white substance from the air
078.text: You feel a tingling sensation spread across your tongue. Gain item 867[/b] and continue.

780.action: BATHE[/b] in the calm, clear water
780.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

781.action: DISARM[/b] the sentient on the right
781.text: With a well-calculated gesture, you tear away what at first appears to be a weapon but is actually some sort of metal sieve. Choose one:

choices.outcome: They thank you profusely and offer you a reward (gain $10) or their services as a guide (gain sentient 1336[/b]).
Its owner yells at you as you walk away. Gain item 980[/b] and curse 1390[/b].

782.action: ROB[/b] the sentient in their moment of weakness
782.text: The sentient puts up no resistance. Gain $5.

783.action: COERCE[/b] the sentient into granting you access to the bank vault
783.text: The Traveler is helpless to intervene as you bully the sentient. The sentient leads you into a hidden cave-like entrance to the bank. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay 1 overpower to force the sentient to provide a secret phrase to the guardian
choices.outcome: Go to cave 090[/b].

choices.option: Release the sentient as you face the guardian alone
choices.outcome: Go to cave 030[/b].

784.action: LOOT[/b] the ruins of any items they contain
784.text: You slip deftly into the ruins. Go to interior 548[/b].

785.action: STALL[/b] until you can’t hear anyone on the bridge
785.text: While you wait, you may pay 1 boost to gain any 2 skills. You may then go into the city to the northwest (780[/b]) or follow north atop the wall surrounding the city (786[/b]).

786.action: DISTRACT[/b] the guards and slip inside behind them
786.text: The guards fall for your tomfoolery; go to interior 591[/b].

787.text: It takes guts and guile to pickpocket a metal sentient, but you manage to catch this one off guard. Gain item 860[/b] and $3.

788.text: It takes all of your cunning to steal a map from the sentient, and they’re so impressed that they offer to accompany you if you give it back. You may gain sentient 1339[/b]; if not, gain item 1264[/b] (the sentient highlights your current location [view page 21 in the Book of Vantage; you are in region I]).

789.action: ROB[/b] the sentient of their most expensive weapon
789.text: The sentient shakes their head sadly as you hold them at bay. “There is no glory in this type of theft,” they say. “I’d respect you if you stole something without me seeing you, but this… this is barbaric.” Gain item 1038[/b] and curse 1391[/b].

079.action: GRAB[/b] onto a spinning boulder and hang on as it spins around the cavern
079.text: You grow dizzier the longer you hang onto the rock. If you pay 1 move[/b], you time your dismount perfectly (proceed deeper into the planet to cave 046[/b]). Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

790.text: Before anyone notices, you tuck the book under your arm and walk away. Gain item 1045[/b].

791.text: As you rifle through the ship, you realize that it has all the signs of a scouting vessel for a colony ship, except with one key difference: The ship features 12 compartments, each labeled with a different element, the origins of life on this planet. Gain 2 boost and continue.

795.action: LOOT[/b] the conspicuously empty room, staying on alert
795.text: As you enter the room, a sentient springs from their hiding place to the right. Gain 1 random skill and choose one:

choices.outcome: Dodge the sentient and exit the cathedral to 281[/b].
You hogtie the intruder and steal the book (1044[/b]), the rifle (1153[/b]), or the talisman (1157[/b]) then exit to 281[/b].
The sentient crashes into you, knocking you unconscious with the butt of their rifle. Lose 1 health and exit to 281[/b].

799.action: LOOT[/b] the pit of any treasure left behind by less fortunate sentients
799.text: A wealthy sentient fell to their doom here, leaving behind a purse full of coins. Gain $13 and continue.

080.action: STEAL[/b] a gold zamazingo from the pile when the sentient’s back is turned
080.text: The token is scalding hot, and you’re barely able to hold back a squeal of pain. Lose 1 health and gain item 1099[/b].

801.action: LOOT[/b] the shard from the sky island
801.text: Just in case someone is watching, you wait for clouds to enshroud the area and take the shard. Gain item 1707[/b].

081.text: Your augsuit is flooded with data, so it filters the most recent and most prevalent threads. It seems that the circuit sentients have been trying to determine how to unplug from this planet and venture into the unknown, but their entire technological system is wire-based. Gain destiny 1606[/b] (place it in the center) and 2 boost.

082.action: EXTRACT[/b] the crystal without breaking the ice
082.text: Fortunately, the ice is thick enough to hold your weight as you wiggle the crystal free. Gain item 1160[/b] and 1 morale.

083.action: SIPHON[/b] the essence of the gateway
083.text: You don’t really know what you’re doing, but your instincts lead you to reach into the gateway and tug the diaphanous membrane into your mind. When you do, all goes black. You wake up on the stairs with a throbbing headache, but also a newfound potential. Lose 1 health, gain lesson 1428[/b], and gain 1 boost.

084.action: EXTRACT[/b] a piece of the crystal
084.text: Leaning off the edge, you just barely snap off a small crystal, but you catch your forearm on a sharp rock as you do. Lose 1 health and gain item 1164[/b]. You may continue with the move-BALANCE[/b][/b] action.

085.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a few drunk, distracted sentients
085.text: The sentients are preoccupied by the rowdy contest and don’t notice your pilfering. Gain $X; you may continue.

086.text: Some lava splashes onto a rock, cooling enough that you can pick it up. Gain item 1182[/b].

087.text: There are an abundance of torches throughout the mine, so no one will notice if one goes missing. Gain item 1086[/b].

088.action: EXTRACT[/b] a crystal from among the roots
088.text: It’s difficult to find good footing among the slick moss, but you finally manage to pull out a crystal. Gain item 1161[/b].

089.action: EXTRACT[/b] a crystal from the walls of the cavern
089.text: A fistsize piece of green crystal breaks free. Gain item 1163[/b].

090.text: You don’t want to raise the sentinel’s suspicion, so you grab a handful of coins and head for an exit. Gain $10.

091.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped due to the humidity. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 5 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1020[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1036[/b]. Otherwise, gain $8. You may continue.

917.text: Your instincts lead you to reach into the energy flowing through the key. When you do, all goes black. You wake up with a throbbing headache, but also a newfound potential. Lose 1 health, gain lesson 1428[/b], and gain 1 boost on your character.

092.action: EXTRACT[/b] the crystal from the pedestal
092.text: A large piece of the crystal breaks free. Gain item 1165[/b].

093.action: PILFER[/b] some circuit boards from the entrance to the maze
093.text: You carefully extract some exposed circuitry from the wall. Gain item 1190[/b] and continue.

094.action: PICKPOCKET[/b] a sentient leaving the city
094.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of maps, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

095.action: STEAL[/b] an egg and slip away
095.text: You have a feeling the mother is nearby, so you remove the closest egg and leave. Gain item 1155[/b] and go to cave 035[/b].

096.text: You quite literally catch the dragon off guard— apparently others who have ventured into its lair have come to fight, not wrangle. It still puts up quite a struggle. Roll 7 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 overpower[/b]. Gain animal 807[/b].

097.text: As far as you can tell, someone has weaponized these devices. You carefully disarm them, and they become a source of good. Gain item 865[/b] and 1 morale.

098.action: GATHER[/b] intel about the labyrinth of roots before proceeding forward
098.text: Based on the position of the doors and bridges, you determine the optimal route. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

988.text: Your instincts lead you to reach into the portal generator. When you do, all goes black. You wake up with a throbbing headache, but also a newfound potential. Lose 1 health, gain lesson 1428[/b], and gain 1 boost on your character.

099.text: The tour guide and their two guests are surprised by the intrusion, but they’re at the end of the tour, so the couple wanders off and the guide—a rune specialist—agrees to remain with you for a small fee (pay $2 to gain sentient 1329[/b]). Whether or not you pay, you may advance deeper into the planet, to dungeon 599[/b]. If you do, do not lose health upon arrival, and keep this location for reference.

100.action: PRAISE[/b] the sentient for their clothing
100.text: After an uncomfortable silence, the sentient compliments your clothing with even more effusive praise. They offer you some pointers on how to give better compliments. Gain ability 1480[/b], 1 boost, and 1 random skill.

101.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 853[/b]. If not, you smile as the animal nuzzles against your hand (gain 1 morale).

1010.action: UPGRADE[/b] into a more advanced vehicle
1010.text: The circuit sentients, who have been watching you ever since you obtained one of their levitating cubes, are in awe that you have retained your sanity despite untethering from the planet. They reassure you in a completely unreassuring way that they have no intentions to spread their influence throughout the galaxy. Replace this with a partial spaceship (1434[/b]) and gain destiny 1606[/b] (place it in the center); if you have any circuit cards in your grid, gain 3 boost on vehicle 1434[/b].

102.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
102.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

choices.outcome: The sentient is overjoyed to see you planting the seeds. They ask you to travel with them through the time portal to the north and find the future version of this location. If you accept, lose item 1020[/b] to gain sentient 1364[/b] and quest 1699[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply). Otherwise, gain 1 boost on the sea seed card.

choices.option: If you are not on location 740 (you may only choose this option once per game)
choices.outcome: You notice a small piece of paper among the seeds that guides you through a secret passage. If you ignore the instructions, now or any time in the game you may choose a location to plant this seed (the card remains in your grid until it is full). If you follow the instructions, perform a look--NAVIGATE[/b][/b] action to go to 746[/b]; the grove is just west of there.

1023.action: UPGRADE[/b] into a more advanced vehicle
1023.text: Replace this with a flying pirate ship (1017[/b]).

103.text: You’re impressed that such diminutive creatures were able to construct such a home, but it could still use a makeover. After making some structural improvements, you hear the animals chirp appreciatively. Gain animal 845[/b].

1032.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health.

104.action: CRAFT[/b] an item from the small tree
104.text: As you reach for a branch, the animal vanishes into thin air. You have a few seconds to study the details of your current location before there’s a flurry of movement in the grove, then the trap door slams shut. Go to 511[/b] and continue.

1040.action: CRAFT[/b] into a more advanced item
1040.text: Replace this with a winter coat (929[/b]).

105.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 803[/b]. If not, the animal presents you with a warm, squirming grub from the roots (gain 1 health).

1057.action: RELAX[/b] in the shade of the maw
1057.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health.

106.action: BUILD[/b] an agricultural establishment in the grove
106.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1296[/b].

1063.action: CRAFT[/b] an arrow from the flora

1066.text: Crafting this vehicle also requires you to attach it to a giant turtle-like animal. Gain vehicle 1013[/b] with 1 boost on it.

107.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

1074.action: CRAFT[/b] an energy key from the flower

1077.action: CRAFT[/b] a blinding grenade from the tree

108.action: HONOR[/b] the sanctity of the shield
108.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place—not to mention one that is probably well-guarded. You bow deeply toward the shield and step away. As you do, a mushroom rolls toward your feet as if of its own accord. Gain flora 1082[/b] and 1 morale.

109.action: OFFER[/b] your support to the sentient
109.text: The sentient seems incredibly uncomfortable that you would offer them your support, but they eventually consent to you accompanying them on their journey south. They insist upon paying you. Gain $3, then you may gain sentient 1350[/b]; if you do, go south to 104[/b].

110.action: CREATE[/b] a truly exceptional flower arrangement for the judges that delights from every angle (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
110.text: Find card 1135[/b], place it on the table, and begin. You must arrange 4 different types of flowers (four stalks of each type) into a grid. All stalks of each type of flower are the same height (1–4). Proceed to fill the grid with up to four stacked tokens per square so that (a) there is only one of each stack height (1–4) in every row and column and (b) specific rows and columns have an exact number of visible flowers when viewed from straight-on angles as indicated by the numbers adjacent to them around the edges (e.g., when looking at the bottom row from the 2 position, only 2 flowers may be visible). Keep in mind taller flowers completely block any shorter flowers behind them. When you are ready to present your flower arrangement, declare the heights of the green squares from left to right. See entry 110[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

111.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple glass item from the broken orb
111.text: You craft a simple but charming glass trinket. Gain item 1091[/b].

112.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 851[/b]. If not, you gain some emotional support as the animal begs for attention by rolling around in the stream (gain 1 morale).

1122.text: Your cats purr louder and louder as you heap them with praise, chin scratches, and head rubs. Gain 2 boost; you may continue.

113.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
113.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

115.text: The cartographers inside the keep are fascinated that you come from the stars, and they have dozens of questions about their star charts. In exchange for your help, they give you an elixir. Gain item 864[/b].

1152.text: Gain X boost on this card.

116.text: The ancient bridge is falling apart—it’s a hazard for any visitor. Using local wood and stone, you patch it up to the best of your ability, much to the gratitude of local leaf sentients. They give you a book in appreciation. Gain item 1192[/b] and either go west to 115[/b] or continue.

117.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue with the take-EXTRACT[/b][/b] action.

118.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 804[/b]. If not, the animal signals to you that there is darkness to the west and beauty to the north (gain 2 boost).

119.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1096[/b].

012.text: Numerous trips to the surface for air are necessary as you reassemble the broken ship. The job would have been even more difficult were it not for the sturdy construction and water-resistant wood. Eventually the ship rises from the depths with you at its helm. Gain vehicle 1015[/b] and float to the ocean surface with it. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (058[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (056[/b]); overpower[/b] (054[/b]).

120.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple item from the salt-soaked wood on the dock
120.text: You contemplatively whittle away. Gain item 1094[/b].

121.text: In appreciation of your unsolicited effort, the owner gives you a big hug and a few coins. Gain $2 and 1 morale.

122.text: You clean out the device and get it working again. You send a quick signal burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

123.text: As advanced as the technology is, you identify a few key areas of the interstellar communication device that could be improved. As you tinker, some curious engineers observe and take notes. They express their appreciation by presenting you with a beautiful bouquet of flowers. Gain flora 1074[/b].

1233.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1234.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1235.text: Gain X boost on this card.

124.action: PRAISE[/b] the guard for the impressive security system
124.text: The guard puffs out their chest and launches into a detailed explanation that you could now exploit, if you were inclined to hack your way into the building. Gain 1 boost and 3 take[/b]; you may continue.

125.action: HONOR[/b] the entrance by offering a cultural exchange
125.text: The sentients are amazed to see an alien like you in their midst. They admire your augsuit and present you with a precious artifact. As you try to use it, though, it doesn’t work. If you pay 3 boost, you activate the scepter (gain item 998[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

126.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
126.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

1265.action: HEAL[/b] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1265.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1266.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item 1217[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item 1224[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item 1136[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1267.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item 974[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item 946[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item 922[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1268.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item 868[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item 869[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item 865[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1269.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item 1413[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item 1231[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item 962[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

127.text: Following the Traveler’s lead, you center yourself among the lorestones and bend the knee. Even without runes, their power runs into you. Gain all 6 skills (1 of each).

1270.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item 1154[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item 1259[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item 1262[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1271.action: PRAISE[/b] a sentient for their gaming skills
1271.text: The confident sentient nods at the praise and flicks a tip in your direction. Gain $2. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1272.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item 858[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item 1158[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item 856[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1273.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item 1102[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item 1417[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item 1189[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1274.action: NURTURE[/b] relations between the representatives of several sentient cultures (you may pay 1 boost from this structure to reduce this cost to 1)
1274.text: In an effort to improve diplomatic relations, you host a gathering of several different cultures. Stone, wind, and energy sentients join the summit. The result is a highly constructive conversation about a new competitive sports competition that could bring sentients worldwide together, setting aside old grudges in place of friendlier, low-stakes rivalries. One of the sentients lingers after the discussion is over. Gain wind sentient 1306[/b], energy sentient 1326[/b], or stone sentient 1347[/b].

1275.action: WISH[/b] for love (pay 1 boost from this structure; perform this action at most once per game)

1276.action: SPONSOR[/b] an actor to join theater (pay $1 or 1 boost)
1276.text: Gain 1 boost on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1277.action: CREATE[/b] a special beverage to enhance the menu
1277.text: Gain 1 boost on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1278.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item 928[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item 955[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item 936[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1279.action: RESCUE[/b] an animal to care for in the stables
1279.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain animal 817[/b]. If 2 boost, gain animal 821[/b]. If 3 boost, gain animal 846[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

128.action: HONOR[/b] the sentient by offering a cultural exchange
128.text: The sentient doesn’t seem all that impressed by you, but they give you an opportunity to earn their respect — and perhaps the blade they wield — by solving the mystery of the artifact. Gain 1 boost and continue with the look-SOLVE[/b][/b] action.

1280.action: TEACH[/b] an important lesson to the students
1280.text: Gain 1 boost on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1281.text: The tower allows you to communicate at great distances, making it easy for you to learn news from around the world. People pay well for the connection. Gain $X (X is the number of boost on this structure).

1282.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and $4. If 2 boost, gain vehicle 1022[/b]. If 3 boost, gain vehicle 1010[/b]. All boost remain on this structure.

1283.action: HEAL[/b] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1283.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1284.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item 1094[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item 1093[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item 1100[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1285.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item 1155[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item 978[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item 977[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1286.text: Instead of using the tower to hunt, you use it to help nearby animals. If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain animal 804[/b]. If 2 boost, gain animal 828[/b]. If 3 boost, gain animal 836[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1287.action: REFINE[/b] a crystal (select a different action if you don’t have a crystal card)
1287.text: Gain the result of a REFINE[/b] action on a crystal in your grid. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1288.action: NURTURE[/b] the growth of dangerous flora in the garden
1288.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain flora 1054[/b]. If 2 boost, gain flora 1055[/b]. If 3 boost, gain flora 1058[/b]. The flora gained in this way are tucked under the structure, not in your grid—you cannot use this flora. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1289.action: HEAL[/b] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1289.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

129.action: HONOR[/b] the ancient script on the spire
129.text: As if the runes recognize your restraint and respect, you feel a purifying wave wash over you. Lose 1 curse and gain 1 morale.

1290.action: HEAL[/b] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1290.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1291.action: NURTURE[/b] the growth of rare flora in the greenhouse
1291.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain flora 1066[/b]. If 2 boost, gain flora 1057[/b]. If 3 boost, gain flora 1081[/b]. The flora gained in this way are tucked under the structure, not in your grid—you cannot use this flora. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1292.text: Gain overpower[/b] equal to the number of boost on this structure, then place 1 boost on this structure. If you gained 3 overpower[/b] this turn, you may not perform this action again. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1293.action: TEACH[/b] a special ability to your students
1293.text: As you teach, you better understand the ability. Add 1 boost to an ability card or gain 1 boost on your character. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

013.text: You curl up in the bedroll within the nook. Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health and you may continue. Either way, also gain the bedroll (1040[/b]).

130.action: EXPOSE[/b] one of the sentients for cheating

choices.outcome: The bigger sentient checks the dice, and you’re correct! Gain ability 1499[/b] and $5.
The smaller sentient checks the dice, and you’re wrong. Gain 1 boost.

131.action: OFFER[/b] to assist the sentient in their journey
131.text: The occupant of the tent, a circuit sentient, chokes over their words as they try to admit that they need help. They are suffering from a virus that they believe can only be cured by a healing spell that can be learned by studying the green spires to the east, but this far in their journey they’re too weak to move off the ledge. They give you a fire-cooked meal to prepare you for your journey. Gain 1 boost, 1 look[/b], and quest 1683[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

132.text: From your vantage, the sword is trapped in the stone, and it’s up to you to rescue it. Gain item 889[/b].

133.text: The green energy seeping through the spires reaches toward you. Seconds later—or perhaps hours—your augsuit is functioning at top capacity. Lose 1 time, and gain 1 morale, 1 health, and 1 boost.

134.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

135.action: HONOR[/b] the previous occupants by staying away
135.text: As if the ruins recognize your restraint and respect, you feel a purifying wave wash over you. Lose 1 curse and gain 1 morale.

136.text: As you patch up the masonry around the base of the tower, its occupant thanks you for your help but admits they’re more interested in traveling the world than sitting in this tower all day. They give you their gun and the tower itself. Gain item 1153[/b] and structure 1286[/b].

137.action: CRAFT[/b] a basic item from a bone
137.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item 1092[/b].

138.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
138.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

139.text: Practice your ability to leap (gain ability 1486[/b]), cleave (gain ability 1493[/b]), or scavenge (gain ability 1510[/b]). You may continue with the action matching that ability.

140.action: BUILD[/b] a business along the shore
140.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1298[/b].

1409.text: Gain X boost on this card.

141.action: CRAFT[/b] a basic item from a bone
141.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item 1092[/b].

1410.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1411.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1412.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1413.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1414.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1415.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1416.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1417.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1418.text: Gain X boost on this card.

142.action: CRAFT[/b] a device from spare circuitry
142.text: From the ship’s wiring and microchips, you cobble together a universal translator. Gain item 891[/b].

143.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

1435.action: EQUIP[/b] your saber (perform this action at most once per game)
1435.text: The saber feels like a little slice of home in your hands. Gain item 1299[/b].

1436.action: EQUIP[/b] your binoculars (perform this action at most once per game)
1436.text: The binoculars offer you a fresh perspective of your surroundings. Gain item 1300[/b].

1437.action: EQUIP[/b] your notebook (perform this action at most once per game)
1437.text: The notebook has always helped you process your thoughts in writing. Gain item 1301[/b].

1438.action: EQUIP[/b] your first-aid kit (perform this action at most once per game)
1438.text: The first-aid kit contains everything you need to survive on an alien planet. Gain item 1302[/b].

1439.action: EQUIP[/b] your multi-tool (perform this action at most once per game)
1439.text: The multi-tool has taught you that there is no such thing as a locked door. Gain item 1303[/b].

144.text: The sentient is slow to accept your aid, but they acknowledge that their task is bigger than them. The elemental to the northeast is disrupting the balance of nature, and they seek to quell the threat. Gain either item 861[/b] or sentient 1352[/b].

1440.action: EQUIP[/b] your axe (perform this action at most once per game)
1440.text: The axe was among the first of the many weapons you’ve learned how to use. Gain item 1304[/b].

1441.action: EQUIP[/b] your saber (if you’ve already done this, select another action instead)
1441.text: The saber feels like a little slice of home in your hands. Gain item 1299[/b].

1442.action: EQUIP[/b] your binoculars (if you’ve already done this, select another action instead)
1442.text: The binoculars offer you a fresh perspective of your surroundings. Gain item 1300[/b].

1445.text: The multi-tool has taught you that there is no such thing as a locked door. Gain item 1303[/b].

1446.text: The axe was among the first of the many weapons you’ve learned how to use. Gain item 1304[/b].

1447.text: The saber feels like a little slice of home in your hands. Gain item 1299[/b].

1449.action: EQUIP[/b] your notebook (if you’ve already done this, select another action instead)
1449.text: The notebook has always helped you process your thoughts in writing. Gain item 1301[/b].

145.text: The sentient offers either to heal you or to distribute their healing powers to your friends. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 3 health.
Each other player gains 1 health and you gain 1 morale.

1450.action: EQUIP[/b] your first-aid kit (if you’ve already done this, select another action instead)
1450.text: The first-aid kit contains everything you need to survive on an alien planet. Gain item 1302[/b].

1451.action: EQUIP[/b] your multi-tool (if you’ve already done this, select another action instead)
1451.text: The multi-tool has taught you that there is no such thing as a locked door. Gain item 1303[/b].

1452.action: EQUIP[/b] your axe (if you’ve already done this, select another action instead)
1452.text: The axe was among the first of the many weapons you’ve learned how to use. Gain item 1304[/b].

146.text: The sentient begs you to recover their beloved dustmouse. Gain $1 and quest 1627[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). If you pay 1 boost, also gain sentient 1329[/b].

147.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

148.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

149.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1297[/b].

150.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal hungrily peck a piece of it from your palm. Gain animal 814[/b]. If not, you gain a little warmth thanks to the animal as it flies against you (gain 1 health).

151.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

152.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1096[/b].

153.action: HONOR[/b] the sanctity of the amulet
153.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place—not to mention one that is probably well-guarded. You bow deeply toward the amulet and step away. As you do, the six large birds nearby swoop down and land in your path, returning your bow in unison. One of them plucks a flower and drops it at your feet. Gain flora 1078[/b] and 1 morale.

154.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health and you may continue.

155.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

156.action: BUILD[/b] an agricultural establishment at the confluence
156.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make in this nutrient-rich soil, and you’re surprised to see the large insect inspecting them as if they can help you. Gain blueprint 1296[/b].

157.text: It’s a peaceful, meditative place to let your mind wander while you craft. You’re pleased by how pretty the result is. Gain item 1096[/b].

1577.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1577.text: You work on enhancing skills necessary to complete the mission. Gain 3 overpower[/b].

1578.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1578.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability 1470[/b].

1579.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1579.text: You work on enhancing skills necessary to complete the mission. If you have an experience card, add 1 or 2 boost to it. If not, gain 2 look[/b].

158.action: CRAFT[/b] a vehicle with the sentient
158.text: The sentient explains that their crash left them too depressed to build anything. Without pushing, you patiently offer to help gather materials, and you soon find yourself building a sand skimmer. The sentient indicates that you can keep it for yourself (gain vehicle 1022[/b]) or help them bring it to the next race (gain sentient 1340[/b] and quest 1628[/b]; add the quest horizontally to your supply).

1580.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1580.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain 3 overpower[/b].

1581.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1581.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability 1476[/b].

1582.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1582.text: You work on improving the size of your coin purse so you can hire more sentients: Gain $5.

1583.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1583.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability 1471[/b].

1584.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1584.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability 1500[/b].

1585.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1585.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability 1503[/b].

1586.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1586.text: You work on enhancing skills necessary to complete the mission. Gain 3 help[/b].

1587.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1587.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability 1479[/b].

1588.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1588.text: You work on enhancing skills necessary to complete the mission. Gain any 2 skills.

1589.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1589.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability 1461[/b].

159.action: ASSIST[/b] the sentients with their task
159.text: The sentients appreciate the gesture, explaining that they were born of this volcano, and every day they spend some time trying to keep it alive. They show you how to craft the lava into new creations, and you realize that skill might be quite useful in solving a major problem.
