Gain item 1101[/b] and quest 1695[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

1590.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1590.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain either the wade ability (1489[/b]), to make movement across water easier, or the cut ability (1508[/b]), to remove the signal once you reach the source.

1591.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1591.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability 1488[/b].

1592.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1592.text: You work on enhancing skills necessary to complete the mission. Gain 3 overpower[/b].

1593.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1593.text: You work on enhancing skills necessary to complete the mission. Gain 3 look[/b].

1594.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1594.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability 1509[/b].

1595.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1595.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability 1474[/b].

1596.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1596.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability 1494[/b].

1597.action: HONE[/b] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1597.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability 1482[/b].

016.text: Avoiding the dangerous magma, you reach the sentient and free them from their bonds. They embrace you and promise to repay the favor. Gain sentient 1336[/b], then gain a random skill and move to the dungeon location matching that skill: move[/b] (596[/b]); look[/b] (019[/b]); engage[/b] (018[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] (593[/b]).

160.action: CRAFT[/b] an item to impress the proprietor
160.text: The head blacksmith is mildly amused by your makeshift creation, and they challenge you to make something more difficult. Gain quest 1644[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

161.text: They try to push you away, but not before you remove them from the lava. As the lava cools, they angrily explain that they were trying to free their mother—the volcano itself—from its confines, and you’ve significantly set them back. Gain curse 1394[/b] and 1 boost; you may continue.

162.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient heading toward the city
162.text: They eagerly accept your assistance, and they chatter nonstop about runecaster design and repairs. Gain 1 morale and go to city 525[/b].

163.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 813[/b]. If not, you gain a little comfort thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 morale).

164.action: HONOR[/b] the sanctity of the eye
164.text: It’s clear to you that this place is sacred. You bow deeply toward the eye and step away. As you do, a sentient emerges from the lava and greets you with a hearty laugh. Gain sentient 1319[/b].

165.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

choices.option: Clean some of the gold-like fungal growth from the sentient’s exterior
choices.outcome: The gold peels away, but you worry it will return soon. The sentient mentions that a landwalker friend of theirs to the east is developing a cure. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

You apply the antidote to the gold-encrusted areas on the sentient, and within minutes they begin to dissolve into the water. The sentient, free of pain for the first time in ages, thanks you profusely and gives you $10. While they don’t think their fellow water sentients will care about their renewed health, they know their leaf friend will. Rotate and add quest 1655[/b] to your grid.

166.action: RELAX[/b] to the pleasant sound of the wind chimes
166.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

1662.action: BREW[/b] a stew (requires at least 1 flora)
1662.text: Sinew sentients are vegetarian, but with limited ingredients you are able to brew stew your grandmother would be proud of. The sentients greedily slurp the soup, and they all have opinions about what you could do to add more depth to the flavor. One even hands you a recipe book (gain item 1223[/b]) and encourages you to keep cooking. Rotate quest 1662[/b] and add it to your grid.

1663.text: Choose one, depending on your circumstances:

choices.option: If you’re not on a location with a skeleton
choices.outcome: Refresh all challenge dice other than those placed for this action and continue.

choices.option: If you’re on a location with a skeleton
choices.outcome: Randomize animals 1218[/b]–1220[/b] not in any player’s grid or reserve and gain 1 at random.

1669.action: PLACE[/b] a flag so it captures the wind
1669.text: As soon as you place the flag in the ground, the wind tosses it to life, much to the pleasure of the onlooking elder. Place a token on quest 1669[/b] relative to location 180[/b] (where you gained quest 1669[/b]).

167.text: The tired fire sentient collapses on the ground before you, the fire in their chest barely a spark now. Their life is in danger. You notice some water on their husk, which you dry off with your shirt as you gently fan the flames back to life. The sentient will need some time to recover, but they’re eternally grateful. Gain sentient 1316[/b].

168.action: RELEASE[/b] the elemental from its tether
168.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental 1400[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

1687.action: HEAL[/b] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1687.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1688.action: HEAL[/b] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1688.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1689.action: HEAL[/b] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1689.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

169.text: You notice several sentients wading toward the fixture, each dropping an object into the scalding lava. You realize that all of the objects are weapons. You may lose 1 weapon; if you do, gain spell 1367[/b] and 1 health. Otherwise, simply kneel and gain 1 morale. Either way, continue.

1690.action: HEAL[/b] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1690.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1691.action: HEAL[/b] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1691.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1692.action: HEAL[/b] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1692.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1695.action: TEACH[/b] the fire sentient about the science and art of spaceship construction
1695.text: Gain 1 token on quest 1695[/b], then gain 1 help[/b] for each token on this quest. If there are now 3 tokens on this quest, remove them and read 1695[/b] in the Book of Secrets..

170.action: REPAIR[/b] the gouge in the arch
170.text: You patch up the thin lava tubes, which resemble heating coils. Inspired by the artistry, you create a trinket from some excess tubing. Gain item 1101[/b].

1701.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1705.action: PRAISE[/b] and appreciate the rescue team for their efforts, ending your adventure
1705.text: The game ends as you head back to your homeworld, and you achieve an epic victory if you have also completed the mission. Otherwise, it is impressive that you survived long enough to control your destiny, and your knowledge of the planet will benefit you in the future.

171.action: AID[/b] a sentient in need based on a plea illuminated on the orb’s surface
171.text: The outside of the orb includes requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. One such request is to free some enslaved miners to the north. Gain 1 boost and quest 1671[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

172.text: You spring into action, high-stepping through the waves, throwing yourself onto the deck, and taking hold of the till. The leaf sentient crewmembers thank you heartily and give you a choice: Join them on their northward journey (gain quest 1671[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply), or drop them off on the northern shore and keep the boat (gain vehicle 1156[/b]).

173.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

174.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the take-ENDURE[/b][/b] action.

175.action: ASSIST[/b] the sentient with their task
175.text: The wind sentient gruffly points you to the barrels to the right and asks you to carry them under the hut. In return, they offer you a choice: Gain $2 or sample the sparkling substance (gain item 867[/b]).

176.action: RESCUE[/b] the helpless sentients from the twister
176.text: You pull the closest sentient out of the reach of the small tornado, and they tumble on top of you, bewildered by your unsolicited aid. “How dare you disturb the Dance of Dust!” they admonish you. You quickly apologize and explain the misunderstanding. They nod and jump back into the fray. Gain 1 boost and continue.

177.text: Nearby sentients see your act of respect and express their gratitude that you did not tread on their sacred land. In appreciation they teach you a lesson in magic. Gain lesson 1419[/b].

178.text: The sentient’s aggression softens as they see you caring for the drooping flowers. They explain that these are weeping asterace, so they’re supposed to look sad—just not this sad. Something has plagued them, and they request that you help find a cure. Gain 1 boost and quest 1629[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

179.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1096[/b].

180.action: OFFER[/b] to help the sentient with a task
180.text: The sentient brightens at the prospect of your aid, and they ask you to place some flags in the area so they can more easily see the wind patterns from a distance. Gain 1 help[/b] and quest 1669[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

181.action: PRAISE[/b] the guards for doing their job
181.text: The sentients stand up a little taller, your compliments well received. “We’re the best in the business at protecting the sacred seed,” one of them says. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

182.action: HONOR[/b] the sentient’s culture with a deep bow
182.text: The sentient is pleased that you would pay such respect to their culture, particularly with the sacred field to the south: Few outsiders know not to walk through that field. They offer to show you around if you’re venturing west; if so, gain sentient 1309[/b] and go to 181[/b]. If not, gain 1 boost.

183.action: ASSIST[/b] the sentient in perfecting the dance
183.text: The sentient describes the combination they’re trying to perfect, and you point out any missteps (and praise them for every perfect set of moves). In gratitude for your help, they offer to join you. Gain sentient 1305[/b].

184.action: ENLIVEN[/b] the queen with your performance art (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
184.text: The queen declares, “Dance for me!” You must think on your feet for the full trial. Roll 2 skill dice to represent some dance moves that come to mind; select and place 1 of them as part of your routine (placed dice cannot change). Then again roll 2 skill dice, select 1, and place it adjacent to the previously placed die. You may never place the same icon in the same row or column (rows and columns extend over empty spaces). Continue rolling 2 skill dice and placing 1 adjacent to the previously placed die. If you ever roll doubles, you may reroll either or both dice. The goal is to have at least 1 die showing each icon and connect back to the first die, completing the dance; you earn $1 for every die you place (succeed or fail; minimum 4 dice and maximum 12 dice). Read entry 184[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the results.

185.action: BUILD[/b] a structure from the framework of the ruins
185.text: Examining what remains of the ancient floorplan, you sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1295[/b].

186.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient heading toward the city
186.text: The sentient shares that they’re heading to the trading post in town, and they appreciate the help. Gain $1 and 1 morale; go to city 518[/b].

187.action: HONOR[/b] the artifact by offering a cultural exchange
187.text: The sentients are amazed to see an alien like you in their midst. They admire your augsuit and present you with a precious artifact. If you pay 3 boost, you successfully play music from the horn; gain item 1003[/b] and perform no other location actions here. If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

188.text: The gears are clogged with sand, so you take them apart, clean them, and put them back together. The machine’s owner is absolutely overjoyed, and they offer you the choice between a special gem (gain item 1168[/b]) and a lesson that could help you earn the Horn of Destiny to the west (gain 1 boost and 2 engage[/b]).

189.action: CRAFT[/b] some wetland shoes from the flag
189.text: The footwear may not look pretty, and they may not keep your feet dry, but they are technically “shoes.” Gain item 933[/b]; you may go north to 194[/b].

190.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple stone item from the rubble at the mouth of the cave
190.text: Gain item 1095[/b]. Up close, the cave doesn’t look as daunting as it did from a distance. If you dare, you may gain 1 look[/b] and continue with the look-EXPLORE[/b][/b] action.

191.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

192.action: PRAISE[/b] the sentient for their work
192.text: The sentient is placing and adjusting flags with precision, and they’re clearly pleased by the compliment. Gain ability 1480[/b] and 1 morale.

193.action: BUILD[/b] a structure on the hill
193.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1297[/b].

194.text: You grab the sentient from the tornado, energy surging from them into you. “Thank you,” they say, taking their biological equivalent of deep breaths. “This duel has gone on much longer than I anticipated! I’m going to play dead until they leave.” Grateful for your aid, they offer either to teach you wind magic (gain spell 1379[/b]) or to give you a powerful grenade (gain item 860[/b]).

195.action: BUILD[/b] a business near the gateway
195.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might build. Gain blueprint 1298[/b].

196.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

197.action: ASSIST[/b] the sentient in finding the perfect position for the flags
197.text: Your assistance proves to be a huge help for the sentient, who is able to gauge the perfect position for this and other nearby flags, instructing you to shift a little to the left or right while they hover at a short distance. “You have brought a great honor to my people,” they say. “I’m happy to reward you with your choice of the wind emblem or my service.” Gain item 1239[/b] or sentient 1307[/b]; also, if you have it, lose the wind curse.

198.action: AID[/b] a sentient in need based on a plea illuminated on the orb’s surface
198.text: The outside of the orb includes requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. One such request is to overthrow a tyrant; the instructions say to meet up with a few energy sentients to the northeast of here. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

199.text: The sentient insists that they don’t need your help, encouraging you simply to enjoy the view of Moonstone Mountain to the north. But they seem to appreciate you handing them tools during the process of picking the lock—some treasure chests are traps, and they want to give this one their full attention. When the chest opens to reveal a large mace, they offer you the choice of becoming their apprentice (gain sentient 1338[/b]) or gaining the weapon (gain item 1036[/b]).

020.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

200.action: RELAX[/b] in the crisp mountain air
200.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

201.action: PRAISE[/b] the sentient for their service
201.text: As if well-accustomed to receiving compliments from travelers, the sentient squares their shoulders and flies away. Gain 1 boost.

202.action: OFFER[/b] to help the sentient with their job
202.text: The sentient scoffs at the offer—they’ve spent years training to maintain and repair runecasters, and you think you can just waltz in and help them? As if sensing your naivete, they explain that runecasters help sentients around the world to increase the efficiency of basic tasks. They demonstrate how to activate the nearby device and give you a map to find others like it. Gain item 1255[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 12 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region F).

203.action: PRAISE[/b] the sentient for staying alert
203.text: “Just doing my job,” the sentient replies, but you can tell from their posture that they appreciate the compliment. “Captives aren’t going to guard themselves!” they say with a wink. Gain 1 boost and continue.

204.action: REPAIR[/b] the exterior of the house
204.text: The occupants appreciate your unsolicited aid and toss you some coins. Gain $5 and continue.

205.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
205.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

206.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient heading toward the city
206.text: They’re struggling to carry two large paintings that they proudly stole and would like to present to the grand museum of Ingot Town. A little conflicted, you provide a steadying pair of second hands. Gain $2 and go to city 522[/b].

207.text: He cheers and welcomes you to participate in the trial. Continue with the take-BYPASS[/b][/b] action.

208.action: AID[/b] a sentient in need based on a plea illuminated on the orb’s surface
208.text: The outside of the orb includes requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. One is to free a hostage just south of here. Gain 1 boost and quest 1652[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

209.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 828[/b]. If not, you gain back a little warmth thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 health).

021.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

210.action: PRACTICE[/b] evasion techniques around—but not too close—to the magnetic object

211.action: OFFER[/b] to find a precious item for the sentient
211.text: “Thank you, little one. The item I covet is the Eye of the Ancient. I know exactly where it is—far northeast of here—but my attempts to acquire it have all failed.” Gain 1 boost and quest 1658[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

212.text: Keeping a safe distance from the animal, you pluck a few petals from the nearby lotus. The scent seems to make the animal dizzy, and it topples onto its back and rolls around. Gain animal 829[/b].

213.text: The flying sentient appreciates the offer, but they’re guarding something far too precious to let a stranger help. Instead they show you a clever way to craft a silly item from energy itself. Gain item 1097[/b].

214.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple stone item from the rubble along the path
214.text: Gain item 1095[/b]. Up close, the cave doesn’t look as daunting as it did from a distance. If you dare, you may gain 1 look[/b] and continue with the look-EXPLORE[/b][/b] action.

215.action: OFFER[/b] to help a drunk sentient
215.text: It’s hard to understand their wild gesticulations, but they seem to want you to find an enchanted forest to the east of here—they even have a picture to share. Gain quest 1700[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

216.text: The museum docent eagerly accepts your help, telling you to keep an eye on an important exhibit. Go to interior 564[/b].

217.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a set of stone steps over the fence
217.text: Some other travelers applaud the effort and give you some spare snow gear in appreciation, saying you’ll need it in the cold north. Gain item 928[/b]; you may go north to 222[/b].

218.action: CRAFT[/b] an advanced device from one of the lodestones
218.text: You pry off a floating shard, and with great ingenuity—if you may say so yourself—you craft a powerful pair of goggles. Gain item 935[/b].

219.action: SHARE[/b] your observations of potential threats with the sentry
219.text: Whether they’re true or false, you spin a web of stories for the sentry, informing them of what you’ve seen in the surrounding area. Gain $4 and continue.

022.text: You position a few icy stones in such a way that the multitude of red-hot lasers is reduced to a single beam, which you easily step over. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave 082[/b].

220.action: PRACTICE[/b] on the sturdy, thick ice
220.text: Practice your ability to forage (gain ability 1487[/b]) or cleave (gain ability 1493[/b]). You may continue with an action matching that ability.

221.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 808[/b]. If not, you gain back a little warmth thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 health).

222.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 810[/b]. If not, you gain back a little warmth thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 health).

223.text: You trudge through the snowfall. Gain ability 1496[/b].

224.action: BUILD[/b] a structure in the valley
224.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1297[/b].

225.action: OFFER[/b] to assist the sentients in their journey
225.text: The campers are two siblings on a journey to find the source of the blight that has stricken so many in their village to the southwest, including their fathers. Gain $2 and quest 1667[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

226.action: PRACTICE[/b] how to descend safely and consistently
226.text: There’s a ledge just a few meters below you before a much longer descent, and it’s the perfect place to practice your skills. Gain ability 1491[/b]; you may continue.

227.action: RELEASE[/b] the device from its tethers
227.text: Nothing happens. The vehicle isn’t intelligent—it relies on a pilot to steer it. Gain 1 boost and continue.

228.text: You tell the sentient how you came to be on this planet. They encourage you to post your story on the message boards in the orb to the south; they offer to accompany you there. Gain sentient 1325[/b].

229.text: You can’t imagine a better place to settle down, so you consider your options for lodging. Gain blueprint 1295[/b]. You may lose 1 time to wait for the moon; if you do, gain lesson 1432[/b].

023.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

230.action: BUILD[/b] an agricultural establishment at the water’s edge
230.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1296[/b].

231.action: BREW[/b] a potion from the nearby lotus in the hopes it will unlock the secrets of the gauntlet
231.text: You drink the potion; gain item 867[/b]. A burst of clarity reveals that you must perform the look-SOLVE[/b][/b] action to gain the gauntlet.

232.action: ASSIST[/b] the light by dipping your hand into the water
232.text: There is an exchange of energy that you can barely explain. You simultaneously feel like a piece of yourself has entered the light and you feel like part of the sentient being that forms is part of you. Gain 2 health.

233.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the look-TRANSLATE[/b][/b] action.

234.action: OFFER[/b] to help the timid sentients
234.text: When they see that you mean them no harm, the trio hovers over to you and quickly adapt to your language. “We were once forced to provide energy for an evil tyrant to the northeast. Will you help us overthrow them?” Gain $2 and quest 1647[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

235.text: The Traveler is grateful you replied to their signal. “By the way, it’s probably best to turn it off now… if, that is, you can find what’s left of my ship to the far southwest of here.” Gain mission 1596[/b], then either keep it and lose your original mission or lose this new mission.

236.action: CRAFT[/b] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
236.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the engage-TRANSMIT[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item 1097[/b].

237.text: The sentient quickly picks up on your language and replicates it. “I’m reading messages from other geolocators in this orb, but no one seems to be able to find a place called Moonstone Mountain. Can you help?” Gain 1 look[/b] and quest 1678[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

238.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient heading toward the city
238.text: The sentient is carrying a bundle of paper lanterns, the kind designed to float on water. When some of the lanterns almost spill into the swamp, you catch them and return them to the sentient. In gratitude, the sentient leads you into the city before heading over to the funeral home. Gain $2 and go to city 520[/b].

239.action: PRAISE[/b] the craftsmanship of the building’s owner
239.text: You poke your head into the building, where a few ethereal sentients are exchanging pleasantries. Clearing your throat, you catch their attention, and you use the moment to compliment them on the many beautiful lanterns inside. The store owner beams— quite literally—and invites you inside. Gain ability 1480[/b] and go to interior 565[/b].

024.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

240.action: AID[/b] a sentient in need based on a plea illuminated on the orb’s exterior
240.text: The outside of the orb includes requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. One such request is to cure a blight; the instructions say that sentients at a campsite south of here are seeking aid. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

241.text: With the energy of the purple crystal enhancing your senses, you practice the science of either careful, calculating study (gain ability 1492[/b]) or deliberate extraction (gain ability 1516[/b]). You may continue.

242.action: RELEASE[/b] the elemental from its tether
242.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental 1402[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

243.text: A loose panel reveals that the levitation core of the runecaster is disconnected. While you have access to the inside, you pair the device to your augsuit. Gain item 1028[/b].

244.action: ASSIST[/b] the sentient inside the orb
244.text: You tap on the glass, and a luminous pink head emerges from within. You ask whether you can help in any way, but they explain that they’re just charging up the orb for other travelers to use. They appreciate the offer, though, and they warn you of the electric fence to the east. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

245.text: The plant lashes out at you, but you manage to harness its energy to create a simple dingsbums. Gain item 1097[/b].

246.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale. The Traveler advises you, “Similarly to how you can send a signal via runecasters like this, you can use towers to manipulate interstellar signals.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

247.action: HONOR[/b] the sentients as you seek an alliance between your world and theirs
247.text: They stop arguing and turn their full attention to you. You spend the next hour answering questions about your world, and you make significant progress toward diplomatic relations. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

248.action: BREW[/b] a potion using the bark of the tree
248.text: The bark yields a greenish tincture. Gain item 861[/b].

249.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 823[/b]. If not, you gain a little strength thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 health).

025.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

250.action: HONOR[/b] whoever placed the box intentionally among the thorns by leaving the box alone
250.text: You leave the box alone, not letting your curiosity get the best of you. Gain 1 morale.

251.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a railing around the pit
251.text: Some other travelers applaud the effort and give you a vented jacket in appreciation, saying you’ll need it to the north. Gain item 967[/b]; you may continue.

252.text: You ask the sentient for permission to use an unwanted bone to craft a bauble, and they agree, offering you a few pointers along the way. Gain item 1092[/b]; if you pay 2 engage[/b], also gain sentient 1331[/b].

253.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
253.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

254.action: BUILD[/b] an agricultural business to enliven this desolate landscape
254.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1296[/b] and continue.

255.text: Your offer overjoys the sentients, and they say that it would be a pleasure to hunt by your side. After all, they typically hunt in groups of three. One of them scouts ahead while the other walks with you. Gain sentient 1333[/b] and quest 1649[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

256.action: CRAFT[/b] a basic item from a bone
256.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item 1092[/b].

257.text: Despite the danger presented by the animals and the apparent shame your assistance brings upon the sentient, you manage to break them free of the cage. They insist upon returning the favor. Gain sentient 1354[/b].

258.action: REPAIR[/b] a broken item for the sentient
258.text: The release mechanism is jammed in a bone-crafted harpoon, so you fix it and give it back to the sentient. They admit they’ve been having trouble selling a fishing instrument in the middle of the desert, so they give it to you in appreciation and recommend that you head southeast, where water is more abundant. Gain item 959[/b] and 1 morale.

259.text: You encourage the animal to eat some of the nearby desert flora you pluck as you approach. The dry snout of the beast rubs against your hand like sandpaper. Gain animal 824[/b].

026.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

260.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 825[/b]. If not, you gain a warm fuzzy feeling thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 morale).

261.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the overpower-HUNT[/b][/b] action.

262.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient heading toward the city
262.text: Fresh from a hunt, they’re juggling weapons and bones in both arms, and they appreciate your assistance. Gain $2 and go to city 524[/b].

263.text: As you share some of your water, the entire plant uproots itself, emerging from the ground with eight legs and petals for a head. You stumble backwards, and to your surprise, the plant catches you and embraces you in a big hug. Gain flora 1052[/b] and 1 morale.

264.action: HONOR[/b] the previous occupants by staying away
264.text: As if the ruins recognize your restraint and respect, you feel a purifying wave wash over you. Lose 1 curse and gain 1 morale.

265.text: You cut the sentient free and force the bounty hunter to run away. Gain sentient 1314[/b] and curse 1392[/b].

266.action: PRACTICE[/b] the dueling card and dice game everyone seems to be playing in the casino
266.text: Gain ability 1499[/b] and 1 boost; you may continue.

267.text: The sentient pauses their work to thank you for the offer. They were expecting the aid of a leaf sentient from the south, but they never showed up. You’re put to work in the garden for a pittance. Gain ability 1476[/b] and $2.

choices.outcome: You wrest the ambassador away from the prince’s grasp. As the sinew bully wanders off in search of easier targets, the leaf sentient expresses their deepest gratitude. Gain item 1248[/b] (also, if you have it, lose the leaf curse).
You pin down the leaf sentient’s wings, leaving them to the whim of the prince. Eventually he tires of toying with his prey and decides to accompany you. Gain sentient 1332[/b] and curse 1388[/b].

269.action: PRACTICE[/b] your skills under these unpredictable conditions
269.text: What better chance to hone your abilities? Practice your ability to evade (gain ability 1485[/b]), balance (gain ability 1501[/b]), or push (gain ability 1502[/b]); you may continue.

027.text: You position a few shiny minerals in such a way that the multitude of red-hot lasers is reduced to a single beam, which you easily step over. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave 087[/b].

270.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
270.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

271.action: RELAX[/b] in the presence of such fine art
271.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

272.action: BUILD[/b] a dwelling near floating blobs
272.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1295[/b].

273.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

274.text: The strange vegetation is just as much flora as it is bone. Craft either a simple bone item (1092[/b]) or flora item (1096[/b]).

275.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
275.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

276.action: PRAISE[/b] the rightmost sentient for their strategy
276.text: The gold sentient is hesitant to accept your compliment, but you convince them of your sincerity. After their game, they offer to coach you (gain sentient 1322[/b]) or steer you toward an amazing landmark (gain 2 move[/b] and quest 1630[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

277.text: The creature has been chained to this wall and trained to fight anything that tries to pass through. It deserves to be free, but it doesn’t know your intentions, and it struggles against your efforts. Finally you break through the chains. Gain animal 836[/b].

278.action: HONOR[/b] the purpose of the wall by moving elsewhere
278.text: You bow to the wall, then turn and walk away. Gain 1 morale and go either east to 279[/b] or west to 277[/b].

279.text: The sentient waves off your attempt to help them, explaining that the outside of orbs like this display requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. The sentient highlights a nearby request to assemble a broken bridge to the north. Gain 1 boost and quest 1632[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

028.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

280.text: In a soft voice, the sentient reveals that they’ve never entirely felt at home in their body. They ask if you would consider venturing to the Memory Palace with them so they can feel what it’s like to occupy a different skin. Gain 2 move[/b] and quest 1697[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

281.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a trap at the entrance to the building
281.text: You suspect that someone is inside the building, so you lay your trap and furtively wait a few minutes. Sure enough, a small sentient wanders out of the building directly into your cleverly concealed snare. On them you find a stolen talisman, which you return to the cathedral in the spirit of helping. The clerics inside bless you with the knowledge of basic magic. Gain lesson 1424[/b] and 1 boost.

282.action: CRAFT[/b] a basic item from a bone
282.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item 1092[/b].

283.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

284.action: HONOR[/b] the sanctity of the crystal
284.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place—not to mention one that is probably well-guarded. You bow deeply toward the crystal and step away. As you do, the three treasure chests nearby pop open, sharp-tooth guardians emerging from each. They line up in front of you… and return your bow. One of them hands you a beautiful bar of soap and gestures for you to leave. Gain item 1207[/b].

285.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

286.action: OFFER[/b] to settle the sentient’s debate
286.text: After a brief conference, the sentient agrees that it would be helpful for you to travel east, then north to find a special constellation. With a sprinkle of sand, you can see it in your mind’s eye. Gain 1 boost, 1 move[/b], and quest 1651[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

287.action: HONOR[/b] the sacred place by adhering to tradition and waiting for a memory
287.text: Gain 1 boost, then gain 1 random skill and read the matching result:

choices.outcome: You are a wind sentient dancing in the prairie with a new love, your senses heightened by a powerful elixir. Continue.
You are an energy sentient learning a new language for the first time, a foreign tongue opening your heart to other cultures. Continue.
You are a gold sentient playing Skirm with your child, reliving the joy of discovering your favorite game through their eyes. Continue.
You are a leaf sentient giving away your favorite pet to an elderly person, experiencing the pride of putting someone else’s need before your own. Continue.
You are a metal sentient stealing from the rich to give to the poor, delighting in the thrill of the heist. Continue.
You are a sinew sentient making your first kill, honoring the animal’s journey to the next world by burying its soulstone below it. Continue.

288.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 834[/b]. If not, the animal tugs on your pants, leading you to the west (you may go west to 287[/b]).

289.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a bridge across the gap
289.text: Some other travelers applaud the effort and give you a spare bedroll in appreciation, saying you’ll need it in the north. Gain item 971[/b]; you may go north to 294[/b].

029.text: You position a few iridescent rocks in such a way that the multitude of red-hot lasers is reduced to a single beam, which you easily step over. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave 089[/b].

290.action: CRAFT[/b] a basic item from a bone
290.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item 1092[/b].

291.text: If you have flora or food, you may drop a piece of it into the pit:

choices.outcome: The entire pit closes and disappears under the sand. Gain 1 morale; you may go north to 296[/b].
Nothing happens. Gain 1 boost and continue.

292.action: PRACTICE[/b] fighting techniques near the oasis
292.text: Inspired by the skull-and-crossbones warning, you refine your fighting prowess. Gain ability 1504[/b].

293.action: BUILD[/b] an agricultural structure next to the oasis
293.text: It seems like the perfect place for growth and prosperity, so you sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1296[/b].

294.text: The campers groggily emerge from their tents, surprised to see a friendly face instead of a bandit. They’re climbers heading to the Memory Palace to the southwest of here. In gratitude for your assistance, they give you a spare rope. Gain item 902[/b].

295.action: ASSIST[/b] the sentient with their work
295.text: The sentient appreciates your silent assistance. Gain item 1258[/b] and $3; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 15 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region D).

296.text: Your feet sink into the fine-grained sand, making your walk more of a trudge. Gain ability 1496[/b].

297.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

298.text: You trek a large circle around the levitating lorestones. Gain ability 1505[/b].

299.action: CRAFT[/b] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
299.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the engage-TRANSMIT[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item 1097[/b].

030.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

300.text: Your ability to heal the creature is greatly hindered by its sheer unwillingness to allow you within its circle of trust. Roll 6 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 move[/b]. You finally manage to remove a large thorn from the animal’s head. Gain animal 841[/b].

301.action: HONOR[/b] the creature by kneeling before it
301.text: The sentient interprets your gesture as an invitation to glide over to you, and you feel a slight tug from within your chest. It leaves you instantly tired, but the sentient glows brighter than before. “Thank you, groundwalker,” they say. “I recognize your language from a vessel I’ve seen in pieces around the world. You’ll find one piece a ways north of here, and another to the southwest. Travel well!” Gain 1 morale and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center).

302.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

303.text: You kneel before the largest stone and touch your forehead to the circle’s center. Three distinct icons fill your mind’s eye. You may choose to focus on one of the three. If you choose the green icon, gain spell 1236[/b]. If you choose the pink icon, gain spell 1237[/b]. If you choose the blue icon, gain spell 1238[/b].

304.action: ASSIST[/b] the one-eyed guard as they fire shots at the approaching pirate ship
304.text: The ship steers away. The guard slaps you on the back and offers you some hardtack and a glider in gratitude. Gain vehicle 957[/b] and 1 health.

305.action: BREW[/b] an adhesive from the flowers dotting the shoreline
305.text: The longer the flowers brew, the stickier they become. Gain item 866[/b] and continue.

306.action: HONOR[/b] the sanctity of the shard
306.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place—not to mention one that is probably well-guarded. You bow deeply toward the shard and step away. As you do, the five floating islands shift position, aligning in such a way as to provide stepping stones for you to reach the shard. You may gain item 1216[/b].

307.action: CRAFT[/b] a basic item from a bone
307.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item 1092[/b].

308.text: You gently remove the source of the creature’s suffering, a large fishhook. You wash the wound and dress it, and already you can see color returning to the animal’s gills. Gain animal 848[/b].

309.action: RESCUE[/b] the sentient at the helm
309.text: You unbind the flying sentient and fend off any further advances from the pirates. As soon as you release the captive, the entire ship crashes into the shallows, you along with it. Lose 1 health and gain sentient 1305[/b].

031.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

310.action: PLACE[/b] a crystal at the end of the rainbow

choices.option: If you don’t have a crystal or don’t want to lose a crystal
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost; you may continue.

choices.option: If you have a crystal and choose to lose it
choices.outcome: As you place the crystal at the end of the rainbow, it dissolves into the rainbow. In its place is a ring. Gain an item based on the color of the crystal you placed (blue[/b]: 991[/b]; purple[/b]: 995[/b]; orange[/b]: 993[/b]; green[/b]: 994[/b]; yellow[/b]: 990[/b]; red[/b]: 992[/b]).

311.text: After you assemble the necessary supplies, you realize that the path is still fully functional—it’s designed to lead underwater. You follow the steps until you’re fully submerged. Choose one:

choices.option: Suffer 1 hypoxia damage to proceed even deeper
choices.outcome: After inhaling too much water, you emerge dripping wet in an underground cave. Go to cave 089[/b].
Gain 1 boost and continue.

312.text: In appreciation of your unsolicited effort, the owner gives you a big hug and a few coins. Gain $2 and 1 morale.

313.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 816[/b]. If not, the bird’s head darts into the water and emerges with a fish that it chars with a spurt of fire before offering it to you (gain 1 morale and 1 health).

314.text: The owner emerges from a nearby cave and thanks you for the unsolicited aid. They offer to guide you past the cave barrier, but they warn you of the toxic fumes found within the cave and offer to sell you a mask (pay $2 to gain item 964[/b]). You may then either go to cave 097[/b] or gain 1 morale.

315.action: NURTURE[/b] the vegetation surrounding the book
315.text: It’s such a beautiful grove, so you take a few minutes to leave it even nicer than when you arrived. A grateful sentient notices the effort and gives you a snare to trap any vermin that might nibble on these plants. Gain item 947[/b].

316.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 843[/b]. If not, the animal seems to recognize your good intentions, and it leads you toward the building to the north (you may go to 321[/b]).

317.action: RESCUE[/b] the animal from a predator
317.text: Through a combination of making yourself big and hiding the animal, you save it from a persistent predator. The animal clicks in appreciation and stays by your side. Gain animal 851[/b] and 1 morale.

318.action: HONOR[/b] the artifact by offering a cultural exchange
318.text: The nearby sentients are amazed to see an alien like you in their midst. They admire your augsuit and present you with a precious artifact. If you pay 3 boost, you clean, mend, and refresh the garment until it shines in the sunlight; gain item 1008[/b] and perform no other location actions here. If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

319.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 817[/b]. If not, you feel a sense of comfort as the animal relaxes in your arms before returning to its task (gain 1 morale).

032.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

320.action: CRAFT[/b] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
320.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the engage-TRANSMIT[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item 1097[/b].

321.action: OFFER[/b] your aid to the sentient
321.text: The sentient chuckles at your adorable offer, pats you on the head, and gestures for you to join them inside. Go to interior 600[/b].

322.text: The sentient couldn’t be happier, and they run over and give you a big hug. Tears come to their eyes when they talk about how hard they worked on this project, even as other students at the Academy were making fun of them for not focusing on magic. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

323.action: TEACH[/b] the class an unsolicited lesson about your area of expertise
323.text: The instructor does not appreciate the interruption, but they let you talk for a few moments. They recommend that you share more of your insights in the academy to the west, and they cast a healing spell on you to aid you in your journey. Gain $2 and 2 health.

324.text: The creature waits patiently as you examine it for signs of injury, and it isn’t long before you find a metal shard wedged deep in its leg. You remove it and bandage the wound. Gain animal 822[/b].

325.text: You gently unwind the web, and the scared animal buries its head into your shoulder as soon as it’s free. Gain animal 817[/b].

326.text: If you have flora or food, a spindle of gold silk snatches it; gain animal 819[/b]. If not, it playfully rolls a ball of gold from the river over to you; gain item 1185[/b].

327.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
327.text: You use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

328.action: ASSIST[/b] the sentient with their duties
328.text: The sentient brags that they’re the best watchman at this pit stop for travelers… but they wouldn’t mind a break. They offer you their hourly earnings if you stay here for a bit. Gain $4.

329.text: Despite their weakened, disconnected state, they struggle against your attempts to heal them as if it is some great dishonor. In their shame they abandon their quest. Gain quest 1670[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). Then roll 6 skill dice and gain all engage[/b] results. You can convince the sentient to stay with you if you pay 1 engage[/b] (if so, gain sentient 1313[/b]).

033.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

330.text: The Traveler ponders this for a second before replying. “I don’t need help, but I’m fairly confident that any gold sentient would like to know about this fresh husk. They’ll want to feel like they discovered it themselves. Can you lead them here? Gold sentients live to the east.” Gain 1 boost and quest 1661[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). You may continue.

331.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain either a basic leaf novelty (1096[/b]) or a basic gold zamazingo (1099[/b]).

332.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient heading toward the village
332.text: The sentient appears to be in a rush, a bundle shifting under their arms. You agree to accompany them as they make their way to a safehouse in the village. Gain $2 and go to city 530[/b].

333.action: REPAIR[/b] some fraying cords anchoring the shop to the edge of the gusty plateau
333.text: The owner is grateful for the help, and they toss you some coins in appreciation, encouraging you to come inside to spend them. Gain $2 and go to interior 568[/b].

334.text: You carefully reassemble the sentient’s exoskeleton. As you do, the gold fluid flows against gravity and re-forms into something resembling a living fountain. Gain sentient 1321[/b].

335.action: VOLUNTEER[/b] to transport a package to the base of the valley
335.text: One of the peddlers is hoping to save themselves a trip to the northern basin. Choose one:

choices.option: Accept a package and a tip from the peddler, then head north
choices.outcome: The peddler hands you a big box before lowering you on a ramshackle pulley. Gain item 1034[/b] and $1, then go north to 340[/b].

choices.option: Tell the peddler that you’re not interested in going north right now
choices.outcome: The peddler mumbles something about how you shouldn’t offer to volunteer unless you actually want to help. Gain 1 boost and continue.

336.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a crude bridge across the canyon in front of you
336.text: Members of the caravan applaud the effort and give you some coins and a spare hydrasuit in gratitude, saying you’ll need the garment both in the hot climate to the distant south and west and in the ocean to the north. Gain item 965[/b] and $3; you may go north to 341[/b].

337.action: UPGRADE[/b] the rope bridge to better handle the weight of the transport
337.text: The driver admits they’re always nervous about crossing such a basic bridge, and they pay you in praise and coins. Gain $5 and 1 morale; you may go north to 342[/b].

338.action: ASSIST[/b] an incoming delivery service heading into the resort

choices.option: Take the time to complete the delivery before slipping away within the resort
choices.outcome: Lose 1 time and gain $3; go to interior 570[/b].

choices.option: After you enter the resort, dash into a side room when no one is looking
choices.outcome: Go to interior 570[/b].

339.action: HONOR[/b] the ritual by offering a cultural exchange
339.text: The sentients pause their battle to see an alien like you in their midst. They admire your augsuit and present you with a precious artifact. If you pay 3 boost, you negotiate for the artifact; gain item 999[/b] and perform no other location actions here. If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

034.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

340.text: In appreciation of you fixing their slowly sinking sailboat, the owner gives you a big hug. They say that you can seek serenity to the west at the horn rocks (gain 1 move[/b] and quest 1676[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply) or gain one of the contents of the nearby treasure chest they recently refilled (gain item 1151[/b]).

341.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the engage-TRADE[/b][/b] action.

342.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient heading toward the city
342.text: The sentient is excited to haggle at the street market, and they share some tips and tricks for getting the best price. Gain ability 1479[/b] and go to city 529[/b].

343.action: BUILD[/b] a business on the river bank
343.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1298[/b].

344.text: While functional for flat-bottom boats, the dock is too close to the shoreline, causing larger boats to get stuck in the muddy shallows. In appreciation of your unsolicited effort, the locals give you a gift to aid in adventures to the north. Gain item 964[/b].

345.action: RESCUE[/b] the animal from the poachers
345.text: The beast is in poor form, but with the hunters gone, you patch it up. It’s still scared of you, but you feel a bond begin to grow. Gain animal 836[/b].

346.action: CRAFT[/b] an item from the skeleton to help you access the tower
346.text: You use some of the sharper bones to craft a useful piece of gear. Gain item 914[/b] and continue.

347.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
347.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

348.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

349.action: CRAFT[/b] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
349.text: You weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant. Gain item 1097[/b].

035.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

350.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple stone item from the rubble at the mouth of the cave
350.text: Gain item 1095[/b]. Up close, the cave doesn’t look as daunting as it did from a distance. If you dare, you may gain 1 look[/b] and continue with the look-EXPLORE[/b][/b] action.

351.action: CRAFT[/b] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
351.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the engage-TRANSMIT[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item 1097[/b].

352.text: They toss a net-woven bag at you, and soon they’re filling it with fish. When they’re done, they say that you’re welcome to keep either the net (gain item 911[/b]) or some fresh fish (gain 1 morale and 1 health).

353.action: UPGRADE[/b] the tower to be fully functional
353.text: Circuit sentients cheer as snow generated by the tower begins to coat the entire area, though the wood sentients aren’t happy about it. Gain item 1240[/b] and curse 1386[/b]; also, if you have it, lose the circuit curse.

354.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1096[/b].

355.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

356.action: RELAX[/b] to the pleasant sound of birds and the soothingly spinning water
356.text: After a few minutes of meditation, you realize that all of the birds have disappeared from the sky, yet a few feathers trickle on the breeze above the water. Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

357.text: As you pull a sentient from the burning building, they shake loose of your grip and shout at you in dismay. You soon learn that the flying creatures are waterfighters—they keep deadly tides at bay from the fire sentient’s house. Gain 1 boost.

358.action: HONOR[/b] the sentient by offering your aid
358.text: The leader appreciates your generous gesture, explaining that they need an outsider to release the sinew elemental to the southwest. Gain 1 help[/b] and quest 1633[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

359.text: The sentient has been here for days without a bite, so they appreciate the help. They ask if you have any flora or food to use as bait. If you do, you may pay a token from a flora or food card as bait to gain 1 morale and 1 health. Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

036.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

360.action: BUILD[/b] a business among the rocks
360.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1294[/b].

361.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

362.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1096[/b].

363.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

364.text: A loose panel reveals that the levitation core of the runecaster is disconnected. While you have access to the inside, you pair the device to your augsuit. Gain item 1029[/b].

365.text: For a weak swimmer like you, there’s no environment better suited for improving your abilities. Gain either the swim ability (1460[/b]) or the wade ability (1489[/b]).

366.action: RELEASE[/b] a fish from the line, careful not to injure it any further
366.text: The fish, freed from its line, darts away in fear before returning to nuzzle against you in appreciation. As it swims away, you find that you have some control over the water that surrounds you. Gain spell 1380[/b].

367.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
367.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

368.action: RELAX[/b] to the pleasant sound of the waterfalls to the east
368.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

369.action: RELEASE[/b] the elemental from its tether
369.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental 1407[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

037.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

370.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

371.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1096[/b].

372.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a bridge across the creek
372.text: Some other travelers applaud the effort and give you a pair of flippers in appreciation, saying you’ll need them in the north. Gain item 927[/b]; you may go north to 302[/b].

373.action: NURTURE[/b] some of the vegetation growing from the animal’s spine
373.text: Some petals are looking a little wilted and tangled, so you tend to them while the animal chortles appreciatively. Gain animal 841[/b].

374.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 838[/b]. If not, the animal is delighted to offer you a handful of sand (gain item 1194[/b]).

375.text: In appreciation of your unsolicited effort, the owner gives you a big hug and a few coins. Gain $2 and 1 morale.

376.action: VOLUNTEER[/b] your services to the sentient in the building
376.text: The hatchery owner says that their job is mostly one of patient waiting and keeping the kiln warm, but they appreciate the gesture. They confide that they’re hoping to expand their services beyond just hatching eggs, and they’re experimenting with explosives. Share your knowledge of detonators with them to gain $5 and continue.

377.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1101[/b].

378.action: PRAISE[/b] the sentients for their salesmanship
378.text: The sentients whoop with glee and invite you to join them on the ledge for a few minutes. They treat you to some snacks and teach you some trade secrets. Gain ability 1479[/b] and 1 health.

379.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple lava item without burning yourself
379.text: You use some porous rocks to shape the lava into a basic chisme. Gain item 1101[/b].

038.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

380.text: You carefully remove a knife from beneath the turtle’s shell and provide care to the extraction point. Its movements are tentative, but the creature should fully recover. Gain either the knife (item 1209[/b]) or animal 813[/b] (who is terrified of the knife).

381.action: HEAL[/b] a wound on the turtle’s webbed feet
381.text: The turtle looks away while you stitch and mend the wound—the animal probably caught it on a piece of coral. In appreciation of your aid, the turtle offers you its service as a taxi. Gain vehicle 1013[/b] with 2 boost on it.

382.text: You seal the gap in the boulder with pebbles and mud, marveling both at the void and the rock’s apparent ability to mend itself. Gain 1 boost and continue.

383.text: The sentient watches curiously as you climb into the hammock. Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

384.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
384.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

385.action: HONOR[/b] the previous occupants by staying away
385.text: As if the ruins recognize your restraint and respect, you feel a purifying wave wash over you. Lose 1 curse and gain 1 morale.

386.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
386.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle— plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

387.action: BUILD[/b] a farm in the valley
387.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make, including a mill and stables. Gain blueprint 1296[/b].

388.action: ASSIST[/b] the guards with a menial task to earn access to the bridge
388.text: The guards ask you to move a series of rocks from one pile to another. It’s mindless, but they seem satisfied with your work. They give you $2 and let you pass (you may go to 780[/b]).

389.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1096[/b].

039.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

390.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

391.action: PRACTICE[/b] your skills on this beautiful day
391.text: The practice pays off. Gain either the scale ability (1503[/b]) or the dig ability (1509[/b]). You may continue.

392.action: BREW[/b] an elixir with the berries
392.text: The berries make for a fine brewing ingredient. Gain item 864[/b].

393.action: RELEASE[/b] the elemental from its tether
393.text: Without its tether, the metal elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental 1408[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

394.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

395.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a north-south ropeline to help travelers pull themselves past the repelling magnets
395.text: The assembly process takes some time, effort, and ingenuity, but the end result creates a viable path past the magnets. Some sentients cheer you and toss you some coins. Gain $3 and 1 morale; you may go north to 396[/b].

396.action: TEACH[/b] the building’s occupants about the stars
396.text: The occupants seem keenly interested in this information and ask a number of questions about your home planet’s natural resources while feeding you a local delicacy. Gain $5 and 1 health; you may go to interior 572[/b].

397.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
397.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

398.action: BUILD[/b] a business at the confluence
398.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1294[/b].

399.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

040.action: SHARE[/b] the artifact with the world
040.text: Something this beautiful needs to be shared with others, not hidden in the depths of the world. You blink, and when your eyes open, you’re back on the surface with the crystal in your hands. Gain item 1000[/b] and go to 157[/b]; if you have a previous location card for reference, return it to the box.

400.action: CRAFT[/b] a nani nani from some circuitry you rip off the nearby tower
400.text: You find solace in the tinkering process, and you’re delighted by the creative— albeit useless—result. Gain item 1098[/b].

401.action: CRAFT[/b] a nani nani from some circuitry you rip off the nearby device
401.text: You find solace in the tinkering process, and you’re delighted by the creative— albeit useless—result. Gain item 1098[/b].

402.text: The felled tree in front of you is dry enough that it will hold a flame. Gain item 1084[/b].

403.action: REPAIR[/b] some broken links in the fence
403.text: You respect boundaries, and there must be a good reason for the fence. So you touch up a few spots here and there, carefully avoiding the electric elements. Some sentients notice the effort and toss you some coins. Gain $4 and 1 morale.

404.action: BUILD[/b] a structure from the framework of the ruins
404.text: The core foundation of the structure is still solid despite the corrosion from the salty sea below. You modernize the structure to ensure its longevity. Gain structure 1292[/b].

405.text: A loose panel reveals that the levitation core of the runecaster is disconnected. While you have access to the inside, you pair the device to your augsuit. Gain item 1030[/b].

406.text: The tiny creature is absolutely terrified, and it runs around the island avoiding you. You wait patiently until it decides to approach you. Gain animal 834[/b].

407.action: CRAFT[/b] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
407.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the engage-TRANSMIT[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item 1097[/b].

408.text: The doorman is suspicious of your intentions, but after the first hour you seem to have gained some trust, as they hand you a pair of goggles and ask you to watch out for metal sentients. Gain item 935[/b].

409.text: Standing between the spires, you feel a heightened sense of healing power. It surges from you, reaching your crew in the far reaches of the world. Each other player gains 2 health; you gain 1 morale and may look at each other player’s location. You may continue.

041.action: OFFER[/b] to help at the assassin’s guild
041.text: A dagger whizzes past your head as you walk into the assassin’s guild. A small but deadly sentient giggles and invites you to join them for a drink. Choose one:

choices.option: Praise the sentient for their ability to control metal with such accuracy
choices.outcome: Gain spell 1375[/b].
