choices.option: Offer to handle a contract job
choices.outcome: Gain quest 1635[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).
Gain item 1231[/b].

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask the sentient whether they know of any opportunities for employment here. The market is hiring; gain structure 1284[/b].

410.action: REPAIR[/b] the exterior of the house
410.text: The occupants appreciate your unsolicited aid and toss you some coins. Gain $5.

411.text: Seeing other sentients reverently walk up to the stone and touch it, you do the same. An image of 9 runes fills your mind and then fades away. You feel a little lighter, but you also sense that you’re missing something. Gain 1 morale and continue.

412.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

413.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
413.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

414.text: The structure is solid, but it needs a lot of work to regain its former glory. Gain structure 1286[/b].

415.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

416.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
416.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

417.text: The sentient introduces themselves as a scavenger, and they admit that their ability to find interesting items isn’t matched by their ability to sell them, and they could use some help in the underground markets of the City of Shadows. Gain sentient 1318[/b] and $2.

418.action: CRAFT[/b] a basic item from a bone
418.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item 1092[/b].

419.action: CRAFT[/b] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
419.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the engage-TRANSMIT[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item 1097[/b].

042.text: The issue seems to be more about the remote camera than the monitor or the local mainframe. You rewind the footage until it reveals an image of a sandstone room filled with precious objects, one of them an ornate blue ring. Suddenly the entire back wall of the room is reduced to rubble by a massive animal, a centipede with teeth the size of your forearm. The last thing you see before the footage ends is the beast swallowing the contents of the room. You hear a gasp behind you—the watchman has returned, and they are deeply embarrassed by the secret you’ve discovered. They plead for your help in recovering the ring. Gain sentient 1323[/b] and quest 1704[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply). Then exit to city 041[/b].

420.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 810[/b]. If not, you gain a little warmth thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 health).

421.text: You cobble together a brace to stabilize its injured leg, and it rewards you with a sloppy lick to the face. It’s more than just a sign of affection; the animal imparts a deeper understanding of those like it. Gain lesson 1422[/b].

422.text: Inspired by the rune, you decide to hone your observational skills. Gain ability 1497[/b]; you may continue.

423.action: BUILD[/b] a business at the confluence using the established foundation
423.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1294[/b].

424.action: CRAFT[/b] a basic item using some loose circuitry
424.text: You fiddle with it for a few minutes and end up with item 1098[/b]. The machine won’t respond to you afterward.

425.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

426.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 855[/b]. If not, you gain a little health thanks to the fresh seaweed the animal deposits in your palm (gain 1 health).

427.text: You tap on the flora, and the sentient pops their head out. Share your recent travels with them. They etch some notes on their arm and thank you with a local flower. Gain flora 1066[/b]; you may continue.

428.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1096[/b].

429.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

043.action: FEED[/b] treats to one of the worms
043.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 832[/b]. If not, the animal nuzzles against you (gain 1 morale).

430.action: PRACTICE[/b] evasion techniques around—but not too close—to the sea spouts
430.text: Practice your ability to swim (gain ability 1460[/b]), navigate (gain ability 1464[/b]), dodge (gain ability 1466[/b]), or evade (gain ability 1485[/b]). You may continue.

431.action: RELEASE[/b] the elemental from its tether
431.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental 1398[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

432.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
432.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

433.text: In appreciation of your unsolicited effort, the owner gives you a big hug and a few coins. Gain $2 and 1 morale.

434.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

435.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a proper bridge across the gap
435.text: You can’t imagine these stepping stones meeting safety standards on any planet, so you connect them with boards and a proper guardrail. Several sentients with younglings thank you by gifting you a spring trap, which they say might be useful for catching critters to the northeast. Gain item 926[/b]; you may go east to 734[/b].

436.text: A loose panel reveals that the levitation core of the runecaster is disconnected. While you have access to the inside, you pair the device to your augsuit. Gain item 1028[/b].

437.text: You wade over to the animals. They’re startled to see you emerge from the surf, but they timidly crawl onto your back so you can deliver them safely to shore. The mother deposits a blue crystal at your feet in appreciation. Gain item 1160[/b].

438.text: While they’re eager for help, they admit that they don’t really need help—their boat is in good shape and they have nowhere in particular to go. If you’re willing to row with them, they can steer you to an amulet they saw in the west (go to 153[/b]); if not, they give you a coin and wish you the best (gain $1).

439.text: The sentient murmurs in appreciation. “Please look at the book to solve the puzzle.” Gain 1 look[/b].

044.text: As the hulking creature roars, you realize that it’s a roar of pain and anguish, not hunger. A pikestaff is wedged deep between its scales. You remove it, and the sand centipede gives you a terrifying kiss before retreating down the dark tunnel. Gain item 1210[/b] and 1 morale.

440.action: FEED[/b] the animals in the hopes they will forge something for you
440.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain destiny 1607[/b] (place it in the center). If not, gain 1 boost.

441.action: PRACTICE[/b] scaling a short rock face
441.text: With the tower in the distance, honing your ability to ascend structures seems like a good idea. Gain ability 1503[/b].

442.action: CRAFT[/b] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
442.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the engage-TRANSMIT[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item 1097[/b].

443.text: The beast is clearly suffering; not physically, but emotionally. It keeps spinning around, smelling the air as if trying to locate someone important to it. Gain animal 817[/b] and 1 boost.

444.text: The creature’s biology is a mystery to you, but with trial and error you find a path to health. Gain animal 819[/b] and 1 morale.

445.text: The Traveler is grateful for your offer. “There are many wonders of this world—one not far west of here, in fact—that I’m grateful for having experienced. Yet I still long for my real home, my planet, my original friends and family. I’ve always fancied that there is some way to return to that time and place.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1608[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

446.action: RELEASE[/b] the elemental from its tether
446.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental 1401[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

447.action: RELAX[/b] to the pleasant sound of the gentle waves
447.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

448.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
448.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

449.text: The wood sentient is busy looking out for invaders, so they ask if you would venture to the northwest to rescue a friend from unfair imprisonment. Gain $2 and quest 1639[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

045.action: RESCUE[/b] the sentient from their plight
045.text: With all your strength, you pull the sentient from the beast and wait for their eternal gratitude. Instead, they shout at you for separating them from their steed. You don’t understand the entire tirade, but you catch something about the taxi service they provide. You offer to help them find another sand centipede, and they begrudgingly agree. Gain sentient 1340[/b].

450.action: RELAX[/b] to the pleasant sound of the wind whistling through the forest
450.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

451.action: ASSIST[/b] the sentients with their mission
451.text: The smaller of the two insist that they don’t “need” help, but the bigger one waves you forward. Gain quest 1642[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

452.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
452.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

453.action: REPAIR[/b] a creaky hinge on the front door
453.text: The grateful sentients apologize for the rust and welcome you inside to dry off by the fire and sip on a warm cup of tea while they work the forge. Gain 1 morale and go to interior 574[/b].

454.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

455.action: SHARE[/b] some stories from your travels with the gatekeeper
455.text: Their face lights up at the offer, and after enjoying your company for a few minutes, they wave you through into the city (go northeast to 762[/b]). If you spend extra time with them (pay 1 boost), they also give you a harpoon bow they recently confiscated (gain item 960[/b]).

456.action: ASSIST[/b] the sentients with cargo they’re unloading
456.text: From the vast variety of goods in the crates, you realize that these are pirates. They appreciate the extra set of hands, and they tip you well. Gain $5.

457.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
457.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

458.action: CRAFT[/b] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
458.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the engage-TRANSMIT[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item 1097[/b].

459.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

046.action: RELAX[/b] within this cocoon of earth
046.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

460.action: BUILD[/b] the boat with the workers
460.text: The shipwrights find it curious that you would voluntarily help them, but they’re happy for the extra set of hands. The sentient in charge offers some pointers about improving a simple boat into a fine vessel. Gain ability 1506[/b] and continue.

461.text: The creature whimpers as you bind its broken wing. It tests the binding and is delighted by the effect. Gain animal 823[/b].

462.action: ASSIST[/b] the sentient with their task
462.text: The sentient, a great warrior among their people, is planning to attack the wind elemental to the north. You may either gain sentient 1311[/b] or pair the nearby runecaster to you with their help (gain item 1027[/b]).

463.action: RELEASE[/b] the elemental from its tether
463.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental 1397[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

464.action: SHARE[/b] your knowledge with the cartographers
464.text: Gain $1 per boost on your character and $1 per map you have. One of the cartographers sheepishly reveals that they have never ventured under the surface of the ocean to the south, and they ask you to chart the hidden wonders beneath the waves. Gain quest 1631[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

465.text: You have a keen eye for poison and disease, and it’s clear that this glowing bog is the source. Careful to avoid contact with the green goopy substance, you create a counteragent to sprinkle over the grass. No one sees you working into the night, but you know you’ve done a good deed. Gain 1 morale; you may go north to 466[/b].

466.action: CRAFT[/b] a flash bomb to throw through the gap
466.text: Working on a hunch, you create a rudimentary flash bomb, cover your eyes, and toss it through the gap. You hear cries of shock and dismay from the other side, and you stroll right past a pair of bandits, one of whom drops a knife. Gain item 1209[/b] and go north to 467[/b].

467.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
467.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISARM[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

468.action: CRAFT[/b] a curio from the easily pliable roots of a nearby tree
468.text: Your mind wanders as you carve, and you’re surprised to see what your subconscious creates. Gain item 1094[/b].

469.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

047.text: When the sand centipede finally loses the struggle, the hunters clasp you on the shoulder in appreciation. Gain $3. They invite you to attempt the Trial of the Hunt, and they offer to take you there now. If you accept, go to 261[/b] (you may perform the overpower-HUNT[/b][/b] action there on a future turn); otherwise, stay here and gain 1 boost.

470.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 821[/b]. If not, the animal signals that the water is safe to drink (gain 1 health).

471.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
471.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

472.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

473.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient heading toward the city
473.text: Perched on the sentient’s shoulders are several colorful animals demanding attention. Gain $4 and go to city 526[/b].

474.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

475.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 831[/b]. If not, the animal shows you some delicious berries in the brush (gain 1 health).

476.action: OFFER[/b] to help the occupant of the building
476.text: The sentient stoutly refuses any assistance… yet they mention offhand that it would be nice if somehow the elemental to the west were no longer a burden upon their people. To demonstrate their selflessness, they teach you some basic magic. Gain lesson 1419[/b] and $2.

477.text: The Traveler shakes their head. “It is too much to ask. Too dangerous—even more dangerous than the Tidewatch that patrols these seas and monitors maritime trade. But you’re welcome to visit my forever home to the northwest and send a rescue signal.” Gain 2 boost and destiny 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

478.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

479.action: ASSIST[/b] the sentient with their scouring
479.text: The sentient sees what you’re doing, sighs deeply, and explains that some pirates have been trying to steal the Pearl of the Island in the northwest. You can either volunteer to handle the problem yourself (gain quest 1681[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply) or join the sentient (gain sentient 1358[/b]).

048.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a staircase leading to the ceiling of the cavern, far above the animal in case it returns
048.text: As you admire the view from your newly created perch, you notice a bright light beaming through the sediment. You peer inside to see a stunning crystal. Gain ability 1506[/b] and go deeper into the planet to cave 040[/b].

480.text: While treading water, you manage to treat the raw scales on the animal to let the healing process begin. The animal nuzzles against you in appreciation. Gain animal 848[/b].

481.text: Practice your ability to dodge (gain ability 1466[/b]), leap (gain ability 1486[/b]), or wade (gain ability 1489[/b]). You may continue.

482.text: You lead the sentients from rock to rock until they’re safely ashore. Yet they have nowhere to go—their homes are destroyed. They beg you to stay and rebuild with them. If you accept, gain item 1295[/b]. Otherwise, gain $2 and 1 morale.

483.text: The poor critter is terrified of the water, so you roll some rocks between it and the shoreline, and it tentatively crosses the divide and collapses against you. Gain animal 829[/b].

484.action: CRAFT[/b] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
484.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the engage-TRANSMIT[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item 1097[/b].

485.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
485.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

486.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

487.text: Some other travelers applaud the effort and give you a spare robe in appreciation, saying you’ll need it in the desert. Gain item 966[/b] and 1 boost; you may go north to 276[/b].

488.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
488.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

489.text: A winged creature is eager for something different than its normal diet. If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 826[/b]. If not, you recover a little from the sun thanks to the animal as it beats its wings near you (gain 1 health).

049.action: CRAFT[/b] an object from one of the spikes
049.text: As soon as you start to chisel away at one of the spikes, the entire cave rotates 180 degrees, sending you sprawling onto another spike. Lose 1 health and continue.

490.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
490.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

491.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

492.text: Digging through the snow, you find a discarded and disassembled sled. You patch it up and are ready to slide down the snowy hillside. Gain vehicle 931[/b].

493.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 822[/b]. If not, you’re still pleased by the encounter; either lose 1 curse or gain 1 morale.

494.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
494.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

495.text: Some other travelers applaud the effort and give you a spare fish trap in appreciation, saying you’ll need it in the north. Gain item 912[/b]; you may go north to 354[/b] or east to 496[/b].

496.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
496.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

497.action: ASSIST[/b] some workers unload a boat
497.text: The workers are grateful for the extra pair of hands, and afterward they reward you with a pair of flippers and some coins. Gain item 927[/b] and $2.

498.action: RELEASE[/b] the elemental from its tether
498.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental 1403[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

499.action: OFFER[/b] your assistance to the nearest house’s inhabitants
499.text: An emaciated sentient appears at the door, trembling from malnutrition. They give you the last of their limited funds to save them. Gain $1 and quest 1664[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

050.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

500.action: CRAFT[/b] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
500.text: The lava scalds your feet as you make your way over to the tower; suffer 1 heat damage. As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the engage-TRANSMIT[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item 1097[/b].

501.text: Reaching the device requires you to move across a lava field; suffer 1 heat damage. A loose panel reveals that parts of the device have melted together. While you have access to the inside, you pair the device to your augsuit. Gain item 1031[/b].

502.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
502.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

503.action: AID[/b] a sentient in need based on a plea illuminated on the orb’s surface
503.text: The outside of the orb includes requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. One such request is to locate the horn rocks; the instructions say that the rocks are somewhere to the west of here. Gain 1 boost and quest 1676[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

504.text: You feel a supernatural strength as you rush to the aid of the sailboat. You’re too late to save their vessel, which the aggressive sky ship has already capsized, but you safely guide the small crew to shore. One of them, a small wood sentient, pledges to repay the favor. Gain sentient 1360[/b].

505.text: The sentient seems content to just hang out in the water, but eventually they admit that they wish they could go to the legendary island to the north. Gain quest 1686[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). If you have a vehicle, also gain sentient 1320[/b].

506.action: CRAFT[/b] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
506.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the engage-TRANSMIT[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item 1097[/b].

507.text: Using some driftwood and a buoyant animal husk, you cobble together a crude rowboat. Gain vehicle 1014[/b].

508.action: RESCUE[/b] the animal from the poachers
508.text: In the thrill of the hunt, the poachers don’t notice you sabotaging their vessels, which start to sink. The animal sees the waterlogging and splashes water to accelerate the process. Defeated, the poachers salvage their possessions and head to shore while the animal expresses its gratitude. Gain animal 847[/b].

509.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

510.action: ASSIST[/b] the occupant of the building
510.text: The sentient stoutly refuses any assistance… yet they mention offhand that it would be nice if somehow the elemental to the west were no longer a burden upon their people. To demonstrate their selflessness, they teach you some basic magic. Gain lesson 1419[/b] (or $3 if you already have this lesson), then exit to 476[/b].

511.action: REPAIR[/b] some damage to the small tree
511.text: In its haste to disappear, the creature snapped several branches from the fledgling tree. You bind and set them. Gain 1 morale and continue with the look-SOLVE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 1.

512.action: HONOR[/b] the sanctity of the lorestone island
512.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place, so you bow deeply toward the lorestones and step away. As you do, the tide lifts you forward, guided by some unseen force. Gain 1 morale and go north to 514[/b].

513.text: As you free the sentient, they warn you to back away. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient sends a surge of energy through the area. Suffer 1 heat damage and gain sentient 1327[/b].
The sentient appreciates your restraint, and they impart some knowledge upon you. Gain lesson 1427[/b].

514.action: PLACE[/b] an item within the pool at the center of the island (lose 1 item)
514.text: As the item leaves your hands, the amulet hovering above the pool falls into your open palm. Your item has replaced it. Gain item 1035[/b].

515.action: BUILD[/b] an agricultural establishment at the mouth of the time rift
515.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1296[/b].

516.action: CRAFT[/b] a wooden token from a fallen branch
516.text: You craft a simple wooden curio. Gain item 1094[/b].

517.action: PRAISE[/b] the workmanship of the smelter
517.text: The old sentient takes a bow and brags about the overclocked engines. They ask whether you wouldn’t mind dropping them off back in the past. Gain vehicle 1033[/b] and sentient 1316[/b].

518.action: OFFER[/b] your assistance at the seed market
518.text: The market is well stocked with a variety of seeds, though you have no idea what plants they’ll grow into. Choose one:

choices.option: Give up something to gain a seed
choices.outcome: Lose 1 card with a value of at least $2 from your grid or reserve to gain item 1021[/b].

choices.option: Give up something to gain a flower
choices.outcome: Lose 1 card with a value of at least $2 from your grid or reserve to gain flora 1052[/b].

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. The cartographer (1270[/b]), windmill (1273[/b]), and theater (1276[/b]) are hiring; gain one of them.

519.action: OFFER[/b] your assistance to the local tailor
519.text: The tailor barely looks up as they carefully chisel away at a wood sentient’s face. Choose one:

choices.option: Honor the process by giving them privacy
choices.outcome: Gain 2 morale.

choices.option: Quietly study the importance of masks in wood culture
choices.outcome: You learn that wood sentients can have elements of their personalities adjusted by expert tailors. Gain 2 boost.

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask the tailor whether there are any employment opportunities. The tailor is hiring; gain structure 1278[/b].

520.action: OFFER[/b] your assistance at the entropy center
520.text: You’re ushered into the entropy center, where an animal is strapped to an altar. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain animal 843[/b].

choices.option: Honor the ritual from a safe distance
choices.outcome: Lose 1 morale as the ritualist kills the animal in front of your eyes. Thanks to some sort of sorcery, a pink spirit rises from the animal’s carcass. An energy sentient leans over to you, whispering in awe about how animals have souls too. Gain sentient 1328[/b].

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city by getting a job here
choices.outcome: The entropy center itself isn’t hiring, but the barn that supplies the entropy center is looking for a new manager. Gain structure 1266[/b].

521.action: OFFER[/b] your assistance at a tech upgrade shop
521.text: The tech upgrade shop is fully automated, so all you need to do is push a few buttons and place an item on the conveyor. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain the result of crafting or upgrading an item in your grid.

Replace your character with the corresponding card (captain[/b]: 1447[/b]; navigator[/b]: 1448[/b]; scholar[/b]: 1449[/b]; medic[/b]: 1450[/b]; engineer[/b]: 1451[/b]; marine[/b]: 1452[/b]); transfer all boost from your original character onto the new card. If you already have your power armor, instead gain 3 boost.

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. The mine that supplies the crystal shop is hiring; gain structure 1287[/b].

522.action: OFFER[/b] your assistance at the thieves’ den
522.text: A silence falls over the thieves’ den as you enter, but you’re soon welcomed like an old friend. Choose one:

choices.option: Offer to procure a precious artifact
choices.outcome: Gain 1 health and quest 1640[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

choices.option: Learn how to open a lock more efficiently
choices.outcome: Gain ability 1471[/b].

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. A local school is hiring; gain structure 1280[/b].

523.action: OFFER[/b] your assistance at a local hospital
523.text: It’s a quiet day at the local hospital. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 2 health.
Gain 2 morale.

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask around the hospital to see if anyone has employment opportunities. The tavern is hiring someone to fill in for the bedridden owner; gain structure 1277[/b].

524.action: BUILD[/b] a new life for yourself in the city
524.text: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. A local school is hiring; gain structure 1280[/b].

525.action: OFFER[/b] your assistance to the hatchery
525.text: A batch of giant eggs stays warm at the hatchery. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item 978[/b].

choices.option: Offer to care for a newly hatched creature
choices.outcome: Gain animal 814[/b].

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. The blacksmith (1269[/b]) and the hatchery (1285[/b]) are hiring; gain one of them.

526.action: OFFER[/b] your assistance to the apothecary
526.text: The smell of the apothecary evokes memories of your mother’s herb cabinet. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 2 health.
Gain flora 1073[/b].

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. The apothecary is hiring; gain structure 1268[/b].

527.text: A few islanders relax in a winery as a musician strums an instrument. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

choices.option: Honor the sentients with a song
choices.outcome: Gain $X.

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask the other islanders whether there are any local employment opportunities. The winery is hiring; gain structure 1272[/b].

528.action: OFFER[/b] your assistance at the recruiting booth
528.text: The officer on duty at the recruiting booth asks if you’re here to join the coast guard or the navy. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain $2.
Gain $4 and 2 boost.

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask about local employment opportunities. The officer tells you that there aren’t jobs underwater for landwalkers like you, but you’re welcome to take up residence at the air supply dome. Gain structure 1290[/b].

529.action: OFFER[/b] your assistance at the embassy
529.text: Gold sentients run the embassy, but you see many types of sentients here. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain ability 1463[/b].

choices.option: Persuade the gold sentients to join an alliance with humans like you
choices.outcome: Gain item 1242[/b] (also, if you have it, lose the gold curse).

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. The embassy is hiring; gain structure 1274[/b].

530.action: BUILD[/b] a new life for yourself in the city
530.text: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. The casino is hiring; gain structure 1271[/b].

531.action: OFFER[/b] your assistance to a glassblower
531.text: A talented glassblower is putting on a show for the customers. They wave you over after the others leave. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient explains that the orbs are designed as universal locators and messaging boards. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

choices.option: Assist the glassblower with a project
choices.outcome: Gain $3 and 1 boost.

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask about employment opportunities. The glassblower isn’t hiring, but they have a connection at the training grounds. Gain structure 1293[/b].

541.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
541.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as a castle rises from the ruins. Exit to 135[/b], then gain structure 1265[/b].

542.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
542.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as a windmill rises from the ruins. Exit to 185[/b], then gain structure 1273[/b].

543.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
543.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as a smithy rises from the ruins. Exit to 264[/b], then gain structure 1269[/b].

544.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
544.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as a cottage rises from the ruins. Exit to 385[/b], then gain structure 1289[/b].

545.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
545.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as a modern outpost rises from the ruins. Exit to 404[/b], then gain structure 1292[/b].

546.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
546.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as an embassy rises from the ruins. Exit to 694[/b], then gain structure 1274[/b].

547.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
547.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as a school rises from the ruins. Exit to 711[/b], then gain structure 1280[/b].

548.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
548.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as an apothecary rises from the ruins. Exit to 784[/b], then gain structure 1268[/b].

549.action: PURIFY[/b] the stinky tent, tidying up the mess
549.text: The animals seem happy to find their tent far cleaner and better organized than when they left it, and they offer you a satchel in appreciation. Gain item 1230[/b] and politely exit to 103[/b].

055.text: As soon as you reach the sentient, you realize it was a mistake. They outweigh you several times over, and they are already deep in a state of panic. Roll 2 skill dice. If either result is engage[/b] or overpower[/b], you manage to secure the sentient (gain sentient 1324[/b]). Otherwise, gain 1 of the skill results. Either way, then roll a skill die and go to where the tides take you: move[/b] (054[/b]); look[/b] (051[/b]); engage[/b] (479[/b]); help[/b] (450[/b]); take[/b] (365[/b]); overpower[/b] (427[/b]).

550.action: PURIFY[/b] the stinky tent, tidying up the mess
550.text: The occupant returns to find their tent far cleaner and better organized than when they left it, and they offer you a satchel in appreciation. Gain item 1230[/b] and politely exit to 131[/b].

551.action: PURIFY[/b] the stinky tent, tidying up the mess
551.text: The occupants return to find their tent far cleaner and better organized than when they left it, and they offer you a satchel in appreciation. Gain item 1230[/b] and politely exit to 225[/b].

552.action: PURIFY[/b] the stinky tent, tidying up the mess
552.text: The occupants return to find their tent far cleaner and better organized than when they left it, and they offer you a satchel in appreciation. Gain item 1230[/b] and politely exit to 294[/b].

553.action: BUILD[/b] a barricade so you have the room to yourself
553.text: With the room secure, you have time to look around. The elixir stands out to you; gain item 864[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 925[/b]). Then exit north to 120[/b] before someone kicks in the door.

554.action: BUILD[/b] a barricade so you have the room to yourself
554.text: With the room secure, you have time to look around. The ointment stands out to you; gain item 868[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 930[/b]). Then exit north to 485[/b] before someone kicks in the door.

555.action: BUILD[/b] a barricade so you have the room to yourself
555.text: With the room secure, you have time to look around. The pliers stand out to you; gain item 881[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 865[/b]). Then exit west to 128[/b] before someone kicks in the barricade.

556.action: BUILD[/b] a barricade so you have the room to yourself
556.text: With the room secure, you have time to look around. The fish trap stands out to you; gain item 912[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 907[/b]). Then exit north to 209[/b] before someone kicks in the barricade.

557.action: BUILD[/b] a barricade so you have the room to yourself
557.text: With the room secure, you have time to look around. The cards stand out to you; gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions). If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 924[/b]). Then exit north to 220[/b] before someone kicks in the door.

558.action: CONSOLE[/b] a sentient who recently lost a game
558.text: The sentient weeps and collapses into your arms, horrified that they just lost $17 from an ill-advised gamble. You grab a torch and lead them out of the casino. Gain item 1087[/b] and exit to 266[/b].

559.action: BUILD[/b] a barricade so you have the room to yourself
559.text: With the room secure, you have time to look around. The water bag stands out to you; gain item 857[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 935[/b]). Then exit north to 409[/b] before someone kicks in the door.

560.action: CRAFT[/b] a barricade or an item

choices.outcome: With the room secure, you have time to look around. The tool kit stands out to you; gain item 880[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 1086[/b]). Then exit north to 678[/b] before someone kicks in the door.

With such a vast array of tools at your disposal, crafting is much easier than usual. Gain either the benefit of a CRAFT[/b] action on a card you control or a simple wood curio (1094[/b]). Either way, exit to 673[/b].

561.action: BUILD[/b] a barricade so you have the room to yourself
561.text: With the room secure, you have time to look around. A torch stands out to you; gain item 1084[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 986[/b]). Then exit north to 490[/b] before someone kicks in the door.

562.action: CRAFT[/b] a barricade or an item

choices.outcome: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby axe stands out to you; gain item 1042[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 946[/b]). Then slip out of the barricade to 160[/b].

With such a vast array of tools at your disposal, crafting is much easier than usual. Gain either the benefit of a CRAFT[/b] action on a card you control or a simple energy dingsbums (1097[/b]). Either way, exit to 160[/b].

563.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby blue crystal stands out to you; gain item 1160[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 943[/b]). Then continue with the move-EXIT[/b][/b] action.

564.action: ASSIST[/b] a museum guest who has lost their datapad
564.text: You pick up the errant datapad from the floor and return it to the sentient. They’re overwhelmed with gratitude, and they share a neat trick with you regarding the museum’s security system. Gain ability 1495[/b] and 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

565.action: BUILD[/b] a barricade between you and the bewildered shop owner
565.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby potion stands out to you; gain item 861[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 953[/b]). Then exit north to 244[/b].

566.action: ASSIST[/b] the guard, who is just around the corner taking aim at a pirate ship
566.text: After several warning shots, the ship steers away into the clouds. The guard clasps your shoulder in gratitude and offers you a glider to aid in your travels. Gain vehicle 957[/b] and 1 morale, and exit to 304[/b].

567.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby blue crystal stands out to you; gain item 1160[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 1039[/b]). Then exit north to 707[/b].

568.action: REPAIR[/b] some broken items for the vendor
568.text: The sentient warily lets you patch up a few older items, and they’re pleased with the results. They offer you a pair of goggles in appreciation. Gain item 941[/b] and exit to 333[/b].

569.action: OFFER[/b] to help the vendors unpack and organize the crates
569.text: The vendors appreciate the extra set of hands. When they realize that a winter coat was included in a crate by mistake, they give it to you. Gain item 929[/b] and exit to 335[/b].

570.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The robe stands out to you; gain item 966[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 994[/b]). Then exit north to 343[/b].

571.action: CRAFT[/b] a barricade or an item

choices.outcome: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby grenade stands out to you; gain item 860[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 870[/b]). Then exit north to 125[/b].

With such a vast array of tools at your disposal, crafting is much easier than usual. Gain either the benefit of a CRAFT[/b] action on a card you control or a simple lava chisme (1101[/b]). Either way, exit to 376[/b].

572.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby goggles stand out to you; gain item 940[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 988[/b]). Then exit north to 397[/b].

573.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby quickdraw stands out to you; gain item 909[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 876[/b]). Then exit north to 411[/b].

574.action: CRAFT[/b] a barricade or an item

choices.outcome: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby armor stands out to you; gain item 976[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 874[/b]). Then exit north to 454[/b].

With such a vast array of tools at your disposal, crafting is much easier than usual. Gain either the benefit of a CRAFT[/b] action on a card you control or a simple metal knickknack (1093[/b]). Either way, exit to 453[/b].

575.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby pair of binoculars stands out to you; gain item 972[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 944[/b]). Then exit north to 456[/b].

576.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby explosives stand out to you; gain item 879[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 905[/b]). Then exit north to 457[/b].

577.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby nanotech syringe stands out to you; gain item 869[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 1045[/b]). Then exit north to 465[/b].

578.action: ASSIST[/b] the workers with the incoming cargo
578.text: The workers appreciate your help, and you quickly unload several large barrels from the boat. They give you a few coins and a spare rope in gratitude. Gain item 901[/b] and $2.

579.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby ring stands out to you; gain item 993[/b]; If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 982[/b]). Then exit north to 358[/b].

580.text: Using the screwdriver, you patch up a loose panel. Gain item 875[/b] and exit north to 618[/b].

581.text: The robots accept your craft command within minutes. Gain either the benefit of a CRAFT[/b] action on a card you control or a simple circuit nani nani (1098[/b]). Either way, exit to 492[/b].

582.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby trident stands out to you; gain item 1090[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 877[/b]). Then exit north to 641[/b].

583.text: You take the podium and offer your homeworld’s aid to this planet. Your proposal fascinates the council and lays the groundwork for diplomatic relations. Gain 1 morale.

584.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby climbing shoes stand out to you; gain item 963[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 1229[/b]). Then exit north to 667[/b].

585.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby key stands out to you; gain item 996[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else; gain either a book (1044[/b]) or a knife (1209[/b]). Then exit north to 681[/b].

586.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby ring stands out to you; gain item 995[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 916[/b]). Then exit north to 687[/b].

587.action: FEED[/b] a feast to the fishermen using the fruit and fish they caught
587.text: Your parents taught you how to cook a decent meal, so you smoke some fish with the fruit and some spices you find hanging from the rafters. The sentients are delighted to try something different, and they give you a choice of the totem (899[/b]) or the oxygen mask (964[/b]) as a parting gift. Gain 1 morale and exit to 744[/b].

588.text: You scrub the floors clean after learning that the occupant’s partner was recently murdered in the middle of this room in broad daylight. They were on the northern edge of the island when it happened, and they didn’t hear a single sound. The owner of the house pays you to investigate. Gain $3 and quest 1645[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

589.action: PLACE[/b] an offering at the foot of the statue (lose 1 item or flora)
589.text: As you place your item at the foot of the statue, you covertly take another item there. Gain one of the following: the bone mace (item 969[/b]), the egg (item 977[/b]), the crystal (item 1160[/b]), or $5. Exit to 763[/b].

590.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient who is struggling with a feisty mount
590.text: The large bird responds well to you, but it seems to want nothing from the sentient, who reluctantly hands you the reins. Gain animal 803[/b] and item 904[/b]; exit north to 770[/b].

591.text: With so many wires, the sword is prone to damage, but you easily repair it. Gain item 893[/b] and exit west to 780[/b] before your presence is detected.

592.action: ASSIST[/b] the sentient with their task
592.text: The sentient—a master at their craft—reluctantly accepts your assistance. They teach you how to collect the memories that trickle into this mountain palace, showing you the subtle differences in the same memories after they later return. They even show you some of the earliest memories from the people of this world, the awakenings of sentience after the collision resulted in the birth of the 12 elements. With your help, they finish their work early and offer to join you for a stroll. Gain sentient 1343[/b] and $3.

596.text: The elder dragon releases a great sigh as you dress the many wounds that have never healed. With every arrow you remove and every poultice you apply, the dragon seems happier and more trusting of you. Gain animal 1110[/b]; you may go down the passage and deeper into the planet to cave 047[/b].

597.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby binoculars stand out to you; gain item 972[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item 1251[/b]). Then exit north to 310[/b].

599.text: The gears on the door have rusted with age; conversely, they make you feel young as you clean them and link them together. Gain 2 health and go deeper into the planet to cave 048[/b].

060.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health. Lastly, roll a skill die and go to where the tides take you: move[/b] (057[/b]); look[/b] (056[/b]); engage[/b] (476[/b]); help[/b] (452[/b]); take[/b] (366[/b]); overpower[/b] (427[/b]).

601.text: The frozen petals inspire you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1100[/b].

602.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
602.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

603.text: If you have a flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 820[/b]. If not, gain 1 boost.

604.text: The sentient won’t stop walking even as you attempt to heal their wound, but fortunately their pace is so slow that it doesn’t make a difference. When you finish, they snap out of their daze and realize what you’ve done. They’re so grateful that they offer to accompany you. Gain sentient 1312[/b] and $3.

605.text: The sentients are surprised to see you emerge from the snow, and they confer briefly amongst themselves. Finally the leader clears their throat and says that they will honor you with the task of cooking them a fine vegetable stew. Gain 1 boost and quest 1662[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

606.text: The sentient is extremely hesitant to stoop to the level of needing help from you, but they reluctantly admit that they aren’t able to leap across the gap in the cave behind them. If you offer to do it for them, gain $4 and go to cave 021[/b].

607.text: If you have flora or food, let the animals nibble on part of it, then gain animal 812[/b]. If not, you gain back a little warmth thanks to the animals as they pass by (gain 1 health).

608.action: CRAFT[/b] a basic item using some loose circuitry
608.text: You fiddle with the circuits for a few minutes (gain item 1098[/b]). The machine won’t respond to you afterward.

609.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
609.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that the nearby sled could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-HIJACK[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

610.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 810[/b]. If not, you gain back a little warmth thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 health).

611.text: You polish the obelisk with vigor, gaining the respect of several circuit sentients in the area. They share with you the knowledge of ice magic. Gain spell 1377[/b] and continue.

612.text: A little rewiring did the trick. It appears to be some sort of bypass code or key. Gain item 1178[/b].

613.text: A loose panel reveals that the levitation core of the runecaster is disconnected. While you have access to the inside, you pair the device to your augsuit. Gain item 1030[/b].

614.text: You kneel before the massive sentient. They nudge you to rise and they reveal that they saw you crash on this planet, and they’re pleased that you emerged from your escape pod much quicker than the Traveler did. They mention that some of your wreckage is to the southwest of here. Gain 2 boost.

615.text: Reconnecting the cord proves easy. A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 look[/b]; you also gain 1 morale.

616.action: RELEASE[/b] the elemental from its tether
616.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental 1399[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

617.action: CRAFT[/b] either a gold or an ice widget
617.text: If you craft with gold, gain item 1099[/b]. If you craft with ice, gain item 1100[/b].

618.action: OFFER[/b] your services to the entities controlling the speakers
618.text: The masks are impressed by your ability to stay connected to your crew via wireless technology. They offer you their assistance in departing this planet if you help them untether. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The masks proudly proclaim that they don’t actually need your help—they’re doing just fine on their own, thank you very much! They try to prove this point by giving you a small piece of their technological advances. Gain item 1190[/b].
Gain $4, 1 help[/b], and destiny 1606[/b] (place it in the center). The circuit sentients send you to the northeast, where you can find vehicles that push the limits of their technology.

619.text: The sentient shrugs as if complex circuitry is no big deal, but you can tell they like the ego boost, so you heap on the compliments. Eventually the sentient can’t resist joining you. Gain sentient 1310[/b] and 1 boost.

062.action: SHARE[/b] a description of the view with your crewmates
062.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If your result matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. Then go to where the tides take you (match your newly gained skill): move[/b] (051[/b]); look[/b] (057[/b]); engage[/b] (478[/b]); help[/b] (450[/b]); take[/b] (364[/b]); overpower[/b] (429[/b]).

620.text: You snip the wires attached to the sentient, attempting to avoid direct contact with the high-voltage metal. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all take[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 take[/b]. Then gain sentient 1326[/b].

621.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the look-MEMORIZE[/b][/b] action.

622.text: They bask in your revelry, tossing some coins at your feet and uploading some advice directly into your brain. Gain $5 and 2 random skills; you may continue.

623.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple circuit item, ignoring the hologram
623.text: It only takes a few cords of ivy for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1098[/b].

624.action: PRACTICE[/b] your ability to squeeze through tight places
624.text: This isn’t a skill set you often have the chance of practicing, so you take the opportunity as presented. Gain ability 1507[/b].

625.action: HONOR[/b] the circuit traditions and try to better understand them
625.text: A sentient sees the reverence and curiosity with which you observe the ceremony, and they pull you aside to explain that this is the Lightstone, the spark of life and sentience on this planet. The circuit sentients built their civilization around the Lightstone, believing that they must directly connect their soul to the Lightstone. Gain 3 boost and continue.

626.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a gadget worthy of the attention of the building owners
626.text: Noticing that everything about this place is connected by wires, you patch together a wireless flying drone. The factory workers are in awe of the device, and in exchange for it, they lead you inside and stuff your purse with money. Gain $6 and go to interior 581[/b].

627.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient heading toward the city
627.text: The circuit sentient resists your assistance, but they begrudgingly admit they need some help carrying several buckets of crystals from their nearby farm. Gain $4 and go to city 521[/b].

628.text: Other crystals in the area have thick wires running through them, but not this one. A farmer notices your handiwork and gives you the pliers in appreciation. Gain item 883[/b] and 1 morale.

629.text: Unfortunately, the healing process begins with the removal of the dead limb that keeps the animal tethered to this cliff. Freed at last, it lingers nearby, wanting to trust you. Gain animal 808[/b].

630.text: The Traveler contemplates ways for you to assist them, but they instead recommend that you help the animal to the west of here. Gain 2 help[/b] and continue.

631.action: RELAX[/b] to the pleasant ebb and flow of the underwater currents
631.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

632.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1096[/b].

633.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 806[/b]. If not, the animal still gives you a little affection, blowing air into your lungs (whenever you arrive at your next location, ignore any hypoxia damage).

634.text: This thriving area seems like a great place to run a business. You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1298[/b].

635.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1096[/b].

636.text: Avoiding being caught in the churning water yourself while pulling the trapped sentient out requires monumental effort and concentration, but you finally succeed. Gain sentient 1347[/b].

637.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1096[/b].

638.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
638.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

639.action: CRAFT[/b] a basic item from a bone
639.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item 1092[/b].

640.action: VOLUNTEER[/b] to work at the outpost while the guards take a break
640.text: The sentients respect your willingness to step up for duty, and they swim north, excitedly discussing the armory in the City of Waves. You take the opportunity to peek inside the outpost. Go to interior 582[/b].

641.action: PRAISE[/b] a sentient heading toward the city
641.text: The young sentient is reciting a short speech to themselves; they explain that they’re working on their homework for school. You give them some words of encouragement. Gain 1 morale and go to city 528[/b].

642.action: NURTURE[/b] the animal with a gentle hand
642.text: The creature brays appreciatively and opens its mouth, revealing a large water-free area occupied by several sentients—it’s an underwater taxi service for landwalkers like you! You may hitch a ride northwest to 476[/b], northeast to 478[/b], southeast to 647[/b], or southwest to 635[/b]. When you arrive, ignore the hypoxia damage (if any).

643.action: RESCUE[/b] an animal being pulled into the waterspout
643.text: You drag some heavy flotsam toward the animal, using it as leverage to prevent the both of you from succumbing to the funnel. When the animal is safe, it darts to the east and returns with a large egg, presenting it to you in gratitude. Gain item 979[/b].

644.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers above the seabed. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

645.action: OFFER[/b] your services to the sentient
645.text: The sentient indicates that they don’t need help guarding the king, but they appreciate your desire to enlist. They point you to the City of Waves to the northwest. Gain 1 morale.

646.action: HONOR[/b] the creature with a gift (lose 1 card with a coin value from your grid or reserve before rolling the challenge die)
646.text: In appreciation of your offering, the sentient welcomes you as the finest of landwalkers. They offer you the choice of participating in the Trial of Strength to the north (gain item 889[/b] and go to 647[/b]) or information about the location of a mech suit (gain quest 1656[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

647.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the overpower-FIGHT[/b][/b] action.

648.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple flora item, keeping your distance from the sharks
648.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty; you’re impressed that you pulled off such a feat underwater. Gain item 1096[/b] and 1 morale.

649.text: Numerous trips to the surface for air are necessary as you reassemble the broken ship. The job would be even more difficult were it not for the water-resistant wood and the sturdy construction of the ship. Eventually the ship rises from the depths with you at its helm. Gain vehicle 1015[/b].

choices.option: Clean some of the gold-like fungal growth from the sentient’s exterior
choices.outcome: The gold peels away, but you worry it will return soon. The sentient mentions that a landwalker friend of theirs to the east is developing a cure. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

choices.option: Pay 2 boost from item 865 (if you have this item)
choices.outcome: You apply the antidote to the gold-encrusted areas on the sentient, and within minutes they begin to dissolve into the water. The sentient, pain free for the first time in ages, thanks you profusely and gives you $10. While they don’t think their fellow water sentients will care about their renewed health, they know their leaf friend will. Gain quest 1655[/b] (if you don’t already have it), then rotate quest 1655[/b] and add it to your grid.

651.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 850[/b]. If not, the animal tries to bite your arm (lose 1 health unless you pay 1 boost or 1 move[/b]).

652.action: RESCUE[/b] whatever or whomever is trapped in the pit
652.text: You perfectly time your rescue attempt when the guards’ attention is elsewhere. Inside the pit is a feeble sentient who follows your lead. Gain sentient 1356[/b]. You may pay 1 boost to go to an adjacent location other than north; otherwise, continue.

653.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
653.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

654.action: PRACTICE[/b] possible approaches to clearing the anemones
654.text: Gain the navigate ability (1464[/b]), squeeze ability (1507[/b]), or cut ability (1508[/b]). You may continue.

655.text: The flat ledge and abundance of sunken supplies creates a great opportunity to construct a refuge from the lack of oxygen below the surface. Gain structure 1290[/b] and continue.

656.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple stone item from the rubble at the mouth of the cave
656.text: Gain item 1095[/b]. Up close, the cave doesn’t look as daunting as it did from a distance. If you dare, you may gain 1 look[/b] and continue with the look-EXPLORE[/b][/b] action.

657.action: RELEASE[/b] the elemental from its tether
657.text: Freed from its tether, elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental 1406[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

658.text: A glowing head appears from the dark depths, and the sentient motions their gratitude. Gain sentient 1318[/b].

659.text: You kneel at the edge of the graveyard. As you do, a tendril of light drifts from the bones into your chest, and you have a feeling of renewal. Gain 1 health. You may go north to 660[/b], south to 658[/b], or west to 653[/b]; if you do, don’t suffer hypoxia damage upon arrival. Otherwise, continue.

660.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 848[/b]. If not, gain 1 health if you suffered hypoxia damage this turn.

661.text: The turtle-like taxi saunters over to you and gestures to its cracked glass shell. You seal a few gaps and climb aboard. Gain vehicle 1013[/b] with 2 boost on it.

662.action: ASSIST[/b] the hunters with skinning their prey
662.text: In gratitude, the hunters give you a spare pair of climbing shoes (963[/b]) and recommend that you hunt for giant huskroaches to the northeast.

663.action: PRACTICE[/b] an ability that might be helpful in the surrounding area
663.text: Gain the ask ability (1470[/b]), steal ability (1482[/b]), or build ability (1488[/b]).

664.action: BUILD[/b] a business in the field
664.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1294[/b].

665.action: VOLUNTEER[/b] to fix up some of the cottages
665.text: The overworked landlord is grateful for your assistance. The hovels are built into the hill, and rainstorms have left the ceilings soggy. Gain $10 and continue.

666.text: The tree explains that they are so close to being brought to life as a wood sentient, but the Carver forgot about them. They weep thick, sappy tears and implore you to use the Tools of Creation. Gain 1 help[/b] and quest 1640[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

667.action: HONOR[/b] the sentients’ traditions by quietly waiting until the right moment and then offering a gift
667.text: The newlyweds soon cross the bridge, solidifying their union. Choose one:

choices.option: Give them each a good-luck coin (pay $2)
choices.outcome: The sentients are touched by this gift from a total stranger, and they insist that you join them for their first meal as a new couple. Gain 2 health.
The sentients are surprised to hear from a stranger, but they’re happy to celebrate with anyone and everyone. They give you a big hug. Gain 1 morale.

668.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 853[/b]. If not, the animal deposits a shiny coin in your palm, proud to have stolen it from some unsuspecting traveler (gain $1).

669.action: BREW[/b] a mushroom into an ointment
669.text: The bulbous fungus yields a greenish salve. Gain item 868[/b].

670.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus near the rune
670.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

671.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

672.action: OFFER[/b] to help the fisherman with an errand
672.text: The fisherman laments a special crate they lost at sea that contained something priceless to them. They give you a fresh bite of fish as a token of their gratitude. Gain 1 health and quest 1634[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

673.action: SHARE[/b] information with your crewmates or the sentient

choices.outcome: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).
You tell a story of your travels to the sentient, who is delighted by your exploits. In turn, they recommend that you speak with the sentient to the north. Gain 1 move[/b] and 1 engage[/b].

674.action: SHARE[/b] some food with the creature

choices.option: If you have a food card and pay 1 boost from it
choices.outcome: You stand in the creature’s path, palm outstretched. It accepts the gift tenderly, as if this were the first time anyone had ever done this. Gain animal 846[/b].

choices.option: If you don’t pay a boost from a food card
choices.outcome: The animal shares some fruit with you instead. Gain item 1224[/b].

675.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
675.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

676.text: The sentient’s tears soak into your augsuit, and they beg you to deliver an antidote to a dear friend—a water sentient—to the west. Gain item 865[/b] and quest 1655[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

677.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient waiting in front of the city
677.text: The sentient says that they’re waiting for the Gatherer of the Forest to return from the southeast with a fresh harvest for their tavern. They ask you to wait for the Gatherer and then bring the harvest to them.

choices.outcome: Gain quest 1636[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).
Go to city 519[/b].

678.text: The sentient continues to pace back and forth as they rant about a pair of vicious alien beasts that reign terror over the woodlands to the northeast. If you dare, gain quest 1668[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). If not, gain 1 boost.

679.action: AID[/b] a sentient in need or the animal
