choices.option: Aid a sentient in need based on a plea illuminated on the orb’s surface
choices.outcome: The outside of the orb includes requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. One such request is from a metal sentient trying to find the end of a rainbow to the east. Gain 1 move[/b] and quest 1703[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

Behind the animal are dozens of others like it; this one seems to be their representative. It doesn’t seem to understand your words, so you kneel and let it approach you. It extends a tendril and brushes it against your arm, and after a moment’s contemplation, it seems satisfied by your intentions. Gain animal 843[/b].

680.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 854[/b]. If not, you gain a little morale thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 morale).

681.action: PRACTICE[/b] your skills in the clearing before proceeding
681.text: Gain the defend ability (1478[/b]), trailblaze ability (1484[/b]), squeeze ability (1507[/b]), or cut ability (1508[/b]). You may continue.

682.action: REPAIR[/b] the exterior of the house
682.text: The occupants appreciate your unsolicited aid, saying that they’ve tried to maintain this place they call Ole Hollow. Either gain $5 or invite yourself inside (enter interior 586[/b]).

683.text: The leaf sentient deflects the compliment, but you can tell from how they flutter their petal-like shoulders that they take pride in their appearance. They offer you some tea and an activity recommendation. Gain 1 health, 1 boost, and quest 1657[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

684.text: You quickly realize that the hummingbats aren’t attacking you—they’re acting like a dangerous predator is in their midst. Then you see it: a massive beetle, nearly invisible against a tree trunk. You almost walked right by it. You act as a shield between the beast and the bats, and the beetle skitters away down the tree. The hummingbats nuzzle against you in appreciation and steer you up the staircase; gain 2 morale, and you may go north to 689[/b].

685.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item 1096[/b].

686.action: BUILD[/b] a business using the abundance of trees
686.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make, whittling absentmindedly at a stick as you do. Gain item 1094[/b] and blueprint 1298[/b].

687.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

688.action: CRAFT[/b] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
688.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the engage-TRANSMIT[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item 1097[/b].

689.text: If you have flora or food, let the cats nibble on part of it, then gain animal 827[/b]. If not, you may instead use 2 boost to gain animal 827[/b].

690.text: You’re able to improve some the structural integrity of the gateways. To repair them fully, however, some amount of sorcery is required. Gain quest 1657[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). You may continue.

691.action: HONOR[/b] the sanctity of the monument
691.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place—not to mention one that is probably well-guarded. You bow deeply toward the monument and step away. As you do, five heavily armed warriors emerge from the roots, returning your bow in unison. One of them gives you a basket of fruit. Gain item 1224[/b] and 1 morale.

692.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 841[/b]. If not, the animal feeds some treats to you, shaking some blue and red berries from within its leafy mane (gain 1 health).

693.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the move-SCALE[/b][/b] action.

694.action: HONOR[/b] this ancient place by staying away
694.text: As if the ruins recognize your restraint and respect, you feel a purifying wave wash over you. Lose 1 curse and gain 1 morale.

695.action: OFFER[/b] to help the owner of the farm
695.text: The farmer, a wood sentient, explains that their entire herd broke free last night. They beg you to search the surrounding area to find them and steer them back here. Gain 1 move[/b] and quest 1702[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

696.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
696.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

697.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

698.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple stone item from the rubble at the mouth of the cave
698.text: Gain item 1095[/b]. Up close, the cave looks even more inviting than it did from a distance. If you dare, you may gain 1 look[/b] and continue with the look-EXPLORE[/b][/b] action.

699.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a bridge across the gully
699.text: Nearby travelers applaud the new bridge and give you a spare toothbrush in appreciation, saying it’ll result in friendlier conversations in the capital city to the north. Gain item 1208[/b]; you may go north to 779[/b] (if you do, also gain 2 help[/b] from the runecaster on the far side of the gully).

700.action: CRAFT[/b] a basic item from a bone
700.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item 1092[/b].

701.text: Choose a specific animal, sentient, flora, or item from your grid or reserve to place inside the box:

choices.outcome: The animal disappears and doesn’t return. Lose the animal and gain 1 boost. Continue.
The sentient disappears and doesn’t return. Lose the sentient and gain 1 boost. Continue.
The flora just sits in the box—nothing happens. Gain 1 boost and continue.
The item just sits in the box—nothing happens. Gain 1 boost and continue.

702.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
702.text: The creature lurking behind the lotus lashes out, making a simple brew a considerably more difficult challenge. Having fended off the beast, you grind the lotus roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva— resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

703.text: The energy in their joints sizzles appreciatively, and they toss a map case at your feet. “With the trials almost complete, I don’t need this anymore.” Gain item 1261[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 18 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region J).

704.action: AID[/b] a sentient in need based on a plea illuminated on the orb’s surface
704.text: The outside of the orb includes requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. One such request is to recover a stolen soulstone; the instructions (from a sentient to the northeast of here) say that the stone was taken to a bandit hideout to the north of this orb. Gain 1 boost and quest 1654[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

705.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 838[/b]. If not, the animal still seems content to enjoy some friendly company for a moment (gain 1 morale).

706.text: You scare away the animal’s pursuers, and the exhausted animal eases to the ground nearby, nuzzling into your palm. Gain animal 840[/b].

707.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

708.text: The stone sentient is almost inconsolable, but you manage to understand that their child needs some help to the north. If you will help, gain 1 move[/b] and go north to 709[/b]; otherwise gain 1 boost.

709.action: RESCUE[/b] the person or people at the other end of the rope
709.text: You find a young sentient wedged within a crack in the column. After you wiggle them free, you lower them to the ground and give them a big hug. Gain sentient 1346[/b] and ability 1513[/b].

710.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a zipline to connect the ledge to the area below
710.text: A nearby traveler applauds the effort and gives you a spare pair of translating glasses in appreciation, saying you’ll need it in the capital city to the west. Gain item 925[/b]; you may go north to 711[/b].

711.text: Having remained alone in one place for so long, the lizard was in dire need of a little care and attention. You soothe its stress and inject some revitalizing meds between the cracks of its stone-like skin. Gain animal 837[/b].

712.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

713.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

714.text: The sentient is grateful for the offer, explaining that their sibling recently wandered too far from home and was captured by enterprising metal sentients to the far north. Gain $2, 1 move[/b], and quest 1652[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

715.text: The sentient waves away your respect, but you can tell they appreciate the gesture. “This is my family business,” they say. They offer to identify and bestow your soul upon you. Roll a skill die and gain a crystal matching the resulting color (blue[/b]: 1160[/b]; purple[/b]: 1161[/b]; orange[/b]: 1162[/b]; green[/b]: 1163[/b]; yellow[/b]: 1164[/b]; red[/b]: 1165[/b]). If you already have that exact crystal, the Soulkeeper nods knowingly and instead offers you some insight into using that crystal (gain 2 skills matching its color).

716.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple stone item from the rubble at the mouth of the cave
716.text: Gain item 1095[/b]. Up close, the cave doesn’t look as steep as it did from a distance. If you dare, you may gain 1 look[/b] and continue with the look-EXPLORE[/b][/b] action.

717.action: BREW[/b] using some fresh water and the nearby flora
717.text: The orange petals of the flower dissolve into the water, then quickly thicken into an acidic paste. Gain item 859[/b].

718.text: The sentient’s voice sounds like rocks grinding together as they explain that a group of bandits—metal sentients—stole their soulstone and took it to the west. Gain 1 take[/b] and quest 1654[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

719.action: BUILD[/b] a castle in the clouds from the framework of the ruins
719.text: This peak provides a fortified position for you to settle down and make a home in these mountains. Gain structure 1265[/b].

720.action: CRAFT[/b] a basic item from a bone
720.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item 1092[/b].

721.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the look-CALCULATE[/b][/b] action.

722.action: HONOR[/b] someone you love by performing a leap of faith
722.text: Trusting the low gravity in this region of the world, you gather your courage and step off the path into the clouds. As you do, close your eyes and think of someone specific to honor (friend, family member, pet, etc.): It feels like you’re floating forever. As you do, the thing you value most about your honoree comes to mind. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 2 health. When you open your eyes, you’re on the opposite path. Gain 1 morale and go north to 723[/b].
Gain 2 morale. When you open your eyes, you’re on the opposite path. Gain 1 morale and go north to 723[/b].
Gain 2 boost. When you open your eyes, you’re on the opposite path. Gain 1 morale and go north to 723[/b].

723.action: PRACTICE[/b] an ability that might be useful here or in the surrounding area
723.text: Gain the leap ability (1486[/b]), scale ability (1503[/b]), or force ability (1512[/b]). If you choose the scale ability, you may continue with a move-SCALE[/b][/b] action.

724.action: FEED[/b] treats to the glowing animal
724.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal 837[/b] and continue with the engage-PICK[/b][/b] action at a cost reduced by 2. If not, the animal wanders away from the treasure chest; gain 1 engage[/b].

725.action: BUILD[/b] an agricultural establishment in this well-traveled area
725.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1296[/b].

726.text: You stand between the travelers and the giant, warding it away while the sentients escape. Gain 1 morale.

727.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient heading toward the city
727.text: The sentient appreciates the help carrying cartons of medical gear toward the hospital. Gain $3 and go to city 523[/b].

728.action: TEACH[/b] the sentient how to fall without injuring themselves
728.text: Your mandatory space cadet safety training comes in handy from time to time! The sentient is appreciative of your advice, and they invite you to watch them attempt the famous Leap of Faith. If you agree, gain sentient 1347[/b] and go west to 722[/b]. If not, they request that you look for their lost pet, a hovertail that recently flew off to the east (gain quest 1650[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

729.action: RELEASE[/b] the elemental from its tether
729.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental 1405[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

730.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple stone item from the rubble at the mouth of the cave
730.text: Gain item 1095[/b]. Up close, you realize the mine is better lit than you originally thought. If you dare, you may gain 1 look[/b] and continue with the look-EXPLORE[/b][/b] action.

731.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

732.text: After patching a small portion of the decaying spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: The further you get into the repairs, the more you’re fascinated by this particular ship. It’s similar to your vessel, but some of the technology is slightly more advanced, yet the overgrowth on the ship indicates that it crashed here long before yours. Gain 2 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to fire up the thrusters.

You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire the navigational system. Gain 1 boost and 1 morale. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b].

733.action: HONOR[/b] the sanctity of the pearl
733.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place. You bow deeply toward the pearl and step away. Sentients in the area are pleased by the gesture of respect, and they reward you with some local ointment. Gain item 868[/b] and continue, as the sentients assure you it’s perfectly fine to go touch the pearl.

734.text: You have absolutely no idea what you’re doing, as your training did not include healing rifts in spacetime. With your instincts and intuition as your only guides, you find a way to fold the rift into itself as if it were quantum pizza dough. When you’re finished, you have a heightened sense of understanding of the universe. Gain lesson 1433[/b].

735.action: ASSIST[/b] the sentient with their work
735.text: The sentient lowers their hands and peeks out of the orb, explaining that they’ve been trying to get it to levitate. They give you a pair of goggles linked to their own so they can see what you see (gain item 941[/b]) and ask you to scout the floating rocks to the northwest (gain quest 1675[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

736.text: The task is a nice distraction from the heat. Gain item 1091[/b] and continue.

737.text: The sentient appreciates the gesture. “I can’t believe my dear Timber is gone,” they say. “And just days before the annual fishing challenge—they haven’t lost in years! Would you like to come inside for a few minutes? I can make tea.” Gain 1 boost; you may go to interior 588[/b].

738.text: The sentient appreciates the assistance as they load their boat. They steer you into the city; gain $2 and go to city 527[/b].

739.action: HONOR[/b] the sanctity of the island
739.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place to the pirates—not to mention one that is probably well-guarded. You bow deeply toward the island and step away. As you do, several pirates swing into the water from the jungle and return your bow. They share a flagon of ale with you and recommend you visit the spaceship wreckage to the southwest. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

740.action: OFFER[/b] to help with the problem
740.text: The sentient says their family has been growing a tree here for the last 100 years to use for a magnificent vessel. The tree was here just a week ago, and now it’s gone! The only hope is to find the rare seeds in a cave to the southeast and somehow accelerate the growth of the tree. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient notices the seeds spilling from your pocket. They are very excited by this, and they beg you to plant the seeds here, walk through the time portal to the north, and find the future version of this location. If you accept, lose item 1020[/b] to gain sentient 1364[/b] and quest 1699[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply). Otherwise, gain 3 boost.
Gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b].

741.action: BUILD[/b] a business in front of the gateway, assuming this is an important junction for travel and commerce
741.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1298[/b].

742.action: SHARE[/b] your memories with the sentient
742.text: The sentient places a floppy hand on your forehead, soaking in your knowledge and history. As a token of their appreciation, they give you a special map. Gain item 1264[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 21 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region H).

743.action: OFFER[/b] to help, gesturing toward the sentient on the shore
743.text: The water sentient explains that the frantic person on the shore has been accused of murder in a small vacation home to the west. They suspect foul play, so before alerting the authorities, they request your help with the investigation. Gain sentient 1359[/b] and quest 1645[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

744.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient as they debone freshly caught fish
744.text: The sentient is grateful for the help. Before you depart, they give you a fish trap and challenge you to bring back an even bigger fish from the depths of the ocean. Gain item 910[/b] and quest 1660[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

745.text: In appreciation of your unsolicited effort, the owner gives you a big hug and a few coins. Gain $2 and 1 morale.

746.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1294[/b].

747.text: You snap off a brittle piece of the nearby flora, its sap dripping down your hand. The thirsty animal laps up the liquid. Gain animal 834[/b].

748.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient heading toward the city
748.text: Their hands are full of glassblowing instruments, and they reluctantly appreciate the help. Gain $3 and go to city 531[/b].

749.action: BREW[/b] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
749.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

750.text: You assumed at first that the kraken was the antagonist, but then you see how the villagers vilify the creature and throw stones at it without provocation. The kraken could have attacked them long ago, yet it didn’t. You give it permission to go to shore and live up to the reputation unfairly given to it. After the kraken returns to the sea, you find a totem among the damaged beach huts. Gain item 899[/b] and 1 help[/b].

751.action: SHARE[/b] your rations with the child and their pet
751.text: As the child munches on the food, they invite you on a grand adventure they’ve been planning for ages. Gain 1 morale, 1 boost, and quest 1643[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

752.action: RELEASE[/b] the elemental from its tether
752.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental 1404[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

753.text: The beautiful creature is dehydrated and exhausted; you direct some nutrients from your augsuit directly into it. The rider is grateful beyond words, and they offer to guide you to the Trial of Speed. They give you a saddle (gain item 958[/b]) and transport you north (go to 754[/b]).

754.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the move-SPEED[/b][/b] action.

755.action: CRAFT[/b] a rowboat from the wreckage to give to the sentient
755.text: With the sentient’s permission, you use some of the scrap wood from the wreckage to cobble together a small boat. The sentient offers some tips while you work, and eventually they join you. It’s a humble vessel compared to what the ship must have looked like, but it’s seaworthy. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and 1 morale.

756.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
756.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

757.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple stone item from stones rubbed smooth by the waterfalls
757.text: You fashion an uncomplicated doodad from the rocks. Gain item 1095[/b].

758.text: The beast resists your calm approach, but eventually it’s paralyzed by pain. It breathes a sigh of relief as you dislodge a bone from its throat. Gain animal 832[/b].

759.action: OFFER[/b] your services to the sentients
759.text: The sentients don’t particularly want your help, but they say that if you have time to spare, you could do them a favor and protect the besieged fortress to the north. Gain $3 and quest 1659[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

076.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple wind item from a wind chime
076.text: There’s no one in the room to stop you, so you take your time to create an air huppeldepup. Gain item 1102[/b].

760.text: The invaders offer no explanation for the battle; they simply hand you a shield and send you to war. Gain item 939[/b] and quest 1694[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

761.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient heading into the city
761.text: The sentient is carrying a basket of assorted items—”gifts for the Founder!” they say. They give you a hug in appreciation for the help. Gain 1 morale and go north to 762[/b].

762.action: TEACH[/b] the sentient the nuances of your language
762.text: The sentient is excited by the opportunity to communicate with an alien like you, and they join you on your journey. Gain sentient 1328[/b].

763.text: If you lose 1 item, gain 2 morale as nearby sentients praise your generosity and guide you inside the towering building (go to interior 589[/b]). If you don’t lose an item, gain 1 morale and continue.

764.text: The sentient leans their wings against you while staggering off the street onto a bench, where you wait patiently for them to sober up. In the meantime they ask if you can help them with a task. Gain item 1158[/b] and quest 1641[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

765.action: ASSIST[/b] the ground crew with a stubborn knot
765.text: The crewmembers are grateful for your strong fingers, and they invite you to join them for a drink at a local tavern a little south of here. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You don’t understand much of what the sentients say, but the drinks are good and the camaraderie is a nice change of pace. Gain 1 morale. You step away for some fresh air and find yourself alone in the stables. Go to interior 590[/b].
The sentients give you some pointers and bid you farewell. Gain 1 move[/b] and $2.

766.action: PRAISE[/b] the integrity of the vessel and its passengers
766.text: The sentient and the Traveler wave at you in gratitude before drifting away. Gain 2 morale.

767.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient heading toward the city
767.text: The sentient is struggling to balance a heavy barrel of liquid and a large metal bird, so you lend a hand. Gain $3 and 1 morale.

768.action: ASSIST[/b] the disoriented sentient to the right
768.text: The sentient thanks you for your help but laughs off the concern—they were waiting for a friend who hasn’t shown up. You offer to accompany them instead. Gain sentient 1360[/b].

769.action: VOLUNTEER[/b] to help with an undesirable task
769.text: The bulky sentient smirks and leads you to the stables, where they point at a pile of manure, flick a coin at you, and leave you alone. Gain $1 and go to interior 590[/b].

077.action: PRAISE[/b] the sentient on the left
077.text: The sentient is surprised by your presence, but their fluttering wings betray their pleasure at your compliment. When they finish the game, they offer to take you on a tour of the top level. Gain sentient 1309[/b] and go to interior 078[/b].

770.text: In appreciation of your unsolicited effort, the owner gives you a big hug and a few coins. Gain $2 and 1 morale.

771.action: OFFER[/b] to help the crew load the ship
771.text: The crew is happy for an extra pair of hands, and when the job is done, they offer you a choice of $3 or a barrel (gain item 1158[/b]). You may continue.

772.action: AID[/b] the ship’s attempt to leave the bay
772.text: Bullies tend to stand down when others stand up against them, and that’s the case here. The captain expresses their gratitude by inviting you aboard. Gain vehicle 1015[/b].

773.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a crude ladder from the nearby trees
773.text: The assembly process takes longer than you hoped, but you’re pleased with the result. Gain 1 morale and go north to 774[/b].

774.action: OFFER[/b] to run an errand for the sentient
774.text: The sentient complains of vagrants slipping through the lax bridge security and robbing them in the night. They and their friend, the smelter, are desperate for protective measures, and they ask whether you could guard the bridge for the night. They toss you a few coins and speak of a greater reward later. Gain $2 and quest 1680[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

775.action: SHARE[/b] some water with the sentient
775.text: The sentient nods appreciatively and takes a hearty swig. They comment on a piece of your armor and, after sizing you up, they ask whether you’d walk with them out of the city. If you accept, gain sentient 1334[/b] and go southwest to 768[/b].

776.text: You can either learn some crafting tips from the vendor (gain ability 1462[/b]) or you can deliver a package for them (gain item 1034[/b] and quest 1638[/b]; add the quest horizontally to your supply). Either way, they appreciate your eagerness to help, and they offer you a discounted price on a robe; you may pay $4 to gain item 966[/b].

777.action: OFFER[/b] your services to the structure’s occupants
777.text: The sentient salutes your assistance and offers to pay you to keep watch while they take a break. You may either gain 1 boost and continue, or lose 1 time to gain $5.

778.text: You clear the tree of dead branches and rotten fruit. A local juice vendor notices the effort and gives you a half-empty barrel in gratitude. Gain item 1158[/b].

779.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

078.text: The tired sentient welcomes your aid. They explain that they are kept here against their will by the Spormonger. If you have the Spormonger (sentient 1309[/b]), you may lose them to gain sentient 1319[/b]. If not, you may simply gain sentient 1319[/b]. Either way, exit to 346[/b].

780.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple wood curio while enjoying the background noise of rushing water
780.text: Your mind wanders to and from the crafting process, so the end result is a surprise even to you. Gain item 1094[/b].

781.action: CONSOLE[/b] the sentient on the left
781.text: The sentient sobs about the loss of an item that they crafted as a gift, but the kindness of a stranger is uplifting to them. Gain sentient 1344[/b]; you may offer to join them on a calming stroll through the gardens to the south (go to 780[/b]).

782.text: The sentient appears ashamed to accept your aid, but they reluctantly agree. They are being chased by the sentient lurking in the background, and they need an armed escort to the east. Gain sentient 1353[/b] and quest 1665[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

783.text: You sense that something is weighing on the gold sentient’s bulky shoulders. They lower their voice to admit that they’re not supposed to leave their post at the bank’s vault before their replacement arrives, and now they’re worried that no one is guarding the treasure inside. Gain 2 boost. “Would you mind checking for me?” they ask. If you accept, go to cave 030[/b].

784.action: BUILD[/b] a structure from the framework of the ruins
784.text: Examining what remains of the ancient floorplan, you sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint 1294[/b].

785.action: VOLUNTEER[/b] your support those on the bridge
785.text: The guards atop the bridge look at each other and nod in agreement. As they pull you up, they share that budget cuts to the city watch have resulted in waves of thieves crossing the bridge at night. Gain $1 and quest 1680[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

786.text: The three broad-shouldered guards chuckle at your offer, assuring you that your services would be better employed elsewhere. In fact, they mention that the bridge to the south could use some help. Gain 1 engage[/b] and quest 1680[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). You may continue.

787.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

788.text: All the sentient requests is that you serve as a distraction for the other vendors in the square for 5 seconds—that’s all it’ll take for them to rob each of them, and they’ll split the proceeds with you. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You pretend to faint with as much dramatic flair as you can muster. When the crowd finally realizes you’re okay, you meet the sentient off to the side, and they commend your effort. Gain ability 1481[/b] and $5.

You announce the sentient’s intentions to the other vendors, who drive away the thief, but not before they curse you for your betrayal. Fortunately, the vendors share their appreciation with you. Gain curse 1391[/b], 1 morale, and 1 health.

789.action: OFFER[/b] to find a rare item for the sentient
789.text: The sentient gestures to the far north, requesting that you obtain an aether lantern for them. It’s being held indoors by energy sentients. Gain 1 move[/b] and quest 1648[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

079.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a connected line of boulders
079.text: You nudge rotating boulders at just the right angles so they wedge into each other, forming a natural bridge down to the central pillar. Gain ability 1506[/b] and go deeper into the planet to cave 046[/b].

790.action: BUILD[/b] a better stand for the book
790.text: Such an important book deserves a truly impressive pedestal. The author of the book takes notice and decides to put a better copy of the book on the stand; they give you the older copy. Gain item 1045[/b].

791.action: RESCUE[/b] the child in the life support capsule
791.text: A young girl is locked into a peaceful, centuries-long cryogenic slumber. As you observe her, the Traveler appears by your side, their holographic visage gesturing toward the chamber. “I’ve wandered this planet as a hologram for far too long. I love this world, but I miss my home. Please don’t risk removing me from this chamber. You are my only hope.” If you have mission 1596[/b], read entry 791[/b] in the Book of Secrets. Otherwise, gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b]. You may either exit to 732[/b] (this option is recommended if you already have a spaceship or a vehicle you are in the process of upgrading to a spaceship) or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to start the rebuilding process in the hopes of rescuing the child (then read the next result only). If you decide to exit, you can return later to perform this action:

choices.outcome: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain 2 boost. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):

The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b], the Traveler safe and sound inside. You don’t know what the future holds for them, but you are hopeful that the esteemed medical crew on your homeworld will help to save them.

795.action: HONOR[/b] the sanctity of the cathedral
795.text: As you kneel, a metal sentient emerges from the shadows and taps you on the shoulder. “Excuse me,” they say. “What are you doing?” They go on to say that this building has been left to the sands of time, which is ironic given that the stained glass window was designed by ancient sand sentients to honor the interconnected nature of the past, present, and future. The sentient is planning to steal the book, but they let you look at it first. View page 23 of the Book of Vantages, then gain 2 boost and exit to 281[/b].

799.text: Part of an old ladder leans against the far wall, as if another prisoner attempted to escape but didn’t complete the job. You’re able to make it tall enough to reach halfway up the wall. Gain 3 move[/b] and continue.

080.action: ASSIST[/b] the sentient with their task
080.text: The sweltering sentient welcomes your assistance, and you make small talk about safecracking while you melt the gold. Gain sentient 1339[/b] and $1; you may continue.

801.text: You kneel before the precious shard—surely it must be precious to be hidden on such a remote sky island. As you bow your head, the shard drifts toward you. Perhaps it does not wish to be kept hidden any longer. Gain item 1707[/b].

081.action: CRAFT[/b] a bauble from some loose wires
081.text: Weaving together the pliable strands is a mindless but oddly satisfying task. Gain item 1098[/b] and 1 morale.

082.action: CRAFT[/b] an item from the ice
082.text: At best, you’re a novice ice sculptor, but you manage to create something mildly pleasant. Gain item 1100[/b].

083.action: CRAFT[/b] a trinket from the gateway
083.text: Out of curiosity, you break off a loose piece of the gateway and mold it into a trinket. Gain item 1097[/b] and continue.

084.action: ASSEMBLE[/b] a proper guardrail and bridge on the precipitous ledge
084.text: Just as you finish the assembly process, you turn to see a sentient lurch out onto the rock. They would have tumbled off the edge were it not for the newly constructed railing. Recognizing your workmanship, they pledge their loyalty to you. Gain sentient 1311[/b] and go deeper into the planet to cave 048[/b].

085.text: If you don’t pay, the sentient remains a spectator, confiding in you that it’s for the best (gain 1 morale). If you pay $3 to the fight club on behalf of the sentient, they embrace you in a sweaty hug and promise to bring back the grand prize; seconds later they’re carted out of the arena, leaving their sword in your hands. Gain item 887[/b] and continue.

086.action: CRAFT[/b] an item using the pliable magma
086.text: All you can create is a fairly useless doodad, but it has potential to be much more. Gain item 1101[/b].

087.text: While some of the miners are here of their own will and accord, others are not. You quietly unchain one sentient at a time, gesturing toward the exit. One wood sentient refuses to leave your side. Gain sentient 1362[/b] and either go toward the surface to cave 027[/b] or go deeper into the planet to cave 049[/b].

088.text: You curl up in the bedroll within the nook. Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue. Also gain the bedroll (1040[/b]).

089.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

090.action: CRAFT[/b] a zamazingo from a lump of gold
090.text: Your mind wanders as you craft, and you’re surprised to see what your subconscious creates. Gain item 1099[/b].

091.action: CRAFT[/b] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
091.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the take-DISMANTLE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item 1099[/b]).

092.action: RELAX[/b] in the serenity of the underwater cave
092.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

093.action: CRAFT[/b] a glider to fly over the maze
093.text: Using spare parts, you patch together a glider. Gain vehicle 957[/b]; you may go deeper into the planet to cave 043[/b].

094.action: ASSIST[/b] a sentient heading toward the city
094.text: They have a magical blue haze around their head, and you help to steer them into the city, where they march into the first door on your left. Gain 1 morale and go to city 041[/b].

095.action: HONOR[/b] the nest by steering clear of the eggs
095.text: Recognizing your deliberate effort, the mother of the eggs emerges from the shadows and guides you to a passage in the rear of the cavern. Proceed deeper into the planet to dungeon 596[/b]; keep this location for reference.

954.text: You may replace this with a glider (957[/b]) or decide instead to keep the hammock (gain 1 boost).

956.text: Gain X boost on this card.

choices.option: If you have an animal, feed it to the dragon
choices.outcome: The dragon eats the sacrificial offering with a single chomp and greedily begs for more. Lose the animal, then gain animal 807[/b].

choices.option: If you don’t have an animal or have one but don’t want to feed it to the dragon
choices.outcome: The dragon strikes at you again. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 move[/b].

960.text: Gain X boost on this card.

097.text: You touch one of the runecasters (there is one for each skill), and a pulse of light ripples outwards from its center seam. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune you chose. You also gain 1 morale.

971.text: Gain a winter coat (929[/b]) or a large bedroll (1040[/b]).

098.action: CRAFT[/b] a curio from the easily pliable roots
098.text: Your mind wanders as you carve, and you’re surprised to see what your subconscious created. Gain item 1094[/b].

985.action: UPGRADE[/b] into a more advanced vehicle
985.text: Replace this with a levitating cube (1010[/b]).

989.text: Replace this with a levitating cube (1010[/b]) or jetpack (1253[/b]).

099.action: PRAISE[/b] the tour guide for their knowledge of ancient glyphs
099.text: The pink sentient seems to glow a little brighter at the compliment. They confide in you that they have a theory about the Great Collision that resulted in the origins of life on this world—they think it was aliens from outer space who crash-landed in the archipelago to the southeast of here. Gain ability 1480[/b], 1 morale, and 1 boost.

100.text: As a peculiar scent percolates, an odd sensation fills your mind—the sentient is talking to you through their odor! “Greetings,” they say, “and welcome to the forest. Please take care to not step on any flora. Would you like a guide through these lands?” Gain sentient 1351[/b].

101.text: As you watch, there is a blur of movement. One second, the animal is chewing on a leaf; the next, it’s holding one of your possessions. It drops it off the rock as if to say, “Take it back so I can have another go.” Gain 1 boost and 1 engage[/b]; you may continue.

102.text: It’s brand new, with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

103.text: You sit down and let the animals come to you. You sense a level of intelligence in their eyes as they examine your clothing and chirp to each other. Having deemed you more friend than foe, they climb into your arms and signal for you to carry them across the stream. Through unknown means they open a door hidden in the boulder and hop into the darkness. Go to cave 095[/b].

104.text: As you reach for the cloak, the animal vanishes into thin air. You have a few seconds to study the details of your current location before there’s a flurry of movement in the grove, then the trap door slams shut. Go to 511[/b] and continue.

105.text: You can’t be sure without testing it, but this beastly bird might be big enough to carry you short distances in the sky. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

106.text: The runes etched into the ancient stone speak to you as you begin to comprehend them. You’re looking at a portal to other parts of the world. Stepping through it would teleport you to a distant island. Gain 2 boost and 1 move[/b]; you may continue.

107.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

108.text: You perceptively notice that the mushrooms are planted intentionally close to the shield. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

109.text: The sentient seems to understand the hummingbird-like animal, which rapidly darts in all directions. The sentient seems the happiest when the bird flies right past your ear from the south to deliver some news. Gain 1 boost and 2 help[/b]; you may continue.

110.text: Your impressive feat of memory impresses the leaf animals, who welcome you to participate in the trial. Gain 1 help[/b] and continue with the help-CREATE[/b][/b] action.

111.text: The orb is made of a shimmering, glasslike substance, so it must have taken immense strength to break it. You notice trampled shrubbery leading to the east. Gain item 1194[/b] and 1 boost; you may continue.

1110.action: LISTEN[/b] to the elder dragon (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1110.text: You open your mind to the thoughts of the elder dragon, who speaks to you telepathically. “You are safe with me, my dear alien. I will protect you just as well among the clouds as under the ocean, and even into the great beyond, from which my ancestors came to this world when the origins of life were just beginning to bloom.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1602[/b] (place it in the center).

112.text: The creature eyes you as it slurps the freshwater, and it wags its “tail” eagerly. It’s excited to meet you! Gain 1 boost and 1 engage[/b]; you may continue.

113.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

115.action: SPY[/b] on the building through a window
115.text: Through the stained glass you see a room filled with maps, books, and crystals. Gain 2 boost and 1 move[/b]; you may continue.

116.action: LISTEN[/b] to the Traveler talk about your mission
116.text: “If you’re trying to map the world, this is a great place to advance that goal.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

117.text: You perceptively notice the runes painted on the rocks surrounding the Darkstone. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. You may continue with the take-EXTRACT[/b][/b] action.

118.text: The animal saw you well before you saw it, and your unassuming stance motivates it to slow down and drift over to you. It smells your hand and licks it affectionately. Gain animal 804[/b].

119.text: The sentient, who introduces themselves as a philanthropist, starts by talking about the nearby runes and flowers, then the wishing well to the south, then the Darkstone to the west… you barely have time to introduce yourself. Gain sentient 1353[/b].

012.action: SEARCH[/b] as far into the interior as you dare venture
012.text: You’re able to reach a pile of coins near the back of the shipwreck (gain $10). Calmly exit to 649[/b].

120.text: “It’s bittersweet that both life and death stem from such devastation. Fire sentients are born of volcanoes like this one— you are entering their realm. Those whom I’ve met are fierce and protective, and if you prove that you can endure just like the fire or the sea, they will respect you.” Gain 2 boost and continue.

121.text: The owner of the boat isn’t far from here, so you could either catch their attention or try to slip away in the boat before they notice. Gain 1 boost, and gain either 1 move[/b] or 1 engage[/b]; you may continue.

122.text: You’re surrounded by artifacts and technology. To the north you see a fragment of your ship, and to the east lies an array of futuristic technology. To the south is a large, dark stone that tugs at something deep within you. Gain 3 boost.

123.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the past—this neutral area of the world was set aside to invite civilizations beyond this world to visit. Gain 1 boost.

124.text: The only entrance you find is the towering, illuminated front door. Then several metal sentients glide through the energy shield with ease. Gain 1 boost and either 1 engage[/b] or 1 take[/b]; go to interior 554[/b].

125.text: As you face the molten labyrinth, you have a choice. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay 4 boost to navigate through the lava tunnels to reach the artifact
choices.outcome: Ignoring the elaborate puzzle, you simply use your navigation skills to reach the artifact. Gain item 998[/b] and perform no other location actions here.

Find card 532[/b] (it’s a large card) and place it on the table. You can only bear the heat long enough to venture down one path. The goal is to choose which of the 3 tunnels to enter so that you can follow a continuous path to the artifact in the back left. The first row represents the three tunnel entrances—it is static and correct. After the first row, each square is in the correct row and the correct orientation (i.e., no rotating), though not necessarily in the correct column. Visually rearrange the squares in each row to ultimately declare the tunnel you wish to enter. See entry 125[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

126.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little corroded by the sulfuric fumes), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

1265.action: REFLECT[/b] on the joys of home ownership
1265.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1266.action: STUDY[/b] the art of creating food

1267.action: STUDY[/b] the art of creating armor

1268.action: STUDY[/b] the art of brewing medicine

1269.action: STUDY[/b] the art of creating weapons

127.action: LISTEN[/b] to the Traveler talk about this passage
127.text: “This passage is unique because it starts (in the east) with a priceless sword and ends (to the north) with another priceless sword. If you’re trying to collect such artifacts, you’re in the right place.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

1270.text: Gain the “create” ability (1465[/b]) or the “navigate” ability (1464[/b]).

1271.action: STUDY[/b] a variety of gambling games

1272.action: STUDY[/b] viticulture and the art of winemaking

1274.action: TRANSLATE[/b] between two sentients (you may pay 1 boost from this structure to reduce this cost to 1)
1274.text: In an effort to establish diplomatic relations, you bridge the language gap between two sentients, one of whom communicates through a digital interface and the other with a verbal language that sounds like boiling soup. Both walk away pleased with the outcome. Gain either circuit sentient 1314[/b] or gold sentient 1324[/b].

1275.action: WISH[/b] for wisdom (pay 1 boost from this structure; perform this action at most once per game)
1275.text: Gain spell 1376[/b] and 1 boost on this structure.

1276.action: SCOUT[/b] the area for fans of theater
1276.text: On a nearby path you find a sentient who loves the performing arts. Gain sentient 1360[/b].

1277.action: STUDY[/b] the art of creating specialty cocktails

1278.action: STUDY[/b] the art of creating garments

128.text: The sentient, a famous knight, chooses the nearby plain of igneous rock as the dueling grounds for this combat puzzle. Find card 533[/b] (it’s a large card) and place it on the table. Your goal is to force the knight into a pit. As the knight warms up, you notice that they always move in the opposite direction of their opponent (e.g., if their opponent moves east, the knight moves west). When you’re ready, place a red token representing you and a green token representing the knight on the starting spaces on card 533[/b]. Start by moving your token 1 square (not into rocks, pits, or off the grounds), then move their token 1 square in the opposite direction (they don’t move if they would move into a rock or off the grounds). Repeat this until you force the knight into a pit or share the same square with the knight. Then read entry 128[/b] in the Book of Secrets.

1280.action: LEARN[/b] useful information to teach at the school
1280.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain ability 1475[/b]. If 2 boost, gain ability 1484[/b]. If 3 boost, gain ability 1497[/b]. All boost remain on this structure.

1281.action: LISTEN[/b] to news from around the world

1282.action: STUDY[/b] the art of creating vehicles

1283.action: REFLECT[/b] on the joys of home ownership
1283.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1284.action: STUDY[/b] the art of creating accessories

1285.action: STUDY[/b] the process of hatching eggs

1286.action: SCAN[/b] for targets in the surrounding area

1287.text: You learn more information about the cave that you can use for guided tours. Gain 1 boost on this structure.

1288.text: One of the perks of owning a garden is having a vast array of flowers to enjoy at any time. Gain 1 morale. If you have 3 boost on this structure, also gain ability 1466[/b], which you learn from dodging through the dangerous flora.

1289.action: REFLECT[/b] on the joys of home ownership
1289.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

129.text: It’s almost as if someone placed a giant puzzle box in the middle of the ocean—you’re confident that there’s something inside to loot. Gain 1 boost and 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

1290.action: REFLECT[/b] on the joys of home ownership
1290.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1291.text: One of the perks of owning a garden is having a vast array of flowers to enjoy at any time. Gain 1 morale. If you have 3 boost on this structure, also gain ability 1477[/b], which you learn from your careful observations of each plant’s unique needs.

1292.text: Gain 1 boost on your character, then find the region where this structure is located (see look[/b] storybook entry for the structure’s location) and use page 2 of the Book of Vantages to determine the page where your view is portrayed (look at that page).

1293.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain ability 1498[/b]. If 2 boost, gain ability 1514[/b]. If 3 boost, gain ability 1502[/b]. All boost remain on this structure.

013.text: The glowing lamp at the rear of the interior indicates that this hostel may not be as abandoned as it first appeared. You find a mysterious tunnel leading west into the darkness. Gain 2 move[/b] and continue.

130.text: While both sentients are having fun, the sentient on the left seems to be winning disproportionately often. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

1305.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to move like the wind, which they have been preparing to do for the Trial of Life. Gain 2 move[/b].

1306.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to talk to flowers. Gain 2 engage[/b].

1307.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to navigate using wind patterns. Gain ability 1464[/b].

1308.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to offer your support to others. Gain 2 help[/b].

1309.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to evade those who stand in your way. Gain ability 1485[/b].

131.action: SPY[/b] through an open seam in the tent
131.text: You’re confident that there’s something inside to loot, and sure enough, you see a circuit board. Gain 1 boost and 1 take[/b]; go to interior 550[/b].

1310.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to repair damaged equipment. Gain ability 1475[/b].

1311.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to fight like a warrior. Gain ability 1504[/b].

1312.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to solve difficult problems. Gain 2 look[/b].

1313.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to communicate more effectively. Gain 2 engage[/b].

1314.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to hack into technology. Gain ability 1472[/b].

1315.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to craft basic items into better items. Gain ability 1462[/b].

1316.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to make structures. Gain either the “assemble” ability (1506[/b]) or the “build” ability (1488[/b]).

1317.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to give flattering compliments. Gain ability 1480[/b].

1318.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to scavenge for things people have lost, or even where to sell such things. Either gain ability 1510[/b] or go to cave 094[/b].

1319.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to explore dark areas. Gain 1 look[/b].

132.text: As you inspect the sword closely, you notice an inscription on the blade. “The Katana of Life. Thou shall cut but not kill; thou shall cleave but not maim.” Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

1320.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to buy and sell effectively. Gain ability 1479[/b].

1321.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to play card and dice games. Gain ability 1499[/b].

1322.text: The sentient patiently teaches you either how to be more persuasive (gain ability 1463[/b]) or how to play their favorite dice and card and dice game (gain ability 1499[/b]).

1323.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to scan an area for important details. Gain ability 1497[/b].

1324.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to attack without leaving yourself vulnerable. Gain ability 1474[/b].

1325.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to hail boats in your direction. Gain 3 engage[/b].

1326.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to translate foreign languages. Gain 3 look[/b].

1327.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to transfer energy from one creature to another. Gain 3 take[/b].

1328.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to coax animals toward you without getting bitten. Gain ability 1500[/b].

choices.option: Learn how to study mysterious objects like towers and lorestones
choices.outcome: Gain ability 1492[/b].

choices.option: Learn about the beginning of life on this planet
choices.outcome: The sentient is happy to explain that the world was a blank slate until the Great Collision, which seeded the planet with the origins of life. Gain 1 boost.

133.text: You feel a surge of inspiration as green energy seeps from the spire into your hands. The power to heal advanced technology is contained within these ancient stones, and now it is part of you. Gain spell 1371[/b].

1330.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to defend against attacks. Gain ability 1478[/b].

1331.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to mimic the sounds of animals. Gain 2 engage[/b].

1332.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to compel someone by authority. Gain 2 take[/b].

1333.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to hunt animals with respect and honor. Gain ability 1473[/b].

1334.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to subdue an attacker. Gain 2 overpower[/b].

1335.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to observe the world around you better. Gain ability 1477[/b].

1336.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to loot unattended items without being caught. Gain ability 1511[/b].

1337.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to inspect runecasters and other devices. Gain 3 look[/b].

1338.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to pick locks on treasure chests. Gain ability 1471[/b].

1339.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to dismantle technology. Gain 3 take[/b].

134.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

1340.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to steer vehicles through various terrain. Gain 2 move[/b].

1341.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to create products as a business. Gain ability 1465[/b].

1342.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to guide others without being patronizing. Gain 2 move[/b].

1343.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to learn new skills faster. They explain that their composition dramatically enhances their ability to internalize new information: Every granule in a sand sentient is inherited from sand sentients before them, dating back to the origins of life on this planet. Gain 2 look[/b].

1344.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to activate technology. Gain 2 engage[/b].

1345.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to transmit signals to far-away recipients. Gain 2 engage[/b].

1346.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to squeeze through tight places. Gain ability 1507[/b].

1347.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to boast bigger. Gain 2 engage[/b].

1348.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to commune with nature. Gain 2 engage[/b].

1349.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to assemble solutions to overcome barriers in your journey. Gain ability 1506[/b].

135.action: SCAN[/b] the ruins for anything useful
135.text: You identify a bedroll among the rubble. Gain 1 boost and 1 look[/b]; go to interior 541[/b].

1350.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to heal the sick. Gain 3 help[/b].

1351.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to nurture the flora around you. Gain 3 help[/b].

1352.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to brew flora into potions without poisoning yourself. Gain ability 1476[/b].

1353.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to aid others who don’t realize they need assistance. Gain 3 help[/b].

1354.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to honor ancient landmarks. Gain 3 help[/b].

1355.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to practice new abilities. Gain 2 help[/b].

1356.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to craft objects into powerful items. Gain ability 1462[/b].

1357.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to slay elementals. Gain 2 overpower[/b].

1358.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to raid buildings of precious items. Gain ability 1467[/b].

1359.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to enlist others to join your cause. Gain 2 take[/b].

136.action: SCAN[/b] the area from the tower
136.text: View page 45 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

1360.text: The sentient patiently teaches you one of two abilities. Choose one:

choices.option: Learn to climb trees and cliffs
choices.outcome: Gain ability 1468[/b].
Gain ability 1503[/b].

1361.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to fish for food. Gain ability 1461[/b].

1362.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to refine crystals and gems. Gain 3 help[/b].

1363.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to hike without getting blisters. Gain 3 move[/b].

1364.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to upgrade vehicles. Gain 3 help[/b].

137.text: It looks like the beast died long ago from blunt force trauma. There is a stillness to the air around the skeleton, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

138.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

139.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the not-so-distant past—this confluence is a meeting place between leaf and water sentients. Gain 1 boost.

140.action: LISTEN[/b] to the Traveler talk about your mission
140.text: “If you’re trying to learn magic, the spires to the northwest and southeast of here might expand your mind.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

141.text: It looks like the beast died from some sort of projectile, perhaps a hunting weapon. There is a stillness to the air around the skeleton, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

142.text: The wreckage in front of you is from your ship, but the Traveler was clearly on this planet before you, so you listen curiously as they explain how your ship could be an older model than theirs. “I’m from the future—around 100 years from now, based on my current calculations. I crashed here after a chronological error caused by a terraforming experiment, so even though I’m from the future, I crashed here in the distant past. Frankly I’m amazed that my body has survived this long—it’s in my ship far to the east of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

143.text: You shouldn’t have a problem squeezing into one of the escape pod ports. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

1435.action: MASTER[/b] some survival skills (you may perform this action at most once per game)
1435.text: You master some skills that may help you to survive on this planet. Gain experience card 1454[/b], 1 look[/b], and 1 overpower[/b].

1436.action: MASTER[/b] some survival skills (you may perform this action at most once per game)
1436.text: You master some skills that may help you to survive on this planet. Gain experience card 1455[/b], 1 move[/b], and 1 engage[/b].

1437.action: MASTER[/b] some survival skills (you may perform this action at most once per game)
1437.text: You master some skills that may help you to survive on this planet. Gain experience card 1456[/b], 1 look[/b], and 1 help[/b].

1438.action: MASTER[/b] some survival skills (you may perform this action at most once per game)
1438.text: You master some skills that may help you to survive on this planet. Gain experience card 1457[/b], 1 engage[/b], and 1 take[/b].

1439.action: MASTER[/b] some survival skills (you may perform this action at most once per game)
1439.text: You master some skills that may help you to survive on this planet. Gain experience card 1458[/b], 1 help[/b], and 1 overpower[/b].

144.action: LEARN[/b] the sentient’s area of expertise
144.text: The sentient is hesitant to share the secrets of the lotus with you, but they acknowledge your good intentions. Lotuses are a source of health and renewal, but they can be highly addictive when brewed and consumed. The sentient offers you a map showing where lotuses can be found, including one to the southwest of here. Gain item 1257[/b] and 1 boost; the sentient highlights your current location on the map (view page 14 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region O).

1440.action: MASTER[/b] some survival skills (you may perform this action at most once per game)
1440.text: You master some skills that may help you to survive on this planet. Gain experience card 1459[/b], 1 move[/b], and 1 take[/b].

145.text: An injured bird perches on the stone, and a splash of energy envelops its body. It flies away in perfect health. Gain ability 1483[/b], 2 boost, and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

146.text: The runes behind the sentient pulse with an energy similar to that of the sentient. There is both a sadness and a joy to the energy, and you can see that the sentient is carrying a cylindrical parchment. Gain 1 morale, and gain either 1 engage[/b] or 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

147.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

148.text: The landscape is peaceful and quiet with not much of note other than the ship wreckage to the south. In the serenity of the moment, you almost miss a bird flying too close to the surface of the sea and getting swallowed whole by an underwater leviathan. Gain 2 boost and continue.

149.action: INSPECT[/b] the ethereal area at the base of the hill
149.text: As you stand within the green light, you feel a growing sense of connection with and control over the varied forms of life that surround you. Gain lesson 1419[/b].

150.text: Despite its fiery disposition, the animal actually just seems to want to help. As you watch, it darts behind you and blocks a volcanic fireball from striking this tiny island, saving you from a nasty burn. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

151.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

152.text: The odor has a hint of sea salt and sword blades. Gain 1 boost and continue.

153.text: You perceptively notice that the six large birds nearby are all poised to strike anyone who steps foot onto the island. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

154.text: The Traveler looks stoically to the north. “Beware of the fire elemental—they will try to trick you into releasing them. It’s a more powerful gesture to lay down your weapons to the east of it.” Gain 2 boost and continue.

155.text: “East of here you’ll find a true rarity in this world, a portal that sends you to a faraway location. Please be cautious about entering such portals, as it’s a one-way trip.” Gain ability 1498[/b] and 1 boost.

156.action: LISTEN[/b] to the Traveler as they communicate with the large insect
156.text: The Traveler gently coaxes the fiery insect, which perches on a nearby rock. As scary as it looks, it seems like it’s looking for a way to help. Gain ability 1500[/b] and 1 boost.

157.text: You toss a pebble through the arch, and it doesn’t splash into the water on the other side. Gain 1 boost and continue.

1577.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1577.text: You’ve always had a flair for the dramatic, perhaps even a touch of a savior complex. Even though no one has asked for your help, this world is new to you, so it must be your job to save it, right? Elementals are massive beasts, often seen from a distance. Slaying an elemental isn’t easy, so be prepared when you take on this challenge. Gain the Map of Elementals (1262[/b]).

1578.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1578.text: You’ve formed a common bond with your crewmates over the question, “Why are we here?” There are a few different places with visual clues for the origins; if you see something historical, talk to the people there to learn more. To help find locations where you can answer this question, gain the Map of Interiors (1256[/b]).

1579.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1579.text: As a fledgling member of the Academy, you need a combination of experience and knowledge to pass your survival training test and reach your full potential. Choose a player to gain the results of their character’s look-MASTER[/b][/b] action.

158.text: The sentient is distractedly drawing diagrams of a vehicle in the sand. As you watch them, you find yourself fixating on the rune on the rock. Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

1580.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1580.text: You’re collecting flowers for the royal greenhouse on your world. A variety of flora are scattered across the world, ready to be plucked! To help find locations where you can find flora, gain the Map of Flora (1263[/b]).

1581.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1581.text: The blight has ravaged your world, destroying millions of lives. You have hope for an antidote in this new world. Gain the apothecary (1268[/b]).

1582.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1582.text: First contact is an important moment for any world, and you have the opportunity to share the stars with these cultures. Each sentient has unique preferences for convincing them to join you (and keeping them with you), and you can draw them to you by activating runecasters. Gain the Book of Sentients (1044[/b]).

1583.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1583.text: You fancy yourselves enterprising adventurers, traveling the galaxy to find the rarest of treasures, animals, and vehicles. Gain the Map of Treasure (1260[/b]).

1584.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1584.text: On behalf of an interplanetary conservation fund, you’re here to collect and protect a variety of animal species. Most wild animals can be convinced to join you, especially if you treat them well. Training can take a little time. Gain the Book of Animals (1043[/b]).

1585.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1585.text: As members of the Galactic Cartographers Guild, your primary goal is to chart as much of the planet as possible, viewing the world from new perspectives. Look for towers to scale so you can see the surrounding area from above. Gain the Map of Towers (1259[/b]).

1586.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1586.text: As part of a year-long sabbatical from your job, you’re here to enhance the lives of complete strangers. Many sentients will share ways you can help if you offer your assistance to them, and some sentients post “help wanted” ads on the exterior of wayfinder orbs. Gain the Map of Orbs (1258[/b]).

1587.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1587.text: Born and raised in poverty, you’ve managed to scrape together the funds to strike it rich on an alien planet. Many of the things you accumulate (items, flora, animals, etc) have a monetary value; you can sell them at markets around the world. You could also pickpocket or dig your way into a pretty penny. Gain the Map of Cities (1251[/b]).

1588.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1588.text: After struggling through dead-end jobs and relationships, you signed up for a week-long self-care retreat. Find inspiration— and your first objective—in your character’s personal item. Gain that item (or gain any 2 skills if you already have your personal item):Captain[/b]: Gain item 1299[/b].Navigator[/b]: Gain item 1300[/b].Scholar[/b]: Gain item 1301[/b].Medic[/b]: Gain item 1302[/b].Engineer[/b]: Gain item 1303[/b].Marine[/b]: Gain item 1304[/b].

1589.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1589.text: After securing the kraken on a different planet, you were transporting it back home to collect a massive bounty. Now it’s wreaking havoc on this world. Seek it wherever there is water and use fishing equipment to capture or kill it. Gain item 913[/b].

159.text: The scalding lava would instantly wound you, but these creatures seem to be bathing in it. There is something ritualistic about their movements, as if they are simultaneously relaxing in and guiding the lava. One of the sentients sports an elaborate array of tattoos. Gain 2 boost and continue.

1590.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1590.text: After some ill-advised choices in the undercity on your home planet, you’re on the run. This uncharted planet can provide refuge, but only if you find the source of the signal that helped you find this world in the first place. Based on the decryption, it seems to come from a ship not entirely unlike your own, perhaps related to the mysterious Traveler. The closest your incoming ship was able to pinpoint the signal was somewhere in the middle of the southeastern region of the world (view page 5 of the Book of Vantages).

1591.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1591.text: Your planet is no longer able to sustain life, and you’re tasked with building a new colony from the ground up with permission from the sentients who were here first. You lucked into finding a planet that’s already well populated, so you could earn money to buy an existing home. Alternatively, you could find the right place to build a home of your own. Gain the Map of Interiors (1256[/b]).

1592.action: RESEARCH[/b] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1592.text: As elite members of the armed forces, you’re here to shoot first and ask questions later.
