393.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the help-RELEASE[/b][/b] action or the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

394.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

395.text: Aside from the magnetic objects, there are some flowers to the west that are twice as tall as you. You are perhaps the most excited to see part of your crashed spaceship to the south. Gain 2 boost and continue.

396.text: Sentients occasionally come and go, but overall there really isn’t much activity at the building. You could probably scale the tower or even just access the building through the front door. Gain 2 boost and any 1 skill; you may continue.

397.text: The smell of rotten eggs is even more powerful when you position your nose directly above the lotus. Despite the odor, there’s something about the scent that clears your mind. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. You may continue.

398.action: OBSERVE[/b] your surroundings at this confluence
398.text: The sounds of conflict drift from the west, while a cool breeze from the east makes you shiver. A flock of birds seems to delight some sentients far down the path to the north. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost; you may continue.

399.text: Two details catch your eye. Firstly, something green glimmers from behind the frozen waterfall to the east. Secondly, the only way to get to that waterfall is to slide across the thin ice. Gain 2 boost and continue.

040.text: There are several ways you could approach the artifact, each as difficult as the next. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

400.text: The cliff runs right against the tower, so you’re able to get quite close. It’s teeming with information—with enough effort, you could probably hack it or even just tear off a piece of it and use it as you wish. Gain 1 boost and any 1 skill; you may continue.

401.text: Each tower is around twice your height, tall enough that they can probably send or receive signals to a hub. Most peculiar are the outlets at the base—they seem designed for something or someone to plug into. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

402.text: The wall ends not far south of here, but if you want to cross over east to 621[/b] now, you may do so if you pay 1 engage[/b] to convince a gatekeeper to let you in. Otherwise gain 1 boost and continue.

403.action: TRACK[/b] the footprints in the snow to their source
403.text: The footprints lead you to a hidden side entrance. If you choose to enter, go to interior 581[/b]. Otherwise gain 1 boost and refresh 1 challenge die from your grid; you may continue.

404.action: SCAN[/b] the ruins from a distance for anything useful
404.text: You identify a grappling hook among the rubble. Gain 1 boost and 1 look[/b]; go to interior 545[/b].

405.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

406.text: The scared creature is stuck on the island, and you suspect it won’t last long once the birds notice it. Gain 1 boost and either 1 engage[/b] or 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

407.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. As you study it, one of the lights on the tower changes to a pink hue, and a head begins to emerge from it. Gain 1 boost and any 1 skill. Continue.

408.text: You spy on the area, identifying a pair of binoculars inside the building and a lotus on the edge of the cliff. Gain 1 boost, then choose one:

choices.outcome: You prepare to descend into the building. You may continue.
Pluck the lotus to gain flora 1159. You may continue.

409.action: LISTEN[/b] to the Traveler talk about your mission
409.text: “If you’re trying to incite a coup on your homeworld, the far-reaching circuit sentients who built these spires could be perfect allies.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

041.action: NAVIGATE[/b] the dark, labyrinthine alleys and arches until you reach a mysterious business
041.text: You feel a wave of nausea as you enter a den of dark magic, despite how eager the sentients inside are to share their knowledge with you. Choose one:

choices.option: Learn the building blocks for controlling memory
choices.outcome: Gain lesson 1430[/b].

choices.option: Learn the foundational elements for transfiguring items
choices.outcome: Gain lesson 1432[/b].

410.action: SPY[/b] on the house through a window
410.text: You’re excited to see some climbing equipment inside; gain 1 boost. Unless you’ve already determined whether the house is occupied, roll a challenge die. If the result is blank, no one is home. If the result is not blank, someone is home. You may continue.

411.text: Sentients—mostly by themselves, but occasionally in pairs—make their way along the path to the base of the runestone, where they kneel and touch their forehead to the great rock. They all seem to glow with joy when they walk away. Gain 2 boost and continue.

412.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

413.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

414.text: Amidst the rubble you find a harpoon bow. Gain item 960[/b] and continue with any action other than take-LOOT[/b][/b].

415.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

416.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weather-worn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

417.text: The sentient is carrying several small items up the staircase. Gain 2 boost and continue.

418.text: It looks like the beast died in a volcanic eruption. There is a stillness to the air around the skeleton, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

419.action: STUDY[/b] the tower or the lorestone

choices.outcome: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. As you study it, one of the lights on the tower changes to a pink hue, and a head begins to emerge from it. Gain 1 boost and any 1 skill. Continue.

You feel a surge of strength as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the past—hulking animals wandered these lands, migrating to warmer or colder climates based on the season. Gain 2 boost.

042.text: After comparing each of the images—which appear to be live footage from hidden cameras—you notice that each of the interiors contains a ring with a different gem. One camera appears to be offline. Gain ability 1492[/b] and 5 boost; exit to city 041[/b].

420.text: The furry critter is probably a juvenile, and they must have fallen behind the herd you can see to the northwest. Gain 1 boost and either 1 move[/b] or 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

421.text: One is badly injured, and the other bleats helplessly, unable to steer their companion away from the edge. You find the sounds easy to mimic. Gain 1 boost and 1 engage[/b]; you may continue.

422.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

423.text: You’re at the confluence of east and west, warm and cold. This is no man’s land, yet you see potential for this to be a place for sentients to gather—it makes sense why someone would start to build a structure here. You could attempt to finish their work or simply scavenge the remains. Gain 2 boost and continue.

424.text: The design and the cords make you think the devices might be range extenders. One of the cords is disconnected, as if it were abruptly cut. Gain 2 boost and continue.

425.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

426.text: The hungry beast seems equally at home above and below the water, like a river dragon of ancient legends from your world. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

427.text: The sentient alternates between scanning the horizon with a pair of large binoculars and practicing a series of close-combat maneuvers. Gain 1 boost and either 1 take[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

428.text: As you smell the salty flower, a brief vision of the future flashes before your eyes. Roll two separate sets of 2 challenge dice; choose 1 set to use as part of your next action this turn (they count toward the challenge dice to roll for that action). Continue.

429.text: The sentient lurking to the west is making you nervous, and you’re excited to notice a blunt object at your feet under the water. Gain item 906[/b] and continue.

043.action: OBSERVE[/b] the nest from a safe distance
043.text: The squishy sound of dozens of baby centipedes roiling in the nest makes your skin crawl. You distract yourself by scanning other parts of the cave, and it’s then that you notice a small hole on the right. Gain 1 boost; you may go deeper into the planet to cave 040[/b].

430.text: The roiling funnels turn this way and that, but you recognize a pattern and slip through at the right moment. Go north to 431[/b].

431.action: PREPARE[/b] to interact with the elemental
431.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the help-RELEASE[/b][/b] action or the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

432.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

433.text: The owner of the boat isn’t far from here, so you could either catch their attention or try to slip away in the boat before they notice. Gain 1 boost, and gain 1 move[/b], 1 engage[/b], or 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

434.text: You shield your eyes from a nearly blinding light to the east; the wishing well to the west looks more welcoming. Your ears are tickled by the sound of an animal near the shore. Gain 1 boost and either 1 move[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

435.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

436.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

437.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

438.text: You may either give the sailor a recommendation for a destination in the area in exchange for a snack (gain 1 health) or join them to navigate while they row (gain vehicle 1014[/b]).

439.text: Find card 802[/b] (it’s a large card) and place it on the table. Roll and place 2 skill dice on each of the circles. Also gain 6 cubes (time tokens). To escape from the time loop, you must manipulate the mancala so that all dice of each type are in their own circle—before it’s too late.Lose a time token to pick up all dice from a single circle and then—clockwise— place 1 of those dice onto each successive circle. You may skip any circle that contains 1 or more dice of a given color and no other dice. Repeat this until you either run out of time tokens or all dice of each type are in their own circle (e.g., all orange dice are in the same circle, all green dice are in the same circle, and so on). When you run out of time tokens or succeed, read entry 439[/b] in the Book of Secrets.

044.text: The creature places its entire mouth over you and then inhales sharply—it’s smelling you. While you’re inside the jaws of the centipede, you notice a flash of blue on one of its teeth. The beast withdraws, slithering slowly past you. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost; you may continue.

440.text: As you watch, the animals swarm above one of the devices, which rises from the lava and blinks to life. The forging process is complete. Roll a skill die and gain the resulting item: move[/b] (item 1028[/b]), look[/b] (item 1030[/b]), engage[/b] (item 1026[/b]), help[/b] (item 1029[/b]), take[/b] (item 1031[/b]), or overpower[/b] (item 1027[/b]). You may continue.

441.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

442.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. As you study it, one of the lights on the tower changes to a pink hue, and a head begins to emerge from it. Gain 1 boost and any 1 skill. Continue.

443.text: The beast slows their approach then sees that you mean no harm. In the best way they can, they communicate that their child is lost in this area. Gain animal 817[/b].

444.text: You’re not familiar with its anatomy, but the creature is clearly injured. It seems possible to heal the animal, but it might be just as relieved if you humanely take away its pain. Gain 1 boost and either 1 help[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

445.text: The Traveler speaks in a contemplative tone. “As serene as this setting is, I think you’ll find true serenity at the horned rocks to the northwest of here.” Gain quest 1676[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

446.action: PREPARE[/b] to interact with the elemental
446.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the help-RELEASE[/b][/b] action or the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

447.text: From your elevated perch, you can see for miles around. To the north there’s a large globe floating in the water; to the east, several boats float on and hover above the water. Gain 2 boost and continue.

448.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Your sensitive nose also catches a whiff of the lotus on the shoreline, which smells like the lotion you used at the beach as a child. Gain 1 health and 1 boost; you may also lose 1 curse. You may continue.

449.text: Their eyes never leaving the water, the sentient explains that they are a lookout tasked with alerting those in the forest if the water sentients invade. They were selected because of their excellent vision, even among wood sentients. After giving you some tips about how to look out for danger, they send you on your way. Gain ability 1477[/b] and 1 boost.

045.text: The sentient is in full control of the monstrosity, and they seem to be enjoying the ride. Within a few seconds they disappear down the tunnel to the right. It’s then that you notice another tunnel in front of you with a much smaller opening. Gain 1 boost; you may go deeper into the planet to cave 040[/b].

450.text: As you observe your surroundings, you notice some large pods on the shore and a monster lurking underwater near the shoreline to the north. You may gain 1 boost or 1 skill of your choice; you may continue.

451.text: Inside the protective bubbles, the sentients are heavily armored. They’re here for an attack. They might be open to you joining them, or you can defend your fellow landwalkers against them by striking now. Gain 2 boost and continue.

452.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

453.text: Sparks fly as sentients pound metal around a fire. Their craftsmanship is on full display, including an impressively designed scythe. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain ability 1462[/b].

choices.option: Enter the building when the sentients aren’t looking
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; go to interior 574[/b].

454.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

455.text: A gatekeeper is lounging near a turnstile and collecting fees from entrants. Gain 1 boost and choose one:

choices.outcome: Go northeast to 762[/b] and gain 1 random skill.

choices.option: Inspect the treasure chest along the shore
choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice; you may add 1 extra die for each engage[/b], take[/b], or overpower[/b] you pay. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 893[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1160[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

456.text: Several sentients—pirates, by the look of them—are removing their armor to take a break. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; go to interior 576[/b].

457.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

458.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. Gain 1 boost and either 1 move[/b] or 1 engage[/b]. You may continue.

459.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

046.text: From the north you can hear the sounds of sentients shouting and struggling. As you touch the walls of the tunnel, you feel the vibrations of something massive moving to the south. Gain 2 boost and continue.

460.text: The shipwrights are busy enough with the main vessel that you could probably take off in one of the smaller boats tied to the dock. The workers seem like good company, though. Gain 1 boost and continue.

461.text: A tear in the wing of the large pink moth-like creature leaves it struggling to fly. You could attempt to bind the wing or relieve the animal of its suffering. Gain 1 boost and either 1 help[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

462.text: The sentient is preparing for a fight. The more you watch them, the more you’re convinced they’re going to attack the massive elemental to the north. Gain 1 boost and continue.

463.action: PREPARE[/b] to interact with the elemental
463.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the help-RELEASE[/b][/b] action or the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

464.text: Several sentients are discussing maps near the front entrance. Gain 1 boost and continue.

465.action: EXAMINE[/b] the green glow in the grass
465.text: You notice an insect hop into the grass, then back out of it. A touch of the green goopy substance is stuck to its legs. Within seconds the insect collapses in the mud. Gain 1 boost and continue.

466.action: SEARCH[/b] for any sign of a trap
466.text: From a perch at the top of the nearby boulder, you see two bandits lying in wait on either side of the gap. You may pay 1 overpower[/b] or 2 boost to catch the bandits off guard; if you do, gain item 1209[/b] and go north to 467[/b]. Otherwise, gain 2 boost and continue.

467.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. It’s also clearly armed and dangerous. Gain 2 boost and continue.

468.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the distant past. There was a time when the crack in the ground—which grows into a wider gap and eventually a canyon to the west—wasn’t here at all, connecting the empires of gold and sand. As tectonic plates shifted, so did the union between those cultures. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill.

469.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

047.action: LEARN[/b] from the hunters from a safe distance
047.text: In an incredibly entertaining battle of wills, the sinew sentients eventually drag the beast to the ground. Gain ability 1473[/b].

470.text: The beasts have long, powerful front legs that could deal real damage in a fight. A gentler approach may be more mutually beneficial. Gain 1 boost and either 1 engage[/b] or 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

471.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

472.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

473.text: You find a narrow path through the jungle that leads into a city built into a series of trees. You’re standing closest to an art gallery; if you choose to enter, gain 1 take[/b], go to city 526[/b], and continue with the take-ACCESS[/b][/b] action there. Otherwise, go to city 526[/b].

474.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

475.text: The small animal doesn’t present a threat, but its significantly larger caretaker in the background would pose an immediate problem if you did anything to its child. The hesitant approach seems to work, with the parent eventually nudging the child toward you before disappearing into the bushes. Gain animal 831[/b].

476.text: Through a side window you see a forlorn sentient staring at the elemental to the west. As you walk past the palm trees, you notice the roots move—there could be danger afoot. Gain 2 boost and 1 move[/b]; you may continue.

477.text: The Traveler speaks in riddles. “There was a time when I would have given anything to visit a place like this, but what was once freedom has become my eternal prison. I’m glad you answered my call, but I fear I’ve trapped you here as well, and that cannot stand. You can send a rescue signal from my crashed ship to the northwest.” Gain 2 boost and destiny 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

478.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

479.text: With your eyes barely above the surface of the water, you watch the sentient scan the surrounding area. They focus mostly on the area to the north and northwest where a large creature and a bright light can be seen from a distance. Gain 2 boost and continue.

048.action: OBSERVE[/b] the beast as it exits the cavern
048.text: As the tip of the creature’s tail disappears down the tunnel, it flicks to the left, poking a hole through the sediment. A beam of light erupts through the tiny gap. Gain 1 boost; you may go deeper into the planet to cave 040[/b].

480.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

481.text: To the east and the west you can see similar devices suspended in midair; the west is quiet, and there is a crowd of sentients perched on a rock to the east. Gain 1 boost and continue.

482.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

483.text: The beast appears to be deathly afraid of water. Gain 1 boost and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

484.text: The structure seems to be a central hub for all towers, connecting them with a combination of ancient and modern technology. As you study it, one of the lights on the tower changes to a pink hue, and a head begins to emerge from it. Gain 2 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

485.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 1 boost and continue.

486.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

487.text: Your keen eyes notice that the ropes are sturdy enough to hold your weight if you balance very carefully. You could instead take the time to install a permanent bridge here: Gain 2 boost and continue.

488.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little sandy), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

489.text: The creatures are feeding on the smallest of scraps in the sand, yet they’re incredibly precise, even from a distance—their eyesight must be incredible. Sharing some special treats might net you a new companion. Gain 1 boost and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

049.text: As you look around, you’re convinced that you’re inside a giant animal, not a cave. It must be asleep, though, as it’s not moving. Wedged onto a nearby spike is a beautiful ring covered in saliva, its blue gem glinting in the light of the cavern behind you. Gain item 991[/b] and 1 move[/b].

490.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

491.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

492.text: Your keen eyes notice that a series of hovels are encased in snow. As you peer into one of them, your feet slipping in the melting snow, the occupant pops out and offers you safe passage down the hill for a mere $2. If you pay, go north to 351[/b] and gain 1 morale for the sheer thrill of the ride. If you don’t pay, gain 1 boost and continue.

493.text: As the animal approaches, you feel a great burden lifted from your shoulders. Lose 1 curse or gain 1 morale; you may continue.

494.text: The chest is sturdy (but covered in ice), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

495.text: It’s really more of a rope than a bridge. Your keen eyes notice that the rope might be more effectively cut and used to lower yourself into the northern valley. Alternatively, you could spend some time repairing the bridge, which the sentients in the area might appreciate. Gain 2 boost and continue.

496.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

497.text: Aside from several unattended boats and remarkably pristine fishing waters, there’s an abundance of barrels just laying around the warehouse. Gain 2 boost and 1 engage[/b]; you may continue.

498.action: PREPARE[/b] to interact with the elemental
498.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the help-RELEASE[/b][/b] action or the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

499.action: SPY[/b] on the house through a window
499.text: You’re excited to see a fancy ring inside; gain 1 boost. Unless you’ve already determined whether the house is occupied, roll a challenge die. If the result is blank, no one is home. If the result is not blank, someone is home. You may continue.

050.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to leap, and you calculate the perfect angle for an attempt. Gain 1 move[/b] and continue.

500.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. You’re worried about the heat of the lava field, though. Gain 1 boost and either 1 move[/b] or 1 engage[/b]. You may continue.

501.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

502.text: The chest is sturdy (but warped from the heat), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

503.text: The orb is made of a shimmering, glass-like substance, and there are markings on the outside with which you might be able to interact. You don’t see how to access the interior, but there must be a way inside. Gain 1 boost and either 1 engage[/b] or 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

504.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

505.text: Clearly in a great mood, the sentient speaks freely of this area, most notably the trial to the south and the legendary island to the north. Gain quest 1686[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

506.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. Gain 1 boost and either 1 move[/b] or 1 engage[/b]. You may continue.

507.text: “Sometimes a magical island appears in the middle of this ocean. I don’t know why or when, but if you can find it, you will reach a new echelon of respect.” Gain 1 boost and quest 1686[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

508.text: The poachers appear to be wealthy tourists having fun at the great expense of the local fauna. They probably won’t stand up to minimal resistance. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

509.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

510.action: SEARCH[/b] as far into the interior as you dare venture
510.text: You’re able to reach a bird-like creature without the sentient noticing your presence (gain animal 816[/b]). Calmly exit to 476[/b].

511.action: SOLVE[/b] the mystery of the grove
511.text: Surveying the area, you can tell that several pieces of the mysterious cloak have torn off in the grove. You must identify at least 5 pieces—subtle differences between location 104[/b] (which you cannot look at) and card 511[/b]—before opening the trap door. Read entry 511[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

512.action: PREPARE[/b] to move onto the island
512.text: You can feel a powerful force or presence on the island, and you resolve to face it. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

513.text: What looked at first like chains are actually electrical wires, with power surging from the sentient into them. The sentient isn’t straining against the bonds—rather, they’re leaning into them, charging the runes and the surrounding area. Gain 2 boost and 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

514.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the distant past—this island was created as a pinnacle of hope and aspiration for sentients around the world. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

515.text: The sky on the other side of the arch is a stark contrast to the sun-drenched horizon in this time. A scan reveals a significant time anomaly—you are now 100 years in the future compared to the other side of the gateway. Gain 1 boost and continue.

516.text: Just as the shipwright said, the tree is a prime candidate for crafting an ocean vessel. You just need to find the right approach to chop it down and bring it back to the past. Gain 1 overpower[/b] and continue.

517.action: NAVIGATE[/b] the ship back toward the time rift
517.text: The smelter shares that they have visited the past on a regular basis thanks to the nearby time rift, but they’re eager to go back to their own time after overseeing this century-long project. They lead you to the bridge and say their goodbyes. Your augsuit connects wirelessly to the ship’s AI, uploading a large amount of data into the ship’s navigational system. Gain vehicle 1033[/b].

518.text: A sentient dances in the square, whipping up a frenzy of dust and sparks. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain ability 1469[/b].

choices.option: Garner interest in turning the solo dance into a street festival
choices.outcome: Gain quest 1646[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

519.action: NAVIGATE[/b] through the busy city toward a fishing supply store
519.text: Holding their nose to avoid the smell of old fish, an old sentient claims to have the finest fishing gear in all the land. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay $2 for a fancy fishing lure
choices.outcome: Gain item 913[/b].

choices.option: Improve the smell by scraping layers of fish off the rental equipment
choices.outcome: The store owner is grateful for your attention to detail. Gain $5.

520.action: NAVIGATE[/b] through the busy city toward a bookstore
520.text: A bookstore is packed with reading material. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Look at page 30 in the Book of Vantages and gain 1 boost.
Gain either a book about the sentients of the world (1044[/b]) or a book of spells (1214[/b]).

choices.option: Translate a few pages of a book
choices.outcome: Learn about an uncharted island in the middle of the ocean to the northwest. Gain 1 boost, 1 move[/b], and quest 1686[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

521.action: NAVIGATE[/b] through the busy city toward a hackerspace
521.text: The hackerspace reminds you of a place you used to frequent back home—the creative energy is palpable. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain ability 1472[/b].
Gain sentient 1312[/b].

522.action: NAVIGATE[/b] through the busy city toward a museum
522.text: A towering museum boasts one of the most impressive collections in the world. Inside you find a vast variety. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Metal sentients view themselves as the protectors of all tangible things, and they believe that the only way to uphold that responsibility is to steal and house those things in museums: Gain 2 boost.

choices.option: Study a collection of arcane tapestries
choices.outcome: Gain lesson 1431[/b].

choices.option: Observe a rare animal that decides to accompany you
choices.outcome: Gain animal 854[/b].

523.action: NAVIGATE[/b] through the busy city toward a tavern
523.text: Sentients in the rowdy tavern are boasting of their recent exploits. Choose one:

choices.option: Listen to an extended story told by a young cave explorer
choices.outcome: Gain sentient 1346[/b].

choices.option: Accept a dare to climb an infamous stone spire
choices.outcome: Gain 1 move[/b] and quest 1677[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

524.action: NAVIGATE[/b] through the busy city toward a casino
524.text: Enter a bustling casino filled with dice games. Choose one:

choices.option: Learn the rules to a dice game
choices.outcome: Gain ability 1499[/b].

choices.option: Play a betting game called “Punch” with the sentients (minimum $1 required to play)
choices.outcome: Bet up to $3 on any skill type(s). Then roll 2 skill dice. For each die matching a skill on which you bet, gain double the amount you bet, then lose all coins you bet. You may play this game up to 3 times. Gain sentient 1332[/b].

525.action: NAVIGATE[/b] through the busy city toward a blacksmith
525.text: A portly blacksmith waves you over to their kiln and offers to teach you a quick lesson. Choose one:

choices.option: Learn how to wield the magic of repairs and fixes
choices.outcome: Gain spell 1367[/b].

choices.option: Learn how to control fire with your mind
choices.outcome: Gain spell 1383[/b].

526.action: NAVIGATE[/b] through the busy city toward a flower arrangement class
526.text: The teacher leading the flower arrangement class invites you to join the session. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain ability 1465[/b].
Gain lesson 1421[/b].

527.action: NAVIGATE[/b] through the busy village toward a tour guide
527.text: You find a tour guide poring over a map. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item 1262[/b]; the tour guide highlights your current location (view page 19 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region L).
View page 19 in the Book of Vantages.
With a wink, they speak of a mysterious, magical island to the south. Gain 1 boost, 1 move[/b], and quest 1686[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

528.action: NAVIGATE[/b] through the busy city toward a school
528.text: The teacher at the school invites you to join the class for a few minutes. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain ability 1460[/b].
Gain 2 morale.

529.action: NAVIGATE[/b] through the busy city toward the pyramid
529.text: In the grand pyramid, you witness an ancient gold sentient offer their husk to a youngling. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The husk is too big for the youngling, but a nearby sentient assures you that they’ll grow into it. Gain 2 morale and 1 boost.

choices.option: Interrupt the ceremony to ask questions
choices.outcome: Some of the sentients resent the interruption, but others appreciate your curiosity about their culture. Gain 2 boost.

530.action: NAVIGATE[/b] through the busy city toward a tavern
530.text: The tavern is full of patrons either washing away their sorrows or celebrating their good luck. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient bemoans their adult offspring, who is deeply in debt. Gain quest 1682[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

choices.option: Celebrate the wedding of a wealthy sentient
choices.outcome: Gain 2 morale and $3.

531.action: NAVIGATE[/b] through the busy city toward an eyeglass shop
531.text: The owner of the eyeglass shop blinks at you behind a thick pair of goggles. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Pay $5 for a pair of night-vision goggles
choices.outcome: Gain item 945[/b].

choices.option: Pay $7 for a pair of mystery goggles
choices.outcome: Gain item 986[/b].

541.action: SEARCH[/b] the ruins for a useful item
541.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a bedroll. Gain item 971[/b].

542.action: SEARCH[/b] the ruins for a useful item
542.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a snare. Gain item 947[/b].

543.action: SEARCH[/b] the ruins for a useful item
543.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a barrel filled to the brim. Gain item 1158[/b].

544.action: SEARCH[/b] the ruins for a useful item
544.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a shovel. Gain item 894[/b].

545.action: SEARCH[/b] the ruins for a useful item
545.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a grappling claw. Gain item 903[/b].

546.action: SEARCH[/b] the ruins for a useful item
546.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a large egg on top of a column. Gain item 979[/b].

547.action: SEARCH[/b] the ruins for a useful item
547.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a trident. Gain item 1089[/b].

548.action: SEARCH[/b] the ruins for a useful item
548.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a magic wand. Gain item 981[/b].

549.action: SEARCH[/b] the tent for the most useful item
549.text: You’re delighted to find a fishing lure inside the tent. Gain item 913[/b] and exit to 103[/b] before the occupants return.

550.action: SEARCH[/b] the tent for the most useful item
550.text: A good pair of pliers in the right pair of hands offer plenty of utility. Gain item 882[/b] and exit to 131[/b] before the occupant wakes up.

551.action: SEARCH[/b] the tent for the most useful item
551.text: The well-worn hiking boots would make your journey much more comfortable. Gain item 955[/b] and exit to 225[/b] before the occupants return.

552.action: SEARCH[/b] the tent for the most useful item
552.text: The climbing gear will make your exploits much easier. Gain item 884[/b] and exit to 294[/b] before the occupants return.

553.action: SEARCH[/b] the interior for the smallest item
553.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the elixir. Gain item 864[/b] and calmly exit to 115[/b].

554.action: SEARCH[/b] the interior for the smallest item
554.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the green crystal. Gain item 1163[/b] and calmly exit to 124[/b].

555.action: SEARCH[/b] the interior for the smallest item
555.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the pliers. Gain item 881[/b] and calmly exit through the western window to 128[/b].

556.action: SEARCH[/b] the interior for the smallest item
556.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the fish trap. Gain item 912[/b] and calmly exit to 204[/b].

557.action: SEARCH[/b] the interior for the smallest item
557.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the metal key. Gain item 918[/b] and calmly exit to 215[/b].

558.action: SEARCH[/b] the interior for the smallest item
558.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the tincture. Gain item 867[/b] and calmly exit to 266[/b].

559.action: SEARCH[/b] the interior for the smallest item
559.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the water bag. Gain item 857[/b] and calmly exit to 408[/b].

560.action: SEARCH[/b] the interior for an item that will help you see in dark places
560.text: Gain item 1086[/b] and calmly exit to 673[/b].

561.action: SEARCH[/b] the interior for the smallest item
561.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the knife on the table. Gain item 1209[/b] and calmly exit to 760[/b].

562.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for the farthest item
562.text: As you advance into the room, you find a pike; gain item 1229[/b]. Calmly exit to 160[/b].

563.action: SEARCH[/b] the room for special items
563.text: As you advance into the room, you find a blue crystal; gain item 1160[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a ninja outfit (gain item 942[/b]). Either way, exit to 200[/b].

564.text: The detail on the mask is incredible, and you’re compelled to put it on, but the security shield blocks you from touching it. You may pay 1 boost to disarm the shield; if you do, gain item 1002[/b]. If you don’t, gain 1 boost. Either way, exit to 216[/b].

565.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for the farthest item
565.text: As you advance into the room, you find a special key; gain item 917[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a beautiful lantern (gain item 953[/b]). Calmly exit to 239[/b].

566.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the tent for the farthest item
566.text: As you advance, you find some light armor; gain item 973[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a pike (gain item 1229[/b]). Calmly exit to 304[/b].

567.text: You sit down in the first row, quietly tucking the mask into your bag (gain item 1039[/b]) as you wait for the other students to arrive. The lesson is short but informative; gain lesson 1429[/b].

568.text: You notice that the goggles aren’t fully functional without their matching pair, which the owner admits is in the hands of a sentient heading to the western observatory. They offer full value for 1 card in your grid or reserve with a coin value (if you accept, lose the card and gain its coin value). They also try to sell you the pair of goggles; you may buy them for $3 (gain item 941[/b]). Then exit to 333[/b].

569.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the nearby crate
569.text: On top of the crate you find a pickaxe; gain item 896[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you also find a winter coat tucked away inside the crate (gain item 929[/b]). Nonchalantly exit to 335[/b].

570.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for the farthest item
570.text: As you advance into the room, you find a vase; gain item 863[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach an elegant robe (gain item 966[/b]). Calmly exit to 338[/b].

571.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for the farthest item
571.text: You’re able to reach a large egg (gain item 978[/b]). Calmly exit to 376[/b].

572.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for the farthest item
572.text: As you advance into the room, you find some blueprints; gain item 1297[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a bypass code (gain item 1178[/b]). Calmly exit to 396[/b].

573.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the house for the farthest item
573.text: As you advance into the room, you find a screwdriver; gain item 876[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a huge hammer (gain item 950[/b]). Calmly exit to 410[/b].

574.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for the farthest item
574.text: As you advance into the room, you find a battery pack; gain item 874[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a scythe (gain item 938[/b]). Calmly exit to 453[/b].

575.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for the farthest item
575.text: As you advance into the room, you find a pair of manacles; gain item 944[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a set of pikes (gain item 1229[/b]). Calmly exit either back outside (455[/b]) or into the city (762[/b]).

576.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for the farthest item
576.text: As you advance into the room, you find a grappling hook; gain item 905[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach some light armor (gain item 974[/b]). Calmly exit to 456[/b].

577.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for the farthest item
577.text: As you advance into the room, you find a pair of night-vision goggles; gain item 945[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, also tuck a map into your back pocket (gain item 1262[/b]). Calmly exit to 464[/b].

578.text: As you advance into the warehouse, you find a rope; gain item 901[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to sneak a barrel from the cargo bay (gain item 1158[/b]). Calmly exit to 497[/b].

579.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the house for the farthest item
579.text: As you advance into the room, you find a forcefield generator; gain item 982[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a magma shovel (gain item 900[/b]). Calmly exit to 499[/b].

580.action: SEARCH[/b] for an item of your choice
580.text: Gain your choice of either the purple crystal (1161[/b]), the ice skates (951[/b]), the time bomb (871[/b]), or the screwdriver (875[/b]). Then exit to 613[/b].

581.action: SEARCH[/b] through the interior for the rarest item
581.text: As you advance into the room, you find a seed; gain item 1019[/b]. If you pay 1 boost, you’re also able to take some discarded credits (gain $8). Calmly exit to 492[/b].

582.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for the farthest item
582.text: As you advance into the room, you find a trident; gain item 1090[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a fish trap (gain item 932[/b]). Calmly exit north to 641[/b].

583.action: LISTEN[/b] to the proceedings using the universal translation device
583.text: You were hoping for an amazing discussion about this planet, but today’s session is just a discussion about budgets. Your father would have enjoyed it, but you duck out after a few minutes. Gain item 891[/b] and exit to 777[/b].

584.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for the farthest item
584.text: As you advance into the room, you find a bow and arrow set; gain item 956[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re able to reach a spring trap (gain item 926[/b]). Calmly exit to 662[/b].

585.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for the farthest item
585.text: As you advance into the room, you find a book; gain item 1044[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a winter coat (gain item 929[/b]). Calmly exit to 676[/b].

586.text: Find card 535[/b] (it’s a large card) and place it on the table. According to the fine script etched into the leather, you can unlock the item’s magic if you use the tools in the correct order. The goal is to select the tool to use fourth overall. See entry 586[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

587.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for the farthest item
587.text: As you advance into the hut, you find a totem; gain item 899[/b]. If you pay 1 boost, you also pocket some freshly caught fish (item 1226[/b]) or fruit (item 1224[/b]). Calmly exit to 744[/b].

588.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the house for the farthest item
588.text: As you advance into the room, you find a totem; gain item 898[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a sword (gain item 888[/b]). Calmly exit to 737[/b].

589.action: SEARCH[/b] the flowers at the foot of the statue
589.text: At the foot of the towering, humanoid statue, you find a large egg. Gain item 977[/b] and exit to 763[/b].

059.text: There is no tide and no wind, and it requires careful navigation to escape the doldrums. Gain ability 1464[/b] and 1 morale, then roll a skill die and go to where the tides take you: move[/b] (062[/b]); look[/b] (053[/b]); engage[/b] (431[/b]); help[/b] (453[/b]); take[/b] (367[/b]); overpower[/b] (426[/b]).

590.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for a precious item
590.text: As you advance into the room, you find a saddle; gain item 958[/b]. If you pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a machete (gain item 920[/b]). Calmly exit to 769[/b].

591.action: INSPECT[/b] the device floating outside the window
591.text: You realize that the device is actually a vehicle—some sort of flying carpet. You step onto it, and it gently lowers you to the ground. Gain vehicle 985[/b] and exit to 787[/b].

592.action: TRANSLATE[/b] the labels on some of the nearby vials
592.text: As the sentient fills a vial with a sand-like substance, you find the shelves filled with similar bottles labeled things like, “First trip to the capital city,” “Scary incident while home alone—false alarm,” and “Architecture class final exam.” You shake a few flakes from the final vial onto your tongue, and they melt like grains of salt. Your mind is filled with blueprints. Gain item 1295[/b].

593.text: You move deeper into the dungeon. Gain a random skill and move to the dungeon location matching that skill: move[/b] (596[/b]); look[/b] (019[/b]); help[/b] (599[/b]); engage[/b]/take[/b]/overpower[/b] (594[/b]).

595.text: The book contains descriptions of spells and sorcery that you can barely comprehend. Gain item 1215[/b].

597.action: SEARCH[/b] deep into the interior for the farthest item
597.text: As you advance into the room, you find a pair of binoculars; gain item 972[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a map (gain item 1251[/b]). Calmly exit to 305[/b].

600.text: The three professors in the Universal Academy greet you and invite you to choose your field of arcane study. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The leaf sentient welcomes you with open arms. Gain lesson 1419[/b] and 1 health.
The energy sentient welcomes you with a joke. Gain lesson 1424[/b] and 1 morale.
The sand sentient welcomes you with a word of advice. Gain lesson 1429[/b] and 1 boost.

601.text: The odor is that of an icicle, somehow wet and frozen at the same time. You smile as holiday memories come to mind; you wish there were someone else nearby with whom you could share those stories. Gain 1 boost and continue.

602.text: The chest is sturdy (but frozen), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

603.text: The bird-like creature is interested in circuitry, and you can probably use its curiosity to your advantage. You also notice tracks in the snow leading east. Gain 1 boost and either 1 engage[/b] or 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

604.text: Despite the gaping wound on their back, the sentient’s attention is entirely on the yellow crystal they’re holding. Gain 2 boost, and gain either 1 help[/b] or 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

605.text: Six sinew sentients huddle around the fire, roasting some vegetables on the open flame. They left their weapons to the side of the temporary shelter. Gain 2 boost and 1 engage[/b]; you may continue.

606.text: The sentient nods, appreciating that you know your place. They suggest that you move west out of circuit territory, but a quick visit to the famed ice obelisk to the north first is worth the time. Gain 2 boost and continue.

607.text: From the way the largest animal plows a path for the others, you suspect they are a parent. Their thick, armor-like outer shell protects them from the cold and could probably insulate you too. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

608.text: At first you think it’s a charging station, but there’s something about the ports that indicates that this is for sentients, not machines or vehicles. In fact, you think it may be compatible with your augsuit. Gain 2 boost and continue.

609.text: The chest is sturdy (but frozen shut), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

061.action: SEARCH[/b] for an entrance to the nearby island
061.text: Upon arriving at a hidden cove, you realize that it’s part of a small archipelago. Gain ability 1515[/b] and go to 512[/b].

610.text: The beast is moving slowly but steadily to the southwest. It’s built for survival against all odds, but you have a hunch that you could mimic its behavior to be perceived as a friend. Gain 1 boost and 1 engage[/b]; you may continue.

611.text: The obelisk isn’t cold to the touch, yet your sensors indicate that it is the same temperature as the ice below your feet. As you stare inside, it emits a piece of information into your brain. Gain spell 1377[/b]; you may continue.

612.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

613.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

614.action: OBSERVE[/b] your surroundings while the ancient sentient communicates
614.text: You see a sentient busy at work to the north, a purple glow to the warmer east, a frozen lake to the south, and some buried technology to the west. The sentient seems a bit annoyed that you’re not paying more attention to their stories. Gain 1 boost; you may continue.

615.text: Aside from the loose cord on the ground that clearly connects to the runecaster, you notice something moving on top of the massive mountain to the west. To the east is a dangerous-looking gateway. Gain 2 boost and continue.

616.action: PREPARE[/b] to interact with the elemental
616.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the help-RELEASE[/b][/b] action or the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

617.text: You find a way to connect your augsuit to the tall circuit board. Suddenly you’re flooded with information about cities of the world. Gain item 1193[/b].

618.text: You recognize the words as a series of vocalized 1s and 0s, which your implant converts into words. The masks are asking what you are worthy of, and they’re growing impatient for you to respond. Gain 2 engage[/b] and continue.

619.text: The sentient is a smug but detail-oriented teacher, and they even offer a tentative compliment for the basic bauble you manage to craft. Gain item 1098[/b].

620.text: Your eyes play tricks on you if you look directly at the sentient, so you focus on their surroundings instead. The box appears to be siphoning energy from the sentient and dispatching it outwards through the wires. The sentient does not seem to be a willing participant. Gain 2 boost, and gain 1 help[/b], 1 take[/b], or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

621.action: MEMORIZE[/b] the maze (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
621.text: Find card 1146[/b] and place it on the table. It shows the route through the maze, starting with a northeast path, followed by a west path. Now flip the card face down. When you’re ready, spend up to a minute memorizing the route. Then flip the maze so only the other players can see it and proceed to declare the full route using cardinal directions relative to the starting position. If you’re playing solo, write down the directions and then check your work. See entry 621[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

622.text: The sentient is eager to educate a lesser being like yourself, and they teach you the basics of mind magic. Gain lesson 1429[/b].

623.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

624.text: You carefully maneuver close to the nearest column, where you find a treasure chest directly under the lights. Roll 3 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have 3 of a kind, gain item 996[/b]. Instead, if you have a pair, gain item 1161[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

625.action: LISTEN[/b] to sentients discussing their experiences with the crystal
625.text: One of the sentients shares that they had not connected to the Lightstone in a while, and they felt like they were losing their sense of self. The other agreed, saying that the Lightstone is the difference between sentients like them and machines. They also speak of the prophecy of the Darkstone. Gain 2 boost and quest 1663[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). You may continue.

626.text: Circuit sentients enter and exit the busy building, which seems to be a factory. You won’t blend in with them, so you’ll need to find another way inside. Gain 2 boost and continue.

627.text: Choose one target to focus on:

choices.outcome: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).
Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. You may continue.
The clear liquid inside catches your eye. Gain item 862[/b].

You find a short cable leading into a shop displaying rows of crystals. If you enter, gain 1 engage[/b], go to city 521[/b], and continue with the engage-TRADE[/b][/b] action there. Otherwise, go to city 521[/b].

628.text: It isn’t difficult to see that someone was trying to repair the nearby crystal and its contraption. It’s one of many in the area—this must either be a farm for growing crystals or a farm for harvesting power from crystals. Gain 1 boost and continue.

629.text: One of the magnificent creature’s tentacles is wedged tightly into a gap in the cliff. There are signs of struggle, but at this point the animal has given up. It will prove difficult to help—perhaps relieving it from its misery will be more humane? Gain 1 boost and either 1 help[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

630.text: “As long as I’ve known them, circuit sentients have been just as technologically advanced as they are afraid of physically disconnecting from their vast network. I believe this to be a good thing, as their untethered ambitions may have grave consequences for the galaxy.” Gain 2 boost and continue.

631.text: The bubbles seem to be coming from a creature much deeper in the ocean to the north. To reach it, you will need to navigate an underwater forest of increasingly large vegetation. Gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b]; you may continue.

632.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

633.text: Unlike most fish, this animal breathes air. It even uses its oxygen reserve to propel itself into the safety of the surrounding vegetation whenever a potential predator approaches. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

634.action: SEARCH[/b] the upper shelves for detritus
634.text: You find a functional pair of flippers still attached to a skeleton. Gain item 927[/b] and continue.

635.text: “If you uproot a portion of this flora, you can brew it into a salve that will add some spring to your step.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

636.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

637.text: “There is something so calm about exploring this underwater world, though I say that as someone who doesn’t require oxygen. Please be prepared for the vastness of the ocean.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

638.text: You can’t see much other than the lotus in front of you and some remnants of a spaceship to the east. The lotus gives you a sense of peace. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. You may continue.

639.text: It looks like the beast died from multiple bite wounds. There is a stillness in the water around the skeletons, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

640.text: A pair of heavily armed sentients monitor all creatures that pass through the corridor. Gain 1 boost and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

641.action: SEARCH[/b] for a secondary entrance into the city
641.text: You swim in place above a group of small water sentients. If you follow them, gain 2 look[/b], go to city 528[/b], and continue with the look-NAVIGATE[/b][/b] action there. Otherwise, go to city 528[/b].

642.text: The great beast isn’t threatening at all; rather, it seems to be a vessel for landwalking sentients to travel underwater. Gain 1 boost and either 1 engage[/b] or 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

643.text: The underwater creatures seem to enjoy the challenge of swooping close to the waterspout and then darting away at the last minute. A few of them even cling to each other while doing so. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

644.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

645.action: YIELD[/b] to the sentient, explaining that you mean no harm
645.text: The sentient’s aggressive stance softens, and they lower their weapon-clad arm. They explain that they are the royal bodyguard for the ruler of these waters. Choose your response:

choices.outcome: The sentient nods and leads you north to 646[/b].
The sentient punches your shoulder affectionately and leads you far north to 647[/b]

646.action: YIELD[/b] to the creature, kneeling on the ocean floor
646.text: The sentient is pleased by the gesture, and they welcome you to participate in the Trial of Strength to the north. If you accept, go to 647[/b]; you may continue to perform the overpower-FIGHT[/b][/b] action there. Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

647.action: MEMORIZE[/b] a pattern in front of the judges
647.text: Your impressive feat of memory impresses the water sentients, who welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the overpower-FIGHT[/b][/b] action.

648.action: NAVIGATE[/b] north through the wildlife toward the shore
648.text: Avoiding contact with the plants, you rise above the sharks. Sensing your movement, several sharks dart after you. Roll 3 skill dice; if the results include at least 1 move[/b] or 1 overpower[/b], go north to 478[/b]. Otherwise, lose 1 health and either continue here or go to an adjacent listed location.

649.action: SEARCH[/b] for an entrance to the shipwreck
649.text: You find a large hole into what was the main cabin, and you begin to scour the wreckage for valuables. Go to interior 012[/b].

650.action: LISTEN[/b] to the sentient’s plea for aid
650.text: The water sentient explains that they are an outcast due to their disformity. While they are proud of what they’ve achieved and overcome, the gold growing on their back is making it increasingly difficult for them to complete even the easiest tasks. They beg you to journey east into the forest to find their landwalker friend who is developing a cure. Gain 1 boost, 1 look[/b], and quest 1655[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

651.text: The animal is close enough that you can count its teeth, meaning it’s either very angry or very hungry. Gain 1 boost and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

652.text: The well-armed sentients patrol around the pits. You can hear the muffled cries of someone inside the nearest pit. Based on how they wield their weapons, it may be difficult to fight these guards. Roll 4 skill dice and gain skills matching 2 of the results. Continue.

653.text: It’s sturdy but waterlogged, with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

654.action: NAVIGATE[/b] north through the anemone tendrils
654.text: Roll 1 skill die. If the result is engage[/b] or overpower[/b], suffer 1 heat damage as the anemones sting you. Either way, go to 479[/b].

655.text: You can’t see the source of the bubbles to the north, but the light they emit illuminates just how flat and sturdy the underwater shelf is. Near the shelf, you spot a pile of sunken debris that could be used for a structure or even a weapon. Gain 2 boost and continue.

656.action: EXPLORE[/b] the mouth of the cave
656.text: As your keen-but-waterlogged eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave 032[/b].

657.action: PREPARE[/b] to interact with the elemental
657.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the help-RELEASE[/b][/b] action or the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

658.action: LISTEN[/b] to the Traveler as they inspect their surroundings
658.text: “There are rumors of an impending land invasion by these water-bound sentients. These glass pods confirm my fears that sand sentients are supporting the water invasion.” Gain 2 boost and continue.

659.text: Coins glitter among the skeletons, as does a glowing box. In the distance, the gravekeeper tracks your every move as if waiting for an excuse to defend this territory. Gain 2 boost and continue.

660.text: The gregarious eel-like creature greets even the smallest fish that swims by. Gain 1 boost and 1 engage[/b]; you may continue.

661.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

662.text: You gag at the sight of three large sentients peeling flesh from massive bones in the main entrance. The sentients see you but are unbothered. They toss you some meat but politely ask you to eat it later, explaining that they’re vegetarian. Gain item 1217[/b] and 2 boost.

663.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the distant past—this area was a place for wood and energy sentients to meet and play, including some that would emerge from a hidden cave to the west of here. As you study it, you can’t help but smell the nearby lotus. Gain 1 health and 1 boost; you may also lose 1 curse.

664.text: The surface of the gateway is covered with an opaque, nebulous substance that you can’t see beyond, so you slowly stick your head into it. On the other side, the green grass and blue skies are replaced by a massive cavern filled with a fiery light. You may either go to cave 083[/b] or stay here and gain 1 boost.

665.text: Concealed by the long grass, you follow the owner of the houses as they check on their residents. They’re each a different type of sentient, but the landlord has some sort of translation device. One of the residents complains about their ceilings. The Traveler stays by your side while you snoop, astutely pointing out that this could be a great place to start a settlement if the locals condone it. Gain 1 boost and destiny 1600[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

666.text: The tree giggles as you poke and prod at them, though they don’t stop you. They’re grateful for your company, and they say that they would be happy to join you in your journey if you could bring them the Tools of Creation. Gain 1 help[/b] and quest 1640[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

667.text: This culture’s customs may be foreign to you, but you gather that this is some kind of wedding ceremony involving a bridge as a literal rite of passage. It seems intentional that there are no witnesses, so you remain quiet. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

668.text: Given its posture, the animal is more curious than afraid. It doesn’t seem dangerous, though all the cockroaches you’ve ever encountered have been notorious thieves. Gain 1 boost and 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

669.text: The mushroom has an earthy odor, and it clears out your sinuses. Gain 1 health and continue.

670.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

671.action: LISTEN[/b] to the Traveler talk about your mission
671.text: “If you’re trying to assemble a group of sentients, you’ll find both leaf and wood sentients to the north and east of here.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

672.action: LEARN[/b] how to fish from the friendly but difficult to understand sentient
672.text: Their instructions are hard to follow, but you’re familiar with the general concept of fishing, so you figure it out. Gain ability 1461[/b] and 1 health.

673.text: Peering through a window, you can see that no one is inside, just some tools and a number of shoes. Gain 1 boost; you may go to interior 560[/b].

674.text: The creature methodically moves through the forest, plucking ripe fruit from the trees. It seems to know this path well, and all passing sentients revere it and smile when the animal gives them a piece of fruit. Gain 1 boost; you may continue with the help-SHARE[/b][/b] action at a cost reduced by 1.

675.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

676.text: The sentient says that the embassy rejected their request to deliver an antidote to their friend in the watery depths to the west. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item 865[/b] and quest 1655[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).
Gain sentient 1350[/b].
Go to interior 585[/b].

677.action: SEARCH[/b] through a thicket for a back-alley entrance
677.text: A bowl of worms props open the door to a shop. If you enter, gain 2 look[/b], go to city 519[/b], and continue with the look-NAVIGATE[/b][/b] action there. Otherwise, go to city 519[/b].

678.text: The sentient is definitely angry about something, as they keep muttering about “furry beasts.” An animal saunters behind them, chewing on the shorter grass. As perturbed as the sentient appears, you have the feeling that you could talk to them or enlist their aid. Gain ability 1483[/b] and 1 boost; you may continue.

679.text: Keeping a safe distance from the fungal animal, you look over the orb. The orb is made of a shimmering, glass-like substance, and there are markings on the outside with which you might be able to interact. You don’t see how to access the interior, but there must be a way inside. Gain 1 boost and either 1 engage[/b] or 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

680.text: The creature proceeds to walk around the grove. You notice that the animal leaves a path of healthy grass and flowers in its wake. Gain 2 boost and continue.

681.action: SCAN[/b] the area, looking for the most viable path forward
681.text: The leftmost path looks too easy to be true, so you scan for a trap… and sure enough, there’s a mammoth spider lurking above it. But you also don’t want to get caught in the web—you would really need to squeeze through there to proceed north. Gain 2 boost and continue.

682.action: SPY[/b] on the house through a window
682.text: You’re excited to see a variety of treasures inside the house, including a ring, a set of tools, and a key. Unfortunately several sentients also occupy the building. Gain 1 boost and continue.

683.text: You soon find that the sentient is prone to rambling about their acts of service and generosity, but you manage to steer the conversation toward something useful. Gain lesson 1420[/b].

684.text: You sit down on the stairs, breathing meditatively as the creatures swarm around you. One by one they land next to you. They don’t look at you, though—they are focused on one of the trees at the base of the staircase. Gain either 1 move[/b] or 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

685.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

686.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

687.action: SCAN[/b] the horizon by stretching into the treetops
687.text: View page 43 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

688.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. As you study it, movement on a nearby tree trunk catches your eye. Something orange and furry springs out of sight to the east. Gain 1 boost and either 1 move[/b] or 1 engage[/b]; you may continue.

689.text: Midway up the tree, you wait patiently for the cats to remember you. Slowly they slide down the branches, claws scraping the bark. Gain animal 827[/b].

690.action: TRANSLATE[/b] ancient text on the ancient gateways
690.text: Four of the five gateways have similar text, each describing a specific destination somewhere else in the world. Unfortunately, none of the gateways are currently functional. Gain 2 boost and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

691.action: PREPARE[/b] to extract a glowing object from the roots
691.text: You perceptively notice that five warriors lurk among the roots, each poised to strike anyone who steps foot inside. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

692.text: The animal’s shadow blocks the sun as it looms over you. Its head lowers to meet you eye to eye, and it sees that you mean no harm. Gain animal 841[/b].

693.text: Your impressive feat of memory impresses the wood sentients, who welcome you to participate in the trial. Gain 2 move[/b] and continue with the move-SCALE[/b][/b] action.

694.action: SCAN[/b] the ruins for anything useful
694.text: The glint of a machete hanging in the ruins catches your eye, as does the treasure chest between you and the ruins. A closer examination reveals that the chest is extremely well built, and the only way to open it is with a key. Choose one:

choices.option: If you have item 916 or 996 (both are keys)
choices.outcome: Open the chest to gain item 1018[/b].

choices.option: If you don’t have item 916 or 996
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost and 1 take[/b]; go to interior 546[/b].

695.action: LISTEN[/b] to a sentient who emerges from the farmhouse
