695.text: The farmer, out of breath from panic, explains that their entire herd broke free last night. They beg you to search the surrounding area to find them and steer them back here. Gain 1 move[/b] and quest 1702[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

696.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

697.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

698.action: EXPLORE[/b] the mouth of the cave
698.text: Avoiding a tangle of vines and tree limbs, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave 038[/b].

699.text: A path is broken by the gully, as if a recent earthquake caused the divide. This place appears well-traveled despite the gap—it could be a good place to pick a few pockets or build something useful. The levitating device on the left is out of reach from this side of the gap. Gain 2 boost and continue.

700.text: It looks like the beast was a massive dragon. There is a stillness to the air around the skeleton, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

701.action: STUDY[/b] the inner workings of the box
701.text: The box is a combination of technology and sorcery. You have a very bad feeling about entering it. Gain lesson 1430[/b] and 1 boost.

702.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

703.text: The sentient relaxes into a less aggressive stance. Gain 1 boost and 1 skill of your choice; you may continue.

704.text: The orb is made of a shimmering, glass-like substance, and there are markings on the outside with which you might be able to interact. You don’t see how to access the interior, but there must be a way inside. Gain 1 boost and gain either 1 engage[/b] or 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

705.text: Despite its imposing appearance, the creature seems to want to play. Gain 1 boost and 1 engage[/b]; you may continue.

706.action: OBSERVE[/b] the animal from the ledge
706.text: The behemoth has an incredible ability to fly, but it seems hurt or scared, and you quickly see why—a pod of similar creatures fly in pursuit not far away. Gain 1 boost and either 1 move[/b] or 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

707.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

708.text: The sentient rushes to explain that their child is stuck in a dangerous position to the north. Misinterpreting your hesitation for negotiation, they toss you some coins and beg you to help. Gain $4 and 1 move[/b]; go north to 709[/b].

709.text: You hear the sound of whimpering from above. Choose one: gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

710.text: There’s a steep descent to the valley below, but you could potentially build or even excavate a more accessible option for traveling north. Alternatively, you could just find an easier path to the west. Gain 2 boost and continue.

711.text: The ancient creature is utterly exhausted from years of guarding the building. The Traveler informs you that stoneskin lizards can live to be nearly twice as old as this one is, so there is hope for this beast to be reinvigorated. Gain 1 boost and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

712.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

713.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

714.action: OBSERVE[/b] the sentient as they manipulate other clouds
714.text: There is a pattern to the sentient’s cloudcrafting, and the result is a form of communication, a call for help. They are searching for someone important to them, someone who has been taken from them. Gain 1 engage[/b] and quest 1652[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

715.text: You’re not the first person who has inquired about this process, though it isn’t much of one. The Soulkeeper examines you carefully, then selects a soulstone for you: Roll a skill die and gain a crystal matching the resulting color (blue[/b]: 1160[/b]; purple[/b]: 1161[/b]; orange[/b]: 1162[/b]; green[/b]: 1163[/b]; yellow[/b]: 1164[/b]; red[/b]: 1165[/b]).

716.action: EXPLORE[/b] the mouth of the cave
716.text: As your keen eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave 024[/b].

717.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

718.text: The sentient skids to a halt at the edge of the cliff, realizing they may have scared you. “I mean no harm,” they yell in a garbled voice. “I need help!” Gain 1 boost and continue.

719.action: SEARCH[/b] for an entrance to the hostel
719.text: Tucked away from the howling wind is a small door. Go to interior 013[/b].

720.text: It looks like the beast died from the impact of a long fall. There is a stillness to the air around the skeleton, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

721.action: CALCULATE[/b] the paths of the boulders (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
721.text: You must choose a single place to stand while boulders are rolled down the surrounding hills. Find card 534[/b] (it’s a large card), place it on the table, and begin. Each of the arrows represents a single boulder teetering at the peaks of the valley. When the trial begins, each boulder will simultaneously tumble in a straight line—the direction indicated by its arrow—one hex at a time until it either exits the other side of the valley or it disintegrates by smashing into another boulder. There exists exactly 1 hex in the valley that will be safe for the duration of the trial (it will never be hit by a boulder). You may use tokens to simulate the tumbling boulders until you are ready to choose the hex where you will stand for the trial. See entry 721[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

722.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

723.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the distant past—this is an ancient meeting place between metal and stone sentients. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill.

724.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. As you examine it, you have the eerie sense that you too are being examined. Gain 2 boost and continue.

725.text: The sign reads that this is the start of the 9-Station Path. Gain 1 boost, 1 move[/b], and quest 1673[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

726.text: The looming sentient grumbles that the travelers are trespassing on private property, and that they aren’t the first—many pilgrims venture this way. You relate to their frustration and ask if they would be willing to show you around their home as a guest, not as a pilgrim. The sentient descends to the ground and guides you to the east, allowing the smaller sentients to hurry away to the north. Go to 410[/b], where the house becomes occupied upon your arrival.

727.text: Off to the side, different types of climbing gear are featured by an open-air vendor. If you enter, gain 2 engage[/b], go to city 523[/b], and continue with the engage-TRADE[/b][/b] action there. Otherwise, go to city 523[/b].

728.text: The sentient explains that they’re training for a “leap of faith” to the west to honor their lost pet, a hovertail that recently flew off to the east. Gain 1 boost and quest 1650[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

729.action: PREPARE[/b] to interact with the elemental
729.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the help-RELEASE[/b][/b] action or the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

730.action: EXPLORE[/b] the mouth of the cave
730.text: As your keen eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave 020[/b].

731.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. You notice that there’s even more wreckage to the north of here, but it isn’t from your ship. Gain 2 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

732.text: The spaceship has been here for a long, long time, and the remaining framework is quite frail. Go to interior 791[/b].

733.action: SEARCH[/b] for a path to the Pearl
733.text: You find a narrow staircase carved into the back of the boulder, and you ascend the steps to touch the Pearl. When you do, your mind goes blank, save for three glowing symbols. Choose one and gain the corresponding spell:

choices.outcome: Gain spell 1236[/b].
Gain spell 1237[/b].
Gain spell 1238[/b].

734.text: You look through the rift to see that it is a rift in time, not space—it’s the same place, just in the distant past or future when water covers this area of the world. Choose one:

choices.outcome: As your hand brushes against the edge of the rift, a jolt of awareness surges through you. Gain lesson 1433[/b] and 1 boost.

choices.option: Interact with the area in a different way
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost and continue.

735.action: SPY[/b] on the sentient as they work
735.text: The sentient is inside a solid glass orb that alternates between opaque and transparent. The sentient seems frustrated. Gain 2 boost and continue.

736.text: It’s almost immediately clear that you will hurt yourself if you try to move north. You could instead walk east to chat with the giant sand sentient there or west to the shoreline. Gain 2 boost and continue.

737.action: SPY[/b] on the house from a distance
737.text: You’re excited to see a beautiful sword hanging from a pole inside; gain 1 boost.

738.text: As you wade toward the city, you follow the shoreline to an open-air tiki bar. If you enter, gain 1 engage[/b], go to city 527[/b], and continue with the engage-TALK[/b][/b] action there. Otherwise, go to city 527[/b].

739.action: PREPARE[/b] to extract contraband from the island
739.text: You perceptively notice that there are three lookouts posted around the island. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

740.text: The sentient is shouting about an important tree that was growing here—it seems to have disappeared overnight, and it will take 100 years to grow another. They speak of the rarity of the tree’s seeds and that they are found in a cave to the southeast. You also catch something about a “time portal.” Gain ability 1494[/b], 1 boost, and 1 move[/b].

741.text: The sunset shining through the arch isn’t in the background—at least not in this time. A scan reveals a significant time anomaly around the arch. It’s the same place, but 100 years in the future. Gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b]; you may continue.

742.text: The sentient is a willing teacher, and they show you how to manipulate strands of time as you would a ball of yarn. Gain lesson 1433[/b] and continue.

743.text: In a garbled voice that sounds like you’re underwater, the tall sentient says that they’re looking for help to solve a murder in the area. Gain 1 help[/b] and quest 1645[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

744.text: Your attention is drawn to a large, threatening creature to the east. The sentients on the shoreline aren’t helping the situation— they’re heckling the beast. You notice some fishing supplies in the sand behind them. Gain 2 boost and continue.

745.text: The owner of the boat is probably in one of the buildings, so you could either catch their attention or try to slip away in the boat before they notice. Gain 1 boost and continue.

746.action: PREPARE[/b] to interact with the cove
746.text: The cove is rife with possibilities: You could start a business here, raid a home, or simply relax in the water. Choose one: gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

747.text: The tiny animal could not have chosen a worse location to avoid predators: It’s a vast expanse empty aside from the oddly shaped bush on your left. You have a hunch that if the animal were to join you willingly, the big-eared creature could be an effective thief. Gain 2 boost, and gain either 1 move[/b] or 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

748.text: You find a door leading into a shop filled with goggles and eyeglasses. If you enter, gain 2 look[/b], go to city 531[/b], and continue with the look-NAVIGATE[/b][/b] action there. Otherwise, go to city 531[/b].

749.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

750.text: You stand your ground, making it clear to the kraken that you condemn its attacks just as you condemn any antagonism by the residents of the seaside village. The beast calms down and heads back to the depths. The villagers give you a generous offering in appreciation for your courage. Gain item 899[/b], 1 morale, and 1 look[/b].

751.action: LISTEN[/b] to the child talk to their pet
751.text: The child is telling the animal all the things they hope to do, including a face-off with the elemental to the north, a race against a sand centipede, and dinner with their parents for the first time in months. Gain 1 boost, 1 random skill, and quest 1643[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

752.action: PREPARE[/b] to interact with the elemental
752.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the help-RELEASE[/b][/b] action or the overpower-SLAY[/b][/b] action.

753.text: The sentients’ diction is easy to understand. Several sentients discuss a race up ahead, which they’re hoping will keep the sand sentients distracted while they join an invasion to the northeast. Gain 1 boost and quest 1694[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). You may continue.

754.text: Your impressive feat of memory impresses the sand sentients, who welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the move-SPEED[/b][/b] action.

755.action: LISTEN[/b] to the sentient share their woes
755.text: “I spent years building a magnificent ship, and the first time I sailed through these waters from the northwest, a kraken dashed it against the rocks. I’m ruined!” You know that sometimes the best way to support someone in pain is simply to sit with them. So you do. Gain ability 1494[/b], 1 morale, and 1 boost.

756.text: The chest is sturdy (but quite weather-worn), with a rusted lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

757.text: Sure enough, there is a cave behind one of the waterfalls. As your keen eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave 023[/b].

758.action: OBSERVE[/b] the animal from a safe distance
758.text: Judging by the size of the bone stuck in its throat, it may be best to steer clear of this creature. Gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b]; you may continue.

759.text: The sentient with the yellow shawl finds you to be a more receptive student, as you quickly pick up the basics of time magic. Gain lesson 1433[/b].

076.text: Roll 3 skill dice. Gain 1 morale for each help result, then gain 1 health. As you listen, you notice another sound—there are people talking inside the building, one level up. Gain 1 move[/b] and continue.

760.text: Chaos engulfs the castle. The invaders are desperate to breach the walls and may accept your help, and the defenders seem helplessly trapped and might be persuaded to hire your services. With the castle’s guards likely distracted, you could sneak inside the castle from the cliffside. Gain 2 boost and 1 move[/b]; you may continue.

761.text: Your keen eyes notice a rope that you could climb as well as a small gateway guarded by a single sentry. Gain either 1 move[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

762.text: The sentient has just come from Founder’s Temple to the near north. They are frantic with worry—an important egg was mistakenly offered to the Founder, and they need you to raid the temple to retrieve it. They suggest that you bring an item to offer to the temple, and they give you a small vial of energy as an option for the donation. Gain item 1211[/b] and quest 1637[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

763.text: It appears that the sentients who are granted entry are those carrying tangible offerings. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

764.text: As much fun as the sentients are having, you’re more comfortable watching. There are a few tipsy sentients who could use your help and a belligerent drunk who should be subdued. You can also hear the sounds of dockside workers to the east. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

765.action: MEMORIZE[/b] a map near the departure area
765.text: The map highlights the cities and towns of the world. Gain item 1251[/b] and continue.

766.text: You don’t have much time to act, so you quickly survey your options. You can leap for the balloon and have a slim chance of catching it, or you could persuade, coerce, or even force the sentient to act in your favor. Gain 1 boost and either 1 engage[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

767.text: The city wall stretches as far as you can see in either direction, and while there may be weak points in it, the gate in front of you appears to be the easiest way to enter. The city is bustling with activity—you wonder whether you can buy a map from any of the vendors at the entrance, though you’ll need to move closer to find out. Gain 1 boost and continue.

768.action: SCAN[/b] the scene for your options
768.text: The vendor on the left is selling maps and refreshments, while the sentient on the right looks a little lost. The smell of stables and animals wafts from inside the city, while some smoke drifts from the industrial district to the east. Gain 2 boost and continue.

769.text: Each sentient who approaches the building from the side has an animal, while those entering the front hand coins to the bouncer. Gain 2 boost, and gain either 1 move[/b] or 1 engage[/b]; you may continue.

077.text: The sentients are so engrossed in their game that they still don’t notice your presence. Both are armed. You can feel air flowing from another level above, but due to the wind chimes, there’s no way to get up there without alerting the sentients. Gain 2 boost and continue.

770.text: The owner of the boat is talking to the owner of the port nearby, so you could either catch their attention or try to slip away in the boat before they notice. Gain 1 boost and continue.

771.action: NAVIGATE[/b] the ship away from the city
771.text: Fair winds sail you to your choice of a quiet cove to the northwest (490[/b]), the prairie to the northeast (347[/b]), or to the western outskirts of the city (459[/b]). From there you must leave the ship behind.

772.text: At first glance it looks like the sentient is bullying the ship, but from their posture and demeanor, you start to think that they might be patrolling these waters in an official capacity. You could seek to defuse the conflict, aid the ship, use the opportunity to commandeer the vessel, or even fight the sentient. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

773.text: The solid but uneven stone of the wall offers an opportunity for a skilled climber. The small gateway is a tempting way to pass north, but you would most likely get stuck inside unless you first dug your way in. There are also a few sentients on the wall to whom you could appeal for help. Gain 1 move[/b], 1 engage[/b], or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

774.text: The sentient already has several apprentices, but they agree to show you some basic blacksmithing techniques on an old practice machete, which they let you keep. Gain item 920[/b].

775.text: The sentient remains in the middle of the path—maybe it’s your imagination, but you’re pretty sure they flex as they intentionally bump against you. Your carefully organized possessions go flying in all directions. Gain 1 boost; you may rearrange your card grid.

776.text: In addition to a variety of robes and outfits, the vendor also has a package awaiting delivery. Gain 1 boost. When they notice you looking at the package, there is a glint in their eyes as they ask if you are a courier. If you say yes, gain item 1034[/b] and quest 1638[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). Otherwise, continue.

777.text: Clear signage in several languages seems to indicate that the council here includes representatives from 12 different cultures. People attend the council meetings either as members of the audience (the sentry should be able to tell you more about attending) or as a speaker (which requires a formal offer of assistance). Gain either 1 engage[/b] or 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

778.text: The fruit on the ground is soft and overripe. In the tree, the freshest fruit appears to be high up in the branches. Gain 2 boost and continue.

779.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

078.text: The lonely sentient is eager to share the mechanics of wind harvesting. Lotuses release a substance into the air, and it can be harvested and processed by devices like this one. The resulting substance is powerful but addictive. The sentient begs you to help them escape. Gain 2 help[/b] and continue.

780.text: You find a bar of soap neatly wrapped in wax paper. Perhaps someone has covertly been bathing in the fresh water nearby. Gain item 1207[/b].

781.text: From what you can gather, the sentient on the right stole a precious object crafted by the sentient on the left, though they claim theft was a valid transfer of ownership in their culture. Gain 1 boost and continue.

782.text: Just as your eyes can see that a purple sentient is lurking nearby, your nose picks up the scent of fear from the green sentient. They need your help. Gain 1 boost and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

783.text: The sentient works at the central bank, which they identify by gesturing to the golden-domed building in the rear. They mention offhandedly that the bank’s cavernous vaults store a considerable amount of treasure. Gain 1 boost and 1 look[/b]; you may continue.

784.action: SCAN[/b] the ruins for anything useful
784.text: You identify a barrel among the rubble. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; go to interior 548[/b].

785.action: LISTEN[/b] to the sentients on the bridge
785.text: You hear the voices of guards, the conversation alternating between gathering tolls from incoming travelers and concerns about the need for a more robust night shift due to the increase in bandits crossing the bridge in the evening. Gain 2 boost and continue.

786.text: Several cables stretch from the wall up to the palace; it would be quite a challenge to scale them, but the view is probably spectacular. Perhaps the three guards are susceptible to the powers of persuasion? Gain 2 engage[/b] and continue.

787.text: The sentient keeps repeating that they “need to get to the museum.” You could follow them (gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b]) or stay here to clear your head (gain 1 boost and 1 help[/b]) Either way, you may continue.

788.text: The metal sentient is planning to steal from the vendors in this pavilion, and they brag that you’ll learn a thing or two if you watch them do what they do best. Gain ability 1482[/b]; you may continue.

789.text: The sentient is proud to showcase the various weapons they have for sale and to share the stories of how they stole them. It seems that theft is considered a form of art for metal sentients, though given the close proximity of this vendor, you’re better off trading with them or seeing if you could do them a favor. Gain 2 boost and continue.

079.action: FOCUS[/b] on the ancient markings on the pillar
079.text: The tiny runes that form the leyline seem to lift off the pillar and float into your mind. Gain spell 1368[/b].

790.action: TRANSLATE[/b] a few pages of the book
790.text: The book describes the various elementals of the world. It’s currently open to a page about a metal elemental, which you can see over the city wall to the east. Look at page 24 of the Book of Vantages, then gain 1 boost and continue.

791.text: You find a number of oddities throughout the ship, including 12 compartments labeled in your language with the name of 12 elements, a barely functional radio, and, most curiously, a young girl in a cryogenic sleep. The readings on the chamber indicate that she’s been there for centuries and that waking her would almost certainly kill her. As you observe her, the Traveler’s holographic visage appears at your side and gestures toward the chamber. “I love this world, but I miss my home. You are my only hope.” Gain 2 boost and continue with the help-RESCUE[/b][/b] action.

795.text: You perceptively notice a guard lurking in the shadows to the right. You could avoid detection by moving no farther than the amulet hanging above the guard’s hiding place, or you could attack the guard before they attack you. Gain either 1 move[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

799.action: SEARCH[/b] the dark pit for anything of use
799.text: You’re elated to find a grappling hook wedged into the wall on the left. Gain item 905[/b] and continue.

080.text: The sentient looks like they could use some help, but they’re also so occupied with their task that they should be easy to sneak around. Gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b]; you may continue.

801.text: You soak in the view from the sky island hovering above a vast sea before studying the shard for any sign of danger. There are no traps or surprises, and the shard is yours. Gain item 1707[/b].

081.text: Beyond the servers, in the back of the cavern, the sediment is so thin that you can see movement on the far side. Gain either 1 move[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

082.text: You kneel at the edge of the stream, positioning your ear just over the ice to determine its structural integrity. To your surprise, carrying through the frozen water are the voices of several sentients yelling at each other. Gain either 1 move[/b] or 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

083.text: You toss a stone through the arch, and while you can’t find it in the back of the cavern, you do discover a partially blocked passage that may lead deeper into the planet. Gain 1 boost and continue.

084.action: SEARCH[/b] for a path that leads to the yellow crystal
084.text: A blind corner to your right leads to a path that extends around the cavern to a staircase descending directly to the crystal. It’s far too large for you to carry, but a generous piece breaks off into your hand. Gain item 1164[/b] and 1 random skill. You may continue with a move[/b] action on this location.

085.text: You could compete, but it might be easier just to bet on a few fighters instead. Either way, if you’re short on coins, you may need to steal from some nearby spectators. Gain 1 boost, and gain either 1 take[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

086.text: The lava is both a barrier and an abundant resource for you to use as you wish. As your eyes adjust to the bright light, you also see a faint glow in the back of the cavern that could lead even deeper into the planet. Gain 2 boost and continue.

087.text: There’s a lot to absorb in the busy cavern. The guards are distracted, so you could sneak around them to the back of the cave. You could also talk to the miners about what they’re doing or even rescue one of them, as some are chained to their posts. Gain 1 boost and 1 engage[/b]; you may continue.

088.text: Amidst the endless tangle of roots and crystals is the beginning of a tunnel that is abruptly cut off by glowing sediment: something beyond, something deeper. Based on footprints in the moss, you suspect that there’s even more activity to the north. Gain 2 boost and continue.

089.text: Vibrant green crystals light the soft soil of the cavern; upon closer examination, you see tiny fruits growing around them. Gain item 1224[/b] and continue.

090.text: Hidden among the coins and jewelry is a glimmer of something special: A glowing, ethereal key. Gain item 917[/b] and 1 morale.

091.text: It’s sturdy, with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

092.action: EXAMINE[/b] the porous exterior of the cavern
092.text: As you look closely at the gaping holes, you realize that the water abruptly ends in some kind of underwater oxygen bubble, perhaps due to a pressure anomaly. Beyond the cavern you see row upon row of giant, jagged teeth. Gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b]; you may continue.

093.text: Choose one of the three paths (from left to right: blue, orange, or green):

choices.outcome: After following a winding path, you reach a dead end. Etched into the wall are some clues for completing the maze. Gain 1 boost; you may pay 1 morale to try again.

This route ends abruptly, so abruptly that you almost miss the sentient sitting on the ground. They’re mumbling to themselves and drawing lines in the air. You console them until they calm down, at which point they share what they know about the maze. Gain ability 1464[/b]; you may pay 1 morale to try again.
An endless series of twists and turns leads you to the end of the maze. Go deeper into the planet to cave 043[/b].

094.text: A door on the western side of the underground city is ajar. You catch a glimpse of an array of computer screens inside. If you enter, go to interior 042[/b]. Otherwise, go to city 041[/b] and gain 1 random skill.

095.text: Each contains a tiny, 8-legged animal. Out of the corner of your eye you see a large creature staring at you. Gain 1 boost and continue.

096.action: OBSERVE[/b] the dragon while it prepares for another strike
096.text: From the copious amounts of drool dripping from the dragon’s jaw, you gather that it’s hungry. You also notice how thin the air is in this cavern—perhaps the dragon doesn’t need oxygen the way you do? Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

097.text: Up close, you can see that these devices are ancient—it’s quite possible they’re the original runecasters, first of their kind, enclosed in this cavern so that their radioactive decay doesn’t destroy the world. As compelled as you are to feel the sheer power of activating them, you know the smart move is to turn around or exit through the door in the rear. Gain 2 boost and continue.

098.text: You find a method to the madness of the underground pathways, and soon you find yourself facing a glowing door that leads deeper into the planet. Go deeper into the planet to cave 044[/b].

099.text: Something clicks as you study the glyphs, which seem to depict the evolution of the planet from nothing to a thriving world. An asteroid couldn’t have brought so many different elements through the vacuum of space. But a spaceship from an already evolved world could have seeded this planet with the origins of life. Gain 2 boost.

100.action: ASK[/b] the sentient about the area
100.text: The sentient is the most excited to share that just to the north of here is one of the largest windborne animals in the world. “It will be happy to eat any food you give it,” they say as they hand you a coin. “Otherwise, it’s somewhat slow, so you can just catch it.” Gain $1 and 1 boost.

101.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
101.text: The creature is skittish, but its curiosity eventually outweighs its fear, and it hops over to inspect your belongings. Gain animal 853[/b].

1013.action: HIRE[/b] the turtaxi for more service
1013.text: Pay $1 or $2 to add 1 or 2 boost to this card, respectively. If you don’t pay, continue.

102.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1169[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1207[/b]. Otherwise, the chest snaps shut on your finger; lose 1 health and gain 1 boost.

103.action: MIMIC[/b] the animals in a sign of friendship
103.text: As you wave fingers above your head and make chirping sounds, the animals relax and go about their business. One ushers you to peek into the tent, the inside of which proudly displays a random collection of items left behind long ago. Go to interior 549[/b].

104.text: As you reach for the animal, it vanishes into thin air. You have a few seconds to study the details of your current location before there’s a flurry of movement in the grove, then the trap door slams shut. Go to 511[/b] and continue.

105.action: MIMIC[/b] the animal with a similar chirp
105.text: The creature cocks its head to the side as if to confirm the sincerity of the gesture, then it waddles over to you. Gain animal 803[/b].

106.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

107.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1345[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

108.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about your mission
108.text: “If you’re trying to build a collection of local flora, try plucking these rare mushrooms.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

1081.action: LURE[/b] a flying animal to you
1081.text: Roll a skill die and gain an animal based on the result (move[/b]: 803[/b]; look[/b]: 804[/b]; engage[/b]: 814[/b]; help[/b]: 820[/b], take[/b]: 823[/b]; overpower[/b]: 826[/b]).

109.text: The animal you were hiding behind scurries away as the sentient turns in your direction. Their leaflike flaps flutter excitedly as they explain that they just arrived from the east by boat in search of the Cloak of Invisibility, which they believe may be found south of here. Either gain 2 boost or pay 1 boost to gain sentient 1350[/b].

110.action: PERSUADE[/b] the judges (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
110.text: The judges welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the help-CREATE[/b][/b] action.

111.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

112.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
112.text: You playfully splash the animal, and it gallops in place, eager for the company. Gain animal 851[/b].

113.action: ASK[/b] a sentient about the lotus
113.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

115.text: The cartographers will happily buy any maps in your possession for their value. They can also sell you a map of the world’s most prominent flora (1257[/b]) for $6 or an elixir (864[/b]) for $2. If you don’t buy or sell anything, they let you borrow their boat (gain vehicle 1014[/b]) so you can be more interesting when you visit in the future.

116.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
116.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, consider mastering the portals of this world; there is one to the south of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1604[/b] (place it in the center).

117.action: ASK[/b] a local sentient about the crystal
117.text: A stone sentient lumbers over to you. In a gravelly voice they explain that this is the Darkstone, a one-of-a-kind crystal viewed—according to prophecy—as the counterbalance to the Lightstone to the far northwest. Gain 1 random skill and quest 1663[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply); you may continue with the take-EXTRACT[/b][/b] action.

118.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
118.text: In its haste, the animal almost ignores you, but something in your tone convinces it to trust you instead. Gain animal 804[/b].

119.action: ASK[/b] the sentient about the flowers
119.text: Delighted to be of assistance, the sentient launches into a detailed explanation of the flower’s ability to heighten your senses. They kindly ask that you not touch the flowers, and they offer to be your guide in the area to satisfy your other curiosities. If you accept, gain sentient 1353[/b]. If not, gain 1 boost and continue.

012.action: WIELD[/b] the sniper rifle wedged between the wooden beams
012.text: You twist the sniper rifle free and swim out of the shipwreck. Gain item 1153[/b] and exit to 649[/b].

120.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
120.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “All technology has simple roots. Even the simplest rowboat can evolve into a mighty spaceship with enough patience and expertise.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1606[/b] (place it in the center).

121.action: HAIL[/b] a ride from the boat’s captain
121.text: The captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride northwest to an active volcano on 481[/b], northeast to a helpless animal on 483[/b], southeast to a levitating stone on 117[/b], or southwest to an old building on 115[/b].
The captain gives you a fresh fish and bids you farewell (gain 1 health).

122.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
122.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, send a signal just like I did to let people know I crash landed here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

123.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestones. They speak to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

124.action: PERSUADE[/b] the guard to let you enter (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
124.text: The guard points at the skeleton and makes you promise not to steal anything inside the building. They then lead you to a side room and leave you alone there. Go to interior 554[/b].

125.action: PERSUADE[/b] a local to tell you the correct path (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
125.text: The fire sentient winks twice and clanks away, but the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved. Gain 1 boost and 1 look[/b].

126.text: The lock is hot to the touch, making it more difficult to pick. Finally it pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1164[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 895[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

1265.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1266.action: SELL[/b] some food to a customer
1266.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $1 or lose a token from a food card to gain $3. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1267.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose an armor card to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1268.action: SELL[/b] some medicine to a customer
1268.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $1 or lose a token from a medicine card to gain $3. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1269.action: SELL[/b] a weapon to a customer
1269.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a weapon to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

127.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
127.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, send a signal to your homeworld via the tower to the northeast.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

1270.action: SELL[/b] a map to a customer
1270.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a map to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1271.action: PLAY[/b] a betting game against your customers
1271.text: The game you play depends on the quantity of boost on this structure:

choices.outcome: Bet up to $3 each on any skill type(s). Then roll 2 skill dice. For each die matching a skill on which you bet, gain double the amount you bet, then lose all coins you bet.
Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll any dice up to 6 times. If the final results are all identical, gain double the amount you bet. Otherwise, lose your bet.

Roll 6 skill dice. If the results include at least 1 engage[/b], gain $2. You may stop and keep your winnings or proceed to roll 5 skill dice. If the results include at least 1 engage[/b], gain $2 and you may continue with another roll (1 fewer die each round); if not, lose the $2 earned on the previous roll and end the game.

1272.action: SELL[/b] a beverage to a customer
1272.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $1 or lose a token from a beverage card to gain $3. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1273.action: SELL[/b] a special item to a customer
1273.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a card you created on this structure to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1274.action: DEFUSE[/b] an argument between two sentients (you may pay 1 boost from this structure to reduce this cost to 1)
1274.text: You put your mediative skills to use in an effort to preserve diplomatic relations. Two sentients—leaf and sinew—are arguing over the ethics of eating meat vs. plants. You help them see from the other person’s perspective, even if they don’t agree. Afterwards, you choose to continue the discussion with one of them. Gain either (sinew) sentient 1333[/b] or (leaf) sentient 1350[/b].

1275.action: WISH[/b] for fame (pay 1 boost from this structure; perform this action at most once per game)

1276.text: The musical is an amazing spectacle of song, dance, and drama. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid, and gain $X, where X is the number of boost on this structure.

1277.action: SELL[/b] a drink to a customer
1277.text: The customer buys your finest drink, paying you $X (X is the number of boost on this structure). Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1278.action: SELL[/b] a garment to a customer
1278.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a garment to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1279.action: COAX[/b] an animal to trust you or a traveler to use your stable’s services

choices.option: Coax an animal to trust you (requires that you already have a wild animal in your grid)
choices.outcome: It takes time and effort, but the animal becomes loyal to you. Replace an animal with its loyal version.

choices.option: Coax a traveler to use your stable’s services
choices.outcome: Gain $X (X is the number of boost on this structure).

128.action: PERSUADE[/b] the sentient to give you the blade (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
128.text: The sentient enjoys the conversation but gives you the gift of time instead of a sword. The mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, but you gain some insight into how to solve it. Gain 1 time and 1 boost.

1280.action: CHARM[/b] a new student to join the school
1280.text: The sentient is eager to begin their studies, but first they must pay tuition. Gain $X (X is the number of boost on this structure).

1281.action: TRANSMIT[/b] a signal to your homeworld (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1281.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

1282.action: SELL[/b] a vehicle to a customer
1282.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a vehicle to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1283.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1284.action: SELL[/b] an accessory to a customer
1284.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose an accessory to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1285.action: SELL[/b] your hatching services to a customer
1285.text: A sentient drops off an egg for you to hatch. Gain $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1286.action: SELL[/b] tower access to a hunter
1286.text: The hunter is eager for a better vantage of the area. Gain $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1287.action: SELL[/b] a crystal to a customer
1287.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a crystal card to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1288.action: SELL[/b] a flora to a customer
1288.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a flora card to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1289.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

129.action: HAIL[/b] a ride from the boat
129.text: The captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride northwest to glowing rock spires on 133[/b], northeast to a sentient on 427[/b], southeast to an aquatic vehicle on 381[/b], or southwest to a lava flow on 379[/b].
The captain asks whether you’ve tried to climb the spire (gain 1 boost). You may continue.

1290.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends, many of them appreciative of the fresh air circulating within the dome. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1291.action: SELL[/b] a flora to a customer
1291.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a flora card to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1292.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

1293.action: SELL[/b] your training services to a sentient
1293.text: You entice a sentient to run the obstacle course, and they’re instantly hooked. Gain $X, where X is the number of ability cards you have plus the number of boost on this structure. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

013.text: The translation earpiece on the nearby table pairs perfectly with your cranial implants. Gain item 878[/b].

130.action: TALK[/b] to the sentients about the game they’re playing
130.text: The sentients, particularly the sentient on the left, seem eager to include you in the game. Place card 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

1305.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, showcasing a suggestive dance move (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, steering you onto the dance floor (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, taking you into their arms and soaring into the air (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1306.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, gesturing for you to plant some seeds with them (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, tickling your neck with a flower (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, sharing that their days of sowing their wild oats are over (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1307.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, scooting close to show you a map they’re working on (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, etching your initials into a hidden heart on a map (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, declaring that you have charted a way into their heart (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1308.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, sharing that it’s been a long time since they last felt the spark of romance (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, teasing your clothes with a gentle breeze (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, excited to have found love so late in life (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1309.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, their gruff facade briefly giving way to a smile (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, showing off their long list of Spor clients (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, twirling you around in their arms (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

131.action: ENTERTAIN[/b] the occupant of the tent with a story
131.text: You weave a boring tale that lulls the circuit sentient to power down, and you slip inside the tent. Go to interior 550[/b].

1310.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, pausing their welding work to look deep into your eyes (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, showering you with sparks (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, syncing with your implants to see the world through your eyes and you through theirs (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1311.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, examining the technology of your augsuit (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, stomping their many feet in a primal courtship dance (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, assuring you that they would do anything to make the world a safer place for you (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1312.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, shyly lingering near you as you walk together (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, revealing that they’ve never felt this level of connection with anyone (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, sharing their precious soulstone with you (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1313.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, asking about your favorite animals (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, boldly declaring that they would like to find an Elder Dragon with you (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, wistfully dreaming of a future when the two of you can have a huge family of animals together (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1314.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, asking for your permission to hack into your implant briefly to learn more about you (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, proclaiming a pick-up line about hacking into your heart (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, making a huge production out of declaring their affection for you (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1315.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, awkwardly trying to make small talk (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, taking you to their smithy to show off their crafting skills (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, speaking poetically of the fire in their heart that burns for you (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1316.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, coyly peering out from the foundation of a structure they’re building (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, telling you that they’ve braved even the coldest regions to build structures and vehicles (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, revealing that it would be their great honor to build a home for the two of you (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1317.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, asking whether you have any tattoos (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, revealing a hidden tattoo that they rarely share (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, etching a tattoo into their carapace declaring their enduring affection for you (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1318.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, not fully trusting your intentions (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, sharing some of their favorite scavenged items with you (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, declaring that they will give up their seedy underground career for you (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1319.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, discussing their torchmaking trade with you (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, dazzling you with a light show of torches (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, claiming that their love for you is enduring against all waves (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

132.action: COMMUNE[/b] with the sword and the stone
132.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the sword: It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

1320.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, asking about your last relationship (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, listing their finer qualities for you to consider (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, arranging for you to join them at the finest table at the most expensive restaurant in the area (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1321.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, shyly asking if you’d like to play a game with them (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, committing to gently helping you navigate a new type of relationship (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1363.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, inspecting your shoes and complimenting your feet (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, showing off some of their newest creations (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, vowing to not rest until they create the ideal pair of shoes for you (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1364.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, asking about ships on your world (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, teasing you as you admire some of the precise work on their latest ship (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least 1 engage[/b] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, their arms pressed against yours at the helm of a ship (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

137.text: Placing your hand on the ribcage, you breathe with intention, eyes closed. The animal appears in your mind, staring at you with an intense calm. Choose one:

choices.outcome: With gratitude, the animal departs into the darkness. Gain 1 morale and 1 health.
With acceptance, the animal steps forward into your mind. Gain ability 1500[/b].

138.action: TRANSMIT[/b] a signal to your homeworld
138.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

139.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestone. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

014.action: COAX[/b] the large slug patiently from the rubble
014.text: Freed from the rubble, the animal shakes off a layer of dust and brays affectionately at you. Gain animal 824[/b]. Enter the open door (go deeper into the planet to cave 043[/b]).

140.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

141.text: Placing your hand on the skull, you breathe with intention, eyes closed. The animal appears in your mind, staring at you with an intense calm. Choose one:

choices.outcome: With gratitude, the animal departs into the darkness. Gain 1 morale and 1 health.
With acceptance, the animal steps forward into your mind. Gain ability 1494[/b].

142.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
142.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, with enough effort you could repair your spaceship. This wreckage is irreparable, but there’s more intact wreckage directly to the east of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center).

143.action: LINK[/b] to the ship’s nutritional system
143.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

146.action: ASK[/b] the sentient about their job
146.text: The energy sentient explains that they are a runekeeper. They travel the world inspecting and energizing runes so that sentients and animals can empower themselves, just as these birds are improving their eyesight by focusing on the nearby runes. They encourage you to do the same and give you a map to aid in your travels. Gain item 1255[/b] and 1 boost; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 12 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region K).

147.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

148.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
148.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “Instead of leaving, why not settle down in a city like the one to the north? Make a new life for yourself here like I have!” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1601[/b] (place it in the center).

149.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about your mission
149.text: “These rolling hills are the perfect location to build a way to map the world.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

150.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
150.text: The critter cautiously moves toward you, finally determining that you’re not a threat. Gain animal 814[/b].

151.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the world. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

152.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

153.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

154.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about a quest
154.text: “If you’re trying to find the floating stones, travel just east of here.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

155.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
155.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “With the aid of helpful lava flies and quite a bit of time, you could probably build a new spaceship.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1607[/b] (place it in the center).

156.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
156.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, you could study the portal technology found in a few areas, like the one just east of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1604[/b] (place it in the center).

157.action: ASK[/b] a passing sentient about the gateway
157.text: A heavily tattooed sentient informs you that this portal is one of just a few gateways that allow travelers to jump across huge expanses. “Not everyone can just fly through towers like the energy sentients,” they say, chuckling. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient invites you to the City of Fire to the near north. “Best tattoo parlors in the land.” Gain 2 boost and 1 move[/b].
Your ears pop as you travel a great distance to location 664[/b].

1577.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1577.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a location just south of an elemental. Choose one:…or stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

choices.outcome: Go to 270[/b] and gain 1 health.
Go to 392[/b] and refresh all dice on your grid cards.
Go to 430[/b] and gain 1 move[/b].
Go to 462[/b] and gain 1 health.

1578.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1578.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to the entrance of a cave in which you might advance toward this goal. Choose one:Go to location 158[/b].Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1579.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1579.text: A helpful sentient peppers you with survival tips and insights. Gain up to 6 boost on your character; give any excess boost to other players.

158.action: ASK[/b] the sentient about their home
158.text: Seeing you gesture at the dark entrance behind them, they smile and clarify that it’s a cave. They live on this beach, exiled from their homeland to the east because they lost a race to an outsider, bringing shame to their family. They long for revenge. Gain sentient 1340[/b] and quest 1628[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

1580.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1580.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a temperate location featuring a flower. Choose one:Go to 119[/b] in a jungle.Go to 234[/b] in a swamp.Go to 685[/b] in a forest.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1581.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1581.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a location just south of where you can find an important ingredient for the cure. Choose one:Go to location 326[/b].Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1582.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1582.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a location just south of where you might find a sentient to hire. Choose one:Go to location 718[/b].Stay at your current location and gain $3.

1583.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1583.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a pleasant location featuring a treasure chest. Choose one:Go to 253[/b] on a mesa.Go to 416[/b] in a quiet cove.Go to 432[/b] along a beach.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1584.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1584.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a location just south of where you might find an animal. Choose one:Go to location 704[/b].Stay at your current location. The sentient gives you some fruit that may be enticing to animals you encounter (gain item 1224[/b]).

1585.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1585.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a temperate location featuring a tower. Choose one:Go to 349[/b] in the prairie.Go to 442[/b] in the desert.Go to 458[/b] along a canal.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1586.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1586.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a peaceful location featuring an orb. Choose one:Go to 198[/b] in some rolling hills.Go to 208[/b] in the mountains.Go to 279[/b] on a seaside cliff.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1587.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1587.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a location just outside a city. Choose one:Go to 186[/b], the entrance to Windmill Village.Go to 473[/b], the entrance to the City of Leaves.Go to 677[/b], the entrance to Treetrunk Village.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1588.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1588.text: A helpful sentient offers you some advice and a pep talk. Choose one:

choices.option: If you have not equipped your character’s personal item
choices.outcome: Gain 2 help[/b].

choices.option: If you have your character’s personal item but not an objective
choices.outcome: Gain up to 2 boost on it.

choices.option: If you have your character’s personal objective
choices.outcome: Gain any 2 skills.

1589.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1589.text: A helpful sentient gives you a spare fish trap (gain item 910[/b]) and offers to lead you to a location just south of where you will find the kraken. Choose one:Go to location 749[/b].Stay at your current location and gain 3 overpower[/b].

159.text: The sentients ask if you’re seeking the services of a smelter or tattoo artist:

choices.outcome: If you pay $3, the sentient shakes off some lava and joins you (gain sentient 1316[/b] and quest 1695[/b]; add the quest horizontally to your supply). If you don’t pay, they recommend that you earn your keep in the City of Fire to the west of here (gain 1 boost).
The sentient volunteers to accompany you. Gain sentient 1317[/b].

1590.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1590.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a location just south of where you might advance toward this goal. Choose one:Go to location 731[/b].Stay at your current location and gain 3 move[/b].

1591.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1591.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a temperate location featuring a good place to build. Choose one:Go to 185[/b] in the prairie.Go to 229[/b] on the edge of a cliff.Go to 272[/b] in the desert.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1592.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1592.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a location just outside a city. Choose one:Go to 238[/b], the entrance to the Eternal City.Go to 342[/b], the entrance to the Golden City.Go to 727[/b], the entrance to the City of Stone.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1593.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1593.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a temperate location featuring a trial; they warn you that it is possible to fail these trials. Choose one:Go to 110[/b], the Trial of Beauty.Go to 174[/b], the Trial of Endurance.Go to 184[/b], the Trial of Life.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1594.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1594.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a temperate location featuring a skeleton. Choose one:Go to 137[/b] in the highlands.Go to 700[/b] in a pasture.Go to 720[/b] in a bog.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1595.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1595.text: A helpful sentient offers to give you a basic item that can be crafted into a weapon. Gain item 1093[/b].

1596.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1596.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a location just south of where you might advance toward this goal. Choose one:Go to location 732[/b].Stay at your current location and gain 3 move[/b].

1597.action: PLEAD[/b] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1597.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a temperate location featuring an artifact. Choose one:Go to 187[/b] on the prairie.Go to 318[/b] in the jungle.Go to 339[/b] in the dustlands.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

160.text: The sentient offers to sell you an axe (item 1042[/b]) for $3. They also mention that there are opportunities for commerce in the city to the east (gain 1 boost).

161.action: TRADE[/b] your services to the sentient
161.text: Bashing the volcanic crust is the sentient’s responsibility, but they’re willing to share the load. They offer to either pay you (gain $5) or aid you on your journey (gain sentient 1315[/b]).

162.action: ASK[/b] a passerby about the city
162.text: A sentient heading out of the City of Fire recommends a tattoo parlor and a bakery, both on the same street. Gain 2 boost.

163.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you with a playful tone
163.text: The huge turtle is eager to have an audience, and it proudly spins on its shell—perhaps a trick they learned from a previous companion. Gain animal 813[/b].

164.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about your mission
164.text: “If you’re on a treasure hunt, there is a rare amulet in the eye of the volcano. Of course, if you like collecting things, you could try to win a duel instead.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1603[/b] (place it in the center).

1645.text: Each suspect knew the victim and was seen in the area around the time the crime was committed.
