You ask why they were here and receive the following answers:Shipwright: “I swear it wasn’t me. Why would I kill the best mechanic in the area? I drifted by here this morning so Timber could take a look at the motor I’m fiddling with. Damned thing is so loud, and even Timber couldn’t get it to quiet down!”Fisherman: “I can’t believe they’re gone. Just yesterday we went fishing together in the bay, and Timber caught a big ‘ole pike. Hey, a pike—ironic how that was also the murder weapon! They couldn’t stand the sight of blood, so I cleaned the fish and dropped it off this morning.”Recruiter: “I’m offended that my integrity is being called into question—I’m here to solve the murder, too! Timber was one of my top recruits. We had a friendly sparring session the last time I was here, but it was all in good fun. In fact, I left my bone sword here. You can see there isn’t a speck of blood on it.”

165.action: LINK[/b] to the ship’s nutritional system
165.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

1657.action: ACTIVATE[/b] the portals (if you don’t have the Teleportation spell, perform another action instead)
1657.text: The portals spring to life. Four of them show glimmers of distant locations; a small altar in front of the center portal suggests that you can choose another destination in exchange for a small sacrifice. Gain destiny 1604[/b], then rotate quest 1657[/b] and add it to your grid, which adds an ENTER[/b] action that you can use only on location 690[/b] (if you do, read entry 1657[/b] in the move[/b] storybook).

166.action: GREET[/b] the occupant of the house from a safe distance
166.text: The reclusive occupant is hesitant but hospitable—they help you steer clear of the dangerous tree to the right. Soon you’re regaling them with tales of your adventure, and while they don’t invite you inside, they offer you some food and a nice compass— they rarely leave this area, so they don’t need it. Gain item 968[/b] and 1 health.

167.text: The sentient is too tired to say much at first, but they open up after pouring themselves a cup of magma and giving you something more palatable. They are a smelter, one of many among their people. Their life is a grind, and they long for the spark of something new and adventurous. If you invite them to join you, gain sentient 1316[/b]. Otherwise, gain 1 health.

168.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and 2 help[/b]; you may continue.

1680.action: INTIMIDATE[/b] a rowdy group of travelers
1680.text: A group of sentients approaches, hanging on each other, drinking, and singing. At first they think you’re kidding when you turn them away, but you stand your ground and they head back east. Add 1 token to quest 1680[/b].

1687.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1688.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1689.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

169.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
169.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, with enough help from the fire sentients to the southeast of here, you could rebuild your spaceship.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1607[/b] (place it in the center).

1690.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1691.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1692.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

170.text: The rock seems adamant about remaining on whatever invisible axis that keeps it tethered to the arch. You can spin it faster temporarily, but it always returns to its original speed. Gain 1 boost and continue.

1701.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1705.action: GREET[/b] the rescue team with gratitude and open arms, ending your adventure
1705.text: The game ends as you head back to your homeworld, and you achieve an epic victory if you have also completed the mission. Otherwise, it is impressive that you survived long enough to control your destiny, and your knowledge of the planet will benefit you in the future.

171.text: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

172.text: As soon as the ship’s crew notices you, they eagerly steer the boat over to pick you up. They give you some kind of meat jerky (gain 1 health) and offer to drop you off northwest at some levitating stones on 251[/b], northeast near a treasure chest on 253[/b], southeast at a monstrous elemental on 168[/b], or southwest at a glowing tree on 166[/b] (or you may remain here).

173.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1315[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

174.action: PERSUADE[/b] the judges (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
174.text: The judges welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the take-ENDURE[/b][/b] action.

175.action: PERSUADE[/b] the sentient to let you taste the sparkling substance (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
175.text: The sentient’s eyes shift to the left and right, then they gesture for you to approach. Gain item 867[/b].

176.text: It’s hard to get their attention, but finally one steps away from the twister. “Can’t you see we’re busy dancing?” they say. You quickly improvise and say that you were hoping to join them, and without hesitation they pull you away. You copy their movements, and within a few minutes you feel the elation of the dance. Gain ability 1469[/b] and 1 morale.

177.action: ASK[/b] a nearby sentient about the flags
177.text: The sentient explains that these flags mark the boundaries of wind sentient territory. Each of these five particular flags represents one of the five original wind sentients who decided their people would stop roaming the world and would instead settle down in this place. They kindly ask that you not walk north through this field. Gain ability 1470[/b] and 2 boost.

178.text: The sentient isn’t looking for anything in particular, but they’re open to trading one of the flowers if you pay $2 or lose a card of any value from your grid/reserve. If you agree, gain flora 1076[/b]. If not, they offer you a breath of fresh air (gain item 1212[/b]).

179.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

018.action: PICK[/b] the lock on the gate
018.text: The old padlock creaks open, giving you a burst of confidence. Gain 2 morale and go deeper into the planet to cave 045[/b].

180.action: GREET[/b] the sentient with respect and reverence
180.text: The elder responds well to your approach, and they ask you to join them in the shade for a refreshment (gain 1 health). They mostly talk about flags, one of the ways wind sentients can see wind patterns from a distance. If you’re interested, you could place some flags in the surrounding grasslands (gain quest 1669[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply). If not, gain 1 boost and continue.

181.action: ASK[/b] about the contents of the chest
181.text: The sentients eye each other warily, hesitant to talk. But your genuine curiosity helps them open up, and they share that the chest contains an extremely rare seed. They have been tasked with guarding it until the day comes for the seed to be planted and spread Spor across the world. Gain ability 1470[/b] and 2 boost.

182.action: TAUNT[/b] the sentient despite them having the upper hand
182.text: The sentient pauses, not expecting such big words from a comparatively small alien. Then they break into laughter, asking you to repeat the insult as they call over their friend. They introduce themselves as the Spormonger, and they offer to accompany you. Gain sentient 1309[/b].

183.action: TALK[/b] with the sentient while they dance
183.text: The sentient is practicing for something called the Trial of Life, a rite of initiation for wind sentients and anyone else who embraces the wind culture. It’s found to the east. Gain 2 boost and continue.

184.action: PERSUADE[/b] the queen (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
184.text: The queen nods in approval and welcomes you to participate in the trial. Continue with the help-ENLIVEN[/b][/b] action.

185.action: ASK[/b] a passing sentient about the ruins
185.text: The sentient explains, “This was once some sort of shelter, though definitely not built by wind sentients, who live in tents and windmills.” You could restore it to its former glory or head inside to see if there’s anything remaining among the rubble. Gain 1 boost and either 1 move[/b] or 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

186.action: ASK[/b] a passerby about the city
186.text: A sentient heading out of Windmill Valley recommends the map vendor and the seed market. Gain $1 and 2 boost.

187.action: ENTERTAIN[/b] the sentients with a haunting-yet-commanding tune on the horn
187.text: All around you, sentients kneel at the power of your song. The artifact is yours. Gain item 1003[/b] and perform no other location actions here.

188.action: TRADE[/b] for one of the blades
188.text: The sentient offers to sell you the sharpest blade for $5. If you pay, gain item 1189[/b]. If you don’t pay, they give you some scrap metal instead (gain item 1184[/b]).

189.text: A flat-bottom ferry drifts over to you, and the captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost and you may go northwest to see the Traveler on 193[/b], northeast to a charming confluence on 398[/b], north to a tornado on 194[/b], or southwest to a dancing sentient on 183[/b].
The captain advises you not to wade across the wetlands (gain 1 boost).

190.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
190.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, the occupant of this cave—while incredibly dangerous—may be the key to a triumphant escape.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1602[/b] (place it in the center).

191.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1338[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

192.action: ASK[/b] the sentient if you can have a sip of the liquid in the jug
192.text: With the gusts of wind, you really need to shout to get the sentient’s attention. They give you the jug but advise against drinking its contents. Gain item 866[/b].

193.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
193.text: The Traveler grows somber at the prospect of your departure. “If you must leave, legend tells of an elder dragon that is unbothered by the void of space. If it exists, you may find it in a cave to the west of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1602[/b] (place it in the center).

194.text: You shout at the sentients over the roar of the tornado, and they stop long enough to hear you out. Remarkably, as soon as they stop moving, the twister dissipates. The sentients fly over to you, explaining that they are dueling for their family’s honor. You suggest that instead of hurting each other, they both cast the most powerful spell they can muster, and you will judge the results. The sentients, tired from their battle, are grateful for the solution. Gain spell 1379[/b].

195.action: HIRE[/b] a passing sentient to build a structure
195.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $7 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a casino (1271[/b]), well (1275[/b]), theater (1276[/b]), tavern (1277[/b]), school (1280[/b]), or training grounds (1293[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

196.action: LINK[/b] to the ship’s nutritional system
196.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

197.action: ASK[/b] the sentient about their job
197.text: With pride, they share that they’re a cartographer. Their responsibilities include a combination of mapmaking, wind measurement, and seed positioning. You’re curious whether they have any maps for sale, and they reply that for $5 they can either sell you a skeleton map (gain item 1254[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location [view page 11 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region A]) or a tower map (gain item 1259[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location [view page 16 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region A]). If you don’t pay, gain 2 boost instead.

198.text: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

199.text: With the sentient watching with bemusement, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1036[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1161[/b]. Otherwise, the chest attempts to eat you; lose 1 health.

020.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

200.action: PERSUADE[/b] a passing metal sentient to guide you through the clouds (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
200.text: The sentient furtively agrees to help. Choose one:

choices.option: Accept directions to a bandit hideout
choices.outcome: Gain 3 look[/b] and continue.
Roll 3 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. If you pay 1 move[/b], you successfully follow the sentient to the bandit hideout (go to interior 563[/b]). Otherwise go north to 205[/b].

201.text: The sentient swivels in midair, surprised by your sudden appearance. “State your name and intent!” they say. Unable to find you in their database, they explain that they patrol the area around the King of Thieves to the northeast, and they don’t want any trouble from you if you head there. Gain 1 boost.

202.text: If you pay $4, they agree to accompany you in exchange for a few coins (gain sentient 1337[/b]). If you don’t pay, they instead encourage you to push the button on the runecaster to see what happens (gain 2 engage).

203.action: PERSUADE[/b] the sentient to let you into the building (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
203.text: Without ever meeting your eyes, the sentient accepts your bribe. Inside you find a sentient who could not be happier to see a friendly face. Gain sentient 1349[/b].

204.action: GREET[/b] the occupants of the house
204.text: You’re happy to see some curious faces appear at the windows of the house. Choose one:

choices.option: Share a story with the occupants
choices.outcome: They’re eager to hear more tales of your adventure, and they invite you inside for dinner. You weave a tale that eventually puts them to sleep. Gain 1 health and go to interior 556[/b].

choices.option: Negotiate with the residents to buy their house and its contents (pay $35; you may later repeat this action for this option only if you don’t choose it now)
choices.outcome: Gain items 907[/b], 912[/b], 1040[/b], and 1158[/b], and structure 1688[/b]; you may place each of these items in your reserve or your grid.

205.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about what makes the lotus special
205.text: “Various sentients have different traditions; some simply smell the lotus while others eat it raw or brew it into a tincture. I’ve heard good and bad things.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

206.action: PICK[/b] the lock on the treasure chest
206.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 951[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1163[/b]. Otherwise, a claw shoots out of the treasure chest and grabs a few coins from your pocket (lose $2).

207.action: PERSUADE[/b] the king (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
207.text: The King of Thieves nods in approval and welcomes you to participate in the trial. Continue with the take-BYPASS[/b][/b] action.

208.text: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

209.action: MIMIC[/b] the animal’s swift, nimble movements
209.text: To mimic the animal, you skitter around the clearing, keeping a safe distance from the creature. Your comical effort convinces the animal that you are friend, not foe. Gain animal 828[/b].

021.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

210.text: The sentient waves but refuses to come any closer to the object. Over the howl of the wind they yell something about it being a powerful magnet, a trap set by metal sentients for unsuspecting travelers. Gain 2 boost and continue.

211.text: Sell any number of items of value $10 or higher, gaining the total value of the sold items, plus $X more. If you choose not to sell, the sentient asks that you fetch a rare item for them (gain quest 1658[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

212.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
212.text: The animal lumbers in your direction, metallic joints scraping and grinding. The creature is eager to entertain, and soon it’s rolling around on the ground in front of you. Gain animal 829[/b].

213.action: LURE[/b] a guard away from the building
213.text: As soon as the guard leaves to investigate, you dash toward the forcefield and then ease through it. Suffer 1 heat damage and go to interior 513[/b].

214.action: HAIL[/b] a ride over to the cave
214.text: A guide offers you a piggyback ride for a $3 fee, advising you on the trickster sentinel waiting inside the cave. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to cave 034[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The guide agrees that you’re better off not entering the City of Shadows and instead recommends seeking a more interesting destination via the orb to the southwest. Gain 1 boost.

215.action: PICK[/b] the lock on a side entrance
215.text: The door swings open after some difficulty. Go to interior 557[/b].

216.action: BOAST[/b] to the proprietor of your collection
216.text: The museum docent isn’t easily impressed. Choose one:

choices.option: ( If you have an item or animal worth $10 or more) Show off one of your more impressive acquisitions
choices.outcome: The docent is impressed and ushers you inside (go to interior 564[/b]).
Go to interior 564[/b].
You’re compelled to do something you can truly boast about. Gain destiny 1603[/b] (place it in the center).

217.action: PERSUADE[/b] the owner of the fence to let you through (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
217.text: The sentient hovers nearby, admiring their handiwork. “This fence has been in my family for generations, primarily to keep snow pigs from digging up our land. You’re welcome to pass, though I’d also recommend the lodestone to the east—it’s popular with tourists.” Gain 2 boost; you may go north to 222[/b] or east to 218[/b].

218.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
218.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “This world offers powers beyond the normal grasp of humans. Mastering magic—like that found in this lodestone—presents an opportunity for you to travel great distances in a single step.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1604[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

219.action: ASK[/b] the sentient what they’re guarding
219.text: The sentient proudly puffs their chest and proclaims that they are the eastern sentry of the greatest energy source in the metal kingdom. “It powers the City of Sha—” They cut themselves off, realizing they’ve said too much. They throw some shiny coins as a distraction before flying away. Gain $2 and 1 boost.

022.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

220.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this harsh planet
220.text: The Traveler grows somber at the prospect of your departure. “If you must leave, you could partner with the circuit sentients—they have the technology but not the willpower to disconnect themselves. But please also consider staying here—yes, it’s cold in this area, but nothing that a thick coat or fire can’t handle.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1606[/b] (place it in the center).

221.action: COAX[/b] the animal by feigning injury
221.text: The creature takes pity on you and tries to help. Gain animal 808[/b].

222.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
222.text: The distraught pup is eager to find a friend and tries to steer you northeast. Gain animal 810[/b].

223.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestone. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

224.action: HIRE[/b] a fellow traveler to build a structure in the valley
224.text: The sentient offers you their services for a $7 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a cartographer (1270[/b]), embassy (1274[/b]), tower (1281[/b]), or outpost (1292[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost). You may continue.

225.action: ENTERTAIN[/b] the occupants of the tent with a bedtime story
225.text: You weave a plodding tale that puts both sentients to sleep. After helping yourself to their food, you slip inside the tent. Gain 1 health and go to interior 551[/b].

226.action: ASK[/b] a passerby about the beam of light
226.text: A sentient informs you that at its base is something called the Gauntlet of Life, one of the twelve most precious, ancient artifacts in the world. They have a friend who once tried to harness the energy of the Gauntlet, and they came quite close. “They started with the number 4 before choosing incorrectly,” they recall before walking away. Gain 1 boost and 1 look[/b].

227.text: It takes longer than you’d like, but you finally locate the owner of the vehicle. They offer to sell you the flying carpet for $8. If you buy the carpet, gain vehicle 985[/b]. Otherwise, the owner expresses their gratitude for you not simply stealing their vehicle, and they offer you a ride down to the base of the cliff. If you accept their offer, go north to 232[/b]; otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

228.action: ASK[/b] the sentient about the tower and the surrounding area
228.text: The sentient is part of a group of messengers who use the towers to travel to faraway lands. They gesture to their homeland—the swamps at the base of the cliff—saying there are other towers to the west and a place called the Eternal City to the north. Gain 2 boost. You may continue with an engage--TRANSMIT[/b][/b] action (the result is found in entry 228[/b] in the Book of Secrets).

229.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about Moonstone Mountain
229.text: “I’m sorry to say that there’s nothing on the mountain itself. However, legend says that when the moon dips low enough in the sky to fill the void in the mountain, those who look upon it will be granted an ancient power.” Gain 1 boost. You may lose 1 time to wait for the moon; if you do, gain lesson 1432[/b].

023.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

230.action: HIRE[/b] a passing sentient to build a structure
230.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $6 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a barn (1266[/b]), winery (1272[/b]), windmill (1273[/b]), stables (1279[/b]), hatchery (1285[/b]), hunting tower (1286[/b]), crystal mine (1287[/b]), garden (1288[/b]), or greenhouse (1291[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

231.action: PERSUADE[/b] an insider to look the other way as you borrow the artifact (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
231.text: You casually stroll away with the artifact hidden away. If you pay 3 boost, your attempts to use the artifact are successful (gain item 1001[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

232.text: Following your instincts, you speak to the light as if it understands you. When the light forms eyes, it’s almost like you’re looking into your own soul. Gain 2 morale.

233.action: PERSUADE[/b] the judges (you may pay $1 to reduce this cost to 0)
233.text: The judges welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the look-TRANSLATE[/b][/b] action.

234.text: The sentients look at each other before responding, their trust for outsiders apparently quite low. After introductions are made, you move to step toward them, and they insist that you stop. “The springblade lilies in this swamp have a taste for landwalkers like you. We advise that you walk around them, not over them.” Gain 1 boost.

235.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about the dangers that await you in this area
235.text: “Beware of the energy elemental to the northeast. It will look deep into your soul in ways I cannot explain. I hope someday the energy sentients will come to their senses and destroy the ancient beast instead of just chaining it to these lands.” Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b].

236.action: TRANSMIT[/b] a signal to your homeworld
236.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

choices.outcome: The sentient offers to sell you a torch (1086[/b]) for $4 and/or they can pay $5 to gain 1 card in your grid or reserve (lose that card). They also mention that there are opportunities for commerce in the city to the east (gain 1 boost).

choices.option: Interact with the orb thanks to the sentient’s assistance
choices.outcome: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

238.action: ASK[/b] a passerby about the city
238.text: A sentient heading out of the Eternal City recommends the lantern store and the cafe. Gain 2 boost.

239.action: ASK[/b] a sentient for help at the treehouse
239.text: The sentient signals the shopkeeper, who explains that they typically sell lanterns to energy sentients— that’s where they sleep. But the lanterns also function as lighting instruments, and they offer to sell you a special version. You may pay $6 to gain item 953[/b] or decline; either way, gain 1 boost.

024.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

240.text: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

241.action: TRADE[/b] a crystal you have (lose it) for this crystal (if you don’t have a crystal, select a different action)
241.text: The stone sentient accepts the exchange. Gain item 1161[/b].

242.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and 2 help[/b]; you may continue.

243.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1325[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

244.text: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

245.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

246.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—I can’t stay, but can I offer you some food?” Gain 2 health.

247.action: DEFUSE[/b] the tension and assure the sentients that they can work together to find common ground
247.text: All three sentients turn to you, shocked that an outsider would dare speak in the Council of Three. “We’ve been debating our role in this world for centuries, and you think you can just walk in here and suddenly we’ll all get along? This guy, am I right?” The sentients share a laugh and mock you mercilessly, even after you turn and walk away. You’re left with a little hope. Gain 2 morale.

248.action: ASK[/b] a passing sentient about the tree
248.text: The sentient explains that the tree is a gift from leaf sentients, an offering of knowledge. It can’t fully be understood until you read the words yourself, so they teach you some basic orthography. Gain ability 1494[/b].

249.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you with a friendly chirp
249.text: You kneel and beckon toward the creature, acting as welcoming and harmless as possible. Gain animal 823[/b].

025.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

250.action: ASK[/b] a passing sentient whether the pink box is theirs
250.text: “No,” the sentient says, “but watch out for those thorns if you take it.” Gain 1 boost and either 1 take[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

251.action: ASK[/b] a passing sentient about the spinning stones
251.text: The sentient laughs. “Oh, that’s a trap. See the sand centipede in the pit? It’s trying to lure unsuspecting tourists for a midday snack.” Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

252.text: The sentient boasts that they are a falconer—they control marrow vultures who scout the surrounding area. The bones they wear reflect their craft. You may either gain a marrow vulture (animal 826[/b]) with 1 boost on it, or gain sentient 1331[/b].

253.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 886[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1160[/b]. Otherwise, the treasure chest bursts into flames, scalding your hands (suffer 1 heat damage).

254.action: ASK[/b] some passing sentients about the pits
254.text: A bulky sentient clarifies that these pits are animal tracks heading north, where you can see a faint cloud of red dust rising in the distance. They offer to sell you a wok to use in case you hunt the animal. You may pay $2 to gain item 907[/b] or decline; either way, gain 1 boost.

255.text: Before the sentients get too close, you draw a line in the sand and dare the sentients to cross it. They apologize for the confusion, saying that they’re just looking for someone to complete their hunting trio. Gain sentient 1333[/b], 1 boost, and quest 1649[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

256.text: Placing your hand on the skull, you breathe with intention, eyes closed. The animal appears in your mind, staring at you with an intense calm. Choose one:

choices.outcome: With gratitude, the animal departs into the darkness. Gain 1 morale and 1 health.
With acceptance, the animal steps forward into your mind. Gain ability 1500[/b].

257.text: The beasts fly away, leaving you alone with the sentient. “Thank you for doing that,” they say, their eyes downcast. “I came to this arid land in the hopes of planting seeds with a friend to the north, but I stumbled into this trap. Please, take these seeds and bring life to this accursed desert.” Gain item 1021[/b].

258.text: The peddler offers you the opportunity to purchase one item (gain the card). You may pay $4 for the mace (969[/b]), $6 for the lyre (970[/b]), $8 for the sword (888[/b]), or $3 for the climbing shoes (963[/b]). You may also sell the peddler 1 card from your grid or reserve to gain its value. Afterwards, seeing how you’re sweltering in the heat, they recommend that you travel to the east or south.

259.text: After a few tries, you perfectly mimic the animal’s chirps, punctuated by a few assertive stomps on the ground. The animal changes its route to follow you. Gain animal 824[/b].

026.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

260.action: COAX[/b] the animal with an overabundance of gesticulation
260.text: It scuttles over to you and looks for you to lead the way. Gain animal 825[/b].

261.action: PERSUADE[/b] the judges (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
261.text: The judges welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the overpower-HUNT[/b][/b] action.

262.action: ASK[/b] a passerby about the city
262.text: A sentient headed out of the City of Bones toward the cooler climate to the south recommends the casino and the bone market. Gain 2 boost; you may continue with the move-DESCEND[/b][/b] action.

263.text: As you hum a tune you learned as a child, the stonelike bulbs around the flower begin to move—they’re all part of the same organism! The song seems to placate the flower, and one of the bulbs pours water into your open palm. Gain 1 morale and 1 health; you may continue.

264.action: WHISPER[/b] to a passing sentient, keeping your voice low out of respect in case the ruins are a sacred place
264.text: The sentient reveals that these ruins are linked to a secret society of sinew sentients who control the legendary Bone Harness. Within the ruins, you’ll need to activate a circular blue button to gain access to an ancient test. Gain 1 boost and continue.

265.action: PERSUADE[/b] the captor to free their captive (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
265.text: If you paid at least $1 for this action, the bounty hunter releases the circuit sentient to you (gain sentient 1314[/b]). Otherwise, gain 2 help[/b] and continue.

266.action: ASK[/b] the proprietor about the cost to enter the building
266.text: The owner of the casino welcomes you inside—entry is free. Go to interior 558[/b].

267.text: Your offer of a trade gets their attention. Lose an item or flora to earn the sentient’s allegiance (gain sentient 1306[/b]). Also gain 1 health from the oasis.

268.text: Despite the heat, you manage to lower the temperature between the two sentients and convince them to walk away. Neither will speak to you afterward. Gain 2 boost.

269.action: SHOUT[/b] for assistance as the storm approaches
269.text: You hear a voice in your head compelling you to move east to safety and security if you just offer a little help in return. Without realizing it, you find your feet walking in that direction. Go to 446[/b] and gain 1 help[/b].

027.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

270.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 924[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, the chest clamps on your leg like a trap; gain 1 boost and (if possible) lose 1 skill.

271.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
271.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, send a signal to your homeworld. There is a tower to the northeast of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

272.action: ASK[/b] some passing sentients about the hovering rocks
272.text: The fleshy sentients seem pleased that you would ask. “We sinew sentients believe that the number 3 is sacred—at least, most of us do. Three schools of magic, three hunters in a pack, and so on. Some say that these pillars of energy are the origin of this tradition. If it’s too hot for you here, please head northwest or northeast.” Gain 3 boost.

273.action: LINK[/b] to the ship’s nutritional system
273.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

274.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

275.action: ASK[/b] a sentient about the lotus
275.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

276.action: BOAST[/b] of your skills at dice and card games
276.text: The sentients are delighted and invite you to duel against the winner of the next game to see if you can back up your grandstanding. Place card 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

277.text: Your attempts at mimicry confuse the beast enough that there’s time for you to dash north. You may go to 282[/b].

278.action: SHOUT[/b] for someone to grant you safe passage, proclaiming an unwritten rule from your pursuit of knowledge across the galaxy
278.text: Murmurs from within the wall carry across the quiet desert. You hear the creaking sound of rusty hinges, and a hole opens in the wall, revealing a slim view of the north. You may either go north to 283[/b] or continue.

279.action: ASK[/b] the sentient about the orb

choices.option: Ask the sentient about the interior of the orb
choices.outcome: The sentient explains that the inside of the orb contains a map of this region. They appreciate your curiosity, and they offer to travel with you. Gain sentient 1344[/b].

choices.option: Ask the sentient about the exterior of the orb
choices.outcome: The sentient explains that the outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

028.text: It’s lonely standing here all day, and you appeal to the sentinel’s desire for companionship. They share that they miss the days of training for this job, as at least then they could flirt with other sentinels. Now they just stand here all day waiting for crystal collectors. Eventually they let you pass, and they look forward to seeing you again. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave 088[/b].

280.action: ASK[/b] the sentient about the surrounding area
280.text: The sentient shares how the sand sentients once occupied the monolithic buildings to the south, but they now prefer to live outside with few material attachments. Gain 2 boost.

281.action: ASK[/b] a passing sand sentient about the building
281.text: The sentient explains that this structure is a Sand Cathedral, a place for sand sentients to research the history and behaviors of other cultures. Gain 1 boost and go to interior 795[/b].

282.action: ASK[/b] a sand sentient about the beam of light in the distance
282.text: The sand sentient communicates directly into your mind. “Many have tried, but few have succeeded in climbing to the top of the Memory Palace to the north.” Gain 1 move[/b]. The sentient offers you the choice of purpose (gain quest 1630[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply) or enhancement (gain ability 1515[/b]).

283.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1308[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

284.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the crystal. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

285.action: LINK[/b] to the ship’s nutritional system
285.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

286.action: PERSUADE[/b] the sentient to join you (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
286.text: The multi-faced sentient takes a vote with itself, and two out of three favor joining you. Gain sentient 1342[/b].

287.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about your mission
287.text: “If you’re trying to better understand the origin of life on this planet, consider the wonders within the Memory Palace. Navigation might be slightly easier than cautious climbing, though you’ll miss the spectacular view.” Gain 2 boost and continue.

288.text: You accentuate your ears and chirp just like the animal, which seems to endear it to you. Gain animal 834[/b].

289.action: HAIL[/b] a ride from the balloon
289.text: The balloon drifts over to you and the captain invites you aboard if you’re heading northeast (if so, go to 466[/b]). If not, they suggest you check out the impressive skeleton they sailed over to the southwest (gain 1 boost).

029.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

290.text: Placing your hand on the skull, you breathe with intention, eyes closed. The animal appears in your mind, staring at you with an intense calm. Choose one:

choices.outcome: With gratitude, the animal departs into the darkness. Gain 1 morale and 1 health.
With acceptance, the animal steps forward into your mind. Gain ability 1473[/b].

291.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about your mission
291.text: “If you’re big game hunting, few animals exceed the size of the sand centipede hidden under the desert here. For a safer approach to achieving legendary acclaim, maybe just try to win a duel instead?” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1603[/b] (place it in the center).

292.action: BEFRIEND[/b] a sentient heading into the cave
292.text: The sentient, a shady character with a glint in their eye, takes a liking to you. They lead you into the cave, opening an ironclad barrier with a swipe of a card and shoving you inside. Go to cave 085[/b].

293.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

294.action: MIMIC[/b] the sounds of a prowling predator to awaken the occupants from their slumber
294.text: Your growl echoes across the quiet night, sending the campers stumbling out into the desert. You slip inside the tent. Go to interior 552[/b].

295.text: The sentient speaks with a sense of pride about their work. The orbs they create are wayfinders to help wayward travelers identify their general location. They’re made of glass, but the glass liquefies upon touch to allow entry. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The interior of the orb displays a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 4 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NE-2. Gain 1 boost.
The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Ask the sentient if there’s anything about the surrounding area you should know
choices.outcome: The sentient assures you that you’ll find a more temperate climate to the north. Gain 1 health and 1 boost.

296.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestone. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

297.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

298.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestone. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

299.action: TRANSMIT[/b] a signal to your homeworld
299.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

030.text: It’s lonely standing here all day, and you appeal to the sentinel’s desire for companionship. They share that they miss the days of training for this job, as at least then they could share a meal with their fellow sentinels. Now they just stand here all day waiting for bankers to brush by them as if they’re nothing. Eventually they let you pass, and they look forward to seeing you again. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave 090[/b].

300.action: COAX[/b] the animal into calming down
300.text: The animal is suffering, but it at least sees that you are trying to help. If you pay 2 help[/b], you remove a thorn from the animal’s head (gain animal 841[/b]). If not, gain 2 help[/b] and continue.

301.text: As the creature hovers nearby, you feel some part of you—an aura, if you can call it that—extend toward the sentient and make contact. The sentient proceeds to speak to you fluently, welcoming you to witness the ceremony below. They describe with nonchalance that members of their sect are in the process of extracting the last of a sacrificial water sentient’s life force. Either gain 1 boost or lose 1 non-energy sentient to gain item 1243[/b] and lose the energy curse (if you have it).

302.action: HIRE[/b] the falconer to send messages to your friends
302.text: The old sentient offers you a deal: If you pay $1, they will send birds to each of your crewmembers, delivering a message of hope in your own handwriting (each player gains 1 morale). You may also or instead pay $3, in which case they’ll join you on your journey (gain sentient 1331[/b]). If you don’t pay, they give you an egg instead (gain 1 health).

303.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestones. They speak to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

304.action: TALK[/b] to a one-eyed guard while they load the cannon
304.text: You’ve picked the worst possible time to chat with the guard, as there is a pirate ship on the horizon that they’re trying to ward away. The guard tells you to take cover inside the outpost. Go to interior 566[/b].

305.action: PICK[/b] the lock on the front door
305.text: The lock pops open, and you follow the winding staircase to the top of the lighthouse. Go to interior 597[/b].

306.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the island. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

307.text: Placing your hand on the skull, you breathe with intention, eyes closed. The animal appears in your mind, staring at you with an intense calm. Choose one:

choices.outcome: With gratitude, the animal departs into the darkness. Gain 1 morale and 1 health.
With acceptance, the animal steps forward into your mind. Gain ability 1487[/b].

308.action: INTERACT[/b] with the animal or the orb

choices.outcome: The animal is clearly in pain, but it can’t resist your playful gesture. You notice a large gash on its back. Gain 1 help[/b] and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue with the help-HEAL[/b][/b] or overpower-RELIEVE[/b][/b] action.
The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

309.action: BOAST[/b] to the pirates in a playful way
309.text: The crew of the pirate ship is soon cheering for your bold, boisterous boasts. They invite you aboard and regale you with food (gain 1 health). Before you leave, they give you a map to various treasure chests (gain item 1260[/b]) and send you on your way.

031.text: It’s lonely standing here all day, and you appeal to the sentinel’s desire for companionship. They share that they miss the days of training for this job, as at least then they could play games with other sentinels during breaks. Now they just stand here all day waiting for anyone who dares to face the serpent. Eventually they let you pass, and they look forward to seeing you again. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave 091[/b].

310.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

311.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

312.action: HAIL[/b] a ride from the boat’s captain
312.text: The captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride northwest close to the Universal Academy on 316[/b], northeast to a curious riverside on 318[/b], southeast to a blue animal on 308[/b], or southwest to a purple shard on 306[/b].
The captain gives you a fresh fish and bids you farewell (gain 1 health).

313.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
313.text: Emboldened by the other birds, the closest creature shows no fear in paddling over to you. Gain animal 816[/b].

314.action: SHOUT[/b] to see whether anyone claims ownership of the boat
314.text: A sentient emerges from a shoreside cave, blinking in the sun. They hand you a mask, cautioning you to wear it if you go deep into the cave. Gain item 964[/b]; you may go to cave 037[/b].

315.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
315.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, with enough effort you could send a signal from a tower to those looking for you.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

316.text: It’s a bit like talking to your cats—it doesn’t make sense to you, but it delights the creature. Gain animal 843[/b].

317.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
317.text: The animal eagerly stumbles into the water next to you, its chest heaving. While you whisper to it in a soothing voice, another animal comes into view, a massive lizard with thick, stone-like scales. It doesn’t seem intimidated by you or the other animal, but after its eyes dart around the various boulders that surround you, it leaves you alone. Gain animal 851[/b].

318.action: PERSUADE[/b] the long-eared guards hidden in the bushes to look the other way as you borrow the artifact
318.text: You casually stroll away with the artifact hidden away. If you pay 2 boost, your attempts to use the artifact are successful (gain item 1008[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

319.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
319.text: The tiny creature seems to want to take a break from its task, and your gentle coaxing is all the excuse it needs. Gain animal 817[/b].

032.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

320.action: TRANSMIT[/b] a signal to your homeworld
320.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

321.action: ASK[/b] the sentient about this place
321.text: The sentient shares that this is the Universal Academy, where students gather from around the world to learn magic. You are welcome to join (go to interior 600[/b]) or stay outside (gain 1 boost).

322.action: TALK[/b] to the sentient about the flower
322.text: The little sentient swells with pride over their creation, a special flower arrangement they made for extra credit. Someday they hope to pass the Trial of Beauty to the distant northeast and become an honorary leaf sentient. Gain 2 boost.

323.action: ASK[/b] a question about the diagram on the chalkboard
323.text: The instructor explains that the triangle represents the three types of magic: life, spirit, and mind. Today they’re focusing on life mana. Gain lesson 1419[/b].

324.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
324.text: The beautiful creature seems to glow when you try to interact with it, and its energy fills you with warmth. The animal is suffering, though, and needs your help. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

325.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

326.action: COAX[/b] the animal into trusting you
326.text: You place your palm on the golden web, letting the creature know through the vibrations that you are neither predator nor prey. Gain animal 819[/b].

327.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1039[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain $10. Otherwise, if you haven’t already disarmed the chest, the chest strikes your lower jaw; you’re more embarrassed than hurt (lose 1 morale).

328.action: PERSUADE[/b] the guard to let you pass (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
328.text: The sentient explains that the encampment is a place for caravans to stop briefly before continuing their journey. They agree to guide you to either the city to the northwest (332[/b]) or the market to the north (333[/b]). Gain sentient 1323[/b] and go to one of those locations.

329.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about whether this sentient could help you escape this planet
329.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, this sentient’s quest offers a dangerous-yet-compelling option for you. I recommend listening to them.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1602[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

033.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

330.action: ASK[/b] the Traveler about the husk
330.text: “Gold sentients aren’t born with a husk—the human equivalent of a skeleton. Rather, they all start off more like a golden slug seeking a shell. It’s a coming-of-age process to find the right husk after it’s shed by a gilded beetle, and sometimes it takes multiple husks to find the right match. Sometimes it’s a brand-new husk; other times it’s a husk passed down from one generation to the next.” Gain 2 boost.

331.text: The act of talking to a tree is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

332.action: ASK[/b] a passerby about the village
332.text: A sentient heading out of the Gilded Village recommends the dice casino and the guildhall at the top of the tower. They kindly give you the password to enter the city. Gain $1, 2 boost, and 1 engage[/b].

333.action: ASK[/b] the shop owner what they’re selling
333.text: The sentient counts off a number of items, including a welding tool, a vented jacket, and some special goggles. Gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b]; you may continue.

choices.option: Ask the sentient what happened to them
choices.outcome: The sentient says that they were gambling to the northwest, and they bet more than they could afford. This suffering is their punishment. They beg for your help to pay off their debt, and they offer you part of their collection for the duel. Gain a random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card; you can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions) and quest 1682[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

choices.option: Ask the sentient about the orb
choices.outcome: The sentient explains that the outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

335.action: TALK[/b] to the peddlers about recent news
335.text: The peddlers nonchalantly mention the gold elemental to the west, but they seem excited about the trial happening in the northeast. You may pay $5 to gain a compass (968[/b]), $6 to gain a pickaxe (896[/b]), or $7 to gain a flare gun (961[/b]). You may also sell up to 2 items to the vendors at their listed value.

336.action: PERSUADE[/b] the caravan to help you cross over to them (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
336.text: A few riders break off from the group and exchange words with you before slinging a harpoon across the gap. You may use the attached rope to cross the divide (go north to 341[/b] and gain 1 morale) or cut the harpoon free (gain item 959[/b]; you may not move north from this location).

337.action: HAIL[/b] a ride into the city
337.text: It takes a while, but you eventually convince the transport to let you hitch a ride north past the majestic monument. Gain 1 boost and go to city 529[/b].

338.action: PERSUADE[/b] the doorman to let you in (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
338.text: The well-dressed doorman leads you to a side room, points out the extract in the fancy vase, and leaves you alone there. Gain ability 1463[/b] and go to interior 570[/b].

339.action: PERSUADE[/b] a guard to look the other way as you borrow the artifact (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
339.text: The guard feigns distraction as you pick up the artifact and stroll away. However, the utility of the artifact eludes you. If you pay 4 boost, your attempts to use the artifact are successful (gain item 999[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

034.text: It’s lonely standing here all day, and you appeal to the sentinel’s desire for companionship. They share that they miss the days of training for this job, as at least then they could chat with other sentinels. Now they just stand here all day waiting for anyone with the password. Eventually they let you pass, and they look forward to seeing you again. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave 094[/b].

340.action: HAIL[/b] a ride from the boat’s captain
340.text: The captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride northwest to a glass orb on 503[/b], northeast to a gleeful sentient on 505[/b], or southwest to a molten elemental on 446[/b].
The captain gives you a fresh fish and bids you farewell (gain 1 health).

341.action: TRADE[/b] into the Gold Emblem in the presence of the judges (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
341.text: Place cards 792[/b], 793[/b], and 794[/b] on the table, then begin the Trial of Negotiation. The gold leader gestures to their merchant companions, introducing them as Minic, Bastia, and Lak. Starting with only a simple sprocket (a red token), you must trade your way into the Gold Emblem in Lak’s possession. You may perform one of the two trade options in each section, and only once (a “trade” is converting 1 or more tokens into 1 or more tokens). After completing trades with a merchant, you may not return to that merchant for other trades (in this way, you will first trade with Minic, then Bastia, then Lak). Afterwards, see entry 341[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

342.action: HAIL[/b] either the Traveler or a ferry

choices.option: Hail the Traveler for advice about escaping the planet
choices.outcome: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “Instead of leaving, why not make a life for yourself in a city like this?” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1601[/b].

choices.option: Hail the ferry for a ride into the city
choices.outcome: The ferry operator drops you off at the city gates. They recommend the husk shop and the broker. Gain 1 boost and go to city 529[/b].

343.action: HIRE[/b] a passing sentient to build a structure
343.text: The contractor offers their services to you for a $4 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a casino (1271[/b]), well (1275[/b]), theater (1276[/b]), tavern (1277[/b]), school (1280[/b]), or training grounds (1293[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

344.action: HAIL[/b] a ride from the boat’s captain
344.text: The captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride to your choice of a runecaster far to the east (go to location 246[/b]) or the city on the far shore a little west of here (go to city 529[/b]).
The captain gives you a fresh fish and bids you farewell (gain 1 health).

345.text: The cowardly poachers move on while you tend to the animal they shot, which limps along beside you. Gain animal 836[/b].

346.action: PICK[/b] the lock on the front door
346.text: The lock is crusted with rust, but it eventually opens. Go to interior 076[/b].

347.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about the lotus
347.text: The Traveler shakes their head as they talk about the lotus. “This is an incredible gift of nature, capable of purifying your soul with even the slightest whiff. But some wind sentients—like those in the tower to the west—have found a way to harvest and brew lotus pollen into a powerfully addictive drug. I don’t recommend using it, though. If you’re seeking connection, you’re better off finding a crewmate.” Gain 2 boost and destiny 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

348.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. They’re not available to travel with you, but they offer a package of food (gain 1 health) and some moral support (gain 1 morale).

349.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
349.text: The Traveler grows somber at the prospect of your departure. “If you must leave, with enough effort you could repair your spaceship. There is wreckage directly to the east of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center).

035.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

350.action: SHOUT[/b] into the cave to see if anyone responds
350.text: All you can hear is a hum and occasional “zap” sounds. Gain 1 boost and 1 look[/b]; you may continue.

351.action: TRANSMIT[/b] a signal to your homeworld
351.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

352.action: TALK[/b] to the sentient while they fish
352.text: You share your limited experience with fishing on a distant ocean planet, and the quiet sentient soon opens up. They talk about their love of fishing, which they think you could learn quickly. They also mention that the hovering technology above the water is called a “runecaster,” and by pushing it you can increase your efficiency temporarily. It doesn’t help much with fishing, though. Gain either 1 move[/b] or 1 look[/b]; you may continue.

353.action: ASK[/b] a sentient about the tower
353.text: Choose a sentient with whom to speak about the tower:

choices.outcome: A wiry sentient is fiddling with a panel at the base of the tower. They explain in a patronizing tone that the tower is designed to change the weather of this area to something more palatable for their people. It isn’t quite working as they’d hoped, though. Gain 1 boost and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

A stump-like sentient is protesting against the tower, saying that the circuit sentients’ aggressive expansion is hurting the warm-weather people of the world. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

354.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

355.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
355.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, with enough effort you could repair your spaceship. But first, I recommend syncing with the nutritional system of the wreckage.” If you pay 1 engage[/b], gain 3 health. Also gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center).

356.action: ASK[/b] a local about this area
356.text: A passing sentient raves about the efficiency of the waterfighters to the east and the quiet inlet to the west. But north? Unless you want to get swallowed by a sea centipede, they recommend traveling elsewhere. Gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b].

357.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
357.text: The animal seems drawn to those in need, so you pretend to sob. Moments later, the animal is nuzzling against you with its warm, fuzzy palpus. Gain animal 814[/b].

358.action: GREET[/b] the leader with a deep bow
358.text: The sentient introduces themselves as Ember. They are curious how you came to this place and whether this world resembles yours. You reply that there are volcanoes and archipelagos on your home planet too. This both impresses and baffles the sentient, as you “don’t carry the fire.” If you have a torch, prove otherwise and gain item 1241[/b] and 1 boost; also, if you have it, lose the fire curse. Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

359.text: The sentient is happy to have the company, as they’ve been fishing constantly for the last week with little to show of their efforts. “Regardless,” they say, “patience and persistence!” as if it’s a familiar saying among their people. They toss you a spare fishing rod and invite you to join them. Gain item 921[/b]; you may continue with the overpower-FISH[/b][/b] action.

036.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

360.action: HIRE[/b] a passing sentient to build a structure
360.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $4 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain an armory (1267[/b]), apothecary (1268[/b]), blacksmith (1269[/b]), tailor (1278[/b]), shipyard (1282[/b]), or market (1284[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

361.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1317[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

362.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

363.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about your mission
363.text: “If you’re trying to collect a menagerie of local fauna, follow the bubbles to a rare fish that can provide you with oxygen underwater. Please don’t harm it.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

364.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1358[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

365.action: HAIL[/b] a ride from any passing boat
365.text: You’re hard to spot in the angry sea, but a keen-eyed fisherman hauls you onto the deck and suggests you head south away from the storm. Gain 1 boost and choose one:

choices.outcome: The fisherman agrees to venture north onto the ocean surface with you on board (go to 063[/b]).
The fisherman is happy to transport you southeast to the Traveler on 507[/b], south to a tower peeking out of the ocean on 506[/b], or southwest to a gold sentient on 505[/b].

366.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

367.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 924[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1164[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

368.text: A flat-bottom boat drifts over to you, and the captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sailor warns you about the elemental to the northwest. Gain 1 boost.

Gain 1 boost, and you may go northwest under the ocean to 655[/b] (ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival), northeast to a talkative tree on 666[/b], southeast to a glowing marsh on 245[/b], or southwest to a defenseless animal on 508[/b].

Gain 2 boost and go northwest onto the ocean surface to 060[/b] or stay in shallow waters (go northeast to a talkative tree on 666[/b], southeast to a glowing marsh on 245[/b], or southwest to a defenseless animal on 508[/b]).

369.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and 2 help[/b]; you may continue.

037.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

370.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

371.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

372.action: GREET[/b] other sentients gathered at the water’s edge
372.text: Other travelers return the greeting, a few of them grumbling about how they’re unable to hop from one green lilypad to the next—apparently this is the only way to safely cross the creek. Gain either 1 help[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

373.action: MIMIC[/b] the animal’s grunts and chortles
373.text: The mammoth pauses its grooming to learn more about its new friend. Gain animal 841[/b].

374.action: MIMIC[/b] the sound of the animal’s constant chittering
374.text: The creature halts its advance, curious and confused by your mimicry. It chitters back and quickly warms to you. Gain animal 838[/b].

375.action: HAIL[/b] a ride from the boat’s captain
375.text: The young couple aboard the ship is happy for the company. You may hitch a ride northwest to an old fort on 304[/b], northeast to some lava-covered lorestones on 125[/b], southeast to a burning building on 357[/b], or southwest to a piece of your spaceship’s wreckage on 355[/b].

376.text: The owner of the building offers to hatch an egg for you. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Hatch the egg and gain 1 morale.

choices.option: If you don’t have an egg
choices.outcome: The sentient describes the heat required to accelerate the hatching process. Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: If you want to buy the building
choices.outcome: The sentient wasn’t planning to sell their home workshop, but they’re willing to part ways with it for $35. If you pay, gain items 860[/b], 870[/b], and 978[/b], and structure 1691[/b]. If you don’t pay, gain 1 boost.

377.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

378.text: The merchants are fiercely competitive, so once you choose one, the others ignore you. Pay $3 to gain one of the following: an explosive (879[/b]), a shovel (900[/b]), armor (946[/b]), a red flower (1069[/b]), an orange crystal (1162[/b]), or a runecaster map (1255[/b]). If you don’t pay, they toss you $1 in pity.

379.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

038.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

380.action: TALK[/b] to the animal in a soothing voice
380.text: The creature can barely turn its head to acknowledge you, but its whimpers tell you that it hears you. Gain 1 help[/b] and continue.

381.action: HAIL[/b] an underwater ride from the turtle
381.text: The sea turtle taxi can safely transport you underwater for a fee. Choose one:

choices.option: Lose 1 boost from a flora or food card (or lose the card itself)
choices.outcome: The turtle nibbles on it and gestures for you to board the vessel. Gain vehicle 1013[/b] with 1 boost on it, then dive underwater either northeast to 632[/b] or east to 631[/b].
The turtle shrugs and waits for the next passenger. Gain 1 boost.

382.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

383.text: The sentient timidly emerges from behind the tree, apologizing for their hesitation. “I run the lighthouse to the east, so I… I don’t often see people face to face. I come down here sometimes to relax in the hammock and smell these fragrant flowers. Would you like one?” Gain flora 1068[/b].

384.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1214[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, the chest clamps onto your fingers and won’t let go (end your turn).

385.action: WHISPER[/b] to a passing sentient, keeping your voice low out of respect in case the ruins are a sacred place
385.text: The sentient says that these ruins were once a great hall for sentients to gather and celebrate the changing seasons. Now it’s just a place for weary adventurers to hang their hats for the night. Gain 1 boost and continue.

386.action: ASK[/b] a sentient about the lotus
386.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

387.action: HIRE[/b] a sentient to build a structure in the valley
387.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $5 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a barn (1266[/b]), winery (1272[/b]), windmill (1273[/b]), stables (1279[/b]), hatchery (1285[/b]), hunting tower (1286[/b]), crystal mine (1287[/b]), garden (1288[/b]), or greenhouse (1291[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain 1 boost, $2, or ability 1488[/b]).

388.action: TRADE[/b] for safe passage across the bridge
388.text: If you pay $2, go to 780[/b]. If you don’t pay, the guards refuse to grant you entry (gain 1 boost and continue).

389.action: SHOUT[/b] at a sentient to the east about the flowers
389.text: The stone sentient encourages you to leave the flowers alone. Gain 1 boost and continue.

039.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

390.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
390.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, with enough effort you could repair your spaceship. There is wreckage to the north of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center).

391.action: BEFRIEND[/b] a fellow traveler who claims to know a secret entrance
391.text: The sentient leads you to the south and shows you an opening concealed by bushes, but they refuse to proceed without payment. If you give them $1, go southwest to 787[/b]. If you don’t pay, gain 1 boost and continue.

392.action: ASK[/b] a passing sentient about the berries and the wall
392.text: An old sentient just around the bend seems happy to catch their breath before continuing up the path. They pop a berry in their mouth before explaining that they come to the capital city once every few days to visit the museum. Pulling a tattered map out of their pocket, they show you that the museum is part of the pavilion. Then, with a wave, they carry on their way. Gain 1 boost and view page 8 in the Book of Vantages.

393.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and 2 help[/b]; you may continue.
