394.action: LINK[/b] to the ship’s nutritional system
394.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

395.action: ASK[/b] some passing sentients about the objects
395.text: The objects are “repelling rods,” placed there by metal sentients, whose homeland is to the east of here. The rods annoy all other types of sentients. Gain 1 boost and either 1 help[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

396.action: PERSUADE[/b] a guard to let you look through the telescope (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
396.text: You feel a surge of homesickness as you peer into the stars. With such interest in the stars, perhaps the circuit sentients could help you escape this planet. Gain 1 morale and destiny 1606[/b] (place it in the center).

397.action: ASK[/b] a sentient about the lotus
397.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

398.action: HIRE[/b] a passing sentient to build a structure
398.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $5 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain an armory (1267[/b]), apothecary (1268[/b]), blacksmith (1269[/b]), tailor (1278[/b]), shipyard (1282[/b]), or market (1284[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

399.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about the sentients in this area
399.text: The Traveler points to the red flags in the distance. “Wind sentients placed those flags, which they use to mark boundaries, monitor the wind, and plant seeds. Leave those flags in place. Beware the circuit sentients to the east—they will not hesitate to prove their superiority.” Gain 2 boost.

040.text: As you touch the massive crystal, you feel an instant connection with every other crystal on the planet. You blink, and when your eyes open, you’re back on the surface with the crystal in your hands. Gain item 1000[/b] and go to 157[/b]; if you have a previous location card for reference, return it to the box.

400.action: HAIL[/b] a ride from the balloon
400.text: You yell, you dance, you even yodel to the best of your ability… and when it’s almost too late, the balloon veers off course and swings by to pick you up. The driver points in a few directions to ask your destination of choice. Gain 1 morale, and you may go northwest to a lantern-lit swamp on 234[/b], northeast to the elemental monster on 616[/b], southeast to a metal sentient on 606[/b], or southwest to a treasure chest on 199[/b].

401.text: The device isn’t compatible with your augsuit, of course, but a few adjustments allow for a smooth conversion. You’re hit with a burst of cold and an influx of data, far more than you can comprehend. You filter it by proximity and learn that there is an elemental to the east and a trial directly north of it. Gain 2 boost.

402.action: HIRE[/b] a passing sentient to build a structure
402.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $4 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a casino (1271[/b]), well (1275[/b]), theater (1276[/b]), tavern (1277[/b]), school (1280[/b]), or training grounds (1293[/b]).
The sentient gives you some loose change as an investment (gain ability 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

403.action: PERSUADE[/b] a guard to let you in (you may pay $1 to decrease this cost to 0)
403.text: You convince the guard to let you into the mainframe. Go to interior 581[/b].

404.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
404.text: The Traveler pauses to gather their thoughts. “Your spaceship may indeed be useless, but some of the vessels on this planet could be upgraded to survive the void of interstellar travel. Seek one such vessel to the northwest of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1606[/b] (place it in the center).

405.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1355[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

406.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
406.text: You move close enough to shore to reach the animal, but far enough that the animal knows you have the ability to carry it away from the island. Exhausted, it eventually hops onto your shoulder. Gain animal 834[/b].

407.action: TRANSMIT[/b] a signal to your homeworld
407.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

408.action: PERSUADE[/b] the doorman that you seek refuge (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
408.text: The doorman lets you inside the safehouse, not asking questions, but also not letting you out of their sight as you eat a fresh meal (gain 2 health). If you pay 1 move[/b], you slip away at the first opportunity (go to interior 559[/b]).

409.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
409.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, you could ally with the same circuit sentients who built these spires. They live to the far north.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1606[/b] (place it in the center).

041.action: TRADE[/b] with the vendors at the black market
041.text: Both patrons and sellers alike in the black market keep their identities concealed. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay $8 to gain a transducer, which is often used to draw and convert fuel from energy sentients
choices.outcome: Gain item 948[/b].

choices.option: Share a secret in exchange for a purple extract
choices.outcome: Gain item 863[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

410.action: GREET[/b] the occupants of the house when they’re available

choices.option: Share a story with the sentients
choices.outcome: They’re eager to hear more tales of your adventure, and they invite you inside for dinner. You weave a tale that eventually puts them to sleep. Gain 1 health and go to interior 573[/b].

choices.option: Negotiate with them to buy their house and its contents (pay $35; you may later repeat this action for this option only if you don’t choose it now)
choices.outcome: Gain items 876[/b], 909[/b], 950[/b], and 1164[/b], and structure 1690[/b]; you may place each of these items in your reserve or your grid.

411.action: ASK[/b] a sentient about the runestone
411.text: A small sentient with bark-like skin looks at the runestone with reverence and pride. “This is my third time along the Path, and it never gets old. It is a pilgrimage that winds throughout this area and ends here. The journey matters more than the destination—the Stone knows how many of the other 8 runes you’ve visited. You can complete this journey right now if you’d like, or head south to find the beginning of the Path and return here at the end.” Gain 1 boost and quest 1673[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

412.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

413.action: ASK[/b] a sentient about the lotus
413.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

414.action: HIRE[/b] a local sentient to restore the building
414.text: A carpenter offers their services to you for a $3 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain structure 1286[/b].
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

415.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1337[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

416.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1193[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

417.text: The sentient is startled by your presence but not intimidated. After making small talk about the cold weather to the west, they look around and offer to lead you into the City of Shadows for $2. If you pay, go to cave 094[/b]. Otherwise gain 1 boost.

418.text: Placing your hand on the skull, you breathe with intention, eyes closed. The animal appears in your mind, staring at you with an intense calm. Choose one:

choices.outcome: With gratitude, the animal departs into the darkness. Gain 1 morale and 1 health.
With acceptance, the animal steps forward into your mind. Gain ability 1505[/b].

419.action: TRANSMIT[/b] a signal to your homeworld
419.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

042.text: A map of the world appears and uploads into your cranial implant. Gain item 1037[/b]; the computer highlights your current location as somewhere in the northwest. Then exit to city 041[/b].

420.text: The animal hears you but is determined to head northwest. They seem fine with the idea of you joining their pack if you tag along. You may go northwest to 610[/b]. If you do, gain animal 810[/b]. Otherwise, gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

421.action: COAX[/b] the animals away from the cliff
421.text: Your presence seems to snap the animals out of their stupor, and they head west. Gain 2 morale.

422.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
422.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, you can use towers like the one south of here to send an SOS signal.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

423.action: HIRE[/b] a passing sentient to finish building the structure
423.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $3 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain an armory (1267[/b]), apothecary (1268[/b]), blacksmith (1269[/b]), tailor (1278[/b]), or market (1284[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

424.text: Information pours into your cerebral implant. The device seems to be a conduit for sentients to connect with each other, not unlike the internet. You randomly click a link. Visit orb.stonemaiergames.com and enter 503[/b], 704[/b], or 738[/b]. You can read but not enter new information there.

425.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1306[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

426.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
426.text: You draw upon your courage and invite the animal toward you with a steady hand. It rubs the sides of its face against your palm, leaving a slimy residue among your fingers. Gain animal 855[/b].

427.action: SHOUT[/b] at the sentient to try to draw them outside
427.text: The sentient emerges from the flora and stands so close to you that drops of sea salt spritz your face as they speak. “Is there a problem?” they ask. Choose your answer:

choices.outcome: The sentient rolls their shoulders and cracks their shell-like neck. Either overpower--FIGHT[/b][/b] the sentient (then gain item 972[/b]) or surrender to them (the sentient knocks you on the head, and you come to your senses on location 134[/b]).
The sentient re-enters the orb, saying, “I thought so. Move along.” The tide carries you west. Go to 134[/b].

428.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

429.action: ASK[/b] a passing sentient about the area
429.text: The passing sentient asks if you breathe oxygen, and when you confirm, they warn you about diving into the vast ocean to the east. Instead, they recommend the rolling hills to the west. Gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b].

043.text: The worms cower before you, slinking back inside their nest. Only one brave worm remains outside the nest; it lies down belly-up at your feet. You get the feeling that it has imprinted onto you out of some sort of survival instinct. Gain animal 832[/b].

430.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the sea spouts. The water speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

431.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and 2 help[/b]; you may continue.

432.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1043[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

433.action: HAIL[/b] a ride from the boat’s captain
433.text: The captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride northeast to the Pearl of the Island on 733[/b] or southeast to shipwreck wreckage on 731[/b].
The captain gives you a fresh fish and bids you farewell (gain 1 health).

434.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

435.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
435.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, to the north and east there are ways to learn about time manipulation.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1608[/b] (place it in the center).

436.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1319[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

437.action: COAX[/b] the animals over to you
437.text: The crab-like creatures are hesitant to test the tide, but a lull gives them an opportunity. You reward them with pets and affection when they arrive, and the mother deposits a blue crystal at your feet in gratitude. Gain item 1160[/b].

438.action: HAIL[/b] a ride from the boat
438.text: The sailor is happy for the company and gives you the choice of going northwest to visit some fire sentients (159[/b]) or southwest to a treasure chest they passed by (485[/b]). Gain 1 boost, then go to your chosen location (or remain here and continue).

439.action: ASK[/b] the sentient what they’re doing
439.text: The sentient sighs as if they’ve answered this question before. “As I’ve told you, please align the time stones on the cover of this book to break the cycle. Look at the book to solve the puzzle.” Gain 1 boost and 1 look[/b].

044.action: MIMIC[/b] the sound of a young sand centipede
044.text: It’s a small miracle that you perfectly emulate a baby centipede on your first try. The massive, blind beast is fooled by your mimicry and gently tucks you inside its cheek to take you back to the nest. Go to cave 049[/b].

440.action: ASK[/b] a nearby sentient what the animals are doing
440.text: A fire sentient is happy to share that these lava flies are forging runecasters, devices designed to spread the power of runes throughout the world. They explain that lava flies aren’t inherently creative, but if you assign them a repetitive task with the reward of food, they will complete it. Gain 2 boost, or pay 1 boost to continue.

441.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

442.action: TRANSMIT[/b] a signal to your homeworld
442.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

443.text: The creature whimpers and scuttles away into the night. Gain 1 morale.

444.action: COAX[/b] the animal into showing you the source of its pain
444.text: The spindly beast is hesitant to reveal its vulnerability, but after some gentle encouragement it reveals a puncture in its abdomen. Gain 3 help[/b] and continue.

445.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about your mission
445.text: “If you’re trying to rid the world of a greedy elemental, this is your chance—your target is directly north of here. Prepare yourself well if you plan to slay the monster.” Gain 1 boost and 1 look[/b].

446.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and 2 help[/b]; you may continue.

447.action: HIRE[/b] a passing sentient to build a structure
447.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $4 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a cartographer (1270[/b]), embassy (1274[/b]), tower (1281[/b]), or outpost (1292[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

448.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 977[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 908[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

449.action: ASK[/b] the sentient what they’re looking for
449.text: Mildly annoyed by the distraction, the sentient says that they’re monitoring the waves for an impending invasion from the depths. They’re not fond of the water, so they request that you venture to the northwest to break a friend of theirs out of an underwater prison. Gain 1 boost and quest 1639[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

045.text: With a series of taps on the tail, the sentient guides the sand centipede to set them down on the ground. The rider offers a free ride back up to the surface. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 morale and go to your choice of a snow field (221[/b]), a desert (441[/b]), or a forest (667[/b]).
The sentient wishes you luck and recommends the clear passage to the west. Gain 1 boost.

450.text: A leaf sentient comes dashing out of the forest, eager to assist you. They steer you away from the dangerous depths, encouraging you to enter the forest instead. You may go east to 676[/b].

451.action: PERSUADE[/b] the sentients to let you join them (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
451.text: The sentients confer briefly while sizing you up, then the bigger of the two signals for you to follow. Gain sentient 1357[/b].

452.action: ASK[/b] a sentient about the lotus
452.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

453.action: INTERACT[/b] with the building or the orb

choices.option: Interact with the people inside the building
choices.outcome: The occupants offer to sell you some heavy armor (976[/b]) for $5 or a battery pack (874[/b]) for $7. They also recommend the views from the tower of roots to the east.
The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

454.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1359[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

455.action: PERSUADE[/b] the gatekeeper to look the other way while you enter the city (you may pay $1 to decrease this cost to 0)
455.text: The gruff sentient shrugs and points you through the gate (go northeast to 762[/b]). If you didn’t pay any coins for this action, gain ability 1463[/b].

456.action: BOAST[/b] of your exploits to the building’s occupants
456.text: Tickled by your tall tales, the pirates toast you with a frothing mug of ale. Choose one:

choices.outcome: When the pirates pass out, go to interior 576[/b].

choices.option: You keep pace with the pirates
choices.outcome: The pirates start chanting, “One of us! One of us!” Soon you’re playing cards with them and having a rowdy good time. Gain 1 morale, then find card 798[/b] (it’s a large card), place it on the table, and follow its instructions.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

457.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 942[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

458.action: TRANSMIT[/b] a signal to your homeworld
458.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

459.action: LINK[/b] to the ship’s nutritional system while consulting with the Traveler about escaping the planet
459.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health. The Traveler says, “What are you running back to? You could make a name for yourself on this planet!” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1603[/b] (place it in the center).

046.text: Following your shout, voices in front of you echo back, pleading for help. From behind you, someone yells that they’re heading your way. Gain 1 move[/b] and continue.

460.text: The workers appreciate the break, and when your performance ends, they invite you to join them for a midday ale. There’s talk of pirates to the south and war to the west. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

461.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
461.text: The fragile creature lands on your outstretched arm, gingerly folding its wings. You make it feel safe with you, secure from the predators that roam these lands until it can heal. Gain animal 823[/b].

462.action: BOAST[/b] to the sentient of your skills
462.text: You’re not exactly sure what will impress the sentient or even why you care so much about impressing them, but at least one of your characteristics intrigues them. They invite you to slay the wind elemental to the north with them. Gain sentient 1311[/b].

463.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and 2 help[/b]; you may continue.

464.action: TRADE[/b] with the sentients inside the building
464.text: If you pay $6 (or cards in your grid/reserve with total value $6 or greater), the sentient sells you a map of the world’s elementals (gain item 1262[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location [view page 19 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region H]). They also recommend a visit to the ruins of an ancient shelter to the east (gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b]).

465.action: SHOUT[/b] at a sentient on the other side of the canyon to the south
465.text: The sentient is too far away to shout back with any clarity, but you can see that they’re gesturing aggressively to the east and west. Gain 1 boost and continue.

466.action: INTIMIDATE[/b] anyone who might be waiting on the other side of the gap
466.text: Your tactic seems to work, as you hear footsteps heading east and west. Gain 1 morale and go north to 467[/b].

467.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 7 skill dice; you may reroll any/all dice up to 2 times. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1037[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1164[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

468.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestone. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

469.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1313[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

047.action: LURE[/b] the sand centipede into a sharp rock using yourself as bait
047.text: The pair of hunters watch in awe as you risk your health for them. They share that their crew is short one member, and they invite you to join them. If you accept, gain sentient 1333[/b] (the other sentient scouts ahead).

470.text: The closest beast ambles over to you, intrigued by such a familiar sound coming from such an unfamiliar creature. Gain animal 821[/b].

471.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll any/all dice up to 2 times. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain vehicle 957[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 857[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

472.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
472.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, with enough effort you could repair your spaceship. There is wreckage directly to the southeast of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center).

473.action: ASK[/b] a passerby about the city
473.text: A sentient heading out of the City of Leaves recommends the photosynthesis salon and the florist. Gain 2 boost.

474.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1351[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

475.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
475.text: The tiny creature’s head swivels back and forth between you and the larger beast in the background. It must have received an imperceptible signal from its parent, as it soon joins you. Gain animal 831[/b].

476.action: TRADE[/b] with the occupant of the building
476.text: After mentioning that there are opportunities for commerce in the city to the northeast (gain 1 boost), the sentient offers to buy one of your possessions (a card in your grid or reserve), paying $2 more than its value. Afterwards, they offer you the chance to either pay $1 to learn a basic magic lesson (gain lesson 1419[/b]) or pay $2 to gain a water pouch (858[/b]).

477.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
477.text: The Traveler is devastated by your question. “Why leave this island paradise? I’m trapped here, but at least you have a choice. There’s a perfectly good home for you just north of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1600[/b] (place it in the center).

478.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1352[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

479.action: ASK[/b] the sentient what they’re looking for
479.text: Startled by your presence, the sentient raises their weapon defensively before seeing that you’re not a threat. They’re an elite member of the coast guard assigned to patrol this area for pirates trying to steal the Pearl of the Island. The sentient is actually heading northwest toward the Pearl now. If you want to head that way, gain sentient 1358[/b] and go to 743[/b]; otherwise gain item 940[/b] to help you watch for threats.

048.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

480.text: “These runes are ancient and naturally occurring, as far as we know. In recent years, sentients have experimented with runes on technology, but it makes me sick to think that someone would brand a helpless animal with a tattoo like this. There is still hope for healing, though—can you help?” Gain 2 help[/b] and continue.

481.action: GREET[/b] some sentients to the east
481.text: A group of sentients is packed onto a rocky outcropping to the east. They share that the volcano has destroyed their city, and they need your help. Gain 2 boost and continue.

482.text: The sentients share that the volcanic eruption has forced them from their homes, and they have nowhere to go. They beg you to stay and rebuild with them. Gain item 1295[/b].

483.text: You join the critter on its little island and pet it reassuringly. It’s still scared, but at least it stops pacing. Gain any 2 skills; you may continue.

484.action: TRANSMIT[/b] a signal to your homeworld
484.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

485.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1089[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

486.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
486.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, with enough time and effort you could eventually upgrade a boat like this into a functional spaceship.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1606[/b] (place it in the center).

487.action: HAIL[/b] a ride across the gap
487.text: Without hesitation, a strong sentient hoists you on their shoulders and tosses you across the gap. Go to 276[/b].

488.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 983[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

489.action: COAX[/b] the animals over to you
489.text: The closest creature flaps over to you, tentative but curious. Gain animal 826[/b].

049.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

490.action: ASK[/b] a sentient about the lotus
490.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

491.action: LINK[/b] to the ship’s nutritional system
491.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

492.action: CONSULT[/b] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
492.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, you could expedite the rescue process by sending a signal from the tower to the north.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

493.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
493.text: The creature is curious about you, and you feel a pleasant sensation as it nuzzles against you. It brays appreciatively as you rub its belly. Gain animal 822[/b].

494.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1083[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

495.text: An enterprising sentient has set up a service for those wanting to cross the gap or descend to the valley. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may go east to a snow-covered lotus on 496[/b] or north to a vibrant pink flower on 354[/b].
The sentient pays you $2 to keep a lookout during their next descent.

496.action: ASK[/b] a sentient about the lotus
496.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

497.action: ENTERTAIN[/b] some dockside workers while they work
497.text: The workers appreciate a break in the monotony of loading and unloading ships. When you’re done, they toss you some coins and invite you to relax inside. Gain $4 and go to interior 578[/b].

498.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and 2 help[/b]; you may continue.

499.action: GREET[/b] the occupants of the house when they’re available
499.text: When you’re within earshot, choose one:

choices.outcome: They’re eager to hear more tales of your adventure, and they invite you inside for dinner. You weave a tale that eventually puts them to sleep. Gain 1 health and go to interior 579[/b].

choices.option: Negotiate with them to buy their house and its contents (pay $35; you may later repeat this action for this option only if you don’t choose it now)
choices.outcome: Gain items 900[/b], 982[/b], and 993[/b], and structure 1687[/b]; you may place each of these items in your reserve or your grid.

050.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

500.action: TRANSMIT[/b] a signal to your homeworld
500.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

501.text: The lava burns as you make your way over to the device. Suffer 1 heat damage. A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient 1306[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

502.action: PICK[/b] the lock while the Traveler talks to you
502.text: “It has always seemed strange to me that such valuables would be stored in public treasure chests. The explanation I’ve heard is that certain generous sentients want to add a little hope and mystery to the world.” Gain 1 boost and proceed to pick the lock. With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1036[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1164[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

503.text: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

504.action: HAIL[/b] the pirate ship after their conquest is complete
504.text: The pirates usher you aboard their fine vessel. Choose one:

choices.option: Charm the pirates into letting you join the crew as they sail west toward a treasure chest
choices.outcome: Go to 502[/b] and gain 1 take[/b].

Either sell the pirates a card from your grid, reserve, or supply (lose the card and gain its value), buy a rare, contraband flora from the pirates (pay $15 to gain flora 1070[/b]), or accept a free barrel of juice the pirates mistook for ale during a recent raid (gain item 1158[/b]).

choices.option: Pay $40 to take ownership of the pirate ship
choices.outcome: Gain vehicle 1017[/b] and item 1260[/b]; the first mate highlights your current location (view page 17 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region D).

505.text: The gold sentient splashes some water at you and laughs. Seeing your bewilderment, they mention that they closed a major deal today and wanted to celebrate with a dip in the ocean. They have time to spare, so you can choose to either gain sentient 1320[/b] or duel the sentient in their favorite card and dice game (find card 798[/b] [it’s a large card, place it on the table, and follow its instructions]).Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

506.action: TRANSMIT[/b] a signal to your homeworld
506.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

507.text: A skiff catches the wind and sails over to you, but the captain won’t steer north because they can “feel a storm a-brewin.’” Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then you may go northwest to the churning ocean’s edge on 365[/b], northeast to a treasure chest on 367[/b], southeast to a shimmering skyline on 344[/b], or southwest to a bustling city on 342[/b].
The captain warns you of those who live under the sea (gain 1 boost).

508.action: PERSUADE[/b] the poachers to leave the animal alone (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
508.text: The poachers sail away to less controversial targets. Gain animal 847[/b].

509.action: LINK[/b] to the ship’s nutritional system while chatting with the Traveler
509.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. As you do, the Traveler talks about a secret island to the somewhat distant northwest. Gain 2 health and 1 boost.

510.text: Your request startles the sentient, though they quickly gather their composure. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning of their growing concern about the elemental to the west
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 476[/b].

choices.option: Pay $2 to buy the water pouch
choices.outcome: Gain item 858[/b], then exit to 476[/b].
Gain item 1045[/b], then exit to 476[/b].

choices.option: Pay $6 to buy the jet pack
choices.outcome: Gain vehicle 1253[/b], then exit to 476[/b].

511.text: The pesky creature cackles with glee at your stern words, their laughter coming from across the creek, though all you can see is a pair of boots. Gain 1 boost and continue with the look-SOLVE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 1.

512.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the island. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

513.action: ASK[/b] the sentient why they’re trapped here
513.text: “Trapped?” they reply. “I’m not trapped—I’m here by choice! Energy is my gift to the world—or, at least, this part of the world.” The sentient bestows upon you the knowledge to share and create energy; gain lesson 1427[/b].

514.text: These lorestones aren’t etched with familiar runes—there’s something both ancient and futuristic to the leylines that run through them, and you’re compelled to take some of this power for yourself. Gain 1 boost and 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

515.action: GREET[/b] a sentient who emerges from the gateway
515.text: A tan sentient in a flowing cape steps forward, their attention on their pocket watch as they cross the barrier. At your greeting, they look up, though they don’t seem all that surprised. They explain that they regularly monitor this time rift, the far side of which has consistently remained 100 years in the future from what you consider the present. Gain sentient 1344[/b] and continue.

516.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the towering tree. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

517.text: The smelter—now 100 years older than the last time you saw them—wipes their wide brow. “It’s about time you showed up!” they say with a hearty laugh. They ease down the stairs on their old legs. “This is quite a ship you have here, and I’m honored to have made it my life’s work. I made a few modifications—there’s basically a small active volcano powering the thrusters.” They pause, and you can tell they have a request that they’re hesitant to make. You speak up first to remove the awkwardness. “Ash, would you like to come with us? We could use a smelter like you among the crew.” The old sentient looks up with disbelief and envelops you in a huge hug. “It would be my great honor.” Gain vehicle 1033[/b] and sentient 1316[/b].

518.action: TRADE[/b] with a vendor at the trading post
518.text: The vendor at the trading post explains that wind sentients traditionally don’t believe in money as currency. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Exchange something of value to gain a crystal
choices.outcome: Lose 1 card with a noted value from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain item 1160[/b].

choices.option: Exchange something of value to gain a pet fish
choices.outcome: Lose 1 card with a noted value from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain animal 806[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

519.action: TALK[/b] with patrons at a local tavern
519.text: Tipsy wood sentients sip on a sap-like beverage in the local tavern. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 2 health.

choices.option: Scoot your chair over to a wizened, half-blind sentient
choices.outcome: The old sentient repays your kindness by sharing a way to tap into greater potential: Gain lesson 1424[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

052.action: HAIL[/b] a ride from the passing sailboat
052.text: The boat is crowded with small sentients, but they make room for you. They present you with a few options for destinations. Gain 1 boost and choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to 058[/b].

choices.option: Go northwest to a remote island cottage
choices.outcome: Go to 476[/b].

choices.option: Go northeast to an industrial building
choices.outcome: Go to 453[/b].
Go to 368[/b].

choices.option: Go southwest to the ocean shallows
choices.outcome: Go to 362[/b].

520.action: TALK[/b] with some sentients at a local cafe
520.text: The cafe is mostly empty, save a sentient busily transcribing a manuscript into a book. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient marks their page and joins you. Gain sentient 1326[/b].

choices.option: Pay $1 for a cup of herbal tea
choices.outcome: Gain 2 health.

choices.option: Learn some communication tactics from the translator
choices.outcome: Gain ability 1470[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

521.text: The owner of the crystal shop is protective of their wares—it’s clear that they are valuable to circuit sentients. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.outcome: Gain your choice of one crystal: blue (1160[/b]), purple (1161[/b]), orange (1162[/b]), green (1163[/b]), yellow (1164[/b]), or red (1165[/b]).
Lose a crystal card to gain $10.
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

522.text: The pawn shop is full of unwanted items. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.outcome: Gain item 898[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

523.action: TRADE[/b] with a climbing gear supply store
523.text: The climbing gear supply is well stocked with items for both ascending and descending. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay $4 for gear designed for ascending
choices.outcome: Gain item 914[/b].

choices.option: Pay $2 for some gear for descending
choices.outcome: Gain item 909[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

524.text: The bone vendor offers an array of animal bones of all shapes and sizes, informing you that sinew sentients wear skeletons to provide structure to their muscular frames. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Sell an animal to the vendor (lose 1 animal from your grid or reserve)
choices.outcome: Gain $10 and lose 1 morale as you worry about what will happen to the animal.

choices.option: Pay $1 for a simple bone carving
choices.outcome: Gain item 1092[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

525.text: If you’re looking for a torch, you’ve come to the right place. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.outcome: Gain item 1085[/b].

choices.option: Persuade the shopkeeper to give you a torch
choices.outcome: Lose 1 time and gain item 1085[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

526.action: TALK[/b] with patrons at the photosynthesis salon
526.text: Sunbathing patrons at the photosynthesis salon chat with each other with their eyes closed. Choose one:

choices.option: Laugh with the other sentients as you relax in the sun
choices.outcome: Roll 2 skill dice. Gain 1 morale for each help[/b] result, then gain 1 health.
It doesn’t take much to get the sunbathers to chat about topics ranging from their favorite runes to how they earned their petals to their latest philanthropic efforts. Gain 2 boost.

choices.option: Cajole a sentient to give you a flower
choices.outcome: Gain flora 1064[/b].
Gain sentient 1354[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

527.action: TALK[/b] with tipsy patrons at the tiki bar
527.text: Everyone is in a festive mood at the tiki bar. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Pay $1 for a drink for yourself
choices.outcome: Gain 2 morale.

choices.option: Pay $5 for a round of drinks
choices.outcome: Gain sentient 1364[/b] and 2 morale.
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

528.action: TRADE[/b] with the air supply dome
528.text: The store owner welcomes you inside their air supply dome. The shelves are stocked for air-breathing lungs like yours. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Sell some oxygen from your lungs (suffer 1 hypoxia damage)
choices.outcome: Gain $6.
Gain item 1212[/b].

choices.option: Pay $5 to gain an oxygen mask
choices.outcome: Gain item 964[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

529.text: The broker is looking for a good deal. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Lose any 1 card with a coin value from your grid, reserve, or supply
choices.outcome: Gain that card’s value +$1.

choices.option: Lose any 2 cards with coin values from your grid, reserve, or supply
choices.outcome: Gain their combined value +$4.

530.text: A host eagerly ushers you inside their casino. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Play a casino game called “Perfecto” with the sentients (bet up to $6)
choices.outcome: Roll 6 skill dice up to 6 times (roll any/all dice each time). If the final results are all identical, gain double the amount you bet. Otherwise, lose your bet.

choices.option: Play a push-your-luck game called “Pinch” with the sentients (pay $1 to play)
choices.outcome: Roll 6 skill dice. If the results include at least 1 engage[/b], gain $2. You may stop and keep your winnings or proceed to roll 5 skill dice. If the results include at least 1 engage[/b], gain $2 and you may continue with another roll (1 fewer die each round); if not, lose the $2 earned on the previous roll and end the game.
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

531.text: The lanky kid behind the counter says that they’re buying and selling sand centipede bait, among other items. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.outcome: Gain animal 834[/b].

choices.option: Lose 1 animal from your grid or reserve
choices.outcome: Gain the animal’s value +$4 and lose 1 morale.
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

054.text: A consortium of merchants welcomes you aboard with open arms… if you have coins to spare. You may lose 1 card to gain its value. Then, if you have at least $1, continue reading. Otherwise the merchants throw you overboard (go to 647[/b], ignoring hypoxia damage upon arrival).

choices.outcome: One merchant offers you information (pay $1 to gain 2 boost); another raves about a seaweed smoothie (pay $1 to gain 1 health); yet another peddles a warm sticky bun (pay $1 to gain 1 morale). You may choose any/all of them if you can afford it (if you buy anything, then go to 647[/b], ignoring hypoxia damage upon arrival), or you can ignore them and listen to some more elite merchants at the upper tiers of the ship (decide to buy or proceed before reading further).

As you ascend higher into the ship, a toothy vendor offers to sell you a steel fox (pay $3 to gain animal 828[/b]) or a gossamer spider (pay $3 to gain animal 819[/b]); a willowy sentient also tries to open your purse with offers to sell you the rare drakeleaf (pay $5 to gain flora 1081[/b]) or a maelstrom agave (pay $6 to gain flora 1046[/b]). You may choose any/all of them if you can afford it (if you buy anything, then go to 647[/b], ignoring hypoxia damage upon arrival), or you can ignore these offers too and go to the very top of the ship for one final offer from the captain (decide whether to buy or proceed before reading further).

As you reach the bridge, an old sentient welcomes you and reveals that they are hoping to retire. “Years ago, I converted an old galleon to this roving market. I think it’s time to ground the market, but the ship is yours for $30.” If you accept, gain vehicle 1016[/b], then roll a skill die and go to where the tides take you: move[/b] (063[/b]); look[/b] (058[/b]); engage[/b] (478[/b]); help[/b] (451[/b]); take[/b] (366[/b]); or overpower[/b] (426[/b]). If not, the captain wishes you well and pushes you off the ship (go to 647[/b], ignoring hypoxia damage upon arrival).

541.action: TRADE[/b] with a hidden occupant of the ruins for an item
541.text: A shy sentient emerges from behind a pillar. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, making them feel seen
choices.outcome: Gain 1 morale. You may also sell them 1 card to gain its value (lose the item).
Gain item 1085[/b].

choices.option: Pay $5 to buy a jar of adhesive
choices.outcome: Gain item 866[/b].
Gain item 971[/b].

542.action: PICK[/b] the lock on the treasure chest
542.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1040[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions). Otherwise, gain $4.

543.text: In an instant, a mob of sinew sentients swarm you and rush you to a secret room full of bones. Find card 800[/b] (it’s a large card) and place it on the table. These bones formed the armor for countless legends among the sinew sentients, with each legend making a unique mark on the bones. The first legend always made an angular mark with something in common. The second legend always made a mark of a circle in a certain position. The third legend… well, that’s for you to decipher. You’re presented with 3 piles of bones. The first pile is of true bones that follow the rules for each legend and for all 3 legends together. The second pile contains false bones that don’t follow some of the rules. The goal is to identify the only bone in the third pile that follows all the rules. See entry 543[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

544.action: TRADE[/b] with a hidden occupant of the ruins for an item
544.text: A shy sentient emerges from behind a pillar. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, making them feel beautiful
choices.outcome: Gain 1 morale. You may also sell them 1 card to gain its value (lose the item).
Gain item 954[/b].
Gain item 872[/b].
Gain item 894[/b].

545.action: TRADE[/b] with a hidden occupant of the ruins for an item
545.text: A shy sentient emerges from behind a pillar. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, making them feel valued
choices.outcome: Gain 1 morale. You may also sell them 1 card to gain its value (lose the item).
Gain item 1136[/b].
Gain item 890[/b].

choices.option: Pay $8 to buy a grappling claw
choices.outcome: Gain item 903[/b].

546.action: TRADE[/b] with a hidden occupant of the ruins for an item
546.text: A shy sentient emerges from behind a pillar. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, making them feel heard
choices.outcome: Gain 1 morale. You may also sell them 1 card to gain its value (lose the item).

choices.option: Pay $2 to buy a water pouch
choices.outcome: Gain item 858[/b].
Gain item 915[/b].

choices.option: Pay $13 to buy a precious egg
choices.outcome: Gain item 979[/b].

547.action: TRADE[/b] with a hidden occupant of the ruins for an item
547.text: A shy sentient emerges from behind a pillar. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, making them feel witty
choices.outcome: Gain 1 morale. You may also sell them 1 card to gain its value (lose the item).
Gain item 1136[/b].
Gain item 906[/b].
Gain item 1089[/b].

548.action: TRADE[/b] with a hidden occupant of the ruins for an item
548.text: A shy sentient emerges from behind a pillar. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, making them feel clever
choices.outcome: Gain 1 morale. You may also sell them 1 card to gain its value (lose the item).
Gain item 1158[/b].

choices.option: Pay $5 to buy a vial of acid
choices.outcome: Gain item 859[/b].

choices.option: Pay $12 to buy a magic wand
choices.outcome: Gain item 981[/b].

549.action: ASK[/b] the animals which item they use the least
549.text: All you hear is a series of chirps and chortles. Gain item 919[/b] and exit to 103[/b].

550.action: ASK[/b] the sentient which item they use the least
550.text: “We rarely use the bypass code. Why do you ask?” Gain item 1178[/b] and exit to 131[/b] before the occupant demands an answer.

551.action: ASK[/b] the sentients which item they use the least
551.text: “We rarely use the shovel. Why do you ask?” Gain item 895[/b] and exit to 225[/b] before the occupants demand an answer.

552.action: PICK[/b] through the items on the ground
552.text: You find a mortar and pestle. Gain item 1227[/b] and exit to 294[/b].

553.text: The sentient is surprised to find you inside, but you quickly convince them that your intentions are pure. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about astronomy and their mapmaking pursuits
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 115[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1,  then exit to 115[/b].
Gain item 1162[/b], then exit to 115[/b].
Gain item 1257[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 14 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region K). Then exit to 115[/b].

554.text: The sentients are surprised to find you inside, but you quickly convince them that your intentions are pure. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentients, learning about their families and hobbies
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 124[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 124[/b].

choices.option: Pay $3 to buy a green crystal
choices.outcome: Gain item 1163[/b], then exit to 124[/b].

choices.option: Pay $6 to buy a beam ball
choices.outcome: Gain item 1228[/b], then exit to 124[/b].

555.action: TRADE[/b] with the owner as they arrive through the window
555.text: The sentient is surprised to find you inside, but you quickly convince them that your intentions are pure. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about all the items they scavenge from the tide
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit through the western window to 128[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit through the western window to 128[/b].

choices.option: Pay $3 to buy a green crystal
choices.outcome: Gain item 1163[/b], then exit through the western window to 128[/b].

choices.option: Pay $6 to buy the snow shoes
choices.outcome: Gain item 933[/b], then exit through the western window to 128[/b].

556.action: TRADE[/b] with the occupants when they return home
556.text: The sentients are surprised to find you inside, but you quickly convince them that your intentions are pure. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the metal sentients, learning about their life among these floating islands
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 204[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 204[/b].

choices.option: Pay $3 to buy a well-crafted barrel
choices.outcome: Gain item 1158[/b], then exit to 204[/b].
Gain item 1040[/b], then exit to 204[/b].

557.text: The sentient is surprised to find you inside this private room, but you quickly convince them that your intentions are pure. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about the hospitality business in these parts
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 215[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 215[/b].

choices.option: Pay $1 to buy a flagon of ale
choices.outcome: Gain item 856[/b], then exit to 215[/b].

choices.option: Pay $6 to buy the weighted dice
choices.outcome: Gain item 924[/b], then exit to 215[/b].

558.action: TALK[/b] with a sentient who sits down at the table opposite you

choices.option: Gesture for the sentient to put on a translation earpiece to understand you better
choices.outcome: They’re a frequent guest at this casino, and they boast of their card and dice game skills. They offer to show you around. Gain sentient 1321[/b] and exit to 266[/b].

choices.option: Play a gambling dice game called “Press” with the sentients (bet up to $5)
choices.outcome: Roll 1 die. You may then roll another or stop, repeating until you bust or stop. If a die matches any previous results, you bust (but can still win). Then roll 1 die at a time for the sentient until they bust, then compare their unmatching dice total to yours. If your total is equal to or higher than theirs, gain double your bet. If their total is higher, they keep your bet.

559.text: The sentient is surprised to find you inside, but you quickly convince them that your intentions are pure. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about the safehouse, a refuge from invasive water and metal sentients
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 408[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 408[/b].

choices.option: Pay $3 to buy a blue crystal
choices.outcome: Gain item 1160[/b], then exit to 408[/b].

choices.option: Pay $6 to buy a serrated axe
choices.outcome: Gain item 1088[/b], then exit to 408[/b].

560.action: TRADE[/b] with the owner when they return
560.text: The sentient is surprised to find you inside their shop, but you quickly convince them that your intentions are pure. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about the shoemaking trade
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 673[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 673[/b].
Gain item 1086[/b], then exit to 673[/b].

choices.option: Pay $9 to buy a pair of shoes
choices.outcome: Gain item 989[/b], then exit to 673[/b].

561.action: TALK[/b] to a sentient who rushes into the room
561.text: “What are you doing in here?” they exclaim. “Get out there and protect the castle! Or at least get the time sieve to safety.” Choose one:

choices.option: Grab a knife and defend the castle
choices.outcome: Gain item 1209[/b] and quest 1659[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply), and exit to 760[/b].

choices.option: Grab the time sieve and dash north away from the invasion
choices.outcome: Gain item 980[/b], then exit to 490[/b].

562.text: The sentient is surprised to find you inside, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good fire humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about their forge
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 160[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 160[/b].

choices.option: Pay $2 to buy a pair of ice skates
choices.outcome: Gain item 951[/b], then exit to 160[/b].

choices.option: Pay $7 to buy an energy shield
choices.outcome: Gain item 983[/b], then exit to 160[/b].

563.action: TRADE[/b] with the occupant when they return
563.text: The sentient is surprised to find you inside, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good bandit humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about these misty mountains
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then continue with the move-EXIT[/b][/b] action.
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then continue with the move-EXIT[/b][/b] action.

choices.option: Pay $3 to buy a blue crystal
choices.outcome: Gain item 1160[/b], then continue with the move-EXIT[/b][/b] action.

choices.option: Pay $7 to buy the snow gear
choices.outcome: Gain item 928[/b], then continue with the move-EXIT[/b][/b] action.

564.text: The sentient is surprised to find you inside, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good curatorial humor. They’re happy to show you around, though mostly they just want to talk about their recent acquisition, the legendary Mask of Memory. Gain 1 boost and 1 look[/b]; you may continue.

565.text: The sentient is surprised to find you inside, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good treehouse humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about their lantern shop
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 239[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 239[/b].

choices.option: Pay $3 to buy a purple crystal
choices.outcome: Gain item 1161[/b], then exit to 239[/b].

choices.option: Pay $8 to buy an aether lantern
choices.outcome: Gain item 953[/b], then exit to 239[/b].

566.action: TRADE[/b] with the guard in charge of this outpost
566.text: The sentient is surprised to find you inside, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good sky island humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about the pirate problem in the area
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 304[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 304[/b].
Gain item 1229[/b], then exit to 304[/b].
Gain vehicle 957[/b], then exit to 304[/b].

567.text: You swiftly pocket the gloves (gain item 936[/b]) before inviting a professor into the room. They welcome you to the Universal Academy and are curious about aliens like you, so they invite you to join the class for a session. If you also pay 2 boost, gain lesson 1429[/b]. Either way, exit to 321[/b].

568.text: You may either pay $6 to gain a vented jacket (967[/b]) or sell the sentient an item, animal, or flora for its value. You may instead reject all trade offers and gain 1 boost; then exit to 333[/b].

569.text: The sentient is surprised to find you near the cargo dock, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good marketing humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about business in these parts
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 335[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 335[/b].
Gain item 968[/b], then exit to 335[/b].

choices.option: Pay $7 to buy a flare gun
choices.outcome: Gain item 961[/b], then exit to 335[/b].

570.action: ENTERTAIN[/b] the room’s occupant when they unexpectedly return
570.text: The sentient is startled by your presence, but you tell them the resort sent you to entertain them. “Ah yes,” they say flippantly. “Well, go ahead, don’t be weird. Dance for me.” After you twirl about for a bit—you were never much of a dancer— they toss you a few coins and ask you for a refill. Gain item 863[/b] and $2, then exit to 338[/b].

571.text: The sentient is surprised to find you inside, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good bellows humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about different types of flames
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 376[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 376[/b].
Gain item 860[/b], then exit to 376[/b].
Gain item 870[/b], then exit to 376[/b].

572.text: A surge of homesickness makes you tremble. With such interest in the stars, perhaps the circuit sentients could help you escape this planet. Gain 1 boost and destiny 1606[/b] (place it in the center), then exit to 396[/b].

573.action: DEFUSE[/b] the situation involving the shocked occupants of the house
573.text: With great tact, a touch of wit, and a peace offering, you set the sentients at ease. Choose one:

choices.option: Entertain the sentients with stories of your interstellar exploits
choices.outcome: They give you a crystal (gain item 1164[/b]) and an open invitation to visit them in the future (gain 1 morale); from now on, the move-ENTER[/b][/b] action on 410[/b] is always available for you. Exit to 410[/b].

choices.option: Entertain the sentients and give them a memento of your travels (lose 1 flora, animal, or item)
choices.outcome: The sentients, honored to have such a treasure, give you something of importance to them in return. Gain item 909[/b] and exit to 410[/b].

574.text: You surprise the sentient, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good smithy humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about the art of blacksmithing
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 453[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 453[/b].
Gain item 976[/b], then exit to 453[/b].
Gain item 938[/b], then exit to 453[/b].

575.text: The sentient is surprised to find you inside, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good gatekeeper humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about the pirates in the area
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 455[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then either go back outside (exit to 455[/b]) or enter the city (go to 762[/b]).
Gain item 1229[/b], then either go back outside (exit to 455[/b]) or enter the city (go to 762[/b]).

choices.option: Pay $7 to buy a harpoon bow
choices.outcome: Gain item 960[/b], then either go back outside (exit to 455[/b]) or enter the city (go to 762[/b]).

576.text: The sentients are surprised to find you inside, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good contraband humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about the local coast guard
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 456[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 456[/b].

choices.option: Pay $3 to buy a fishing net
choices.outcome: Gain item 911[/b], then exit to 456[/b].

choices.option: Pay $6 to buy the light armor
choices.outcome: Gain item 974[/b], then exit to 456[/b].

577.text: The cartographer is surprised to find you inside, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good mapmaking humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about their research about elementals
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 464[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 464[/b].
Gain item 869[/b], then exit to 464[/b].
Gain item 1262[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 19 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region H). Then exit to 464[/b].

578.text: The sentients are surprised to find you inside the warehouse, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good seafaring humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with a sentient, learning about trade in this region
choices.outcome: They turn out to be the owner and captain of the nearby merchant ship, and they see potential in your sea legs. Gain quest 1684[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).
A sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 497[/b].
Gain item 1158[/b], then exit to 497[/b].
Gain item 901[/b], then exit to 497[/b].
Gain vehicle 1015[/b], then exit to 497[/b].

579.action: DEFUSE[/b] the situation involving the shocked occupants of the house
579.text: With great tact, a touch of wit, and a peace offering, you set the sentients at ease. Choose one:

choices.option: Entertain the sentients with stories of your interstellar exploits
choices.outcome: They give you a forcefield generator (982[/b]) and an open invitation to visit them in the future (gain 1 morale); from now on, the move-ENTER[/b][/b] action on 499[/b] is always available for you. Exit to 499[/b].

choices.option: Entertain the sentients and give them a memento of your travels (lose 1 flora, animal, or item)
choices.outcome: The sentients, honored to have such a treasure, give you something of importance to them in return. Gain item 993[/b] and exit to 499[/b].

580.text: A surge of information whips through your mind: memories from a thousand lives of a thousand circuit sentients, schematics for technology beyond your comprehension, research on other sentients and regions, and, most recently, plans for breaking the tethers of this planet and conquering other worlds. Gain 1 boost and destiny 1606[/b] (place it in the center), then continue.

581.text: When the robots complete their work, a frost mammoth—a machine just as much as an animal—rises from the assembly line. It needs training, but it imprints onto you instantly. Gain animal 812[/b] and exit to 492[/b].

582.text: You swiftly set the alarmed guards at ease with some good landwalker humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentients, learning about how they confiscated these items
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit north to 641[/b].
A sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit north to 641[/b].

choices.option: Pay $2 to buy a fish trap
choices.outcome: Gain item 932[/b] and promise not to use it in these waters, then exit north to 641[/b].
Gain item 887[/b], then exit north to 641[/b].

583.text: You present a case for your homeworld to open official diplomatic relations with this planet. Gain item 891[/b] and exit to 777[/b].

584.text: The sentients are surprised to find you inside, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good hunting humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about their latest hunting techniques
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 662[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 662[/b].
Gain item 926[/b], then exit to 662[/b].

choices.option: Pay $5 to buy a bow and arrow set
choices.outcome: Gain item 956[/b], then exit to 662[/b].

585.action: TALK[/b] to the ambassador stationed at the embassy
585.text: The leaf sentient flutters into the room, eager to serve. When they realize you can only understand a portion of their speech, they give you a universal translator to aid your travels. Gain item 885[/b] and exit to 676[/b].

586.action: PERSUADE[/b] the sentients to consider an offer for their house and its contents (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)

choices.option: Buy their house and its contents (pay $35; you may later repeat this action for this option only if you don’t choose it now)
choices.outcome: Gain items 916[/b], 995[/b], and 997[/b], and structure 1689[/b]; you may place each of these items in your reserve or your grid.
The sentients send you away with some freshly picked berries (gain item 1224[/b]).

587.text: The sentient is surprised to find you inside, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good fishing humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about the alien kraken to the east of here
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 744[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 744[/b].

choices.option: Pay $1 to buy some fruit or fish
choices.outcome: Gain either fruit (item 1224[/b]) or fish (item 1226[/b]), then exit to 744[/b].

choices.option: Pay $4 to buy a fish trap
choices.outcome: Gain item 910[/b], then exit to 744[/b].

588.action: TALK[/b] empathetically with the grieving occupant
588.text: You respectfully remain on the outskirts of the cottage, showing the owner you mean no harm. Choose one:

choices.option: Help the sentient solve the mystery of a murder that happened here
choices.outcome: Gain quest 1645[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). You may continue.

choices.option: Entertain the sentient and give them a memento of your travels (lose 1 flora, animal, or item from your grid or reserve)
choices.outcome: The sentient, appreciative of the distraction from recent tragedy, gives you something of importance to them in return. Gain item 898[/b] and exit to 737[/b].

589.action: ASK[/b] a sentient about the temple
589.text: An elderly sentient breathes warm air in your ear as they whisper back. “This is the Founder’s Temple, where we honor the origins of life on our world. It was Her divine influence that spread the 12 elements across the globe. Oh, sorry, look at the time—I must be on my way!” The sentient hobbles away. Gain 2 boost and continue.

590.action: TALK[/b] with a passing sentient about their travels
590.text: The wood sentient says that they actually just finished a tree climbing challenge to the south, and they offer you their climbing harness. Gain item 904[/b] and exit to 769[/b].

591.action: INTIMIDATE[/b] the owner of these items
591.text: A distracted sentient rounds the corner, and they jump into the ceiling when you surprise them. When they collect their composure, they grab the sword, leap onto the flying carpet, and sail away. Gain item 990[/b] and exit west to 787[/b].

592.action: ASK[/b] the sentient what they’re doing
592.text: The startled sentient steps away from the beam of light, clutching a mace in one hand and a small vial in another. They relax upon seeing you. “Sorry, you surprised me. I’m just collecting an incoming memory—a young water sentient’s parent expressed how proud they are. I’m glad for memories that don’t need any adjustments.” They explain further by teaching you about memory magic; gain lesson 1430[/b] and exit to 287[/b].

597.text: The sentient is surprised to find you inside, but you swiftly set them at ease with some good nautical humor. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning about maritime trade among the cities of the world
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to 305[/b].
The sentient happily accepts your offer. Lose 1 card and gain its value plus $1, then exit to 305[/b].

choices.option: Pay $2 to buy an oil torch
choices.outcome: Gain item 1085[/b], then exit to 305[/b].

choices.option: Pay $7 to buy a pair of binoculars
choices.outcome: Gain item 972[/b], then exit to 305[/b].

601.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

602.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item 1090[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

603.action: COAX[/b] the animal over to you
603.text: The skittish animal isn’t easily convinced, but it’s intrigued by the wiring of your augsuit. Gain animal 820[/b].

604.action: ASK[/b] the sentient if they’re okay
604.text: The sentient pauses, their shoulders slumped, their eyes on the snow. “No,” they reply, “I’m not okay. But… I don’t want to talk about it. Not yet.” You assure them that you won’t ask again, yet you have the feeling that they could use some company. You may spend 1 morale to gain sentient 1312[/b] and go west to 603[/b], or you may continue.

605.action: ENTERTAIN[/b] the sentients with a song
605.text: The hunters are easily amused, and they’re soon singing along to music they’ve never heard before. Afterwards they invite you to join them by the fire for a meal. Regain any health lost from the cold on this location, then gain 1 morale and continue.

606.action: PERSUADE[/b] the sentient into letting you pass (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
606.text: The sentient points you to the cave they’re guarding (go to cave 021[/b]).

607.action: COAX[/b] a calf over to you
607.text: Without fear, they amble toward you and smell your hand. Heat radiates from its small body. Gain 2 health and continue.
