1272.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] your personal and professional goals
1272.text: You take a deep look at your aspirations, motivations, and priorities, and you see a path forward just running your own business here. Gain destiny 1601[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1273.text: You scale the windmill and are rewarded with a vast view of the surrounding area. Gain 2 boost on your character, then find the region where your windmill is located (see the look[/b] storybook) and use page 2 of the Book of Vantages to determine the page where your view is portrayed (view the resulting page).

1274.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] a troubled sentient within the embassy
1274.text: A sentient rushes into the embassy seeking asylum from the people of this planet. Choose one:

choices.option: Welcome the sentient into the embassy (if there is already a sentient granted asylum in the embassy and choose this option, lose them)
choices.outcome: You invite the sentient inside and hide them in the most secure room. Keep this sentient in your supply with its dice slots tucked under the embassy. You may not place challenge dice on the sentient, and you may only perform their actions and use their boost ability when you are on the embassy’s location. Roll 1 skill die and gain the resulting sentient: move[/b] (sentient 1309[/b]); look[/b] (sentient 1327[/b]); engage[/b] (sentient 1323[/b]); help[/b] (sentient 1312[/b]); take[/b] (sentient 1339[/b]); overpower[/b] (sentient 1330[/b]).

choices.option: Steer the sentient toward another safe hiding place
choices.outcome: The sentient gives you an appreciative nod and rushes away. Lose 1 morale and gain 1 boost.

1275.action: [b][MOVE] WISH[/b] for beauty (pay 1 boost from this structure; perform this action at most once per game)
1275.text: Lose up to 2 curses, and gain item 1172[/b].

1276.text: You dance like no one’s watching, and you realize that you have more rhythm than you thought. Gain ability 1469[/b].

1277.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] your personal and professional goals
1277.text: You take a deep look at your aspirations, motivations, and priorities, and you see a path forward just running your own business here. Gain destiny 1601[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1278.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] your personal and professional goals
1278.text: You take a deep look at your aspirations, motivations, and priorities, and you see a path forward just running your own business here. Gain destiny 1601[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1279.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] your personal and professional goals
1279.text: You take a deep look at your aspirations, motivations, and priorities, and you see a path forward just running your own business here. Gain destiny 1601[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

128.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the sword in hand
128.text: In a blur of motion, you swipe the sword, but it disappears when your feet touch the water. The sentient calls to you, waving the weapon: “Looking for this?” The mystery of the artifact remains unsolved; gain 1 boost.

1280.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] your personal and professional goals
1280.text: You take a deep look at your aspirations, motivations, and priorities, and you see a path forward just running your own business here. Gain destiny 1601[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1281.text: You scale the tower and are rewarded with a vast view of the surrounding area. Gain 2 boost on your character, then find the region where your tower is located (see the look[/b] storybook) and use page 2 of the Book of Vantages to determine the page where your view is portrayed (view the resulting page).

1282.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] your personal and professional goals
1282.text: You take a deep look at your aspirations, motivations, and priorities, and you see a path forward just running your own business here. Gain destiny 1601[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1283.text: Transfer any number of cards with coin values on them between your grid to your reserve.

1284.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] your personal and professional goals
1284.text: You take a deep look at your aspirations, motivations, and priorities, and you see a path forward just running your own business here. Gain destiny 1601[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1285.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] your personal and professional goals
1285.text: You take a deep look at your aspirations, motivations, and priorities, and you see a path forward just running your own business here. Gain destiny 1601[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1286.text: You scale the tower and are rewarded with a vast view of the surrounding area. Gain 2 boost on your character, then find the region where your tower is located (see the look[/b] storybook) and use page 2 of the Book of Vantages to determine the page where your view is portrayed (view the resulting page).

1287.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] tourists through the attached crystal cave
1287.text: The geological wonders of your cave awe the tourists and open their wallets. Gain $X (X is the number of boost on this structure), then pay 1 boost from this structure.

1288.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] your personal and professional goals
1288.text: You take a deep look at your aspirations, motivations, and priorities, and you see a path forward just running your own business here. Gain destiny 1601[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1289.text: Transfer any number of cards with coin values on them between your grid to your reserve.

129.text: The salt-encrusted handholds are just barely wide enough for you to pull yourself over the crest of the spire, from where you can see the spire is hollow. Go to interior 555[/b].

1290.text: Transfer any number of cards with coin values on them between your grid to your reserve.

1291.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] your personal and professional goals
1291.text: You take a deep look at your aspirations, motivations, and priorities, and you see a path forward just running your own business here. Gain destiny 1601[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1292.text: Transfer any number of cards with coin values on them between your grid to your reserve.

1293.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] your personal and professional goals
1293.text: You take a deep look at your aspirations, motivations, and priorities, and you see a path forward just running your own business here. Gain destiny 1601[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

013.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item

130.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the sentients in a non-threatening way to get a closer look at the game they’re playing
130.text: The sentients, particularly the sentient on the left, seem eager to include you in the game. Place card 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

131.text: The occupant weakly shoves you back outside. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all take[/b] results. If you pay 1 take[/b], pocket a pair of pliers (gain item 882[/b]) as you tumble out of the tent.

132.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] up to the stone to grab the sword
132.text: With both hands on the sword and your feet providing leverage against the stone, the blade slides out with little resistance. Gain item 889[/b].

133.text: The green cracks in the spire serve as excellent grips and footholds as you make your way up the tower. The view from above is illuminating. View page 45 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

134.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
134.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

135.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the ruins, gingerly avoiding rubble and debris
135.text: A cool breeze blows off the water and through the tall grass as you clamber up the hill. Go to interior 541[/b].

136.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to look around from above
136.text: To the south a vast archipelago of glowing volcanic islands dominates the horizon. The view might be even more spectacular at night. View page 45 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

137.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] among the bones in case a predator appears
137.text: The beast that killed this creature must have been massive, and you’re worried it will return. Fortunately, after you wait a few minutes, it seems that the coast is clear. Gain 1 morale and continue.

138.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to get a better view of the surrounding area
138.text: The volcanic archipelago to the south is ruggedly beautiful in its way. View page 45 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

139.text: As you land, your feet dig deep into the soft grass. As you lift them, you notice a green glow underneath. Gain item 1163[/b].

140.text: Other than the small critters who have made this cliffside area their home, this seems like an excellent place to build a business. Gain 1 help[/b] and continue.

141.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] among the bones in case a predator appears
141.text: Just as you tuck yourself away in the long grass, a massive shape darkens the sky. A whale-like creature hovers over the skeleton and then scratches its belly on the ribcage, humming in delight. Before you can act, the animal flies away to the west. Gain 1 boost and continue.

142.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the rusty structure, which is at risk of crumbling at any moment
142.text: The view is spectacular, and for a moment you forget how unsafe your vantage is. View page 45 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

143.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the ship through an empty escape pod port
143.text: The inside of the wreckage is in shambles, and you barely have enough room to turn around and move back outside. The good news is that the locker containing your power armor is still intact. The bad news is that you’ll need to cleave the wreckage in half to get to it. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

1434.action: [b][MOVE] RIDE[/b] the partial spaceship (if on a land, sky, or ocean location; if not, choose another action)
1434.text: The craft is noisy but functional enough to lift you slowly through the clouds. Pair your current region (see look[/b] storybook) with its sky location (page 48 in the Book of Vantages), then go to that location.

144.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] the sentient far to the north
144.text: Go to 475[/b], where the sentient warns you of the elemental to the east before departing.

145.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the sentient with extreme caution
145.text: The power emanating from the sentient is palpable, and the last thing you want to do is startle them. You circle around to the front where you think their face is, and to your delight they seem happy to meet you. They explain that they belong to a special sect of energy sentients who can distribute their energy across great distances to specific targets. It’s up to you whether to help others or to take energy for yourself. Gain either 1 help[/b] or 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

146.text: The sentient seems to be in a meditative state, making it easier for you to sneak around them. From your vantage on the shore, you see a similar sentient to the west and a current that may make it easier for you to swim north. Gain 2 move[/b].

147.text: The vastness of the calm sea makes you wonder if you could swim that far north, though you worry about the shadows lurking under the surface to the east. You scoop up some of the sand, sifting it between your fingers. Gain item 1194[/b].

148.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the Traveler at the water’s edge
148.text: Without turning to you, the Traveler speaks. “Most of the ancient beasts of this world went extinct long ago, their sun-bleached skeletons all that remain. But there are a few beasts that remain, including one believed to be fictional where we come from.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1602[/b] (place it in the center).

149.action: [b][MOVE] DANCE[/b] within the ethereal area at the base of the hill
149.text: As you dance, you feel a growing sense of connection and control over the many varied forms of life that surround you. Gain lesson 1419[/b].

015.text: Your lungs are aching for air by the time you clear the passage. Gain a random skill and go to the dungeon location matching that skill: move[/b]/help[/b]/take[/b] (016[/b]); look[/b] (019[/b]); engage[/b] (018[/b]); overpower[/b] (017[/b]).

150.text: You rush toward the animal, and it soars into the sky. Gain 1 morale.

151.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] the arch up to the rune
151.text: When you reach the rune, you realize that the stone is etched with hundreds of pairs of names. This appears to be a place for lovers to declare their eternal affection, something you did as a teenager. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost. Also soak in the view around you by viewing page 37 of the Book of Vantages.

152.text: The lush vegetation on the tiny island is beautiful from a distance, but up close the flora are barbed with sharp spikes. Plucking them could be dangerous. Gain 1 boost and continue.

1529.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

153.text: Just in case there’s a guard you can’t see, you hold your breath as long as possible before emerging in the shadows and bagging the amulet. Gain item 1176[/b].

1530.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

1531.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

154.text: You think you can find part of the shore that is protected from lava. Go to 159[/b].

155.text: Crossing lines dominate the northern sky. Are those contrails from other ships? Go to 160[/b].

1550.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

1551.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

156.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] away the animal hovering above the Traveler
156.text: The Traveler doesn’t seem perturbed as you shoo away the giant insect, but you feel brave for doing so. Gain 1 morale and continue.

1560.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

1561.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

1568.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

1569.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

157.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the gateway after swinging up onto the rock
157.text: As your hand touches the surface, the surface also reaches out to you, pulling you forward. You may resist to stay here and gain 1 boost or proceed into the gateway (go to 664[/b]).

1570.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

1571.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

1572.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

1573.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

1574.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

1575.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

1576.text: Remove all remaining elemental combat cards and gain 1 boost. You may later attempt to slay this elemental again, but you may not perform any other location actions here.

1577.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)

choices.option: If you are on location 000 or 001
choices.outcome: Read entry 1577[/b] in the Book of Secrets.. In general, you may not perform actions on locations 000[/b] or 001[/b]—you have found a secret option.

choices.option: If you are on any other location
choices.outcome: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if any player performs a location action on a location with an elemental. Gain any 1 skill.

1578.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)

choices.outcome: Read entry 1578[/b] in the Book of Secrets.. In general, you may not perform actions on location 000[/b]—you have found a secret option.

choices.option: If you are on any other location
choices.outcome: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if any player enters the Founder’s Temple on the western side of the capital city. Gain 1 move[/b].

1579.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1579.text: Instead of the original goal, you may complete the mission if any player replaces their character card with an alternative version (even with no boost on their character). Gain 1 look[/b] to help you master survival skills.

158.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
158.text: The sentient either doesn’t notice or doesn’t care as you sneak around the boulder. Just behind the sentient is a cave. As your eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave 039[/b].

1580.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1580.text: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if any player has at least 1 flora in their grid or reserve. Gain 1 overpower[/b] to help you pluck flowers.

1581.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)

choices.outcome: Read entry 1581[/b] in the Book of Secrets.. In general, you may not perform actions on location 000[/b]—you have found a secret option.

choices.option: If you are on any other location
choices.outcome: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if any player has a medicine item in their grid or reserve. Gain 1 help[/b] to help you brew.

1582.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1582.text: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if any player has at least 1 sentient in their grid or reserve. Gain 1 engage[/b] to help you recruit sentients.

1583.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1583.text: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if any player has cards with a total value of $20 or more in their grid or reserve. Gain 1 take[/b] to help you acquire items.

1584.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1584.text: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if there are at least 2 animals (wild or loyal) among players’ grids and reserves. Gain 1 help[/b] to help you attract animals.

1585.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1585.text: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if any player views or has viewed at least 1 page of the Book of Vantages. Gain 1 look[/b] to help you find books, maps, and views from above.

1586.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1586.text: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if any player has or had at least 1 incomplete quest in their supply. Gain 1 help[/b] to make it easier to gain a quest from a sentient.

1587.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1587.text: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if players collectively have at least $10. Gain either 1 engage[/b] or 1 take[/b], depending on whether you consider yourself more of a salesperson or a grifter.

1588.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1588.text: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if any player completes or has completed at least 1 personal objective. Gain 1 help[/b] to equip you better for this mission.

1589.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)

choices.outcome: Read entry 1589[/b] in the Book of Secrets.. In general, you may not perform actions on location 000[/b]—you have found a secret option.

choices.option: If you are on any other location
choices.outcome: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if any player gains or has gained a card FISH[/b] . Gain 1 overpower[/b] to help you fish.

159.text: The sentients turn toward you and ask if you’re seeking the services of a smelter or tattoo artist:

choices.outcome: If you pay $3, the sentient shakes off some lava and joins you (gain sentient 1316[/b] and quest 1695[/b]; add the quest horizontally to your supply). If you don’t pay, they recommend that you earn your keep in the City of Fire to the west of here (gain 1 boost and continue).
The sentient volunteers to accompany you. Gain sentient 1317[/b].

1590.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)

choices.outcome: Read entry 1590[/b] in the Book of Secrets.. In general, you may not perform actions on location 001[/b]—you have found a secret option.

choices.option: If you are on any other location
choices.outcome: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if any player hacks or cleaves a tower (or has already done this). Gain either 1 take[/b] or 1 overpower[/b].

1591.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1591.text: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if any player has at least 1 structure in their supply. Gain 1 help[/b] to help you build.

1592.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1592.text: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission by conquering part of a city (perform at least 1 CONQUER[/b] action on a city). Place 2 tokens on the mission and gain 1 overpower[/b].

1593.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1593.text: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if players have interactions (that do not result in gaining a curse) with at least 2 different sentients. Gain any 1 skill.

1594.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1594.text: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if any player has at least 1 crystal in their grid or reserve. Gain 1 overpower[/b] to help you hunt for crystals.

1595.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1595.text: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if there are at least 3 cards with an overpower[/b] challenge die slot or a “before overpower[/b]” boost power among grids and reserves. Gain 1 overpower[/b].

1596.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)

choices.outcome: Read entry 1596[/b] in the Book of Secrets.. In general, you may not perform actions on location 000[/b]—you have found a secret option.

choices.option: If you are on any other location
choices.outcome: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if players (collectively) have 2 more interactions with the Traveler (on different locations). Gain 1 engage[/b].

1597.action: [b][MOVE] PIVOT[/b] to an easier version of this mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1597.text: As an alternative to the original goal, you may instead complete the mission if any player has an item worth at least $10 in their grid or reserve. Gain 1 take[/b] to help you acquire an item.

160.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the building to find a rooftop entrance
160.text: As you hoped, there is a large vent on the roof. It’s quite hot, and you suffer a few burns as you slide inside. Suffer 1 heat damage and go to interior 562[/b].

161.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] the lava bursts, making your way north
161.text: You’re sweating profusely, but you make it through with only minor singed spots on your clothes. Go to 166[/b].

162.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the city by wading through the warm waters
162.text: You can’t wait to get a closer look at a civilization so integrated with nature. Go to city 525[/b].

163.text: The animal seems delighted to have a companion willing to guide them. Gain animal 813[/b].

164.text: Luckily, no one seems to be guarding the source of the lava; either that or you’re just an exceedingly clever rogue. Gain item 1177[/b].

1646.text: As soon as you and your friends join the sentient dancing in the square, a great gust of wind sentients crashes into the area to join the party. Gain 2 morale and add 1 boost to each sentient you have. Then rotate this quest and add it to your grid.

165.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the ship through a small hole in the side
165.text: The inside of the wreckage is in shambles, and you barely have enough room to turn around and move back outside. The good news is that the locker containing your power armor is still intact. The bad news is that you’ll need to cleave the wreckage in half to get to it. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

choices.option: Enter a portal to a set destination
choices.outcome: Go to cave 083[/b], location 106[/b], location 157[/b], or location 664[/b].

choices.option: Pay 1 morale to go to a destination of your choice

166.text: As you walk by the tree toward the house, one of the sizzling boils bursts open, burning your shoulder. Suffer 1 heat damage. The commotion alerts the owner of the house to your presence, and they chase you away. Go either east to 167[/b] or west to 165[/b].

167.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] the sentient into their home
167.text: You linger at the doorframe while the sentient opens a tap of scalding liquid and collapses onto a stool, their many legs jutting outwards. They notice you and invite you inside for a drink. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost; you may continue.

1675.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] up to one of the floating stones (on location 438)
1675.text: When you reach the stone, you cautiously put your hand underneath, wary of the weight of the rock crushing every bone in your arm. But nothing happens. On a whim, you lay beneath the stone and close your eyes. When you open them, you’re filled with new knowledge. Gain spell 1368[/b]. The sand sentient is intrigued by the spell implanted in your mind by the floating stone. They press a sandy palm onto your forehead, and they smile as the knowledge transfers into their mind as well. Rotate quest 1675[/b] and add it to your grid.

1676.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] from one horn-shaped rock to the other
1676.text: Elated from your leap across the rocks, you pause to enjoy the late afternoon sun. Sometimes the best quests are just for your benefit. Gain 2 morale, then rotate the quest and add it to your grid.

168.text: You tap into the enormous power emanating from the elemental, summoning aid from your crewmates. Their visages are projected across the planet to your location. Each player who has a fire composition card (in their grid or reserve) or pays 2 boost is considered summoned. If this is a solo game, you may select one unused starting character card (1435[/b]–1440[/b]) to act as a summoned player. Summoned players may temporarily place challenge dice in their grid as if they were on your location, but only you suffer penalties from the elemental. Summoned players remain summoned until you perform any action other than overpower-SLAY[/b][/b]. Continue.

1687.text: Transfer any number of cards with coin values on them between your grid to your reserve.

1688.text: Transfer any number of cards with coin values on them between your grid to your reserve.

1689.text: Transfer any number of cards with coin values on them between your grid to your reserve.

169.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the sacred monument with a sacrifice in mind
169.text: As onlookers and the Traveler watch, you choose an object (a coin or an item) to lose in the lava. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Sentients look a bit confused, but they appreciate the gesture. Gain 1 morale and 1 move[/b].

choices.option: Lose a weapon from your grid or reserve
choices.outcome: Sentients applaud your participation in their tradition; gain spell 1367[/b] and 1 move[/b].
Gain 1 move[/b].

1690.text: Transfer any number of cards with coin values on them between your grid to your reserve.

1691.text: Transfer any number of cards with coin values on them between your grid to your reserve.

1692.text: Transfer any number of cards with coin values on them between your grid to your reserve.

170.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the rock into the cavity
170.text: After a struggle, the rock slides seamlessly into place. As it does, a jolt surges up your spine and down your arms. You’ve been endowed with a new power. Gain spell 1367[/b].

1701.text: Transfer any number of cards with coin values on them between your grid to your reserve.

1702.text: The giant green creatures are enjoying their freedom and are in no rush to return home. Roll X skill dice; for each help[/b] result, you may reroll 1 other die. Then place 1 token on quest 1702[/b] for each move[/b] result.

1705.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] from the rescue team so you can pursue your new life on this planet
1705.text: You remain hidden as the rescue team searches the planet, finding only ship wreckage, the rescue team assumes that no one survived the crash. Lose destiny 1705[/b], gain destiny 1600[/b] (place it in the center), and proceed with the next player’s turn.

171.text: As you wander, careful to avoid the lava, you notice a sailboat to the east and a strange archway to the west. You also detect a gap in the tide to the north. Gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b].

172.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] into the waves to the wayward boat
172.text: High-stepping over the waves, you reach the boat and take the helm. The leaf sentient crew members express their gratitude and invite you either to join them on their northward journey (gain 1 morale and quest 1671[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply) or to take the entire boat after dropping them off on the northern shore (gain vehicle 1156[/b]).

173.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
173.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the super-charged runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune and continue.

174.text: Your spirited performance delights the judges, and they welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the take-ENDURE[/b][/b] action.

175.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the swift sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
175.text: You’re probably not fast enough to outrun the winged sentient, but you bolt through the plains to the north until you spot a breezier sentient relaxing in another tent. Go to 180[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

176.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a sentient away from the twister
176.text: The sentient lands awkwardly on the ground, their wing bent at a painful angle. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go east, south, or west.
Gain $4.

choices.option: Lose 1 time, pay 2 boost, or pay 1 help to heal their wing
choices.outcome: They accept your apology and your aid, and they teach you to dance. Gain ability 1469[/b] and 1 morale.

177.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with a flag in hand
177.text: The people in the surrounding area are furious that you would steal one of these flags. Gain item 1188[/b] and curse 1387[/b].

178.action: [b][MOVE] DANCE[/b] in place as the sentient draws near
178.text: The sentient pauses… and then mimics the same dance move. You’ve stumbled upon some kind of party or ceremony among the flowers! Other sentients join the revelry. When you’re done, they offer you one of the flowers as a gift. Gain flora 1076[/b]; you may go north to 183[/b].

179.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the blissfully unaware sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
179.text: The flowers looming overhead are downright Seussian. Go to 184[/b].

180.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the sentient, intentionally making noise so you don’t surprise them
180.text: The elder responds well to your approach, and they ask you to join them in the shade for a refreshment. Gain 1 health. They mostly talk about flags, one of the ways wind sentients can see wind patterns from a distance. If you’re interested, you could place some flags in the surrounding grasslands (gain quest 1669[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply). If not, gain 1 boost and continue.

181.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the sentients, bowing as you draw close
181.text: One of the sentients cautions you to stay away from the sacred seed. Choose one:

choices.outcome: When they see that you heed their warning, they offer you a token of their people. Gain item 1212[/b].

choices.option: Ask for more details about the sacred seed
choices.outcome: They share that the chest contains an extremely rare seed. They have been tasked with guarding it until the day comes for the seed to blossom and spread Spor across the world. Gain 2 boost.

182.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the sentients, jumping to your feet and racing ahead (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
182.text: You dodge the sentients and sprint north across the open prairie. Go to 187[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

183.text: At first it’s difficult to discern and copy the sentient’s dance moves, but a distinct pattern emerges. Gain ability 1469[/b]. Eventually, the dancer acknowledges you and asks if you’d like to accompany them to the Trial of Life. If you agree, gain sentient 1305[/b] and go east to 184[/b].

184.text: Your spirited performance delights the queen, and she welcomes you to participate in the trial. Continue with the help-ENLIVEN[/b][/b] action.

185.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the ruins, gingerly avoiding rubble and debris
185.text: Birds coast on the dry air above you as you climb up the rocky hill, watching your footing as you go. Go to interior 542[/b].

186.text: The path leads directly into the town. Go to city 518[/b].

187.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the artifact in hand
187.text: In a blur of motion, you swipe the artifact and leave pursuers cursing you in your wake. Gain curse 1387[/b]. If you pay 4 boost, your attempts to use the artifact are successful (gain item 1003[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

188.text: From the top of the turbine, you get a better look at the rusty gears and the surrounding area. View page 35 of the Book of Vantages and gain 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

189.text: You pick up a family of leeches from the muck, but you eventually arrive at the far shore. Lose 1 health and go north to 194[/b].

190.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] blindly into the pitch-black of the cave
190.text: Despite the impressive width of the cave mouth, you’re increasingly overwhelmed by claustrophobia as you move deeper and deeper inside. Just when you can’t take it any longer, a cavern opens before you. Lose 1 morale and go to cave 036[/b].

191.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
191.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

192.text: How often do you let yourself twirl around in the wind? The breeze lifts your lonely spirits. Gain 2 morale.

193.action: [b][MOVE] WANDER[/b] around the hill, looking for inspiration
193.text: The grass on the hill is soft, but the soil is a mix of pebbles and earth—it may be difficult to dig into, but the ground would soundly support a building here. Gain 1 help[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

194.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] the twister as you head north (if the twister is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
194.text: The gale-force winds leave you unsteady on your feet at first, but you sprint without stopping until you reach (much more tranquil) foothills to the north. Go to 199[/b] and gain 1 morale.

195.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the gate to the north; you may pay $2
195.text: Green lights scan your body as you pass through the gateway. If you paid $2, gain 2 health—the gateway provides a health benefit for those willing to pay. Whether or not you paid, go to 225[/b].

196.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the ship through a small hole in the side
196.text: The inside of the wreckage is in shambles, and you barely have enough room to turn around and move back outside. The good news is that the locker containing your power armor is still intact. The bad news is that you’ll need to cleave the wreckage in half to get to it. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

197.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the sentient, showing that you mean no harm
197.text: The sentient requests that you wait until they place the final flag in the ground, then they turn to you. “Looking for company?” they ask. Gain sentient 1307[/b].

198.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the orb off the cliff
198.text: The orb shatters on the rocks below, exposing a pink sentient. They were looking for work, but now they can’t read any job postings on the orb. They begrudgingly latch onto you. Gain sentient 1327[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

199.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the oblivious sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
199.text: A circular rock formation in the distance looks like a window to the sky. Go to 229[/b].

020.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] up to the barrier, ignoring the puzzle trap
020.text: Unfortunately, you find the barrier sealed tight. Gain 1 boost and continue.

200.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north through the misty valley
200.text: You descend into the opaque fog below, where the poor visibility and rugged terrain together make navigation all but impossible. Roll 6 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. You may pay 2 look[/b] to go to interior 563[/b]. Otherwise, go to 205[/b]. Either way, also gain 1 morale.

201.text: The sentient swivels in midair, surprised by your sudden appearance. “State your name and intent!” they demand. Unable to find you in their database, they explain that they patrol the area around the King of Thieves to the northeast, and they don’t want any trouble from you if you head there. Gain 1 boost.

202.text: After the sentient flies away in frustration, you find yourself in a colorful flower patch. You unearth a particularly beautiful flower, shaking dirt from its roots. Gain flora 1075[/b].

203.text: The narrow staircase doesn’t leave you with much room to maneuver, but a well-timed spin move leaves the guard grasping at air. Inside the building you find a hostage, whom you free, much to the disdain of their captor. Gain sentient 1349[/b] and curse 1391[/b].

204.text: The result of you entering the building is based on whether anyone is inside. Proceed if you already know this status; if not, roll a challenge die to determine the status randomly:

choices.option: No one is home (blank challenge die)
choices.outcome: Go to interior 556[/b]; on your next turn, you may not perform the engage-TRADE[/b][/b] action on interior 556[/b] before you go to another location.
The startled family shoves you back outside and locks the door. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all take[/b] results. If you pay 1 take[/b], gain item 1040[/b] as you avoid the slammed door.

205.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] up to the higher lotus
205.text: This hard-to-reach lotus is thriving despite the chilly temperatures. It would be a beautiful specimen to pluck. Gain 1 overpower[/b] and continue.

206.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the city through the primary gates
206.text: A departing sentient brushes against you as you saunter through the main entrance, and you realize they pinched a coin from your pocket. Lose $1 and go to city 522[/b].

207.text: Your spirited performance delights the king, and he welcomes you to participate in the trial. Continue with the take-BYPASS[/b][/b] action.

208.text: On the inside of the orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 3 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NW-3. They also mention that you can leave messages to other travelers on the orb exterior. Gain 1 boost and continue.

209.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] away the animal (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
209.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animal. Gain 1 morale; you may go north to 214[/b].

021.text: Even with a running start, you barely manage to clear the gap. Move deeper into the planet to cave 079[/b].

210.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] the magnetic pull of the object
210.text: You dart around the giant orestone, evading its magnetic grasp. A metal sentient compliments your dexterity, asking with a wink if you’re one of the infamous bandits who hide in the clouds south of here. You may go north to 215[/b] or south to 205[/b].

211.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the collector to see what they want
211.text: “Thank you for asking, little one. The item I covet is the Eye of the Ancient. I know exactly where it is—far northeast of here—but all my attempts to acquire it have failed.” Gain 1 boost and quest 1658[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

212.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animal. Gain 1 morale. As the beast rumbles away, you catch a hearty whiff of the large lotus on the right. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse.

213.text: You exploit a blind spot in the sentinels’ predictable route. Either go north to 218[/b], or suffer 1 heat damage and go to interior 513[/b].

214.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] north precariously across the narrow path
214.text: You have to think about every step (gain ability 1501[/b]), but you make it safely to cave 034[/b].

215.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the eastern side of the building until you reach an open window
215.text: Before you enter, you hear the hum of the angular device hovering within reach. As you place your palm against it, your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune. Gain 1 morale and go to interior 557[/b].

216.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the building through the front door
216.text: The museum docent charges you a small fee to walk around the exhibits. If you pay $1, go to interior 564[/b]. Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

217.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north up and over one of the rocky outcroppings that break up the fence
217.text: The fence is relatively easy for you to bypass… but is that a good idea? Go to 222[/b].

218.text: As you encircle the stone, you realize that your feet are no longer touching the ground—you are levitating in orbit with the other shards. You kick away, falling to the snow, a newfound power surging through you. Gain lesson 1431[/b].

219.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the Traveler about escaping this planet
219.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “There are several ways you could leave, but they require a power source like that controlled by the metal sentients.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1607[/b] (place it in the center).

022.text: You’re able to contort yourself past the first few laser beams, but the slightest misstep sends you sprawling backwards in pain. Lose 1 health, then gain 1 boost and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

220.text: The cold stone digs into your fingers as you ascend, but the view from the top is worth it. View page 36 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

221.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] the mechanical hydra (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
221.text: You bend and twist to avoid the beast; choose one:

choices.outcome: if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b] when you notice that the hydra only really cares about guarding the cave.

222.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the animal through the blizzard
222.text: The pup leans against you for comfort, trusting your presence. It seems particularly happy to head northeast. Gain animal 810[/b] and 1 morale.

223.action: [b][MOVE] WANDER[/b] around the deep snowdrifts surrounding the lorestones
223.text: You think you hear the jangling of coins at your feet at one point, and at another you see a golden glow within the stones. Gain either 1 take[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

224.text: You press against the ridge, as far from the sheer drop as you can get. Go to 420[/b].

choices.outcome: There’s no one inside, so you bundle up the tent quietly. Gain item 1032[/b].
The occupants shove you back outside. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all take[/b] results. If you pay 1 take[/b], pocket an item as you tumble out of the tent (gain item 908[/b]).

226.text: Your legs ache from the long descent, but your curiosity about the source of the glimmering helix of light below sustains your motivation. Gain ability 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to 231[/b].

227.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] the vehicle into the air
227.text: You ease yourself onto the carpet, which adjusts itself automatically for your volume and waits for a command. Gain vehicle 985[/b].

228.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to get a better view of the surrounding area
228.text: To the north, warm amber-colored lights in the vast swamp below glimmer among the dense trees. View page 31 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

229.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the steep cliff
229.text: The slope of the rocky cliff face on the north side of the curiously shaped mountain is unforgiving, but eventually you make your way into a dense swamp punctuated by glowing lights. Gain ability 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to 234[/b].

023.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the gate out of your way
023.text: You can push the gate all you want, but it isn’t going anywhere. Gain 1 boost and continue.

230.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] your palm into the nearby rune
230.text: With your hand blocking the rune, nothing happens. Gain 1 boost and continue.

231.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the artifact in hand
231.text: In a blur of motion, you swipe the artifact and leave pursuers cursing you in your wake. Gain curse 1395[/b]. If you pay 4 boost, your attempts to use the artifact are successful (gain item 1001[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

232.text: As you wait in the shadows, the light begins to resemble an intelligent life form. You realize you’re witnessing the birth of a sentient made of pure energy. The light is the same color as the lanterns that hang all around you—they must be where this type of sentient lives. Gain 2 boost.

233.text: Your spirited performance delights the judges, and they welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the look-TRANSLATE[/b][/b] action.

234.text: You begin to step forward, but they demand that you stop. “The springblade lilies in this swamp have a taste for landwalkers like you. We advise that you walk around them, not over them.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

235.action: [b][MOVE] WANDER[/b] around the moss of the swamp
235.text: The Traveler talks to you while you roam. “You’ll find the entire swampland to the east to be quite difficult to traverse, whether you’re wading through the muck or trailblazing through tight clusters of trees.” Gain 1 boost.

236.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to view the surrounding area
236.text: Soft yellow lights the color of old sodium lamps dapple the swamp all around you. View page 31 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

237.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] into the orb after the sentient leaves
237.text: The orb displays a partial map of the world. Look at page 3 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NW-1. Gain 1 boost.

238.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the city through the primary gates
238.text: An eerie-yet-welcoming light draws you into the city. Go to city 520[/b].

239.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] a tree to covertly enter the treehouse
239.text: The misty air and the rugged wooden construction remind you of the pirate ships you built in your grandparents’ backyard when you were young. Go to interior 565[/b].

024.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] blindly into the pitch-black of the cave
024.text: You quickly realize that this isn’t a short passage, and you return to the entrance. Gain 1 boost and continue.

240.text: You surprise the current occupant of the orb. Fortunately, they’re curious about you, and there’s enough room for two inside. They show you that the orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 3 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NW-1. Gain 1 boost.

241.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the crystal from the grip of the stone
241.text: The crystal resists moving, but you manage to wrest it from the stone’s influence. Gain item 1161[/b].

242.text: You tap into the enormous power emanating from the elemental, summoning aid from your crewmates. Their visages are projected across the planet to your location. Each player who has an energy composition card (in their grid or reserve) or pays 2 boost is considered summoned. If this is a solo game, you may select one unused starting character card (1435[/b]–1440[/b]) to act as a summoned player. Summoned players may temporarily place challenge dice in their grid as if they were on your location, but only you suffer penalties from the elemental. Summoned players remain summoned until you perform any action other than overpower-SLAY[/b][/b]. Continue.

243.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
243.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

244.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] while you wait for the sentient to exit the orb
244.text: The sentient finally finishes their business inside the orb, and you enter it to find a map of the area. Look at page 3 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NW-1. Gain 1 boost.

245.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] a tree to get a better look at a lantern
245.text: You tap on the glass, and a tiny sentient inside is irate that you would disturb them in their home. The angrier they are, the more light the lantern casts. Gain item 1187[/b] and curse 1395[/b].

246.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
246.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

247.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north around the sentients (if they are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
247.text: You stay behind the runestones, just in case. Go to 663[/b].

248.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] the boat into the stream
248.text: Careful not to attract attention, you set the boat adrift and climb aboard. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and $4.

249.text: The animal recognizes that you’re looking for navigational help. Gain 1 morale; you may go either north to 665[/b] or south to 244[/b].

025.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the gate out of your way
025.text: You can push the gate all you want, but it isn’t going anywhere. Gain 1 boost and continue.

250.text: You find a way to reach the glowing box without impaling yourself on any of the spiked rocks. Gain item 952[/b].

251.text: The ground lurches beneath you, and all goes black. Go to cave 049[/b].

252.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the Traveler or the sentient

choices.option: Approach the Traveler about the possibility of escaping this planet
choices.outcome: “Is your home really that much better than this planet? There are vibrant cities to the north and south of here where you can make a new home.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1601[/b] (place it in the center).

choices.option: Approach the sentient about their profession
choices.outcome: The sentient boasts that they are a falconer—they control marrow vultures who scout the surrounding area. The bones they wear reflect their craft. You may either gain a marrow vulture (animal 826[/b]) with 1 boost on it, or gain sentient 1331[/b].

253.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the treasure chest into the pit
253.text: When you push the chest off the ledge, it smashes onto the scalding rocks in the pit and bursts into flames. Luckily, one of the contents of the chest—a blue crystal—falls within reach. Gain item 1160[/b].

254.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] the source of the tracks
254.text: You realize that it’s not one but two animals that created these footprints. You can tell from the tracks that the animal to the north is hungry and that the animal to the east is scared. Choose one:Gain 1 boost and go north to 259[/b].Gain 1 boost and go east to 443[/b].Remain here to gain 1 boost and continue.

255.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the sentients (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
255.text: The sentients make a halfhearted attempt to snag you, but you’re much faster than them. Go to 260[/b].

256.text: You find a lotus defying the odds in the dry heat. The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

257.text: The birds fly away, leaving you alone with the sentient. “Thank you for doing that,” they say, their eyes downcast. “I came to this arid land with the hope of planting seeds with a friend to the north, but I stumbled into this trap. I could really use some company.” Gain sentient 1354[/b].

258.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with one of the peddler’s wares
258.text: You grab the mace dangling from the peddler’s arm and run away. Gain item 969[/b] and go to an adjacent location (either a listed location, where you’ll find cooler temperatures, or the hot desert to the north (263[/b]) or west (257[/b]).

259.text: It doesn’t take much to scare away the animal, but you trip over a spiky plant, uprooting it. Gain flora 1053[/b].

026.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] around the trap toward the barrier
026.text: The heat of the magma verges on the unbearable, and it quickly begins to rise as you attempt to bypass the puzzle. Gain 1 boost and continue.

260.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the animal in the direction of a skeleton
260.text: Unsure as to your intentions, the animal doesn’t blink as you lead it away. Gain animal 825[/b].

261.text: Your spirited performance delights the judges, and they welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the overpower-HUNT[/b][/b] action.

262.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] into the arid town, which appears to be made entirely from the skeletal remains of gargantuan beasts
262.text: Though a little unsettling, the bone-based architecture of the city is surprisingly functional. Go to city 524[/b].

263.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the flower with caution in case it’s a trap
263.text: As you tiptoe toward the flower, the soil around it bursts to life, the stone-like bulbs pummeling you from all sides. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 move[/b]. You’re caked in sweat and sand by the time you put the flower to rest. Gain flora 1052[/b].

264.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] up to the ruins, gingerly avoiding rubble and debris as you enter
264.text: Before you enter the ruins, you can’t resist pushing the large rune on the device levitating on the far side of the plateau. Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune and go to interior 543[/b].

265.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] until the coast is clear, then move north (if you interacted with the sentients, reduce this cost to 1)
265.text: The path of scraped dirt from the dragged sentient extends as far as you can see. Go to 270[/b].

266.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the building through the front door
266.text: Eyeing your purse, a greeter eagerly welcomes you inside. Go to interior 558[/b].

267.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] the swift sentient north (if you already interacted with the sentient, reduce this cost to 2)
267.text: Gain 1 health as you pass through the oasis. Go to 272[/b].

268.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the Traveler with the possibility of escaping this planet
268.text: “If you must leave, with enough effort you could repair your spaceship. There is wreckage directly to the north of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center).

269.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] north against the increasing wind
269.text: You’re able to move through the sandstorm to 274[/b], but not before the sand leaves hundreds of shallow gashes in your skin. Lose 1 health.

027.text: You’re able to contort yourself past the first few laser beams, but the slightest misstep sends you sprawling backwards in pain. Lose 1 health, then gain 1 boost and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

270.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the chest off the ledge
270.text: The chest bursts open upon impact, and all you can find among the mud is a bright red crystal. Gain item 1165[/b].

271.text: You’re rewarded with a breathtaking view of the surrounding area. View page 33 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost; continue.

272.text: You can’t make much sense of the blobs, but you’re amazed by the sheer scale of the skeleton, which yields some craftable ivory. Gain item 1186[/b].

273.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the ship through a small hole in the side
273.text: The inside of the wreckage is in shambles, and you barely have enough room to turn around and move back outside. The good news is that the locker containing your power armor is still intact. The bad news is that you’ll need to cleave the wreckage in half to get to it. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

274.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] from one horn-shaped rock to the other
274.text: Despite the simplicity of the act, it is satisfying in the same way as any arbitrary accomplishment or dare from your childhood. Gain 2 morale and continue.

275.text: The view at the top of the old structure gives you a new perspective of the severe beauty of this corner of the world. View page 38 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

276.text: The sentients wave you over to join the next game. Place card 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

277.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north under the beast (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
277.text: The animal grabs at you, finding only air where you were seconds before. Go to 282[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

278.text: As you approach the wall, you’re swarmed from all sides by cloaked sentients bearing shields covered in tiny mirrors. The sun’s reflection off the shields blinds you. Gain 1 boost and read entry 278[/b] in the Book of Secrets.

279.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the orb off the cliff
279.text: The orb shatters on the distant rocks below. The sentient is so fast that they’re able to run diagonally along the edge of the cliff instead of falling. Gain curse 1390[/b] and 1 boost.

028.text: The sentinel might as well be a wall of muscle and armor; you can dance in front of them all you want, but you can’t move past them. Gain 1 boost and continue.

280.text: “With this sentient’s knowledge of time travel, there’s a fool’s hope that I could see my family again.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1608[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

281.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the building through the front door
281.text: The main entrance is wide open, so you walk right inside. Go to interior 795[/b].

282.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] behind some rocks in case the predator is still in the area
282.text: You realize after a few minutes that whatever killed this beast is long gone. The swirling sand reveals a glimmer of green under the skeleton; gain item 1163[/b].

283.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
283.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

284.text: You can feel the crystal’s power as you draw near. You remove it from the rock, and as you do, the three treasure chests on the ground below burst open. Fierce guardians emerge from each and surround the rock. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Then lose 1 health unless you pay 1 overpower[/b]. Gain item 1162[/b].

285.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the ship through a small hole in the side
285.text: The inside of the wreckage is in shambles, and you barely have enough room to turn around and move back outside. The good news is that the locker containing your power armor is still intact. The bad news is that you’ll need to cleave the wreckage in half to get to it. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

286.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the multi-headed sentient as the sun lowers in the sky (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
286.text: The sentient is too busy debating something untranslatable with itself to notice you slipping behind a rock outcrop. Go to 291[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

287.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] to the peak of the mountain
287.text: It is a treacherous ascent, but you find a well-worn route to the top. First, view page 38 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost as you look down at the world below. Then, go to interior 592[/b] and gain 1 morale.

288.text: The mouse-like creature chirps excitedly as it leads you away from the overly convenient gateway before scampering away. Go west to 287[/b].

289.text: You take a running start and leap off the bridge to the other side. Go to 294[/b] and gain 1 morale.

029.text: You’re able to contort yourself past the first few laser beams, but the slightest misstep sends you sprawling backwards in pain. Lose 1 health, then gain 1 boost and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

290.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to get a better view of the surrounding area
290.text: Patches of fog obscure parts of the rugged terrain below. View page 38 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

291.text: As you walk past the pit, the sand under your feet gives way and a massive centipede bursts upward. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go north to 296[/b].
Go to cave 049[/b].

292.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] blindly into the pitch-black of the cave
292.text: You’re increasingly overwhelmed by claustrophobia as you move deeper and deeper inside. Just when you can’t take it any longer, a cavern opens before you. Lose 1 morale and go to cave 025[/b].

293.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the narrow, dark hole on the side of the cliff
293.text: You crawl through the hole, and it dumps you into a crowd of people inside the mountain. Go to cave 085[/b].

294.text: The occupants wake up from the intrusion and shove you back outside. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all take[/b] results. If you pay 1 take[/b], pocket an item as you tumble out of the tent. Gain item 884[/b].

295.text: The sentient shifts before your eyes, moving faster than you can imagine. They relax when they see you aren’t an intruder in the night. They return to their work, sharing that the orbs they create are wayfinders for travelers to know where they are. They’re made of glass, but the glass liquifies upon touch to let you enter. Gain 1 health and 1 boost.

296.text: The lorestones glow from within. Gain 1 overpower[/b] and continue.

297.text: Daylight should give some relief from the chill of night. Go to 327[/b].

298.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] from one lorestone to the next
298.text: You jump onto the highest lorestone and soak in the view, illuminated by millions of stars and the northern dawn. View page 34 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

299.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to view the surrounding area
299.text: The dry mesas and rocky sands of the desert give way to a blue ocean to the north. View page 34 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

030.text: The sentinel might as well be a wall of muscle and armor; you can dance in front of them all you want, but you can’t move past them. Gain 1 boost and continue.

300.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] northwest across the natural bridge
300.text: You’re baffled that such a large animal could traverse such precarious terrain. Go to 383[/b].

301.text: The sentient flies away, leaving you alone on the hillside. Gain 1 morale and 1 move[/b]; you may continue.

302.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] quietly into one of the buildings so as not to disturb the birds
302.text: You are surrounded by nests of various shapes, sizes, and compositions—bowl, cavity, ground, platform, and even some more unusual shapes. Of the birds inside, most are sleeping, though a few chirp at you. You pocket a few eggs and leave (gain item 1213[/b]); as you do, you see an exit directly through the mountain. You may go north to 307[/b].

303.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] one of the stones into the sea
303.text: The large stone hits the water with a very satisfying “plunk!” Gain 2 morale.

304.text: The only guard you can see is distracted by the pirate ship. Go to interior 566[/b].

305.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the exterior of the building
305.text: It’s quite a vertical ascent, but fortunately the wood is old and warped. Go to interior 597[/b] and gain 1 morale.

306.text: Just in case there’s a guard you can’t see, you sneak along the shoreline, the waves spraying you with saltwater. Having made it to the base of the shard, you may pay 2 boost to extract it (if so, gain item 1216[/b]). If not, gain 1 take[/b] and continue.

307.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] to the peak of the island
307.text: The lush hill is easy to climb, and soon you’re treated with a resplendent view. Look at page 44 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost; you may continue.

308.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the animal to the shallows nearby so you can inspect it for injuries
308.text: The animal winces and cries as it settles in the sand at your feet. Gain 1 help[/b] and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue with the help-HEAL[/b][/b] or overpower-RELIEVE[/b][/b] action.

309.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the pirates to a nearby treasure chest
309.text: The pirates cheer you from above and toss you a flagon of ale, though they don’t invite you aboard—they probably don’t want to share the spoils with you. Gain item 856[/b].

031.text: The sentinel might as well be a wall of muscle and armor; you can dance in front of them all you want, but you can’t move past them. Gain 1 boost and continue.

310.text: As you saunter around the shoreline, you notice an abundance of beautiful flowers. You unearth a particularly pretty patch, shaking dirt from its roots. Gain flora 1067[/b] and continue.

311.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] into the water, following the steps
311.text: You find that the path leads underwater by design. You follow the steps until you’re fully submerged. Choose one:

choices.option: You may suffer 1 hypoxia damage to proceed even deeper
choices.outcome: After inhaling too much water, you emerge dripping wet in an underground cave. Go to cave 089[/b].
Gain 1 boost and continue.

312.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] the boat into the current
312.text: You feel at home at the helm of this fine vessel. Unfortunately, it’s technically not your vessel, and the owner—whose footprints are in the sand—curses you from the shore. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and curse 1386[/b].

313.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] away the animal as you wade north (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
313.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animal. Gain 1 morale and go north to 318[/b].

314.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] the boat into the current
314.text: You feel at home at the helm of this fine vessel. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and $4.

315.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the book in hand
315.text: It’s more difficult that it looks to wrestle the book free from its stand, but with a sharp tug it’s in your arms. You scamper into the forest. Gain item 1192[/b].

316.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] away the animal by waving a freshly plucked mushroom in its face
316.text: The creature shrieks and skitters away. Gain item 1136[/b].

317.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the animal into the trees before turning to find its hunter
317.text: The creature blends in perfectly with the trees, to the point that you can’t even locate it. Gain 1 morale and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

318.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the artifact in hand
318.text: In a blur of motion, you swipe the artifact and leave pursuers cursing you in your wake. Gain curse 1388[/b]. If you pay 4 boost, your attempts to use the artifact are successful (gain item 1008[/b]). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

319.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] the animal away from the rocks
319.text: The skittish animal is frightened by your aggressive approach, and it skitters into the brush. Gain 1 move[/b].

032.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the gate out of your way
032.text: You can push the gate all you want, but it isn’t going anywhere. Gain 1 boost and continue.

320.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to view the surrounding area
320.text: This tower sits where several regions meet. Choose one:

choices.outcome: View page 39 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.
View page 40 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.
View page 44 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.
View page 43 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

321.text: The stoic sentient welcomes you inside, where you find rows of classrooms along a main hallway. One is filling with young sentients in three queues; the other is empty. If you would like to join a line, go to interior 600[/b]. If you would like to be alone in a room, go to interior 567[/b].

322.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the sentient, letting them know of your presence
322.text: The little sentient shyly shows you their creation, a special flower arrangement. They mention that their focus at the academy is life magic, which gives them a slight advantage when working with flora. They share a basic lesson with you. Gain lesson 1419[/b].

323.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] in the back of the class, hoping the teacher won’t notice you
323.text: The instructor is explaining the sacrifice required to tap into life mana. Gain lesson 1419[/b].

324.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to get a better view of the surrounding area
324.text: The unruly terrain to the north must be a product of perverse and often baffling geological processes. View page 40 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

325.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away from the golden predators with the tiny animal in hand
325.text: Your surprise tactic pays off, and the golden spiders don’t have time to react. The animal is trembling with fear. Gain animal 817[/b].

326.text: It only takes a moment for the animal to realize that you’re the predator in this situation, and with a spin of their web they’re rappelling down the canyon. Gain 1 morale.

327.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the chest off the ledge onto the path
327.text: The chest lands with a thud, disarming the trap set underneath. Gain either 1 engage[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

328.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the slow sentient
328.text: The sentient makes a feeble attempt to catch you, but you easily evade them. As you do, you’re drawn to the sweet smell of the nearby lotus. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. Go north to 333[/b].

329.text: Clearly exhausted, they mumble something about falling off course while looking for a legendary cave. With one of their arms in your reassuring grasp, you gather what information you can and head east to 467[/b]. Gain sentient 1313[/b] and quest 1670[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

033.text: Even with a running start, you barely manage to clear the gap. Move deeper into the planet to cave 093[/b].

330.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the button on the device
330.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

331.text: You’re intimidated by the large gaps to the north and south, but the lotus has a calming effect on you. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. You may continue.

332.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the city through the primary gates
332.text: If you pay 1 engage[/b] or $1, the guards make way for you to enter city 530[/b]. Otherwise, the guards refuse to let you pass; gain 1 boost and continue.

333.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the shop through the front door
333.text: The proprietor is happy for the opportunity to sell to you. Go to interior 568[/b].

334.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the orb to see if it contains anything to aid the sentient
334.text: The orb shows your current position in the world, but it offers no insights into gold sentients. Look at page 4 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NE-2. Gain 1 boost.

335.text: No one stops or notices you as you covertly enter the stall. Go to interior 569[/b].

336.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] into the depths of the gap
336.text: As you descend deeper into the darkening abyss, the silence of the world above is replaced by the sound of a crowd cheering. You drop down into a hidden cavern filled with sentients. Go to cave 085[/b] and gain 1 morale.

337.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the Traveler about the possibility of escaping this planet
337.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “Instead of leaving, you could just save up enough coins—or acquire them in a morally ambiguous way—to buy or build a home.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1600[/b] (place it in the center).

338.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] your way into the resort using a tether
338.text: When you reach the top, a guard peers over the ledge. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The guard helps you up (go to interior 570[/b]).

choices.option: Push the button on the runecaster hovering above the resort
choices.outcome: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 help[/b]. Sensing your good intentions, the guard helps you into the resort; go to interior 570[/b].
The guard pockets the coins, leads you inside the resort, and subtly gestures toward an ornate ring. Go to interior 570[/b].

339.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the artifact in hand
339.text: In a blur of motion, you swipe the artifact and leave pursuers cursing you in your wake. Gain curse 1393[/b]. If you pay 4 boost, your attempts to use the artifact are successful (gain item 999[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

034.text: The sentinel might as well be a wall of muscle and armor; you can dance in front of them all you want, but you can’t move past them. Gain 1 boost and continue.

340.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] the sailboat out of the mud
340.text: The owner of the sailboat is grateful for your assistance, and they offer you either one of the contents of the nearby treasure chest they recently refilled (gain item 1151[/b]) or a calming quest westward to the horn rocks (gain 1 move[/b] and quest 1676[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

341.text: Your spirited performance delights the judges, and they welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the engage-TRADE[/b][/b] action.

342.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] onto a ferry heading into the city
342.text: No one notices you sneak aboard, but trying to blend in among the gold sentients on the ferry is quite difficult. Go to city 529[/b].

343.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] across the canal to the north shore
343.text: The water tastes slightly brackish. Go to 507[/b].

344.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the shoreline, keeping an eye on the city’s reflection in the water
344.text: When you reach the shoreline, your suspicions are confirmed—the “city” in the distance is a well-crafted mirage. When you point this out to a local, they offer you a mischievous glance.
