413.text: You enjoy a long walk south along a riverside path. Go to 412[/b].

414.text: As you head east, ashes fall from the sky like dark snowflakes. Go to 120[/b].

414.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north toward the floating stones
414.text: You hike along the rough coastline—at least the water here is calm for the moment. Go to 415[/b].

414.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south through the calm waters
414.text: The mist idly drifting over the water refreshes you. Go to 413[/b].

415.text: You get goosebumps while walking under the levitating stones, though their lack of gravity has no effect on you. Go to 416[/b].

415.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south toward an old tower
415.text: The peculiar shoreline is rocky but charming. Go to 414[/b].

416.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] east to a small island
416.text: You consider burying a treasure chest like a pirate, but the island looks too rocky to dig. Go to 150[/b].
You hike along a narrow strip of sand between the mountain and sea. Go to 417[/b].
As you move south, more levitating stones appear. Go to 415[/b].
The temperate seaside quickly turns cold, with the mountain dividing east and west. Go to 209[/b].

417.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] for a moment until the sentient passes, then move north (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
417.text: The sentient takes no notice of you—in fact, you get the feeling that they don’t want anyone to notice them. Soon their light grows dim as they ascend the stairs. Go to 418[/b].
You stroll along the sandy shoreline at the base of a mountain range dividing the warm east from the cold west. Go to 416[/b].

417.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] west up the increasingly icy staircase
417.text: The temperature drops rapidly as you hike up the staircase, which leads to a snowcapped peak. Go to 214[/b] and gain 1 morale.

418.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north toward the distant tower
418.text: The tower looks as tall as the mountains from this angle. Go to 419[/b].

419.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south toward a large skeleton
419.text: The mostly-intact skull is big enough for you to fit inside. Go to 418[/b].

042.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] through a back panel into another room
042.text: You eavesdrop on some sentients in the assassin’s guild as you approach from the shadows. Gain 1 boost. You may exit to city 041[/b]; if you do, continue with the help-OFFER[/b][/b] action there with the cost reduced by 2.

420.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north onto an icy ridge
420.text: You slip on the slush during a short but steep hike. Go to 421[/b].

421.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] east away from the cold weather
421.text: The cold wind from the west makes you eager to arrive in the warmer climate to the east. Go to 250[/b].

422.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the green gateway to the west
422.text: Proceed based on whether or not you’ve disarmed the gateway:

choices.outcome: Go to 615[/b].
Lose 1 health and go to 615[/b].

423.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] west over the mountain range
423.text: Your breath grows ragged as you make the steep ascent to the west. Go to 620[/b] and gain 1 morale.

424.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] west over the mountain range
424.text: The mush of melting snow grows crisp under your feet as you hike west over the mountain range. Go to 625[/b] and gain 1 morale.

425.text: The temperature drops rapidly as you trek upward and westward. Go to 630[/b].

426.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] east on the ocean surface or [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] east underwater

choices.outcome: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (062[/b]); anything else (061[/b]).
Go to 632[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

426.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the beast (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
426.text: Knowing that being in the water would leave you at a severe disadvantage in any conflict with the giant sea creature, you leave it a wide berth as you swim around it. Go to 427[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

427.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] east on the ocean surface
427.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (063[/b]); anything else (057[/b]).

427.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the scout (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
427.text: There’s little place to hide along the water, but the watchful scout either ignores you or isn’t so watchful. Go to 428[/b].

427.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] south past a threat in the water (if it is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
427.text: Careful to keep your distance, you swim a long way around the irritable-looking sea creature. Go to 426[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

428.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] east on the ocean surface
428.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (062[/b]); anything else (059[/b]).

428.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north through the slippery sea garden
428.text: The misshapen spheres bob on the water like inflatable beach balls. Go to 429[/b].

429.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] east on the ocean surface
429.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (055[/b]); anything else (056[/b]).
You look for reeds to fashion a snorkel but don’t see any nearby. Go to 430[/b].

429.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south over the slippery algae under the surface
429.text: You find your way into an overgrown cove that, mostly importantly, isn’t occupied by any waterspouts at the moment. Go to 428[/b].

043.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] east into a glowing door
043.text: You step into an elevator, and the door slides closed behind you. The elevator ascends slightly toward the surface, opening within an underground city. Go to city 041[/b].

043.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the nest and the worms to proceed through the dark tunnel
043.text: Your augsuit catches on the nest as you maneuver north, and the baby centipedes shriek in unison. Go to cave 044[/b].

430.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] along the steep shoreline, avoiding the waterspouts
430.text: You are happy to have stayed on dry land, as you avoided a fearsome beast rising from the sea. Go to 475[/b].

choices.option: Pay 1 move to evade the second sea spout
choices.outcome: Go north to 431[/b] and gain 1 morale.

You are caught in the second sea spout, which sends you rocketing out of the water. Roll a skill die and go to a location based on the result: move[/b] (761[/b]); look[/b] (361[/b]); engage[/b] (667[/b]); help[/b] (434[/b]); take[/b] (649[/b]); overpower[/b] (752[/b]).

430.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] east on the ocean surface
430.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (054[/b]); anything else (060[/b]).
You’d rather not risk swimming into an underwater vortex. Go to 429[/b].

431.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
431.text: Avoiding the circling waterspouts and the strong pull of currents and crosscurrents swirling around the elemental is exhausting, but eventually you roll ashore on a (much more relaxing) beach. Go to 432[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

431.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] southeast on the ocean surface
431.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (060[/b]); anything else (054[/b]).

choices.outcome: Go south to 430[/b] and gain 1 morale.

You are caught in the second waterspout, which sends you rocketing out of the ocean. Roll a skill die and go to a location based on the result: move[/b] (430[/b]); look[/b] (361[/b]); engage[/b] (667[/b]); help[/b] (434[/b]); take[/b] (649[/b]); overpower[/b] (752[/b]).

431.text: Scaling the nearly vertical cliff face would be a formidable task even without the sheets of water soaking you and the deafening white noise of the falls, but you manage to pull yourself over the edge onto much calmer terrain. Gain ability 1468[/b] and 1 morale; go to 475[/b].

432.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] east toward the source of the scrapheap
432.text: You walk away from the footsteps but make a mental note that you’re not alone. Go to 731[/b].

432.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south through the rainforest and past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
432.text: You keep a wide berth between you and the elemental and the waterspouts gyrating around it. Go to 431[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

434.text: The idyllic beauty of the rainforest makes the climb up the steep slope a little more bearable. Go to 435[/b] and gain 1 morale.

435.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] east across the floating stones
435.text: The stones lead into a dark passage through the pillar of stone. Roll 5 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. If you pay 1 look[/b], you find something in the darkness (gain item 1263[/b]). Go east to 734[/b].

435.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south down the mountain to a verdant valley
435.text: The stone pillar in front of you looms like a hive in an alien apiary. You leave it behind for somewhere more tranquil. Go to 434[/b].

choices.outcome: The path passes by the mouth of a cave. Either go to cave 033[/b] or go north to location 437[/b].
Despite your careful steps, several wedges of glass slice into your feet. Lose 1 health and gain item 1194[/b]; go to 437[/b].

437.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north along the shoreline or [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] north across the sand dune

choices.outcome: The waves and slippery rocks make this path difficult, but eventually you arrive. Go to 438[/b] and gain 1 morale.
This route is more direct than walking along the shoreline, but the sand is riddled with unavoidable glass shards. Lose 1 health and gain ability 1496[/b]; go to 438[/b].

437.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] south through the glass-spiked sand

choices.outcome: Despite your careful steps, several wedges of glass slice your skin. Lose 1 health and gain item 1194[/b]; go to 436[/b].
You pass by a cave entrance. Either enter it (go to cave 033[/b]) or proceed south (go to location 436[/b]).

438.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] or [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north toward the far shore

choices.outcome: You swim northwest toward the glowing lavafall. Go to 159[/b].
You hike up the tall, rocky hill: Go to 439[/b].

438.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] west to a rocky outcrop
438.text: Did you hear a loud rumble or is it just water in your ears? Go to 154[/b].

044.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] west around the tail of the sand centipede as it whips forward (if the sand centipede is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
044.text: You squeeze into a nook and hope the beast doesn’t notice you. Like other underground animals, it uses touch and sound more than sight. After several heart-stopping moments, it slithers away. You lean back in relief… and the soil collapses behind you. Go deeper into the planet to cave 040[/b].

440.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] away the animals so you can proceed north (if the animals are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
440.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animals, though they hover a safe distance away as if waiting for you to leave so they can return to the lava flow. Go to 441[/b].

441.text: A second tower emerges from behind the first as you get closer. Go to 442[/b].

442.text: You follow a path under the arch. Go to 443[/b].
The sky brightens as you head south. Go to 441[/b].

443.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north as the beast charges by (reduce this to 1 if the animal is no longer an obstacle)
443.text: At the top of the dune, you’ll be able to see if more creatures are approaching. Go to 444[/b].
As the sand silently yields to your feet, you soak in the view of the stars. Go to 442[/b].

444.text: A path is barely discernible through the sand and dust. Go to 445[/b].
Red dust fills your vision as you head west into a desert. Go to 259[/b].

445.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north toward a golden goliath
445.text: You are filled with a sense of dread as you follow the path toward some sort of monster. Go to 446[/b].
As you move south, the air dries and stars begin to emerge from the twilight. Go to 444[/b].

446.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
446.text: There aren’t many places to hide among these gently sloping hills, but you manage to avoid the elemental’s attention. Go to 447[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

446.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south toward a natural arch
446.text: You are filled with a sense of relief as you head south away from the elemental’s location. Go to 445[/b].

447.text: You have a wistful urge for ice cream as you walk into the sunset. Go to 503[/b].

447.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south past a hulking elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
447.text: The shallow hills make for few hiding spots, but you manage to evade the strange, hulking elemental. Go to 446[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

448.text: The water almost reaches your chin as you wade south. Go to 368[/b].

448.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] west on the ocean surface
448.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (063[/b]); anything else (056[/b]).

449.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north around the sentient, submerging to avoid detection (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
449.text: While you’re underwater, you notice several pods large enough to hold a sentient. Gain 1 boost and go to 450[/b].

449.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] west on the ocean surface
449.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (062[/b]); anything else (052[/b]).

045.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the sand centipede (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
045.text: You scrape through some glowing sediment and tumble into a hidden chamber. Go deeper into the planet to cave 040[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

450.text: As you tread water, something from the depths clamps onto your ankle and tries to drag you underwater. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. If you pay 1 overpower[/b], go north to 451[/b]. Otherwise, lose 1 health and get dragged west underwater to 657[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

450.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] west on the ocean surface
450.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (057[/b]); anything else (063[/b]).

451.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the sentients (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
451.text: You move furtively through the waves, easing yourself onto shore and beyond. Go to 452[/b].

451.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] west on the ocean surface
451.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (056[/b]); anything else (059[/b]).

452.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north, staying near the shoreline
452.text: Swimming through long lotus stems feels like you’re in a bowl of noodles. Go to 453[/b].

452.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] west on the ocean surface
452.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (051[/b]); anything else (052[/b]).

453.text: The tide helps to carry you along as you head north. Go to 454[/b].

453.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south, drifting close to the shore
453.text: You breathe easier as the acrid smoke is replaced by a pleasant floral scent. Go to 452[/b].

453.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] west on the ocean surface or [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] west underwater

choices.outcome: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (061[/b]); anything else (051[/b]).
Go to 660[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

454.text: You try to swim directly to shore, but the current pulls you closer to the vast city in the distance. Go to 455[/b].
The cool water here is deceptively deep given how close you are to shore. Go to 453[/b].

454.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] southwest on the ocean surface
454.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (054[/b]); anything else (063[/b]).
The tide pulls you into deeper water where an animal lingers near the Traveler. Go to 480[/b].

455.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north against the current across the canal
455.text: The undercurrent slows your progress, but at least it’s pleasant weather for a swim. Go to 456[/b].
You struggle to push off against the slippery rocks near the shoreline, but movement is easier when you start to swim. Go to 454[/b].

455.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] west, struggling against the crashing waves
455.text: The heaving waves slow your progress and carry wooden debris from the west. Go to 755[/b].

456.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] east up the sea-kissed cliff into the city
456.text: For being adjacent to a large city the terrain is surprisingly untamed here, but you manage to scramble up the mossy rocks to the outskirts. Go to 762[/b] and gain 1 morale.

456.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south across the widest part of the canal
456.text: The current helps to push you toward a small gatehouse. Go to 455[/b].

457.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] east through gaps in the old city ruins
457.text: It’s a tight fit through the break in the wall, but you’re rewarded with a striking view of a towering dome to the north. Go to 763[/b].

457.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north from rock to rock until you reach the shore
457.text: You’re less worried about the sharp rocks you can see than any hidden below the surface of the water. Soon you find yourself safely on the sand. Go to 458[/b].

457.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] west through the calm water
457.text: You try to race the nearby fish, but they quickly vanish into the distance. Go to 757[/b].

458.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] east up a tree and over the city wall
458.text: The sounds and smells of a busy city drift over the wall as you climb. Go to 764[/b].

458.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] south from one slippery rock to the next
458.text: The sandy shoreline ends abruptly at a canal, and the only way across is to jump strategically. Go to 457[/b].

459.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] an abandoned house to the east
459.text: The house was built a long time ago outside of the protective walls of the city. You find some old toothpaste and a toothbrush, as well as a short tunnel at the back of the house. Gain item 1208[/b]; you may go to 765[/b].

459.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] west up the sand dune toward a pair of sentients
459.text: If the runes on stones are natural, are the runes on buildings made by sentients? Go to 759[/b].

046.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] east through the glowing sediment
046.text: Falling forward, you find yourself in a bright chamber. Go deeper into the planet to cave 040[/b].

046.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] north forward into the darkness
046.text: You follow some voices, which grow louder as you approach. Go to cave 047[/b].

460.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] east into the city through a canal
460.text: This canal would only suit passenger boats; cargo ships would scrape their hulls. Go to 766[/b].
The waves threaten to smash you against the rocks and ships as you swim north. Go to 461[/b].

460.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] west up the shoreside cliff
460.text: A roaring sound grows louder as you near the top of the sandstone cliff. Go to 760[/b].

461.text: You follow the wide, silty coastline eastward, astutely avoiding the dusty air to the north. Go to 345[/b].
The calm waters turn choppy the closer you are to the city shipyard. Go to 460[/b].

461.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] west toward the sand dunes
461.text: The water never gets too deep, and it keeps you cool even as the wind carries heat from the west. Go to 490[/b].

462.text: A strong headwind makes the stroll quite challenging. Go to 463[/b].

462.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] west up the steep seaside cliff
462.text: The wind whips sand in your face as it courses along the cliffside, but at least it provides a little relief from the midday heat. Go to 279[/b] and gain 1 morale.

463.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
463.text: Pushing against the constant wind whipped up by the elemental’s daunting wingspan, you make your way around it and slip off— unseen, you hope—to the north. Go to 464[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

463.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south away from the elemental
463.text: Moving southward along the desolate landscape, you feel the air pressure return to normal. Go to 462[/b].

464.text: With a running start you manage to clear the fissure, but upon arriving on the other side, the glowing landscape is sickly with corruption. Go to 465[/b] and gain 1 morale.

464.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south past a flying elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
464.text: The constant beating of the elemental’s massive wings generates a powerful air current, and you struggle to push against it as you try to slip by the creature undetected. Go to 463[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

465.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north through the mud and up the hill
465.text: You step in a green, goopy substance, and instead of rubbing off in the mudflats, it clings to your skin and begins to burn. Lose 1 health. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all help[/b] results. Unless you pay 1 help[/b], lose another health. Go to 466[/b].
The fresh air gusting up from the canyon is a welcome relief from the corruption you left behind. Go to 464[/b].

466.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the gap to the north or add 3 to the cost and [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] north over the wall

choices.outcome: Two bandits jump you from either side, leaving you with a bruise on your head and an empty purse. Lose 1 health and lose $3; go to 467[/b].
Go to 467[/b].

466.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south down a hill toward a mysterious green glow
466.text: A fluorescent, otherworldly sickness permeates the valley below. Go to 465[/b].

467.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north toward the forest valley
467.text: You follow the edge of the great swamp to the east down toward the valley floor. Go to 468[/b].

467.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] a gap in a towering wall to reach its southern side
467.text: As you approach the gap in the wall, you notice two bandits hiding in the shadows, their backs to you. They’re waiting for unsuspecting travelers to pass through the gap from south to north. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You clear the gap by a good distance, leaving the surprised bandits in your wake. Go to 466[/b].

Roll 2 skill dice and keep all move[/b] and overpower[/b] results. If you pay 1 move[/b] or 1 overpower[/b], the bandits stumble away, leaving behind a knife (gain item 1209[/b], then go to 466[/b], where your only choices on the location are to move east, south, or west). Otherwise, lose 1 health and $2, then go to 466[/b].

choices.option: Change your route and move to the east or west instead
choices.outcome: Go east to 225[/b] or west to 329[/b].

468.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south out of the forest valley
468.text: The hike takes you up around a hill. Go to 467[/b].

469.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] north, choosing a direction at the fork in the path
469.text: Choose to walk to the left or right at the split:

choices.outcome: Go north to 470[/b].
It’s on this path that you notice a lotus patch. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. Then go northeast to 240[/b].

047.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] north around the sand centipede and climb the staircase in the rear of the cave (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
047.text: The centipede is massive but lumbering, and a well-timed dash takes you to the safety of the glowing stairwell. Go deeper into the planet to cave 040[/b].

470.text: Keeping your distance from the animals, you quietly enter the water. With every step you sink deeper into the rich sediment of the shallows. Go to 509[/b].
The gangly giants grazing along the shore pay little attention to you. Go to 344[/b].

471.text: The river is so wide that you don’t quite make it across. Go to 472[/b].
The long swim is exhausting, but at the far shore the spectacle of light at the top of the cliff makes the climb a little more tolerable. Go to 145[/b] and gain 1 morale.

472.text: Some large animals plod upstream as you swim by, paying no attention. Go to 101[/b].

472.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south across the vast sea
472.text: The endless waves leave your muscles aching. When you pull yourself ashore, you see birds circling a glowing light just above the water. Go to 146[/b] and gain 1 morale.

472.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] west toward a shoreside treasure chest
472.text: You glide across the murky water, watching to see if anyone claims the treasure chest before you reach it. Go to 471[/b].

473.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] into the jungle, either to proceed north or to enter the city
473.text: Fashionable sentients mill around the entrance to the city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 random skill and go to city 526[/b].
Gain ability 1484[/b] and go to 102[/b].

473.text: The gentle squawking of the seabirds above welcomes you ashore after an exhausting swim. Go to 147[/b] and gain 1 morale.

474.text: You trip over underwater branches as you make your way to shore. Go to 103[/b].

474.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south to the closest shoreline before walking along the beach
474.text: The beach is idyllic, but there’s something unsettling about the water here. Go to 148[/b].

475.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] east off the waterfall toward an elemental in the water
475.text: Jumping off a waterfall is easy, but avoiding the rocks below is not. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 look[/b]. Go to 431[/b].
The hike takes you through the bushes, across a series of waterfalls, and to the edge of a forest. Go to 104[/b].

476.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] east on the ocean surface
476.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (055[/b]); anything else (060[/b]).
You tread carefully through the clear water, avoiding the jagged metal shards of your spaceship wreckage. Go to 731[/b].

476.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] south underwater, trying to avoid several dangerous-looking sea spouts

choices.outcome: Go south to 636[/b] and gain 1 morale.

You are caught in the second sea spout, which sends you rocketing out of the water. Roll a skill die and go to a location based on the result: move[/b] (636[/b]); look[/b] (361[/b]); engage[/b] (667[/b]); help[/b] (434[/b]); take[/b] (649[/b]); overpower[/b] (752[/b]).

477.text: Keeping the shoreline well within view, you paddle eastward, where large flora cast shadows underwater. Go to 478[/b].
You swim toward the flags bobbing on the surface of the water. Go to 737[/b].

477.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south on the ocean surface
477.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (059[/b]); anything else (062[/b]).

478.text: Never venturing too far from the nearest shore, you swim eastward, where a watchful sentient seems to be patrolling the waves. Go to 479[/b].
The verdant jungle in the distance beckons to you as you swim. Go to 743[/b].

478.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south on the ocean surface
478.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (051[/b]); anything else (062[/b]).
You keep your head above water as you swim, trying to discern how the Traveler is standing on the ocean surface. Go to 477[/b].

479.text: You paddle near the shoreline toward a large, affable-looking serpent-like creature. Go to 480[/b].
You stay as close to the surface as possible while you swim, avoiding the jellyfish. Go to 749[/b].

479.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south on the ocean surface
479.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (052[/b]); anything else (057[/b]).
You swim west toward an angular technology hovering above the water. Go to 478[/b].

480.text: The swim along the gentle tide is relaxing, and the rolling hills to the north look idyllic. Go to 454[/b].
The calm swim becomes precarious as you approach the wreckage of a wooden ship. Go to 755[/b].

480.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south on the ocean surface
480.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (056[/b]); anything else (051[/b]).
You try to avoid splashing a sentient hovering above the water. Go to 479[/b].

481.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] fireballs to move north around the volcano
481.text: The seisms of the ground and the occasional salvo of fireballs in your direction makes what would otherwise be a pleasant stroll potentially lethal. Go to 150[/b] and gain 1 morale.

481.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south away from the volcano
481.text: The water cools noticeably as you (prudently) move further from the volcano. Go to 120[/b].

482.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] east to a solid rock
482.text: A series of boulders covered in lichen make for faster progress than swimming or wading. Go to 483[/b].

482.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north, ignoring the advice of the sentients
482.text: The city is covered in ash, but you find a nice inlet on the far shore. Go to 151[/b].

482.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] south to a rocky outcrop
482.text: You leap from rock to rock in a single, bold dash. Go to 121[/b].

483.text: As you stroll along the far shore, you pass a piece of your ship wreckage. It’s part of the propulsion system and could become flightworthy with a bit of work. You may either go north to 152[/b] or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center). You may either stop (go to 152[/b]) or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop (go to 152[/b]) or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b] and go to 152[/b].

483.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] west to a solid rock
483.text: As you move westward from rock to rock, you hear the commotion of distress. Go to 482[/b].

484.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north toward an odd rock formation
484.text: Whether it was some kind of natural mirage or sentient-made deception, you realize as you approach that rock formation is hiding a precious secret. Go to 153[/b].

485.text: As you swim in the warming water, lava continues to ooze slowly from the caldera of the stratovolcano. Go to 154[/b].

486.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] east up the steep incline
486.text: The intensifying heat of the desert air makes an already strenuous hike even more exhausting… and even more exhilarating to finish. Go to 487[/b] and gain 1 morale.
On the far side, you find an unoccupied boat. You may pay 1 move[/b], 1 take[/b], or 1 time to steer it into the water; if so, gain vehicle 1014[/b] and $4. Either way, go to 275[/b].

486.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] south through an area of the desert speckled with reflective objects
486.text: Due to the sheer volume of mirrored glass in the sand, you can’t avoid slicing open your leg. Lose 1 health. You can go to 736[/b] and lose another health or turn back to stay on 486[/b].

487.text: It takes a running start, but you manage to clear the canyon with room to spare. You feel proud, and you look around, hoping that someone saw your feat. Go to 276[/b].

487.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] west down the steep dune
487.text: The sand slips under your feet with every step, making the hike even more tiring, but at least the cool wind off the water to the west provides a little relief. Go to 486[/b] and gain 1 morale.

488.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] north across the scalding desert
488.text: As you approach the gateway in the wall, what appears at first to be a mirage is actually a many-legged beast. Go to 277[/b].
A curious fog rests over the desert city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to 748[/b].

choices.option: Enter the city to the south through a back entrance
choices.outcome: Go to city 531[/b].

489.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north across the arid mesa
489.text: You plod along the dry desert, willing yourself to keep going. Go to 278[/b].
You avoid the long trails of dust and sand that the riders and their mounts are kicking up. Go to 754[/b].

049.text: As you walk, the entire cave begins to vibrate and move. Choose one:

choices.option: Grab a spike and hold on
choices.outcome: Despite the wild movements of the cave—which you now realize is a rather large creature—the inside is surprisingly stable. That is, until the beast reaches the surface, propelling you skyward. Your fall is cushioned by palm trees and phlegm. Gain 1 boost and go to 758[/b].

choices.option: Reverse course and dash south out of the cave
choices.outcome: As you run, a sudden gust of moist wind hurtles you out of the cave. Lose 1 health and go to cave 044[/b].

049.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] south out of the cave
049.text: The cave jerks under your feet as you walk, and you stumble out to cave 044[/b].

490.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] east across the calm waters
490.text: The cool water is welcome relief from the hot wind still blowing from the west. Go to 461[/b].

490.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] south through the chaos of battle
490.text: The clangor of battle rings in your ears. Roll 5 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Then lose 1 health unless you pay 1 overpower[/b]. Go to 760[/b].

491.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north across the shallow pond
491.text: The pond may be shallow, but you quickly learn to test every step to avoid slicing your feet on the wreckage. Go to 350[/b].

492.action: [b][MOVE] SLIDE[/b] north down the slippery slope
492.text: Unless you pay 1 move[/b], lose 1 health as you crash into the ground at the base of the valley. Go to 351[/b].
As much heat as the complex produces, a patina of ice still covers most of its topside. Go to 626[/b].

493.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] north through the deep snow
493.text: The snow gets shallower and eventually gives way to mud and grass as you descend into the valley below. Go to 352[/b].
The cables are wide, but they’re slick with ice. Gain ability 1501[/b] and go to city 521[/b].

494.text: As you trudge down the long hillside, the snowy terrain gives way to slippery mud and grass. Go to 353[/b] and gain 1 morale.

495.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] east using the rope as a zipline or [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] east
495.text: You make the death-defying maneuver look easy. Go to 496[/b] and gain 1 morale.

495.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the steep cliff
495.text: The climb down the icy cliff face is unforgiving and the handholds are fewer in number than you’d like, but at least the view to the north is spectacular. Go to 354[/b] and gain 1 morale.

496.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north to the wetlands below
496.text: The crunching of the crisp snow gives way to the squelching of mud as you slowly plod down the mountainside. Go to 355[/b] and gain 1 morale.
A giant, tentacled animal blocks the route west, so you skirt around it to the south. Go to 629[/b].

497.text: The water is cold from the melting snow to the south, but it grows warmer the farther you swim. Go to 356[/b].

498.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
498.text: The narrow canyon leaves little room for maneuvering, but you manage to avoid the monstrous elemental’s attention—or at least its interest. Go to 357[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

499.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north through the cluster of buildings
499.text: The sulfides seeping through the fissures in the ground nauseate you. Go to 358[/b].

050.text: Even with a running start, you barely manage to clear the gap. Move deeper into the planet to cave 079[/b].

500.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north across the lava field; you may add +2 to this cost to move to the northeast or northwest instead

choices.outcome: You tread carefully to an expanse covered in igneous pinnacles. Go to 358[/b].
Suffer 1 heat damage and go to 359[/b].
Soon you hear the crash of waves and the sizzle of rapidly cooling lava falling into the sea. Go to 360[/b].

501.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north across the lava field
501.text: Suffer 1 heat damage and go to 360[/b].

502.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north across the channel or add 2 to this cost to [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north along the shoreline

choices.outcome: The scalding water boils your skin as you wade. Suffer 1 heat damage and go to 361[/b].
The terrain is unforgiving, but you can’t help but admire the severe beauty of the volcanic coastline. Go to 361[/b].

503.text: The water remains shallow for quite some distance from shore. Go to 362[/b].

503.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south up the seaside cliffs
503.text: As you hike along the shore, the combination of seaside smells and sounds makes you nostalgic for the family reunions of your youth. Go to 447[/b].

504.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north across the calm, shallow channel
504.text: A light breeze dances across the water as you wade underneath a skyship. Go to 363[/b].
The farther you wade south away from the ocean, the muddier the water becomes. Go to 340[/b].

505.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north, briefly exchanging pleasantries with the sentient
505.text: Go to 364[/b] and gain 1 boost. The sentient warns of much deeper waters ahead and dangers lurking under the surface.

506.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north through the shallow water
506.text: The undertow tugs at your legs as you go to 365[/b].

506.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south into or around a city
506.text: Just south of the ocean is a glimmering city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You’ve never seen so much gold before. Go to city 529[/b].
You scout information about the golden civilization as you trek. Gain 1 boost and go to 342[/b].

507.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north from one sandbar to the next
507.text: A series of sandbars ensures your top half remains dry as you wade north. Go to 366[/b].
As you walk down the long hill to the canal, you admire the glimmering monuments to the west. Go to 343[/b].

508.text: Boats skim across the water as you wade north. Go to 367[/b].

508.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south across a muddy canal
508.text: The gleaming gold of the city reflects impossibly on the brown water. Go to 344[/b].

509.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north into the confluence of sea and fresh water
509.text: The brackish water has an odd smell. Go to 368[/b].

509.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south toward the edge of a forest
509.text: You’re so busy looking for slippery rocks as you wade that you pass right by some long-legged animals grazing by the shore. Go to 470[/b].

511.text: You clamber down the steep slope and (carefully) hop along a series of small islands before finding firmer ground. Go to 475[/b].

512.text: The water is shallow, and you soon step onto the island. Go to 514[/b].
You hold your breath and plunge into the depths. Go to 643[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

513.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] east out of the pyramid
513.text: The hair on your forearm stands on end as you step through the energy shield. Exit to 213[/b].

514.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] south underwater or [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south to the rocky archipelago

choices.outcome: Go to 644[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.
Go to 512[/b].

515.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] east across the sand (only if you have completed quest 1695)
515.text: You begin to feel nauseous the further east you go—some sort of time dilation effect. Go to 517[/b].
You feel a cool breeze from the other side of the arch, and you step forward into it. Go to 741[/b].

515.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] south through the jungle (only if you have quest 1699)
515.text: You are amazed by what you find in the once-empty grove. Go to 516[/b].

516.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] back north toward the gateway
516.text: You can feel the sunburn as you walk across the scalding desert. Go to 515[/b].

517.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] back west over the hot sand
517.text: You begrudgingly leave the shade of your new ship to head west toward the gateway. Go to 515[/b].

518.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] north after passing through the city
518.text: Beyond the market square, the city becomes more spacious—it seems that wind sentients don’t like spatial constraints. Go to 191[/b].

519.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north after passing through the city
519.text: Your thighs get an excellent workout as you stroll through the city, the streets of which are almost all staircases. Go to 682[/b].

520.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north after passing through the city
520.text: The cozy, silent city reminds you of stories of ancient libraries. Eventually the shops taper off and you find yourself back in the marsh. Go to 243[/b].

521.text: You leave the glowing lights of the Gibsonesque city and out into the wild snow fields, where it’s somehow even colder. Go to 628[/b].

521.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] north after passing through the city
521.text: You wonder how other sentients navigate this peculiar urban planning. Gain ability 1501[/b] and go to 493[/b].

522.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] east down the steep cliff
522.text: A cruel wind blows along the face of the tall cliff, leaving you somehow even colder than you were in the frigid city. Go to 207[/b] and gain 1 morale.

522.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north after passing through the city
522.text: The howling wind beating against the cliffside makes the nearly vertical ascent punishing, but as you near the precipice, a glow from behind it draws your attention. Go to 211[/b] and gain 1 morale.

523.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north after passing through the city
523.text: Leaving the city this way makes for a technical but manageable climb. Go to 728[/b].

523.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] west toward some tumbling rocks
523.text: You deftly maneuver around the rolling boulders. Go to 721[/b].

524.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north after passing through the city
524.text: You have a sense of unease as you walk through the skeletons that shape this city. Go to 267[/b].

525.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north after passing through the city
525.text: The water of the sea is a welcome relief from the perpetual heat of molten metal in the industrial city. Go to 167[/b].

526.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north after passing through the city
526.text: You slide down giant leaves to reach the jungle basin before forging a path north. Go to 102[/b].

527.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north after passing through the city
527.text: You stroll across a vast series of boardwalks until one ends at the northern edge of the city. The water is warm, welcoming, and waist-high. Go to 739[/b].

528.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north after passing through the city
528.text: You can’t hear much underwater, but the vibrant lights of the City of Waves are dazzling to witness as you swim north. Go to 642[/b].

529.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north after passing through the city
529.text: The glitz of the city is beyond anything you’ve seen on other worlds. Go to 506[/b].

530.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north after passing through the city
530.text: You methodically descend a vertical cliff at the northern edge of the city, then make your way to tidal pools tucked into a vast shoreline. Gain ability 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to 337[/b].

531.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] north after passing through the city
531.text: The sights and sounds of the sandy city are soon behind you as you trudge north. Go to 488[/b].

541.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] east through the long seagrass
541.text: The waist-high grass billows in the breeze coming off the sea. Go to 136[/b].
The grassy cliffside shoreline makes for a moderately difficult hike away from the ruins. Go to 140[/b].

541.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] west to a tiny island
541.text: You wade through the shallows to reach a tiny island, upon which is perched an even tinier animal. Go to 406[/b].

542.text: When you exit the ruins, the shadow of something high up in the clouds passes over the plains. Go to 190[/b].

543.text: The descent off the plateau is steep, but a series of ropes helps you reach solid ground. Go to 264[/b].

544.text: The forest is dense but navigable. You hear a falling gobble-like call from a bird followed by a clap of its beak. Go to 315[/b].

545.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north off the sky island into the water
545.text: You plummet into the waves, nearly landing on a pointy device. Go to 405[/b].

545.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] west across the gap to another island
545.text: With a running start you clear the gap and find yourself on a much less tranquil island. Go to 304[/b].

546.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north out of the forest
546.text: You carefully avoid touching the crumbling ruins as you head north. Go to 699[/b].

547.text: The alps tower over the already impressive waterfall. Go to 712[/b].

548.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] south across the narrow walkway out of the ruins
548.text: You realize that the walkway may actually be a wall, but it’s too late to turn back. Go to 784[/b].

549.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north across the stream after exiting the tent
549.text: You grab the plump mushroom as you leave the tent. Exit to 108[/b], gaining item 1136[/b] as you leave.

550.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the steep drop after exiting the tent
550.text: Exit down the sheer cliff face to 136[/b], gaining item 1041[/b] as you leave. Also gain 1 morale.

551.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the sheer cliff after exiting the tent
551.text: You grab a pair of boots on your way out of the tent (gain item 955[/b]), then make a not-so-fast getaway down the almost vertical cliff face to the swampland below. Exit to 230[/b] and gain 1 morale.

552.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] north across the desert after exiting the tent
552.text: You snag a rope as you leave the tent. Exit to 299[/b], gaining item 902[/b] as you leave.

553.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north after exiting out the back window, pocketing a parchment as you leave
553.text: You roll up the map and try to waterproof it before jumping out a back window into the water. Gain item 1257[/b] and exit to 120[/b].

554.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] north through the back gate, pocketing the smallest item as you leave
554.text: You stuff the ball into your pocket as you dash out the gate. Gain item 1228[/b] and exit to 485[/b].

555.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] west after exiting out the side window, pocketing an item as you leave
555.text: You grab the snowshoes and leap out the window. Gain item 933[/b] and exit to 128[/b].

556.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north after exiting out the back, grabbing an item as you leave
556.text: The sleeping bag looks quite cozy. You tuck it under your arm (gain item 1040[/b]) and slip out the back door (exit to 209[/b]).

557.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north after exiting out the back, pocketing the smallest item as you leave
557.text: You pocket the dice and quickly exit the tavern. Gain item 924[/b] and exit to 220[/b].

558.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north after exiting out the back of the casino, pocketing the smallest item as you leave

choices.outcome: Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack. Place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions. Exit to 271[/b].
Gain item 878[/b] and exit to 271[/b].

559.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] far north after exiting out the back, strapping on the goggles as you leave
559.text: You pocket the goggles (gain item 935[/b]) and then dive into the vast sea for a long swim to the north. Exit to 409[/b] and gain 1 morale.

560.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north after exiting out the back, taking some shoes as you leave
560.text: You’ve never seen wingtips like the ones on these shoes. Gain item 989[/b] and exit to 678[/b].

561.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north after exiting out the back, pocketing a smaller item as you leave
561.text: You grab the goggles and escape through a narrow window. Gain item 986[/b] and exit to 490[/b].

563.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] the bandit hideout into the clouds
563.text: On your way out of the room, you grab a blue ball from the cubby. Gain item 1228[/b]. Then, using no additional information, exit to location 706[/b], 200[/b], 393[/b], 201[/b], or 205[/b].

564.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north after exiting out the back of the museum, attempting to grab the nearby armor as you leave
564.text: The nearby armor looks like it would fit you perfectly, but the security shield blocks you from touching it. You may pay 1 boost to disarm the shield; if you do, gain item 975[/b]. If you don’t, gain 1 boost. Either way, exit to 221[/b].

565.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north after exiting out the back, pocketing a vial as you leave
565.text: You hope the owner of the house won’t notice a missing vial among so many colorful trinkets. Gain item 861[/b] and exit to 244[/b].

566.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] east off the floating island, grabbing the glider as you leave
566.text: You grab the glider (gain vehicle 957[/b]) and vault off the island (go to 404[/b]).

566.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north after exiting out the back, stealing the farthest item as you leave
566.text: Had you not been in such a hurry, the glider would have aided the leap off the island. Gain vehicle 957[/b] and exit to 309[/b].

567.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] north after exiting out a back window, pocketing an item as you leave
567.text: You pocket the gloves and rush toward the windows. Gain item 936[/b] and exit to 707[/b].

568.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north with the smallest item in hand
568.text: You grab the goggles (gain item 941[/b]) and exit the back window, which overhangs a steep descent to 338[/b].

569.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north after exiting out the back, pocketing a nearby item on the way out
569.text: You pilfer the compass (gain item 968[/b]) then sneak down the long, sheer cliff to the valley below. Gain 1 morale, and exit to 340[/b].

570.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north after exiting out the back, pocketing a small item as you leave
570.text: You drop the ring in your pocket before leaving the resort. Gain item 994[/b] and exit to 343[/b].

571.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north after exiting out the back, taking a helpful item as you leave
571.text: You figure the fire sentients won’t miss a blowtorch. Gain item 870[/b] and exit to 125[/b].

572.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north after exiting out the back, taking an item as you leave
572.text: You grab the clunky goggles. Gain item 940[/b] and exit to 397[/b].

573.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] north via the open window, grabbing the farthest item as you leave
573.text: You grab the climbing equipment and slip out the window. Gain item 909[/b] and exit to 411[/b].

574.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north after exiting out the back, taking the armor as you leave
574.text: You don the armor and squeeze out the back window. Gain item 976[/b] and exit to 454[/b].

575.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north after exiting out the back window, pocketing an item as you leave
575.text: You pilfer the binoculars before slipping out the window. Gain item 972[/b] and exit to 456[/b].

576.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] north out the back, pocketing a dangerous item as you leave
576.text: You carefully handle the explosive. Gain item 879[/b] and exit to 457[/b].

577.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north over a canyon after exiting out the back, pocketing a document as you leave
577.text: You have only a moment to decide if the map (item 1262[/b]) or the book (item 1045[/b]) is more important to you. After you gain one, proceed to exit the window to 465[/b], which smells as bad as it looks.

578.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north after exiting out the back, a nearby item in hand
578.text: You regret not putting on the flippers before swimming north. Gain item 927[/b] and exit to 356[/b].

579.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north after exiting out the back, pocketing a small item as you leave
579.text: You slip the ring in your pocket, curious to see how it feels to try on. Gain item 993[/b] and exit to 358[/b].

580.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] north after exiting out a side panel, pocketing an item as you leave that might aid your travels
580.text: The ice skates will be useful in the frozen north. Gain item 951[/b] and exit to 618[/b].

581.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] south through a ventilation shaft out of the facility
581.text: You drag the transducer behind you as you leave. Gain item 948[/b] and exit to 626[/b].

581.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] west out of a secret passage
581.text: You carry the transducer with you as you sneak out of the factory. Gain item 948[/b] and exit to 403[/b].

582.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north after exiting out the back, grabbing the farthest item as you leave
582.text: You steal the net as you swim away. Gain item 932[/b] and exit north to 641[/b].

583.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the council, grabbing the package as you leave
583.text: Much to the dismay of the council, you rob them of the package in plain sight. Gain item 1034[/b] and exit to 778[/b].

584.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north after exiting out the back, stealing an item as you leave
584.text: You’re eager to try on the shoes after you leave the lodge. Gain item 963[/b] and exit to 667[/b].

585.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north after exiting out the back door, pocketing the key as you leave
585.text: You doubt anyone will notice the missing key. Gain item 996[/b] and exit to 681[/b].

586.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north after exiting out the back, pocketing a ring as you leave
586.text: You’re excited to try on the ring. Gain item 995[/b] and exit to 687[/b].

587.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north after exiting out the back, putting on the oxygen mask as you leave
587.text: You look forward to diving into this ocean with this mask. Gain item 964[/b] and exit to 745[/b].

588.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north after exiting out the back, taking the farthest item as you leave
588.text: You toss the fishing net over your shoulders as you leave the island. Gain item 911[/b] and exit to 738[/b].

589.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] north out the back, stealing an offering as you leave
589.text: The egg looks like it might make an interesting omelet. Gain item 977[/b] and exit to 764[/b].

590.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north after exiting out the back, pocketing an item as you leave
590.text: You hope you can fit into the climbing gear. Gain item 904[/b] and exit to 770[/b].

591.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the back of the building
591.text: You steal a ring as you leave the room. Gain item 990[/b] and exit to 787[/b].

591.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] west, pocketing the ring as you leave
591.text: The large ring looks like it may fit better on your wrist than your finger. Gain item 990[/b] and exit to 780[/b].

593.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

594.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

595.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

596.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

597.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north out of the lighthouse window, pocketing the farthest item as you leave
597.text: The map on the wall looks like it will provide a sense of direction. Gain item 1251[/b] and exit to 310[/b].

598.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

599.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

601.action: [b][MOVE] SLIDE[/b] north across the snow-dusted ice
601.text: You slide and shuffle across the ice, hoping it’s thick enough to hold you. Go to 606[/b].
The ice slopes slightly downhill, so you simply maintain your balance as you slide toward a lorestone. Go to 220[/b].

602.text: The thin ice breaks under your weight, plunging you into the frigid water. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all move[/b] and look[/b] results. Suffer 1 cold damage unless you pay 1 move[/b] or 1 look[/b], then pull yourself to safety (go to 607[/b]).

603.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] south through the deep snow
603.text: The hike through the deep snow is long and tiring. Gain ability 1496[/b] and go to 222[/b].

604.text: The thick sheet of ice easily holds your weight, but propelling forward in a relatively straight line requires some patience. Go to 609[/b].

604.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] south through the ice and snow
604.text: There’s no relief from the cold as the wind kicks up flurries of snow. Go to 223[/b].

605.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north around the camp (if the camp is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
605.text: The snow muffles the sound of your steps as you sneak north. Go to 610[/b].

605.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south out of the valley onto the ridge
605.text: The ridge narrows precipitously and a blizzard rolls in as you trek southward. Go to 224[/b].

606.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] north via the right-side path
606.text: You expect to slip on the ice before the long ascent up the mountain path, but a supernatural force pushes you forward with precision and speed. Go to 611[/b].

606.action: [b][MOVE] SLIDE[/b] south across the brittle ice
606.text: You careen over the icy slope and down a snowy embankment. Go to 601[/b].

607.text: Roll 4 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Underfoot of the animals, you lose 1 health unless you pay 1 overpower[/b] or unless you previously removed the threat of the animals. Go to 612[/b].
You slide wildly across a frozen lake but your fear subsumes your exhilaration as you notice the wide cracks in the ice. Go to 602[/b].

608.action: [b][MOVE] SLIDE[/b] north across the vast expanse of ice
608.text: You fear for bumps, bruises, and breaks every time you fall on the ice. Go to 613[/b].

609.text: Using the snow for traction you accelerate yourself to a breakneck speed. It’s not safe or comfortable, but at least it’s fun. Go to 613[/b].

609.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north up the steep hill
609.text: Your breath catches in your lungs as you reach the summit. View page 32 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost. Then go to 614[/b] and gain 1 morale.
It’s a smooth ride down into the open plain, and you spot something smoking in the distance ahead. Go to 604[/b].

610.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] the animal as you make your way north (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
610.text: You dart forward through the snowfall, finding cover in a small canyon. Go to 615[/b].

611.action: [b][MOVE] SLIDE[/b] north over the ice, avoiding the cracks
611.text: The ice tilts toward a series of gaps, and falling into them could be deadly. Fortunately you manage to avoid them as you slide north. Go to 616[/b].

611.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south down a small, icy hill
611.text: You find yourself behind a sentient, their back to you. They seem to be guarding a cave entrance. You can choose to go to cave 021[/b] or to face the sentient (go to location 606[/b]).

612.text: You pass tall, cabled towers that remind you of the server racks on your spaceship. Go to 607[/b].

613.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] east up the steep mountain
613.text: From the top of the mountain, the clouds briefly part to reveal the snowy area below. View page 32 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost. Then go to 614[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The ice turning to snow is a sign of warmer climates to the north. Go to 618[/b].
The cold doesn’t subside, but at least the fast slide across the nearly frictionless ice is fun. Go to 608[/b].

614.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] to the east from the mountaintop
614.text: The steep descent into the icy canyon below is cold and technically demanding. Go east to 615[/b].

614.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] to the south from the mountaintop
614.text: The sun hangs tentatively in the sky, seeming powerless to melt the frozen lake below. Go south to 609[/b].

614.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] to the west from the mountaintop
614.text: The temperature doesn’t become any more forgiving as you clamber down the icy mountainside to the towering, cabled structures below. Go west to 613[/b].

615.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] east through a gateway illuminated by green lights
615.text: Unless you’ve disarmed the gateway, you receive a brutal shock as you pass through it. Lose 1 health and go to 422[/b].

615.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] west up a steep mountain
615.text: From the top of the mountain, the clouds briefly part to reveal the snowy area below. View page 32 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost. Then go to 614[/b] and gain 1 morale.

616.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
616.text: By staying close to the cliffside you manage to avoid the attention of the nightmarish synthetic elemental’s many tentacles. Go to 621[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
Against your better judgment, you careen down an icy hill and across a frozen lake. Go to 611[/b].

617.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north over the icy crags
617.text: After focusing on the frozen, spiky stones, you look up to see a sentient glaring at you. Go to 622[/b].

618.text: It’s still freezing, but you’re happy to find yourself more in the open (and with fewer enormous and frankly weird chattering masks). Go to 613[/b].

619.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the busy sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
619.text: You are reluctant to leave the warmth of the sentient as you sneak north. Go to 624[/b].
You slide across the slippery ice and skid to a stop in a wide, shallow cave. Go to 618[/b].

620.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] east over the mountain range
620.text: The crisp snow starts to turn to mush as you hike east. Go to 423[/b] and gain 1 morale.
To avoid electrocution, you wiggle carefully through the wires. Go to 625[/b].

621.text: The maze piques your curiosity, but it’s much easier to simply walk around it. Go to 626[/b].

621.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south past the hydra-like elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
621.text: You hug the snowy cliff face as you move south and manage to avoid the attention of the elemental’s numerous appendages. Go to 616[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
The air warms quickly as you scale down the far side of the wall. Go to 402[/b].

622.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
622.text: You scamper across the snow toward the city lights in the distance. Go to 627[/b].

623.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the hologram while the Traveler provides a distraction (if you talked to the hologram, reduce this cost to 1)
623.text: The panoptic holographic AI sees your attempts to sneak by it, and as you leave, it offers haughtily, “I could calculate your chance of survival, but you won’t like it.” Go to 628[/b].

624.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] north blindly through the wires
624.text: You need a little luck to make it through the wires. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Lose 1 health as you trip on a cord and bang your knee unless you pay 1 look[/b]. Go north to 629[/b].

624.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] northeast out into the open
624.text: You avoid the tangle of wires and head northeast, where a vehicle hovers over the Traveler. Go to 630[/b].

625.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] east over the mountain range
625.text: Warm air from the east motivates you to persist east across the mountain range. Go to 424[/b] and gain 1 morale.

626.text: The building features ample handholds and footholds, though you’re careful not to slice yourself on the sharp metal. Go to 492[/b].

626.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south around the outskirts of a maze, scouting it as much as possible
626.text: You catch occasional glimpses of the maze as you walk, giving you a slight advantage if you decide to journey through it later. Gain 1 boost and 1 look[/b]; go to 621[/b].

626.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] a fence to head west
626.text: A jolt of electricity strikes as you grab the top of the fence (unless you previously disarmed the fence, suffer 1 heat damage). Go to 403[/b].

627.text: You stay clear of the dozens of cables draping outward from the city center and dash to the frozen wastes to the east. Go to 628[/b].

627.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] north across the icy cables
627.text: You figure there must be an easier way to enter the city, but you haven’t seen one yet. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city 521[/b], gain 1 random skill, and gain 1 morale.
Go to 493[/b] and gain 1 morale.

627.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south past an angry-looking sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
627.text: An intimidating sentient has their back turned to you. Either confront them (go to 622[/b]) or go southeast to 623[/b] or southwest to 621[/b].

628.text: The land drops off just beyond the crystals, leading down toward fields of green. Go to 494[/b].

629.text: You dodge through tentacles swinging like huge, slow pendulums around you. Go to 495[/b].

630.text: After cresting the hill, the temperature rises rapidly to something more comfortable, and the snow gives way to sand. Go to 425[/b].

631.text: You push away from the seaweed to a place where you can stand out of the water. Go to 363[/b].
Your lungs plead for fresh air as you head for the surface. Go to 381[/b].

632.text: You swim against the current to stay clear of the dangerous flora. Go to 638[/b].

632.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] north through the swinging stalks
632.text: Roll 5 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Lose 1 health as the plants slash toward you unless you pay 1 look[/b]. Go to 633[/b].
You’re eager to escape from the violent flora. Go to 426[/b].

633.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] south through the aggressive vegetation
633.text: Roll 5 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Lose 1 health as the plants slash toward you unless you pay 1 look[/b]. Go to 632[/b].
Bubbles released by the fish push you toward the shallows. Go to 427[/b].

634.text: As intriguing and mysteriously well-lit as the depths appear, you are eager for a breath of fresh air. Go to 428[/b].

635.text: The bioluminescent roots help to guide you toward the shallows. Go to 429[/b].

636.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north, struggling against the twisters

choices.outcome: Go north to 476[/b] and gain 1 morale.

You are caught in the second sea spout, which sends you rocketing out of the water. Roll a skill die and go to a location based on the result: move[/b] (476[/b]); look[/b] (361[/b]); engage[/b] (667[/b]); help[/b] (434[/b]); take[/b] (649[/b]); overpower[/b] (752[/b]).

637.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north as seaweed slaps into you
637.text: Tendrils of seaweed wrap around your appendages, some leaving painful welts as you pull away. Go to 638[/b] and lose 1 health.
As you emerge from the ocean, the breeze skimming along the water warns you of a storm to the east. Go to 364[/b].

638.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south through the whipping seaweed
638.text: Any piece of seaweed that comes into contact with your skin leaves you with open sores. Go to 637[/b] and lose 1 health.

638.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] west as the giant seaweed waves around you
638.text: Countless bioluminescent tendrils light your way. Go to 632[/b].

639.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] north through the dense cables
639.text: The thick cables sway in the current as you swim by. Go to 640[/b].

640.text: A guard stops you and asks for identification. If you have the water emblem, go to 641[/b]. If not, stay here, gain 1 boost, and continue.

640.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] south through the dense cables
640.text: You manage to pull yourself through the heavy cables undulating slowly in the current. Go to 639[/b].

641.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north, admiring the city below
641.text: The city glows with the bioluminescence of a million organisms. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You find a less populated area to enter the ocean metropolis. Go to city 528[/b].
Go to 642[/b].

642.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the animal to the surface (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
642.text: The beast is massive, but it’s also quite slow. Go to 477[/b].

642.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south into or around an underwater city
642.text: You swim deeper into the ocean, the pressure building in your ears. Go either to city 528[/b] or to 641[/b].

643.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north deeper into the ocean
643.text: You underestimated the strength of the waterspout. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. Then choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to 644[/b].

choices.option: Leave yourself at the whim of the waterspout
choices.outcome: Lose 1 health and go to 512[/b].

643.text: The closer you swim to the shallows in this area, the more you are at the whim of the tide. Go to 365[/b].

644.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south around the water spout
644.text: To avoid being dragged to the sea floor, you give the vortex a wide berth. Go to 643[/b].

645.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] north past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
645.text: The sentient, impressed by your strength, lets you pass. Go to 646[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

646.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north past the sentient, bowing respectfully
646.text: In appreciation, the creature cushions your head in a bubble. Ignore the hypoxia damage when you arrive at 647[/b].

648.text: Catching your scent, a pair of sharks chases after you. Roll 2 skill dice; if the results include at least 1 move[/b] or 1 overpower[/b], go north to 478[/b]. Otherwise, lose 1 health and go to an adjacent listed location.

649.text: You’re unsure of the dangers that lurk around or inside the shipwreck, so you head to the shallows. Go to 366[/b].

650.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] north past the weakened sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
650.text: You dart smoothly through the water, only to come face to face with several angry animals. Go to 651[/b].

651.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the herd of animals (if the animals are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
651.text: You swim past several large egg-like containers hidden on the ocean floor. Go to 652[/b].

652.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the remaining guards
652.text: You grow still and calm your heartbeat, drifting above guards. Go to 653[/b].

653.text: You swim quietly over several guards without catching their attention. Go to 652[/b].

654.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] north through the seemingly endless colony of anemones
654.text: Roll 2 skill dice. For each engage[/b] and overpower[/b] result, suffer 1 heat damage as the anemones sting you. Then go to 479[/b].

655.text: Fresh air fills your lungs when you reach the shallows. Go to 448[/b].
You gulp for air as you break through to the surface. Go to 367[/b].

656.text: These dark ocean depths give you the creeps. Go to 449[/b].

657.text: Underwater monsters have a huge advantage over you in their natural environment; you didn’t even learn to swim until recently. Go to 450[/b].

657.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
657.text: You swim behind rock formations and the bubbles rising from glowing vents and manage not to draw the hulking sea monster’s attention. Go to 658[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

658.text: You swim away from these dark waters, cresting the ocean surface. Go to 451[/b].

658.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south around a massive elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
658.text: You can only be so subtle moving around in the water, but to your relief the gargantuan creature either doesn’t notice or doesn’t take interest in you. Go to 657[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

659.text: The graveyard may be a sacred place to the water sentients, but it chills you to the bone. Go to 452[/b].
The gravekeeper offers you safe passage. Go to 660[/b].

660.text: You were once stung by a jellyfish, and you discovered soon after that it’s a myth that urinating on such a sting will alleviate the pain. You swim east away from them. Go to 453[/b].
The sunbeams guide you toward the surface. Go to 480[/b].

661.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north over the rushing water
661.text: You pass by the vehicle on your way north. Choose one:

choices.option: Hijack the vehicle (if available; pay 1 take)
choices.outcome: You take the opportunity to grab the reins and steer it as you wish. Gain vehicle 1013[/b] with 1 boost on it, then go to 666[/b].

choices.option: Ignore the vehicle (or if it is not available)
choices.outcome: Go to 666[/b].

661.text: The lush hills turn into an eerie, soggy marsh the farther south you reach. Go to 245[/b].
The ocean floor drops just a few meters from the shore, enough that you can’t see the bottom. Go to 368[/b].

662.text: A bright light under the waterfall beckons to you as you head north. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to cave 028[/b].
Go to 667[/b].

662.text: You can feel the humidity increase when you reach the marsh. Go to 246[/b].

663.text: Bat-like animals dart in long flocks through the sky as you quietly wade around some sentients talking in a river. Go to 247[/b].

664.text: The river is deep, and the bottom becomes muckier as you cross it. Go to 248[/b].

665.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] north through the long grass
665.text: The grass is so thick that you can’t see anything below your waist. Go to 670[/b].

665.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south across a narrow river
665.text: The river bottom is especially mucky, but otherwise the wade is pleasant. Go to 249[/b].

666.text: A bridge across the stream is occupied, so you wade quietly through the water instead. Go to 667[/b].

666.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] south off the waterfall onto the soft grass below
666.text: You tuck into a roll expertly as you land, but the turtle-like creature nearby seems unimpressed. Go to 661[/b].
This babbling brook leads into a vast ocean at the forest edge. Go to 448[/b].

667.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the ceremony (if you already interacted with the ceremony, reduce this cost to 1)
667.text: You quietly observe the ceremony as you head north. Gain 1 boost and go to 672[/b].
You crash through the trees and bushes into a clearing. Go to 662[/b].
With respect to the celebrants, you try to splash as little as possible. Go to 666[/b].

668.text: The forest is so dense that you can’t see farther than a few paces ahead. Go to 673[/b].

669.text: You climb over mossy fallen logs and cut hanging vines as you push northward. Go to 674[/b].

670.text: The grove leads into a vast, hilly forest. Go to 675[/b].

670.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] south through the long grass
670.text: The field slopes slightly downward as you stroll to the south. Go to 665[/b].

671.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] west into the shallows of a sea
671.text: The water is cool and refreshing, but you can’t shake the sense that you’re being watched. Go to 449[/b].

672.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north around the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
672.text: You walk silently through the lush grass toward a towering city in the distance. Go to 677[/b].

672.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south past a ceremony (if you already interacted with the ceremony, reduce this cost to 1)
672.text: There is love in the air as you head south through the forest. Go to 667[/b].

673.text: The grassy path is well maintained; it’s much more difficult to traverse through the thicket. Go to 678[/b].
Overgrown fallen trees are everywhere, their limbs akimbo, and it’s real exercise to climb over all of them. Go to 668[/b].

674.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north into the dense forest
674.text: Berries squish under your toes as you blaze past the path left by the animal. Go to 679[/b].

674.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] south out of the forest into a field
674.text: It takes a moment for your eyes to adjust to the bright light of the sun in the open pasture, and when they do you notice red fungi stretching across it. Go to 669[/b].

675.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north through the thick underbrush
675.text: A trick of the light makes the animal in the distance appear ethereal. Go to 680[/b].

675.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] south out of the forest into a meadow
675.text: As you emerge from the shadows of the forest, a glowing glyph hovers curiously above a stone. Go to 670[/b].

676.text: You peek inside the building as you walk past, catching sight of a book, a key, a knife, and a crystal. Go to 681[/b].
You step down the leafy embankment and walk out into the cool water until it comes up to your waist. Go to 450[/b].

677.text: Tendrils of smoke trace up the long trunk of the massive tree-city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city 519[/b] and gain 1 random skill.
Go to 682[/b].

678.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] south out of the grove
678.text: The forest is alive with gentle bird calls, quietly chatting sentients, and the occasional howl. Go to 673[/b].

679.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] north past the fungal animal (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce the cost to 1)
679.text: The animal shoves you, and within seconds you’re surrounded by dozens of similar creatures. You must immediately choose either to engage[/b] them or to overpower[/b] them:
